<utils/blockapi.ts>
import axios from "axios"

interface TimetableItem {
  SCHEME: string
  SUBJECT_CODE: string 
  TOTAL_STUDENTS: number
  TIME_SLOT: string
}

export const fetchTimetable = async (date: string, session: string) => {
  try {
    const response = await axios.get(`/api/timetable/?date=${date}&session=${session}`)
    return response.data.map((item: TimetableItem, ix: number) => ({
      ID: ix + 1,
      SCHEME: item.SCHEME,
      SUBJECT_CODE: item.SUBJECT_CODE,
      TOTAL_STUDENTS: item.TOTAL_STUDENTS,
      TIME_SLOT: item.TIME_SLOT,
    }))
  } catch {
    throw new Error("Failed to fetch timetable. Please try again.")
  }
}

export const fetchSupervisors = async () => {
  try {
    const response = await fetch(`/api/supervisors/`)
    return await response.json()
  } catch {
    throw new Error("Failed to fetch supervisors. Please try again.")
  }
}

interface BlockAllocationPayload {
  blocks: Array<{
    id: number
    supervisorId: number 
  }>
}

export const updateBlockAllocation = async (payload: BlockAllocationPayload) => {
  try {
    const response = await fetch(`/api/blocks/`, {
      method: "POST",
      headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" },
      body: JSON.stringify(payload),
    })
    if (!response.ok) throw new Error("Failed to update block allocation")
    return true
  } catch {
    throw new Error("Failed to update block allocation")
  }
}

</utils/blockapi.ts>

<utils/tables.ts>
import pool from "@/lib/db";

export const ensureSupervisorTableExists = async (eccode: string) => {
    const createTableQuery = `
    CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS TH_SUP_${eccode} (
      UID VARCHAR(50) PRIMARY KEY,
      NAME VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL,
      DEPARTMENT VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL,
      ROLE VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL,
      EMAIL VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'default@testforge.software'
    );
  `;
    try {
        await pool.execute(createTableQuery);
    } catch (error) {
        console.error('Error ensuring supervisor table exists:', error);
        throw error;
    }
};

export const ensureControllerTableExists = async (ec_code: string) => {
    const createTableQuery = `
    CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS TH_CROOM_${ec_code} (
      id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
      name VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL,
      designation VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL,
      post_held_in_examination VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL
    );
  `;
    try {
        await pool.execute(createTableQuery);
    } catch (error) {
        console.error('Error ensuring controller table exists:', error);
        throw error;
    }
};

export const ensureExamCenterTableExists = async () => {
    const createTableQuery = `
        CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS THC_EC_CONFIG (
            ID INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
            EC_CODE VARCHAR(255) UNIQUE NOT NULL,
            EC_INFO JSON NOT NULL,
            CON_INST JSON,
            EXAM_INFO JSON,
            DC_INFO JSON,
            DEPARTMENTS JSON DEFAULT (JSON_ARRAY()),
            isActive BOOLEAN DEFAULT TRUE,
            CREATED_AT TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
            UPDATED_AT TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
        );
    `;
    try {
        await pool.execute(createTableQuery);
    } catch (error) {
        console.error('Error ensuring table exists:', error);
        throw error;
    }
};

export async function ensureBlockConfigTableExists(eccode: string) {
    const tableName = `TH_BLOCK_CONFIG_${eccode}`;
    try {
        const conn = await pool.getConnection();
        try {
            await conn.execute(`
                CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS ${tableName} (
                    ID INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
                    INST_CODE VARCHAR(50),
                    DATE DATE,
                    SESSION VARCHAR(50),
                    TIMESLOT VARCHAR(80),
                    BLOCKNO VARCHAR(100),
                    LOCATION VARCHAR(100),
                    SCHEME VARCHAR(50),
                    SUBJECT_CODE VARCHAR(20),
                    SUBJECT_NAME VARCHAR(100),
                    SEAT_NUMBERS JSON,
                    FIRST INT,
                    LAST INT,
                    ASSIGNED INT,
                    STRENGTH INT,
                    SUPERVISOR_UID VARCHAR(50),
                    SUPERVISOR_NAME VARCHAR(100)
                );
            `);
        } finally {
            conn.release();
        }
    } catch (error) {
        console.error('Error ensuring block config table exists:', error);
        throw error;
    }
}

export async function ensureSupervisionOrderTableExists(eccode: string) {
    const tableName = `TH_SUP_ORD_${eccode}`;
    try {
        const conn = await pool.getConnection();
        try {
            await conn.execute(`
                CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS ${tableName} (
                    ID INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
                    DATE DATE NOT NULL,
                    SESSION ENUM('MORNING', 'EVENING', 'AFTERNOON') NOT NULL,
                    SUPERVISOR_UID VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL,
                    ASSIGNED_AT TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
                    FOREIGN KEY (SUPERVISOR_UID) REFERENCES TH_SUP_${eccode}(UID)
                );
            `);
        } catch (error) {
            console.error(`Error ensuring supervision order table exists for EC ${eccode}:`, error);
            throw error;
        } finally {
            conn.release();
        }
    } catch (error) {
        console.error(`Error getting connection for supervision order table EC ${eccode}:`, error);
        throw error;
    }
}


export async function ensureRelieversTableExists(eccode: string) {
    const tableName = `TH_REL_${eccode}`;
    try {
        const conn = await pool.getConnection();
        try {
            await conn.execute(`
                CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS ${tableName} (
                    ID INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
                    UID VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL,
                    NAME VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL,
                    DEPARTMENT VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL,
                    EMAIL VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL
                );
            `);
        } catch (error) {
            console.error(`Error ensuring relievers table exists for EC ${eccode}:`, error);
            throw error;
        } finally {
            conn.release();
        }
    } catch (error) {
        console.error(`Error getting connection for relievers table EC ${eccode}:`, error);
        throw error;
    }
}

export async function ensureRelieverOrderTableExists(eccode: string) {
    const tableName = `TH_REL_ORD_${eccode}`;
    try {
        const conn = await pool.getConnection();
        try {
            await conn.execute(`
                CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS ${tableName} (
                    ID INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
                    DATE DATE NOT NULL,
                    SESSION ENUM('MORNING', 'AFTERNOON') NOT NULL,
                    RELIEVER_ID INT NOT NULL,   
                    RELIEVER_UID VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL,
                    ASSIGNED_AT TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
                    FOREIGN KEY (RELIEVER_ID) REFERENCES TH_REL_${eccode}(ID)
                );
            `);
        } catch (error) {
            console.error(`Error ensuring reliever order table exists for EC ${eccode}:`, error);
            throw error;
        } finally {
            conn.release();
        }
    } catch (error) {
        console.error(`Error getting connection for reliever order table EC ${eccode}:`, error);
        throw error;
    }
}
</utils/tables.ts>

</config/help-desk-context.json>

<components/misc/TimetableFetcher.jsx>
"use client";

import React, { useState } from 'react';
import axios from 'axios';
import { Card } from '../ui/card';
import { Input } from '../ui/input';
import { Button } from '../ui/button';
import { Alert, AlertDescription } from '../ui/alert';
import { AlertCircle } from 'lucide-react';
import { toast } from 'react-toastify';
import { RadioGroup, RadioGroupItem } from '../ui/radio-group';
import { Label } from '../ui/label';
import { Switch } from '../ui/switch';

const TimetableFetcher = ({ timetableState, setTimetableState }) => {
    const [date, setDate] = useState(new Date().toISOString().split("T")[0]);
    const [session, setSession] = useState('');
    const [loading, setLoading] = useState(false);
    const [error, setError] = useState('');
    const [followSupervisionOrder, setFollowSupervisionOrder] = useState(true);

    const fetchSupervisors = async () => {
        const url = followSupervisionOrder 
            ? `/api/supervisors?date=${date}&session=${session}`
            : '/api/supervisors';
        const response = await axios.get(url);
        return response.data;
    };

    const fetchTimetable = async () => {
        const response = await axios.get(`/api/timetable/?date=${date}&session=${session}`);
        return response.data;
    };

    const handleFetch = async () => {
        if (!session || !date) {
            setError("Please select both session and date.");
            toast.warn("Select session and date");
            return;
        }
        setLoading(true);
        setError('');

        try {
            // Step 1: Fetch timetable and check for block allocation
            const timetableData = await fetchTimetable();
            const formattedTimetable = timetableData.map((item, ix) => ({
                ID: ix + 1,
                SCHEME: item.SCHEME,
                SUBJECT_CODE: item.SUBJECT_CODE,
                TOTAL_STUDENTS: item.TOTAL_STUDENTS,
                TIME_SLOT: item.TIME_SLOT,
                IS_BLOCK_ALLOCATED: item.isBlockAllocated,
            }));

            if (timetableData[0]?.isBlockAllocated) {
                throw new Error("Block allocation already exists for this date and session.");
            }

            // Step 2: Fetch supervisors and ensure they exist
            const supervisorData = await fetchSupervisors();
            if (!Array.isArray(supervisorData) || supervisorData.length === 0) {
                throw new Error(`No supervisors found for date ${date} and session ${session}`);
            }

            // Step 3: If no block allocation and supervisors exist, proceed
            const timetableWithMeta = {
                DATE: date,
                SESSION: session,
                TIMETABLE: formattedTimetable,
                followSupervisionOrder
            };

            localStorage.setItem('tt_rem', JSON.stringify(timetableWithMeta));
            setTimetableState(true);
        } catch (err) {
            const message = axios.isAxiosError(err) ? err.response?.data?.message : err.message;
            setError(message || 'An unexpected error occurred.');
        } finally {
            setLoading(false);
        }
    };

    return (
        <Card className="p-6 shadow-lg rounded-lg w-full max-w-md">
            <h2 className="text-xl font-bold mb-4">Fetch Timetable</h2>
            
            <div className="flex items-center justify-between mb-4 p-2 bg-muted/50 rounded-lg">
                <Label htmlFor="supervision-order" className="text-sm font-medium">
                    Follow Supervision Order
                </Label>
                <Switch
                    id="supervision-order"
                    checked={followSupervisionOrder}
                    onCheckedChange={setFollowSupervisionOrder}
                />
            </div>

            <Input
                type="date"
                value={date}
                onChange={(e) => setDate(e.target.value)}
                className="mb-4"
                placeholder="Select Date"
            />
            <div className="mb-4 flex">
                <RadioGroup value={session} onValueChange={setSession} className="flex gap-8 w-full">
                    <div className="flex items-center space-x-2">
                        <RadioGroupItem value="Morning" id="morning" />
                        <Label htmlFor="morning">Morning</Label>
                    </div>
                    <div className="flex items-center space-x-2">
                        <RadioGroupItem value="Afternoon" id="afternoon" />
                        <Label htmlFor="afternoon">Afternoon</Label>
                    </div>
                </RadioGroup>
            </div>
            <Button onClick={handleFetch} className="w-full mb-4" disabled={loading}>
                {loading ? "Loading..." : "Load Timetable"}
            </Button>
            {error && (
                <Alert variant="destructive" className="flex items-center gap-4">
                    <AlertCircle className="h-5 w-5 text-red-500" />
                    <AlertDescription className="text-sm">{error}</AlertDescription>
                </Alert>
            )}
        </Card>
    );
};

export default TimetableFetcher;
</components/misc/TimetableFetcher.jsx>

<components/misc/DialogBox.tsx>
import React from "react";
import {
    AlertDialog,
    AlertDialogAction,
    AlertDialogCancel,
    AlertDialogContent,
    AlertDialogDescription,
    AlertDialogFooter,
    AlertDialogHeader,
    AlertDialogTitle,
} from "@/components/ui/alert-dialog";
import { AlertCircle, CheckCircle } from 'lucide-react';

interface ConfirmationDialogProps {
    type: "error" | "success" | "info"; // Extend this as needed
    message: string;
    onConfirm: () => void;
    onCancel: () => void;
    confirmButtonText?: string; // Optional custom confirm button text
    cancelButtonText?: string; // Optional custom cancel button text
}

const ConfirmationDialog: React.FC<ConfirmationDialogProps> = ({
    type,
    message,
    onConfirm,
    onCancel,
    confirmButtonText = "Confirm", // Default text
    cancelButtonText = "Cancel", // Default text
}) => {
    if (!message) return null;

    const isError = type === "error";
    const icon = isError ? (
        <AlertCircle className="h-5 w-5 text-red-500 mr-2" aria-hidden="true" />
    ) : (
        <CheckCircle className="h-5 w-5 text-green-500 mr-2" aria-hidden="true" />
    );

    const title = isError ? "Error" : "Confirmation";

    return (
        <AlertDialog open={!!message} onOpenChange={onCancel}>
            <AlertDialogContent>
                <AlertDialogHeader>
                    <AlertDialogTitle className="flex items-center">
                        {icon}
                        {title}
                    </AlertDialogTitle>
                    <AlertDialogDescription>{message}</AlertDialogDescription>
                </AlertDialogHeader>
                <AlertDialogFooter>
                    <AlertDialogCancel onClick={onCancel}>
                        {cancelButtonText}
                    </AlertDialogCancel>
                    <AlertDialogAction onClick={onConfirm}>
                        {confirmButtonText}
                    </AlertDialogAction>
                </AlertDialogFooter>
            </AlertDialogContent>
        </AlertDialog>
    );
};

export default ConfirmationDialog;
</components/misc/DialogBox.tsx>

<components/misc/DateSession.tsx>
import type React from "react"
import { Card, CardContent, CardHeader, CardTitle } from "@/components/ui/card"
import { Input } from "@/components/ui/input"

import { Label } from "@/components/ui/label"
import { CalendarIcon } from "lucide-react"

interface DateSessionProps {
  onSubmit: (date: string, session: string) => void
  date: string
  session: string
  setDate: (date: string) => void
  setSession: (session: string) => void
  isLoading: boolean
}

const DateSession: React.FC<DateSessionProps> = ({ onSubmit, date, session, setDate, setSession, isLoading }) => {
  const handleSubmit = () => {
    onSubmit(date, session)

  return (
    <Card className="w-full max-w-md">
      <CardHeader>

      </CardHeader>
      <CardContent className="space-y-4">

        <div className="flex flex-col space-y-1.5">
          <Label>Session</Label>

              <RadioGroupItem value="Morning" id="morning" />
              <Label htmlFor="morning">Morning</Label>
            </div>
            <div className="flex items-center space-x-2">
              <RadioGroupItem value="Afternoon" id="afternoon" />
              <Label htmlFor="afternoon">Afternoon</Label>
            </div>
          </RadioGroup>
        </div>
        <Button onClick={handleSubmit} className="w-full" disabled={isLoading}>
          {isLoading ? "Fetching..." : "Fetch Data"}
        </Button>
      </CardContent>
    </Card>

}

<components/blocks/BlockDetailsTable.tsx>
import React from "react";
import { Card, CardContent } from "@/components/ui/card";
import { Table, TableBody, TableCell, TableRow } from "@/components/ui/table";

const BlockDetailsTable = ({
  blockDetails,
  blockKeys,
}: {
  blockDetails: { [key: string]: { Name: string; Strength: number } };
  blockKeys: string[];
}) => (
  <Card className="overflow-hidden border border-gray-300 shadow-md rounded-xl mb-6 bg-white dark:bg-gray-900">
    <CardContent className="p-4">
      <div className="overflow-x-auto">
        <Table className="w-full text-sm border-collapse">
          <TableBody>
            {["Name", "Strength"].map((label) => (
              <TableRow
                key={label}
                className="hover:bg-gray-100 dark:hover:bg-gray-800 transition-colors duration-150"
              >
                <TableCell className="font-semibold sticky left-0 bg-gray-200 dark:bg-gray-700 z-10 border border-gray-300 dark:border-gray-600 px-6 py-4 text-gray-900 dark:text-gray-100 rounded-l-lg">
                  {label}
                </TableCell>
                {blockKeys.map((key) => (
                  <TableCell
                    key={key}
                    className="text-center border border-gray-300 dark:border-gray-600 px-6 py-4 text-gray-800 dark:text-gray-200"
                  >
                    {label === "Name" ? blockDetails[key]?.Name : blockDetails[key]?.Strength ?? "N/A"}
                  </TableCell>
                ))}
              </TableRow>
            ))}
          </TableBody>
        </Table>
      </div>
    </CardContent>
  </Card>
);

export default BlockDetailsTable;

<components/blocks/BlockAllocation.tsx>
import React, { useEffect, useState, useMemo } from "react";
import { toast } from "react-toastify";
import Skeleton from "react-loading-skeleton";
import { Alert, AlertDescription } from "@/components/ui/alert";
import TimetableFetcher from "@/components/misc/TimetableFetcher";
import ConfirmationDialog from "@/components/misc/DialogBox";
import BlockDetailsTable from "@/components/blocks/BlockDetailsTable";
import StudentInfoTable from "@/components/blocks/StudentInfoTable";
import BlockAssignmentForm from "@/components/blocks/BlockAssignmentForm";
import BlockDistributionTable from "@/components/blocks/BlockDistributionTable";
import { AlertCircle } from "lucide-react";
import axios from "axios";

interface BlockDetail {
  Strength: number;
  Name: string;
  currentStrength: number;
}

interface Student {
  ID: number;
  SCHEME: string;
  TOTAL_STUDENTS: number;
  REMAINING_STUDENTS: number;
  SUBJECT_CODE: string;
  TIME_SLOT: string;
  IS_BLOCK_ALLOCATED: boolean;
}

interface StudentsDataType {
  DATE: string;
  SESSION: string;
  TIMETABLE: Student[];
  followSupervisionOrder: boolean;
}

interface FormDataType {
  totalEligibleCandidates: number;
  scheme: string;
  blockName: string;
  selectedSupervisor: string;
  numberOfCandidates: number;
}

interface BlockAllocationData {
  blockName: string;
  scheme: string;
  startFrom: number;
  numberOfCandidates: number;
  subCode: string;
  timeslot: string;
  supervisor: string;
}

const initialFormData: FormDataType = {
  totalEligibleCandidates: 0,
  scheme: '',
  blockName: '',
  selectedSupervisor: '',
  numberOfCandidates: 0
};

const BlockAllocation = () => {
  const [blockDetails, setBlockDetails] = useState<{ [key: string]: BlockDetail }>({});
  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);
  const [error, setError] = useState<string | null>(null);
  const [formData, setFormData] = useState<FormDataType>(initialFormData);
  const [selectedStrength, setSelectedStrength] = useState<number | null>(null);
  const [timetableState, setTimetableState] = useState<boolean>(false);
  const [studentsData, setStudentsData] = useState<StudentsDataType>({ DATE: '', SESSION: '', TIMETABLE: [], followSupervisionOrder: false });
  const [blockData, setBlockData] = useState<BlockAllocationData[]>([]);
  const [dialogMessage, setDialogMessage] = useState<string | null>(null);
  const [dialogType, setDialogType] = useState<"error" | "success" | "info" | null>(null);
  const [dialogAction, setDialogAction] = useState<(() => void) | null>(null);
  const [allocatedSupervisors, setAllocatedSupervisors] = useState<Map<string, string>>(new Map());

  useEffect(() => {
    const fetchBlockDetails = async () => {
      try {
        const response = await fetch("/api/block");
        if (!response.ok) throw new Error("Failed to fetch");

        const data = await response.json();
        setBlockDetails(data);
      } catch (error) {
        const message = axios.isAxiosError(error) ? error.response?.data.message : "Failed to load block details.";
        setError(message);
      } finally {
        setLoading(false);
      }
    };

    fetchBlockDetails();
  }, []);


  useEffect(() => {
    const ttData = localStorage.getItem("tt_rem");
    const tmpBlock = localStorage.getItem("tmp_alloc");
    if (tmpBlock) setBlockData(JSON.parse(tmpBlock));
    if (ttData) {
      const parsedData = JSON.parse(ttData) as StudentsDataType;
      setStudentsData(parsedData);
      setTimetableState(true);
      if (parsedData.TIMETABLE?.length) {
        const firstEntry = parsedData.TIMETABLE[0];
        setFormData(prev => ({
          ...prev,
          totalEligibleCandidates: firstEntry.TOTAL_STUDENTS,
          scheme: firstEntry.SCHEME,
        }));
      }
    }
  }, [timetableState]);

  const handleInputChange = ({ name, value }: { name: string; value: string | number }) => {
    setFormData(prev => ({ ...prev, [name]: value }));
    if (name === "blockName") setSelectedStrength(blockDetails[value as string]?.currentStrength ?? null);
  };

  const clearForm = (data: StudentsDataType) => {
    setFormData(initialFormData);
    const firstEntry = data.TIMETABLE[0];
    setFormData(prev => ({
      ...prev,
      totalEligibleCandidates: firstEntry?.TOTAL_STUDENTS || 0,
      scheme: firstEntry?.SCHEME || '',
    }));
    setSelectedStrength(null);
  };

  const handleSubmit = (e: React.FormEvent) => {
    e.preventDefault();
    if(!formData.selectedSupervisor){
      toast.warn("Select a supervisor")
      return;}
    const existingAllocations = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem("tmp_alloc") || "[]") as BlockAllocationData[];
    if (formData.selectedSupervisor) {
      setAllocatedSupervisors((prev) => new Map(prev).set(formData.blockName, formData.selectedSupervisor));
    }
    const schemeAllocations = existingAllocations.filter((alloc) => alloc.scheme === formData.scheme);
    const totalAllocated = schemeAllocations.reduce((sum, alloc) => sum + Number(alloc.numberOfCandidates), 0);
    const startFrom = totalAllocated + 1;
    const selectedStudent = studentsData.TIMETABLE.find((student) => student.SCHEME === formData.scheme);
    const allocationData: BlockAllocationData = {
      blockName: formData.blockName,
      scheme: formData.scheme,
      startFrom,
      numberOfCandidates: Number(formData.numberOfCandidates),
      subCode: selectedStudent?.SUBJECT_CODE || "",
      timeslot: selectedStudent?.TIME_SLOT || "",
      supervisor: formData.selectedSupervisor,
    };
    const updatedAllocations = [...existingAllocations, allocationData];
    localStorage.setItem("tmp_alloc", JSON.stringify(updatedAllocations));
    setBlockData(updatedAllocations);
    const updatedStudentsData = studentsData.TIMETABLE.map((student) =>
      student.SCHEME === formData.scheme
        ? { ...student, TOTAL_STUDENTS: student.TOTAL_STUDENTS - formData.numberOfCandidates }
        : student
    ).filter((student) => student.TOTAL_STUDENTS > 0);
    const updatedData = { ...studentsData, TIMETABLE: updatedStudentsData };
    localStorage.setItem("tt_rem", JSON.stringify(updatedData));
    setStudentsData(updatedData);
    setBlockDetails((prev) => ({
      ...prev,
      [formData.blockName]: {
        ...prev[formData.blockName],
        currentStrength: prev[formData.blockName].currentStrength - formData.numberOfCandidates,
      },
    }));
    toast.success(`Successfully allocated ${formData.numberOfCandidates} students to ${formData.blockName}`);
    clearForm(updatedData);
  };

  const blockKeys = useMemo(() => Object.keys(blockDetails), [blockDetails]);

  if (loading) return <SkeletonGrid />;
  if (error) return <ErrorAlert message={error} />;

  return (
    <div className="grid gap-6 max-h-[calc(100vh-7rem)] overflow-y-auto p-6">
      <BlockDetailsTable blockDetails={blockDetails} blockKeys={blockKeys} />
      {!timetableState ? (
        <div className="flex items-center justify-center gap-4">
          <TimetableFetcher timetableState={timetableState} setTimetableState={setTimetableState} />
        </div>
      ) : (
        <div className="flex items-center h-fit justify-evenly gap-4 w-full md:flex-row flex-col">
          {studentsData.TIMETABLE.length ? (
            <>
              <StudentInfoTable studentsData={studentsData} className="w-full" />
              <BlockAssignmentForm
                className="w-full"
                allocatedSupervisors={allocatedSupervisors}
                blockDetails={blockDetails}
                formData={formData}
                studentsData={studentsData}
                selectedStrength={selectedStrength}
                blockKeys={blockKeys}
                handleInputChange={handleInputChange}
                handleSubmit={handleSubmit}
                clearForm={clearForm}
              />
            </>
          ) : null}
          <BlockDistributionTable
            className="w-full"
            blockData={blockData}
            remainingDetails={studentsData.TIMETABLE}
            setDialogMessage={setDialogMessage}
            setDialogType={setDialogType as React.Dispatch<React.SetStateAction<string | null>>}
            setDialogAction={setDialogAction}
          />
        </div>
      )}
      <ConfirmationDialog
        type={dialogType || "info"}
        message={dialogMessage || ""}
        onConfirm={() => {
          if (dialogAction) dialogAction();
          setDialogMessage(null);
          setDialogType(null);
          setDialogAction(null);
        }}
        onCancel={() => {
          setDialogMessage(null);
          setDialogType(null);
          setDialogAction(null);
        }}
      />
    </div>
  );
};

const SkeletonGrid = () => (
  <div className="grid gap-4 p-6">
    {[...Array(3)].map((_, i) => <Skeleton key={i} className="h-[120px] w-full rounded-xl" />)}
  </div>
);

const ErrorAlert = ({ message }: { message: string }) => (
  <Alert variant="default" className="m-6 flex gap-4">
    <AlertCircle className="h-4 w-4" />
    <AlertDescription>{message}</AlertDescription>
  </Alert>
);

export default BlockAllocation;
</components/blocks/BlockAllocation.tsx>

<components/blocks/StudentInfoTable.tsx>
import React from "react";
import { Card, CardHeader, CardTitle, CardContent } from "@/components/ui/card";
import { ClipboardListIcon, CalendarDaysIcon, AlarmClock } from "lucide-react";

const StudentInfoTable = ({ studentsData, className }: { studentsData: { DATE: string; SESSION: string; TIMETABLE: Array<{ SCHEME: string; SUBJECT_CODE: string; TOTAL_STUDENTS: number }> }, className: string }) => (
  <Card className={`h-full max-w-3xl shadow-lg ${className}`}>
    <CardHeader>
      <CardTitle className="text-xl flex items-center gap-2">
        <ClipboardListIcon className="h-5 w-5" />
        Timetable Info
      </CardTitle>
    </CardHeader>
    <CardContent>
      <div className="flex items-center justify-between mb-4">
        <div className="flex items-center space-x-2">
          <CalendarDaysIcon className="h-4 w-4" />
          <p className="text-sm font-medium">{studentsData.DATE}</p>
        </div>
        <div className="flex items-center space-x-2">
          <AlarmClock className="h-4 w-4" />
          <p className="text-sm font-medium">{studentsData.SESSION}</p>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div className="overflow-x-auto">
        <table className="w-full table-auto border-separate border-spacing-0">
          <thead>
            <tr className="bg-accent text-left text-sm font-semibold">
              <th className="px-6 py-4 border-b">Scheme</th>
              <th className="px-6 py-4 border-b">Subject Code</th>
              <th className="px-6 py-4 border-b">Remaining Students</th>
            </tr>
          </thead>
          <tbody>
            {studentsData.TIMETABLE.map((student, index) => (
              <tr key={index} className="hover:bg-gray-50 transition-colors">
                <td className="px-6 py-4 border-b">{student.SCHEME}</td>
                <td className="px-6 py-4 border-b">{student.SUBJECT_CODE}</td>
                <td className="px-6 py-4 border-b">{student.TOTAL_STUDENTS}</td>
              </tr>
            ))}
          </tbody>
        </table>
      </div>
    </CardContent>
  </Card>
);

export default StudentInfoTable;
</components/blocks/StudentInfoTable.tsx>

<components/blocks/BlockAssignmentForm.tsx>
import React, { useEffect, useState } from "react";
import { Card, CardHeader, CardTitle, CardContent } from "@/components/ui/card";
import { Input } from "@/components/ui/input";
import { Select, SelectContent, SelectItem, SelectTrigger, SelectValue } from "@/components/ui/select";
import { Button } from "@/components/ui/button";
import { Building2 } from "lucide-react";
import { Separator } from "../ui/separator";
import { toast } from "react-toastify";
import { Label } from "@radix-ui/react-dropdown-menu";
import axios from "axios";

interface FormData {
    totalEligibleCandidates: number;
    scheme: string;
    blockName: string;
    selectedSupervisor: string;
    numberOfCandidates: number;
}

interface Student {
    ID: number;
    SCHEME: string;
    TOTAL_STUDENTS: number;
    REMAINING_STUDENTS: number;
    SUBJECT_CODE: string;
    TIME_SLOT: string;
    IS_BLOCK_ALLOCATED: boolean;
}

interface StudentsData {
    DATE: string;
    SESSION: string;
    TIMETABLE: Student[];
    followSupervisionOrder: boolean;
}

interface Supervisor {
    UID: string;
    NAME: string;
    DEPARTMENT?: string;
}

interface BlockAssignmentFormProps {
    className: string;
    formData: FormData;
    allocatedSupervisors: Map<string, string>;
    selectedStrength: number | null;
    blockKeys: string[];
    handleInputChange: (data: { name: string; value: string | number }) => void;
    handleSubmit: (e: React.FormEvent) => void;
    clearForm: (data: StudentsData) => void;
    blockDetails: { [key: string]: { Name: string; Strength: number } };
    studentsData: StudentsData;
}

const BlockAssignmentForm = ({
    className,
    formData,
    allocatedSupervisors,
    selectedStrength,
    blockKeys,
    handleInputChange,
    handleSubmit,
    clearForm,
    blockDetails,
    studentsData,
}: BlockAssignmentFormProps) => {
    const [supervisorData, setSupervisorData] = useState<Supervisor[]>([]);
    const [filteredSupervisors, setFilteredSupervisors] = useState<Supervisor[]>([]);
    const [search, setSearch] = useState("");
    const [availableSchemes, setAvailableSchemes] = useState<Student[]>([]);

    useEffect(() => {
        const fetchSupervisorData = async () => {
            try {
                const url = studentsData.followSupervisionOrder 
                    ? `/api/supervisors?date=${studentsData.DATE}&session=${studentsData.SESSION}`
                    : '/api/supervisors';
                    
                const response = await axios.get(url);
                setSupervisorData(response.data);
                setFilteredSupervisors(response.data);
            } catch (error) {
                toast.error("Error fetching supervisor data: " + (axios.isAxiosError(error) ? error.response?.data?.message || error.message : error));
            }
        };
        fetchSupervisorData();
    }, [studentsData.DATE, studentsData.SESSION, studentsData.followSupervisionOrder]);

    useEffect(() => {
        if (studentsData.TIMETABLE) {
            setAvailableSchemes(studentsData.TIMETABLE.filter(student => student.TOTAL_STUDENTS > 0));
        }
    }, [studentsData.TIMETABLE]);

    useEffect(() => {
        if (allocatedSupervisors.has(formData.blockName)) {
            const allocatedUID = allocatedSupervisors.get(formData.blockName);
            if (formData.selectedSupervisor !== allocatedUID) {
                handleInputChange({ name: "selectedSupervisor", value: allocatedUID || "" });
            }
        }
    }, [formData.blockName, allocatedSupervisors]);

    useEffect(() => {
        if (formData.scheme) {
            const schemeDepartment = formData.scheme.split('-')[0];
            const filtered = supervisorData.filter(supervisor => {
                const isAllocated = Array.from(allocatedSupervisors.values()).includes(supervisor.UID);
                const isDifferentDepartment = supervisor.DEPARTMENT !== schemeDepartment;
                return !isAllocated && isDifferentDepartment;
            });
            setFilteredSupervisors(filtered);

            if (formData.selectedSupervisor) {
                const currentSupervisor = supervisorData.find(s => s.UID === formData.selectedSupervisor);
                if (currentSupervisor?.DEPARTMENT === schemeDepartment) {
                    handleInputChange({ name: "selectedSupervisor", value: "" });
                    toast.error("Supervisor from same department cannot be selected");
                }
            }
        }
    }, [formData.scheme, supervisorData, allocatedSupervisors]);

    const handleSchemeSelect = (value: string) => {
        const selectedScheme = availableSchemes.find(s => s.SCHEME === value);
        if (selectedScheme) {
            handleInputChange({ name: "scheme", value });
            handleInputChange({ name: "totalEligibleCandidates", value: selectedScheme.TOTAL_STUDENTS });
        }
    };

    const handleSupervisorSelect = (value: string) => {
        const selectedSupervisor = supervisorData.find(s => s.UID === value);
        const schemeDepartment = formData.scheme.split('-')[0];

        if (selectedSupervisor?.DEPARTMENT === schemeDepartment) {
            toast.error("Cannot select supervisor from same department");
            return;
        }

        handleInputChange({ name: "selectedSupervisor", value });
    };

    const handleBlockSelect = (value: string) => {
        handleInputChange({ name: "blockName", value });
        handleInputChange({ name: "numberOfCandidates", value: 0 });
    };

    return (
        <Card className={`${className} mx-auto max-w-4xl shadow-xl`}>
            <CardHeader className="p-6">
                <CardTitle className="text-2xl flex items-center gap-3">
                    <Building2 className="h-6 w-6" />
                    Block Assignment
                </CardTitle>
            </CardHeader>
            <CardContent className="p-6">
                <form onSubmit={handleSubmit} onKeyDown={(e) => e.key === "Enter" && e.preventDefault()} className="space-y-6">
                    <div className="grid gap-6 md:grid-cols-2">
                        <div className="space-y-2">
                            <label className="text-sm font-semibold">Scheme</label>
                            <Select
                                value={formData.scheme}
                                onValueChange={handleSchemeSelect}
                                required
                            >
                                <SelectTrigger className="h-11">
                                    <SelectValue placeholder="Select scheme" />
                                </SelectTrigger>
                                <SelectContent>
                                    {availableSchemes.map((scheme) => (
                                        <SelectItem key={scheme.SCHEME} value={scheme.SCHEME}>
                                            {scheme.SCHEME} ({scheme.TOTAL_STUDENTS} students)
                                        </SelectItem>
                                    ))}
                                </SelectContent>
                            </Select>
                        </div>

                        <div className="space-y-2">
                            <label className="text-sm font-semibold">Total Candidates</label>
                            <Input
                                value={formData.totalEligibleCandidates}
                                readOnly
                                className="bg-muted/50 h-11"
                            />
                        </div>

                        <div className="space-y-2">
                            <label className="text-sm font-semibold">Block Details</label>
                            <div className="grid grid-cols-2 gap-3">
                                <Select
                                    name="blockName"
                                    value={formData.blockName}
                                    required
                                    onValueChange={handleBlockSelect}
                                >
                                    <SelectTrigger className="h-11">
                                        <SelectValue placeholder="Location" />
                                    </SelectTrigger>
                                    <SelectContent>
                                        {blockKeys.map((key) => (
                                            <SelectItem key={key} value={key}>
                                                {`${blockDetails[key]?.Name} (${blockDetails[key]?.Strength ?? "N/A"})`}
                                            </SelectItem>
                                        ))}
                                    </SelectContent>
                                </Select>
                            </div>
                        </div>

                        {selectedStrength !== null && (
                            <div className="space-y-2">
                                <label className="text-sm font-semibold">Current Strength</label>
                                <Input value={selectedStrength} readOnly className="bg-muted/50 h-11" />
                            </div>
                        )}

                        <div className="space-y-2">
                            <label className="text-sm font-semibold">Supervisor</label>
                            {allocatedSupervisors.has(formData.blockName) ? (
                                <div className="space-y-1">
                                    <Input
                                        value={formData.selectedSupervisor}
                                        readOnly
                                        className="bg-muted/50 h-11"
                                    />
                                    <Label className="text-sm text-muted-foreground font-medium block text-center">
                                        {supervisorData.find(s => s.UID === allocatedSupervisors.get(formData.blockName))?.NAME || ""}
                                    </Label>
                                </div>
                            ) : (
                                <Select
                                    value={formData.selectedSupervisor}
                                    onValueChange={handleSupervisorSelect}
                                    required
                                >
                                    <SelectTrigger className="h-11">
                                        <SelectValue placeholder="Choose supervisor (different department)" />
                                    </SelectTrigger>
                                    <SelectContent>
                                        <Input
                                            placeholder="Search..."
                                            value={search}
                                            onChange={(e) => setSearch(e.target.value)}
                                            className="m-3 w-[95%] mx-auto h-10"
                                        />
                                        <Separator className="my-3" />
                                        {filteredSupervisors
                                            .filter(({ NAME, UID }) =>
                                                NAME.toLowerCase().includes(search.toLowerCase()) ||
                                                UID.toLowerCase().includes(search.toLowerCase())
                                            )
                                            .map(({ UID, NAME, DEPARTMENT }) => (
                                                <SelectItem key={UID} value={UID} className="py-2">
                                                    <b>({UID})</b> {NAME} - <i>{DEPARTMENT}</i>
                                                </SelectItem>
                                            ))}
                                    </SelectContent>
                                </Select>
                            )}
                        </div>

                        <div className="space-y-2">
                            <label className="text-sm font-semibold">Candidates to Assign</label>
                            <Input
                                type="number"
                                name="numberOfCandidates"
                                value={formData.numberOfCandidates}
                                onChange={(e) => handleInputChange({ name: "numberOfCandidates", value: e.target.value })}
                                min="1"
                                max={Math.min(formData.totalEligibleCandidates, selectedStrength || 0)}
                                required
                                className="h-11"
                            />
                        </div>
                    </div>

                    <div className="flex items-center justify-between gap-4 mt-8">
                        <Button variant="outline" onClick={() => clearForm(studentsData)} className="h-11 px-6">Clear</Button>
                        <Button
                            type="submit"
                            disabled={!selectedStrength || !formData.scheme || !formData.selectedSupervisor || !formData.numberOfCandidates}
                            className="h-11 px-8"
                        >
                            Save
                        </Button>
                    </div>
                </form>
            </CardContent>
        </Card>
    );
};

export default BlockAssignmentForm;
</components/blocks/BlockAssignmentForm.tsx>

<components/blocks/BlockDistributionTable.tsx>
import type React from "react"
import { useRouter } from "next/navigation"
import { Card, CardContent, CardHeader, CardTitle } from "@/components/ui/card"
import { Table, TableBody, TableCell, TableHead, TableHeader, TableRow } from "@/components/ui/table"
import { Button } from "@/components/ui/button"
import { Layers } from "lucide-react"
import { toast } from "react-toastify"
import { updateBlockAllocation } from "@/utils/blockapi"
import { cn } from "@/lib/utils"
import { useState } from "react"

interface BlockData {
  blockName: string;
  scheme: string;
  startFrom: number;
  numberOfCandidates: number;
  subCode: string;
  timeslot: string;
  supervisor: string;
}


interface RemainingDetails {
  [key: string]: unknown
}
interface Student {
  ID: number;
  SCHEME: string;
  TOTAL_STUDENTS: number;
  REMAINING_STUDENTS: number;
  SUBJECT_CODE: string;
  TIME_SLOT: string;
  IS_BLOCK_ALLOCATED: boolean;
}
interface BlockDistributionTableProps {
  blockData: BlockData[]
  remainingDetails: (RemainingDetails | Student)[]
  setDialogMessage: React.Dispatch<React.SetStateAction<string | null>>
  setDialogType: React.Dispatch<React.SetStateAction<string | null>>
  setDialogAction: React.Dispatch<React.SetStateAction<(() => void) | null>>
  className?: string
}

const BlockDistributionTable: React.FC<BlockDistributionTableProps> = ({
  blockData,
  remainingDetails,
  setDialogMessage,
  setDialogType,
  setDialogAction,
  className,
}) => {
  const router = useRouter()
  const [isLoading, setIsLoading] = useState(false);
  const handleUpdate = async () => {
    try {
      setIsLoading(true);
      const tmpAlloc = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem("tmp_alloc") || "[]")
      const ttRem = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem("tt_rem") || "{}")

      const payload = {
        instituteId: process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_INSTITUTE_CODE,
        date: ttRem.DATE,
        session: ttRem.SESSION,
        blocks: tmpAlloc.map((block: BlockData) => ({
          blockName: block.blockName,
          scheme: block.scheme,
          numberOfCandidates: block.numberOfCandidates.toString(),
          subCode: block.subCode.toString(),
          supervisor: block.supervisor,
          startFrom: block.startFrom.toString(),
          timeslot: block.timeslot,
        })),
      }

      await updateBlockAllocation(payload)
      toast.success("Block allocation updated successfully!")

      localStorage.removeItem("tmp_alloc")
      localStorage.removeItem("tt_rem")
      setTimeout(() => router.back(), 1000)
    } catch (error) {
      setTimeout(() => router.back(), 1000)
      toast.error("Failed to update block allocation " + error)
    }
  }

  const handleClear = () => {
    setDialogMessage("Are you sure you want to clear the data?")
    setDialogType("info")
    setDialogAction(() => () => {
      localStorage.removeItem("tmp_alloc")
      localStorage.removeItem("tt_rem")
      toast.success("Data Cleared Successfully!")
      setTimeout(() => router.back(), 1000)
    })
  }

  return (
    <Card className={cn("shadow-lg", className)}>
      <CardHeader>
        <CardTitle className="text-xl flex items-center gap-2">
          <Layers className="h-5 w-5" />
          Block Distribution
        </CardTitle>
      </CardHeader>
      <CardContent>
        <div className="overflow-x-auto">
          <Table>
            <TableHeader>
              <TableRow>
                <TableHead>Block Name</TableHead>
                <TableHead>Scheme</TableHead>
                <TableHead>Supervisor</TableHead>
              </TableRow>
            </TableHeader>
            <TableBody>
              {blockData.map((block, index) => (
                <TableRow key={index}>
                  <TableCell>{block.blockName}</TableCell>
                  <TableCell>
                    {block.scheme} <i>{block.subCode}</i> <b>({block.numberOfCandidates})</b>
                  </TableCell>
                  <TableCell>{block.supervisor}</TableCell>
                </TableRow>
              ))}
            </TableBody>
          </Table>
        </div>
        <div className="flex items-center mt-4 justify-between">
          <Button variant="destructive" onClick={handleClear}>
            Clear
          </Button>
          <Button
            variant="secondary"
            disabled={remainingDetails.length !== 0 || isLoading}
            onClick={() => {
              setDialogMessage("Are you sure you want to update block allocation?")
              setDialogType("info")
              setDialogAction(() => handleUpdate)
            }}
          >
            {isLoading ? "Updating..." : "Update"}
          </Button>
        </div>
      </CardContent>
    </Card>
  )
}

export default BlockDistributionTable

</components/blocks/BlockDistributionTable.tsx>

<components/main/header.tsx>
"use client";

import { Sun, Moon, Menu, LogOutIcon, Bell, Settings, User, MessageSquare, BookOpen } from 'lucide-react';
import { useTheme } from "next-themes";
import { Button } from "@/components/ui/button";
import Link from "next/link";
import { Show, useClerk, useUser } from '@clerk/nextjs';
import { Tooltip, TooltipContent, TooltipProvider, TooltipTrigger } from '@radix-ui/react-tooltip';
import { DropdownMenu, DropdownMenuContent, DropdownMenuItem, DropdownMenuTrigger } from '@/components/ui/dropdown-menu';
import { Avatar, AvatarImage, AvatarFallback } from '@/components/ui/avatar';
import { useEffect, useState } from 'react';
import { redirect } from 'next/navigation';

export function Header({ toggleSidebar }: { toggleSidebar: () => void }) {
  const { setTheme, theme } = useTheme();
  const { user } = useUser();
  const { signOut } = useClerk();
  const [mounted, setMounted] = useState(false);
  const [isMobile, setIsMobile] = useState(false);

  useEffect(() => {
    setMounted(true);

    // Check if device is mobile
    const checkMobile = () => {
      setIsMobile(window.innerWidth < 768);
    };

    // Initial check
    checkMobile();

    // Add event listener for window resize
    window.addEventListener('resize', checkMobile);

    // Cleanup
    return () => window.removeEventListener('resize', checkMobile);
  }, []);

  if (!mounted) return null;

  const handleSignOut = async () => {
    try {
      localStorage.clear();
      await signOut();
      redirect("/login");
    } catch (error) {
      console.error("Error during sign out:", error);
    }
  };

  const iconButtonClass = "hover:bg-gray-100 dark:hover:bg-gray-700 transition-colors";
  const dropdownMenuItemClass = "flex items-center gap-2";

  // Theme toggle component to reuse for both signed-in and signed-out states
  const ThemeToggle = () => (
    <TooltipProvider>
      <Tooltip>
        <TooltipTrigger asChild>
          <Button
            variant="ghost"
            size="icon"
            onClick={() => setTheme(theme === "light" ? "dark" : "light")}
            className={iconButtonClass}
            aria-label="Toggle theme"
          >
            <Sun className="h-5 w-5 rotate-0 scale-100 transition-all dark:-rotate-90 dark:scale-0" />
            <Moon className="absolute h-5 w-5 rotate-90 scale-0 transition-all dark:rotate-0 dark:scale-100" />
          </Button>
        </TooltipTrigger>
        <TooltipContent className="bg-neutral-800 text-white p-2 rounded-md shadow-md">
          <p>Switch to {theme === "light" ? "dark" : "light"} mode</p>
        </TooltipContent>
      </Tooltip>
    </TooltipProvider>
  );

  return (
    <header className="border-b">
      <div className="flex h-16 items-center px-4">
        <div className="flex items-center gap-2 md:gap-4">
          <button
            onClick={toggleSidebar}
            className={`p-2 ${iconButtonClass} rounded-lg`}
            aria-label="Toggle sidebar"
          >
            <Menu className="h-5 w-5" />
          </button>
          <Link href="/active" className="text-lg md:text-2xl font-bold hover:text-primary transition-colors truncate">
            TestForge
          </Link>
        </div>

        <div className="ml-auto flex items-center gap-1 md:gap-4">
          {/* Theme Toggle - Available for all users */}
          {!isMobile && <ThemeToggle />}

          {/* Documentation Link - Available for all users */}
          <TooltipProvider>
            <Tooltip>
              <TooltipTrigger asChild>
                <Link href="/docs/introduction">
                  <Button variant="ghost" size="icon" className={iconButtonClass} aria-label="Documentation">
                    <BookOpen className="h-5 w-5" />
                  </Button>
                </Link>
              </TooltipTrigger>
              <TooltipContent className="bg-neutral-800 text-white p-2 rounded-md shadow-md">
                <p>Documentation</p>
              </TooltipContent>
            </Tooltip>
          </TooltipProvider>

          <Show when="signed-in">
            {/* User Menu - All options moved to dropdown for mobile */}
            <DropdownMenu>
              <DropdownMenuTrigger asChild>
                <Button variant="ghost" className={iconButtonClass} aria-label="User menu">
                  <Avatar className="h-8 w-8">
                    <AvatarImage src={user?.imageUrl} alt={user?.fullName || "User"} />
                    <AvatarFallback>{user?.fullName?.charAt(0) || "U"}</AvatarFallback>
                  </Avatar>
                </Button>
              </DropdownMenuTrigger>
              <DropdownMenuContent className="w-56">
                {isMobile && (
                  <>
                    <DropdownMenuItem className={dropdownMenuItemClass}>
                      <Sun className="h-4 w-4 rotate-0 scale-100 transition-all dark:-rotate-90 dark:scale-0" />
                      <Moon className="absolute h-4 w-4 rotate-90 scale-0 transition-all dark:rotate-0 dark:scale-100" />
                      <Button
                        variant="ghost"
                        className="w-full justify-start p-0"
                        onClick={() => setTheme(theme === "light" ? "dark" : "light")}
                      >
                        <span>Switch to {theme === "light" ? "dark" : "light"} mode</span>
                      </Button>
                    </DropdownMenuItem>

                    <DropdownMenuItem className={dropdownMenuItemClass}>
                      <Bell className="h-4 w-4" />
                      <span>Notifications</span>
                      <span className="ml-auto bg-red-500 text-white text-xs rounded-full px-1">3</span>
                    </DropdownMenuItem>

                    <DropdownMenuItem className={dropdownMenuItemClass}>
                      <MessageSquare className="h-4 w-4" />
                      <Link href="/active/misc/help-desk" className="w-full justify-start p-0">
                        <span>AI Assistant</span>
                      </Link>
                    </DropdownMenuItem>

                    <DropdownMenuItem className={dropdownMenuItemClass}>
                      <BookOpen className="h-4 w-4" />
                      <Link href="/docs/introduction" className="w-full justify-start p-0">
                        <span>Documentation</span>
                      </Link>
                    </DropdownMenuItem>
                  </>
                )}
                <DropdownMenuItem className={dropdownMenuItemClass}>
                  <User className="h-4 w-4" />
                  <Link href="/active/misc/profile" className="w-full justify-start p-0">
                    <span>Profile</span>
                  </Link>
                </DropdownMenuItem>
                <DropdownMenuItem className={dropdownMenuItemClass}>
                  <Settings className="h-4 w-4" />
                  <span>Settings</span>
                </DropdownMenuItem>

                <DropdownMenuItem className={dropdownMenuItemClass}>
                  <LogOutIcon className="h-4 w-4" />
                  <Button
                    variant="ghost"
                    className="w-full justify-start p-0"
                    onClick={handleSignOut}
                    aria-label="Logout"
                  >
                    <span>Logout</span>
                  </Button>
                </DropdownMenuItem>
              </DropdownMenuContent>
            </DropdownMenu>

            {/* Only show these buttons on desktop */}
            {!isMobile && (
              <>
                {/* Notifications */}
                <div className="relative">
                  <Button variant="ghost" size="icon" className={iconButtonClass} aria-label="Notifications">
                    <Bell className="h-5 w-5" />
                    <span className="absolute top-0 right-0 bg-red-500 text-white text-xs rounded-full px-1">3</span>
                  </Button>
                </div>

                {/* Help Desk AI Assistant */}
                <TooltipProvider>
                  <Tooltip>
                    <TooltipTrigger asChild>
                      <Link href="/active/misc/help-desk">
                        <Button variant="ghost" size="icon" className={iconButtonClass} aria-label="Help Desk">
                          <MessageSquare className="h-5 w-5" />
                        </Button>
                      </Link>
                    </TooltipTrigger>
                    <TooltipContent className="bg-neutral-800 text-white p-2 rounded-md shadow-md">
                      <p>Chat with TestForge AI Assistant</p>
                    </TooltipContent>
                  </Tooltip>
                </TooltipProvider>
              </>
            )}
          </Show>

          <Show when="signed-out">
            {/* Theme Toggle for mobile when signed out */}
            {isMobile && <ThemeToggle />}

            <Link href="/login">
              <Button variant="outline" className="text-xs md:text-sm">Sign In</Button>
            </Link>
          </Show>
        </div>
      </div>
    </header>
  );
}
</components/main/header.tsx>

<components/main/sidebar.tsx>
"use client";

import { useState, useEffect } from "react";
import Link from "next/link";
import { usePathname } from "next/navigation";
import { ChevronDown, CrownIcon, File, Folder, LockKeyhole, LockOpen } from 'lucide-react';
import { cn } from "@/lib/utils";
import { Collapsible, CollapsibleContent, CollapsibleTrigger } from "@/components/ui/collapsible";
import { useUser } from "@clerk/nextjs";
import { Input } from "../ui/input";

type Submodule = { name: string; file: string; fallback?: string };
type SubmoduleGroup = { name: string; submodules: Submodule[] };
type Module = { module_name: string; submodules: (Submodule | SubmoduleGroup)[]; premium?: boolean };

export function Sidebar({ isSidebarVisible }: { isSidebarVisible: boolean }) {
  const [modules, setModules] = useState<Module[]>([]);
  const [searchQuery, setSearchQuery] = useState("");
  const { user } = useUser();
  const premiumVersion = (user?.publicMetadata?.premiumVersion) || [];

  useEffect(() => {
    (async () => {
      const response = await import('@/config/modules.json');
      setModules(response.default);
    })();
  }, []);

  const filteredModules = modules.map(module => ({
    ...module,
    submodules: module.submodules.filter(submodule => {
      if ("submodules" in submodule) {
        return submodule.submodules.some(s => s.name.toLowerCase().includes(searchQuery.toLowerCase()));
      } else {
        return submodule.name.toLowerCase().includes(searchQuery.toLowerCase());
      }
    })
  })).filter(module => module.submodules.length > 0);

  return (
    <div className={cn(
      "w-64 border-r h-[calc(100vh-6.5rem)] sticky top-0 transition-all duration-300 ease-in-out bg-background/95 backdrop-blur supports-[backdrop-filter]:bg-background/60",
      !isSidebarVisible && "hidden"
    )}>
      <div className="p-3">
        <Input
          type="text"
          placeholder="Search..."
          value={searchQuery}
          onChange={(e) => setSearchQuery(e.target.value)}
          className="w-full p-2 rounded-lg border border-neutral-200 dark:border-neutral-800 bg-transparent text-sm focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-primary"
        />
      </div>
      <nav className="flex flex-col h-[calc(100vh-10rem)] p-3 space-y-1 overflow-y-auto">
        {filteredModules.map((module, index) => (
          <ModuleItem key={module.module_name || index} module={module} premiumVersion={premiumVersion as string[]} />
        ))}
      </nav>
    </div>
  );
}

function ModuleItem({ module, premiumVersion }: { module: Module; premiumVersion: string[] | [] }) {
  const [isOpen, setIsOpen] = useState(false);

  return (
    <Collapsible open={isOpen} onOpenChange={setIsOpen}>
      <CollapsibleTrigger
        className={cn(
          "flex w-full items-center justify-between p-2 rounded-lg text-sm font-medium hover:bg-neutral-200 dark:hover:bg-neutral-800 transition-colors duration-200",
          module.module_name === "Premium" ? "bg-gradient-to-r from-orange-300/80 to-orange-500/80 hover:from-orange-300/90 hover:to-orange-400/90" : "",
          isOpen && "bg-neutral-200 dark:bg-neutral-800"
        )}
      >
        <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
          {module.module_name !== "Premium" ? (
            <Folder className="h-4 w-4 text-primary" />
          ) : (
            <CrownIcon className="h-4 w-4 text-orange-600" />
          )}
          <span className={cn(module.module_name === "Premium" && "font-semibold")}>
            {module.module_name}
          </span>
        </div>
        <ChevronDown className={cn("h-4 w-4 text-primary transition-transform", isOpen && "rotate-180")} />
      </CollapsibleTrigger>
      <CollapsibleContent className="pl-6 mt-1 space-y-1">
        {module.submodules.map((submodule, submoduleIndex) =>
          "submodules" in submodule ? (
            <SubmoduleGroup key={submodule.name || submoduleIndex} group={submodule} premiumVersion={premiumVersion as string[]} />
          ) : (
            <SubmoduleItem key={submodule.name || submoduleIndex} submodule={submodule} premiumVersion={premiumVersion as string[]} />
          )
        )}
      </CollapsibleContent>
    </Collapsible>
  );
}

function SubmoduleGroup({ group, premiumVersion }: { group: SubmoduleGroup; premiumVersion: string[] | [] }) {
  const [isOpen, setIsOpen] = useState(false);

  return (
    <Collapsible open={isOpen} onOpenChange={setIsOpen}>
      <CollapsibleTrigger className="flex w-full items-center justify-between p-2 rounded-lg text-sm font-medium hover:bg-neutral-200 dark:hover:bg-neutral-800 transition-colors duration-200">
        <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
          <Folder className="h-4 w-4 text-primary" />
          <span>{group.name}</span>
        </div>
        <ChevronDown className={cn("h-4 w-4 text-primary transition-transform", isOpen && "rotate-180")} />
      </CollapsibleTrigger>
      <CollapsibleContent className="pl-6 mt-1 space-y-1">
        {group.submodules.map((submodule) => (
          <SubmoduleItem key={submodule.name} submodule={submodule} premiumVersion={premiumVersion as string[]} />
        ))}
      </CollapsibleContent>
    </Collapsible>
  );
}

function SubmoduleItem({ submodule, premiumVersion }: { submodule: Submodule; premiumVersion: string[] | [] }) {
  const pathname = usePathname();
  const isPremium = submodule.file.startsWith('premium');
  const hasAccess = isPremium ? premiumVersion.some(version => submodule.file.includes(version)) : true;
  const href = hasAccess ? submodule.file : submodule.fallback || submodule.file;

  return (
    <Link
      href={`/active/${href}`}
      className={cn(
        "flex items-center gap-2 p-2 rounded-lg text-sm transition-colors duration-200 hover:bg-neutral-200 dark:hover:bg-neutral-800",
        pathname === `/active/${href}` && "bg-neutral-200 dark:bg-neutral-800 font-semibold"
      )}
    >
      {isPremium ? (
        hasAccess ? (
          <LockOpen className="h-4 w-4 text-green-600" />
        ) : (
          <LockKeyhole className="h-4 w-4 text-red-600" />
        )
      ) : (
        <File className="h-4 w-4 text-primary" />
      )}
      <span>{submodule.name}</span>
    </Link>
  );
}
</components/main/sidebar.tsx>

<components/ui/tooltip.tsx>
"use client"

import * as React from "react"
import * as TooltipPrimitive from "@radix-ui/react-tooltip"

import { cn } from "@/lib/utils"

const TooltipProvider = TooltipPrimitive.Provider

const Tooltip = TooltipPrimitive.Root

const TooltipTrigger = TooltipPrimitive.Trigger

const TooltipContent = React.forwardRef<
  React.ElementRef<typeof TooltipPrimitive.Content>,
  React.ComponentPropsWithoutRef<typeof TooltipPrimitive.Content>
>(({ className, sideOffset = 4, ...props }, ref) => (
  <TooltipPrimitive.Portal>
    <TooltipPrimitive.Content
      ref={ref}
      sideOffset={sideOffset}
      className={cn(
        "z-50 overflow-hidden rounded-md bg-primary px-3 py-1.5 text-xs text-primary-foreground animate-in fade-in-0 zoom-in-95 data-[state=closed]:animate-out data-[state=closed]:fade-out-0 data-[state=closed]:zoom-out-95 data-[side=bottom]:slide-in-from-top-2 data-[side=left]:slide-in-from-right-2 data-[side=right]:slide-in-from-left-2 data-[side=top]:slide-in-from-bottom-2",
        className
      )}
      {...props}
    />
  </TooltipPrimitive.Portal>
))
TooltipContent.displayName = TooltipPrimitive.Content.displayName

export { Tooltip, TooltipTrigger, TooltipContent, TooltipProvider }

</components/ui/tooltip.tsx>

<components/ui/badge.tsx>
import * as React from "react"
import { cva, type VariantProps } from "class-variance-authority"

import { cn } from "@/lib/utils"

const badgeVariants = cva(
  "inline-flex items-center rounded-md border px-2.5 py-0.5 text-xs font-semibold transition-colors focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-ring focus:ring-offset-2",
  {
    variants: {
      variant: {
        default:
          "border-transparent bg-primary text-primary-foreground shadow hover:bg-primary/80",
        secondary:
          "border-transparent bg-secondary text-secondary-foreground hover:bg-secondary/80",
        destructive:
          "border-transparent bg-destructive text-destructive-foreground shadow hover:bg-destructive/80",
        outline: "text-foreground",
      },
    },
    defaultVariants: {
      variant: "default",
    },
  }
)

export interface BadgeProps
  extends React.HTMLAttributes<HTMLDivElement>,
    VariantProps<typeof badgeVariants> {}

function Badge({ className, variant, ...props }: BadgeProps) {
  return (
    <div className={cn(badgeVariants({ variant }), className)} {...props} />
  )
}

export { Badge, badgeVariants }

</components/ui/badge.tsx>

<components/ui/select.tsx>
"use client"

import * as React from "react"
import * as SelectPrimitive from "@radix-ui/react-select"
import { Check, ChevronDown, ChevronUp } from "lucide-react"

import { cn } from "@/lib/utils"

const Select = SelectPrimitive.Root

const SelectGroup = SelectPrimitive.Group

const SelectValue = SelectPrimitive.Value

const SelectTrigger = React.forwardRef<
  React.ElementRef<typeof SelectPrimitive.Trigger>,
  React.ComponentPropsWithoutRef<typeof SelectPrimitive.Trigger>
>(({ className, children, ...props }, ref) => (
  <SelectPrimitive.Trigger
    ref={ref}
    className={cn(
      "flex h-9 w-full items-center justify-between whitespace-nowrap rounded-md border border-input bg-transparent px-3 py-2 text-sm shadow-sm ring-offset-background placeholder:text-muted-foreground focus:outline-none focus:ring-1 focus:ring-ring disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:opacity-50 [&>span]:line-clamp-1",
      className
    )}
    {...props}
  >
    {children}
    <SelectPrimitive.Icon asChild>
      <ChevronDown className="h-4 w-4 opacity-50" />
    </SelectPrimitive.Icon>
  </SelectPrimitive.Trigger>
))
SelectTrigger.displayName = SelectPrimitive.Trigger.displayName

const SelectScrollUpButton = React.forwardRef<
  React.ElementRef<typeof SelectPrimitive.ScrollUpButton>,
  React.ComponentPropsWithoutRef<typeof SelectPrimitive.ScrollUpButton>
>(({ className, ...props }, ref) => (
  <SelectPrimitive.ScrollUpButton
    ref={ref}
    className={cn(
      "flex cursor-default items-center justify-center py-1",
      className
    )}
    {...props}
  >
    <ChevronUp className="h-4 w-4" />
  </SelectPrimitive.ScrollUpButton>
))
SelectScrollUpButton.displayName = SelectPrimitive.ScrollUpButton.displayName

const SelectScrollDownButton = React.forwardRef<
  React.ElementRef<typeof SelectPrimitive.ScrollDownButton>,
  React.ComponentPropsWithoutRef<typeof SelectPrimitive.ScrollDownButton>
>(({ className, ...props }, ref) => (
  <SelectPrimitive.ScrollDownButton
    ref={ref}
    className={cn(
      "flex cursor-default items-center justify-center py-1",
      className
    )}
    {...props}
  >
    <ChevronDown className="h-4 w-4" />
  </SelectPrimitive.ScrollDownButton>
))
SelectScrollDownButton.displayName =
  SelectPrimitive.ScrollDownButton.displayName

const SelectContent = React.forwardRef<
  React.ElementRef<typeof SelectPrimitive.Content>,
  React.ComponentPropsWithoutRef<typeof SelectPrimitive.Content>
>(({ className, children, position = "popper", ...props }, ref) => (
  <SelectPrimitive.Portal>
    <SelectPrimitive.Content
      ref={ref}
      className={cn(
        "relative z-50 max-h-96 min-w-[8rem] overflow-hidden rounded-md border bg-popover text-popover-foreground shadow-md data-[state=open]:animate-in data-[state=closed]:animate-out data-[state=closed]:fade-out-0 data-[state=open]:fade-in-0 data-[state=closed]:zoom-out-95 data-[state=open]:zoom-in-95 data-[side=bottom]:slide-in-from-top-2 data-[side=left]:slide-in-from-right-2 data-[side=right]:slide-in-from-left-2 data-[side=top]:slide-in-from-bottom-2",
        position === "popper" &&
          "data-[side=bottom]:translate-y-1 data-[side=left]:-translate-x-1 data-[side=right]:translate-x-1 data-[side=top]:-translate-y-1",
        className
      )}
      position={position}
      {...props}
    >
      <SelectScrollUpButton />
      <SelectPrimitive.Viewport
        className={cn(
          "p-1",
          position === "popper" &&
            "h-[var(--radix-select-trigger-height)] w-full min-w-[var(--radix-select-trigger-width)]"
        )}
      >
        {children}
      </SelectPrimitive.Viewport>
      <SelectScrollDownButton />
    </SelectPrimitive.Content>
  </SelectPrimitive.Portal>
))
SelectContent.displayName = SelectPrimitive.Content.displayName

const SelectLabel = React.forwardRef<
  React.ElementRef<typeof SelectPrimitive.Label>,
  React.ComponentPropsWithoutRef<typeof SelectPrimitive.Label>
>(({ className, ...props }, ref) => (
  <SelectPrimitive.Label
    ref={ref}
    className={cn("px-2 py-1.5 text-sm font-semibold", className)}
    {...props}
  />
))
SelectLabel.displayName = SelectPrimitive.Label.displayName

const SelectItem = React.forwardRef<
  React.ElementRef<typeof SelectPrimitive.Item>,
  React.ComponentPropsWithoutRef<typeof SelectPrimitive.Item>
>(({ className, children, ...props }, ref) => (
  <SelectPrimitive.Item
    ref={ref}
    className={cn(
      "relative flex w-full cursor-default select-none items-center rounded-sm py-1.5 pl-2 pr-8 text-sm outline-none focus:bg-accent focus:text-accent-foreground data-[disabled]:pointer-events-none data-[disabled]:opacity-50",
      className
    )}
    {...props}
  >
    <span className="absolute right-2 flex h-3.5 w-3.5 items-center justify-center">
      <SelectPrimitive.ItemIndicator>
        <Check className="h-4 w-4" />
      </SelectPrimitive.ItemIndicator>
    </span>
    <SelectPrimitive.ItemText>{children}</SelectPrimitive.ItemText>
  </SelectPrimitive.Item>
))
SelectItem.displayName = SelectPrimitive.Item.displayName

const SelectSeparator = React.forwardRef<
  React.ElementRef<typeof SelectPrimitive.Separator>,
  React.ComponentPropsWithoutRef<typeof SelectPrimitive.Separator>
>(({ className, ...props }, ref) => (
  <SelectPrimitive.Separator
    ref={ref}
    className={cn("-mx-1 my-1 h-px bg-muted", className)}
    {...props}
  />
))
SelectSeparator.displayName = SelectPrimitive.Separator.displayName

export {
  Select,
  SelectGroup,
  SelectValue,
  SelectTrigger,
  SelectContent,
  SelectLabel,
  SelectItem,
  SelectSeparator,
  SelectScrollUpButton,
  SelectScrollDownButton,
}

</components/ui/select.tsx>

    { className, orientation = "horizontal", decorative = true, ...props },
    ref
  ) => (
    <SeparatorPrimitive.Root
      ref={ref}
      decorative={decorative}
      orientation={orientation}
      className={cn(
        "shrink-0 bg-border",
        orientation === "horizontal" ? "h-[1px] w-full" : "h-full w-[1px]",
        className
      )}
      {...props}
    />
  )
)
Separator.displayName = SeparatorPrimitive.Root.displayName
