<app/api/(configurations)/rel-order/route.ts>
import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from "next/server";
import type { RowDataPacket } from "mysql2/promise";
import pool, { getEcCodeFromClerk } from "@/lib/db";

interface SupervisionData {
  total_students: number;
  schemes: string[];
  allotted: string[];
}

export async function GET(req: NextRequest) {
  const connection = await pool.getConnection();
  try {
    const { searchParams } = new URL(req.url);
    const [date, session] = [searchParams.get("date"), searchParams.get("session")];
    const ec_code = await getEcCodeFromClerk();

    if (!ec_code) throw new Error("Missing EC_CODE", { cause: 400 });
    if (!date || !session) throw new Error("Missing Date and Session", { cause: 400 });

    const [ttRows] = await connection.query<RowDataPacket[]>(
      `SELECT DATE_FORMAT(DATE, '%Y-%m-%d') AS DATE, SESSION,
              GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT SCHEME) AS SCHEMES, SUM(TOTAL_STUDENTS) AS TOTAL_STUDENTS
       FROM TH_TT_${ec_code}
       WHERE DATE = ? AND SESSION = ?
       GROUP BY DATE, SESSION`,
      [date, session]
    );

    if (!ttRows.length) {
      return NextResponse.json({
        status: 418,
        message: `No timetable data found for EC ${ec_code} on date ${date} and session ${session.toUpperCase()}`
      }, { status: 418 });
    }

    const [blockRows] = await connection.query<RowDataPacket[]>(
      `SELECT AVG(Strength) AS AVG_STRENGTH FROM THC_BLOCK_DETAILS_${ec_code}`
    );
    
    const [relRows] = await connection.query<RowDataPacket[]>(
      `SELECT ID, UID, NAME, DEPARTMENT FROM TH_REL_${ec_code}`
    );
    
    const [allottedRows] = await connection.query<RowDataPacket[]>(
      `SELECT DATE_FORMAT(DATE, '%Y-%m-%d') AS DATE, SESSION, RELIEVER_UID
       FROM TH_REL_ORD_${ec_code}
       WHERE DATE = ? AND SESSION = ?`,
      [date, session.toUpperCase()] 
    );

    const supervisionRequired = ttRows.reduce((acc: Record<string, Record<string, SupervisionData>>, row) => {
      acc[row.DATE] = {
        [row.SESSION]: {
          total_students: row.TOTAL_STUDENTS,
          schemes: row.SCHEMES.split(","),
          allotted: allottedRows.map(a => a.RELIEVER_UID)
        }
      };
      return acc;
    }, {});

    const relievers = Object.fromEntries(
      relRows.map(rel => [rel.UID, { ID: rel.ID, NAME: rel.NAME, DEPARTMENT: rel.DEPARTMENT }])
    );

    return NextResponse.json({
      avg_strength: Number(blockRows[0]?.AVG_STRENGTH)?.toFixed(2) ?? "0.00",
      relievers,
      supervision_required: supervisionRequired
    });
  } catch (error: unknown) {
    const err = error as { cause?: number; message?: string };
    console.error("Error fetching reliever data:", error);
    return NextResponse.json({
      status: err.cause || 500,
      message: err.message || "Internal server error"
    }, { status: err.cause || 500 });
  } finally {
    connection.release();
  }
}

export async function POST(req: NextRequest) {
  const connection = await pool.getConnection();
  try {
    const ec_code = await getEcCodeFromClerk();
    if (!ec_code) throw new Error("Missing EC_CODE", { cause: 400 });

    const { date, session, reliever_ids, reliever_uids } = await req.json() as {
      date: string;
      session: string;
      reliever_ids: number[];
      reliever_uids: string[];
    };
    
    if (!date || !session || !Array.isArray(reliever_ids) || !Array.isArray(reliever_uids) || 
        reliever_ids.length !== reliever_uids.length) {
      throw new Error("Missing or invalid required fields: date, session, reliever_ids, reliever_uids", { cause: 400 });
    }

    const table = `TH_REL_ORD_${ec_code}`;
    await connection.beginTransaction();

    const values = reliever_ids.map((id, index) => 
      [date, session.toUpperCase(), id, reliever_uids[index]]
    );
    
    await connection.query(`
      INSERT INTO ${table} (DATE, SESSION, RELIEVER_ID, RELIEVER_UID)
      VALUES ?
      ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE 
        RELIEVER_ID = VALUES(RELIEVER_ID),
        RELIEVER_UID = VALUES(RELIEVER_UID)
    `, [values]);

    await connection.commit();
    return NextResponse.json({
      status: 200,
      message: "Reliever orders created/updated successfully"
    });
  } catch (error: unknown) {
    await connection.rollback();
    const err = error as { cause?: number; message?: string };
    console.error("Error creating reliever orders:", error);
    return NextResponse.json({
      status: err.cause || 500,
      message: err.message || "Internal server error"
    }, { status: err.cause || 500 });
  } finally {
    connection.release();
  }
}

export async function PUT(req: NextRequest) {
  const connection = await pool.getConnection();
  try {
    const ec_code = await getEcCodeFromClerk();
    if (!ec_code) throw new Error("Missing EC_CODE", { cause: 400 });

    const { date, session, old_reliever_uid, new_reliever_uid } = await req.json() as {
      date: string;
      session: string;
      old_reliever_uid: string;
      new_reliever_uid: string;
    };
    
    if (!date || !session || !old_reliever_uid || !new_reliever_uid) {
      throw new Error("Missing required fields", { cause: 400 });
    }

    const [newReliever] = await connection.query<RowDataPacket[]>(
      `SELECT ID FROM TH_REL_${ec_code} WHERE UID = ?`,
      [new_reliever_uid]
    );
    
    if (!newReliever.length) {
      throw new Error(`New reliever with UID ${new_reliever_uid} not found`, { cause: 400 });
    }

    const [result] = await connection.query(
      `UPDATE TH_REL_ORD_${ec_code}
       SET RELIEVER_ID = ?, RELIEVER_UID = ?
       WHERE DATE = ? AND SESSION = ? AND RELIEVER_UID = ?`,
      [newReliever[0].ID, new_reliever_uid, date, session.toUpperCase(), old_reliever_uid]
    );

    if ((result as { affectedRows: number }).affectedRows === 0) {
      return NextResponse.json({
        status: 404,
        message: "No matching reliever order found to update"
      }, { status: 404 });
    }

    return NextResponse.json({
      status: 200,
      message: "Reliever order updated successfully"
    });
  } catch (error: unknown) {
    const err = error as { cause?: number; message?: string };
    console.error("Error updating reliever order:", error);
    return NextResponse.json({
      status: err.cause || 500,
      message: err.message || "Internal server error"
    }, { status: err.cause || 500 });
  } finally {
    connection.release();
  }
} 
</app/api/(configurations)/rel-order/route.ts>

<app/api/(configurations)/supervisors/route.ts>
import { NextResponse } from 'next/server';
import { RowDataPacket, ResultSetHeader } from 'mysql2/promise';
import pool,{ getEcCodeFromClerk } from '@/lib/db';

interface Supervisor {
    UID: string;
    NAME: string;
    DEPARTMENT: string;
    ROLE: string;
    EMAIL: string;
}

// Utility function to handle database errors
const handleDbError = (error: unknown) => {
    if (error instanceof Error && 'code' in error && error.code === 'ER_DUP_ENTRY') {
        return NextResponse.json({ error: 'Duplicate entry: UID must be unique' }, { status: 400 });
    }
    return NextResponse.json(
        { error: 'Internal server error', details: error instanceof Error ? error.message : 'Unknown error' },
        { status: 500 }
    );
};

// Fetch supervisor(s)
const fetchSupervisors = async (tableName: string, uid?: string) => {
    let query = `SELECT * FROM ${tableName}`;
    const params = uid ? [uid] : [];
    if (uid) query += ' WHERE UID = ?';
    const [rows] = await pool.execute<RowDataPacket[]>(query, params);
    return rows;
};

// Insert supervisor
const insertSupervisor = async (tableName: string, supervisor: Supervisor) => {
    const { UID, NAME, DEPARTMENT, ROLE, EMAIL } = supervisor;
    const query = `INSERT INTO ${tableName} (UID, NAME, DEPARTMENT, ROLE, EMAIL) VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?)`;
    const [result] = await pool.execute<ResultSetHeader>(query, [UID, NAME, DEPARTMENT, ROLE, EMAIL]);
    return result.insertId;
};

// Update supervisor
const updateSupervisor = async (tableName: string, uid: string, updates: Partial<Supervisor>) => {
    const { NAME, DEPARTMENT, ROLE, EMAIL } = updates;
    const query = `UPDATE ${tableName} SET ${NAME ? 'NAME = ?, ' : ''}${DEPARTMENT ? 'DEPARTMENT = ?, ' : ''}${ROLE ? 'ROLE = ?, ' : ''}${EMAIL ? 'EMAIL = ?, ' : ''}WHERE UID = ?`;
    const params = [NAME, DEPARTMENT, ROLE, EMAIL, uid].filter(Boolean);
    const [result] = await pool.execute<ResultSetHeader>(query, params);
    return result.affectedRows;
};

// Delete supervisor
const deleteSupervisor = async (tableName: string, uid: string) => {
    const query = `DELETE FROM ${tableName} WHERE UID = ?`;
    await pool.execute(query, [uid]);
};

// GET: Fetch all or specific supervisor
export async function GET(request: Request) {
    const { searchParams } = new URL(request.url);
    const ec_code = await getEcCodeFromClerk();
    const uid = searchParams.get('uid');
    const date = searchParams.get('date');
    const session = searchParams.get('session');
    const action = searchParams.get('action');

    if (!ec_code) return NextResponse.json({ error: 'EC_CODE is required' }, { status: 400 });

    const supTableName = `TH_SUP_${ec_code}`;
    const ordTableName = `TH_SUP_ORD_${ec_code}`;

    try {
        // Fetch all supervision orders from TH_SUP_ORD
        if (action === 'suporder') {
            const query = `
                SELECT 
                    o.DATE,
                    o.SESSION,
                    o.SUPERVISOR_UID,
                    s.NAME,
                    s.DEPARTMENT,
                    s.ROLE,
                    s.EMAIL
                FROM ${ordTableName} o
                LEFT JOIN ${supTableName} s 
                ON o.SUPERVISOR_UID COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci = s.UID COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci
                ORDER BY o.SUPERVISOR_UID ASC, o.DATE ASC, o.SESSION DESC
            `;
            const [rows] = await pool.execute<RowDataPacket[]>(query);
            return NextResponse.json(rows.length > 0 ? rows : []);
        }

        // Fetch with date and session
        if (date && session) {
            const query = `
                SELECT 
                    s.UID,
                    s.NAME,
                    s.DEPARTMENT,
                    s.ROLE,
                    o.DATE,
                    o.SESSION
                FROM ${supTableName} s
                INNER JOIN ${ordTableName} o 
                ON s.UID COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci = o.SUPERVISOR_UID COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci
                WHERE o.DATE = ? AND o.SESSION = ? ${uid ? 'AND s.UID = ?' : ''}
                ORDER BY o.DATE ASC, o.SESSION DESC
            `;
            const params = uid ? [date, session.toUpperCase(), uid] : [date, session.toUpperCase()];
            const [rows] = await pool.execute<RowDataPacket[]>(query, params);

            if (rows.length === 0) {
                return NextResponse.json({ 
                    message: `No supervisors found for date ${date} and session ${session}` 
                }, { status: 418 });
            }
            return NextResponse.json(rows);
        }

        // Original functionality when no date/session provided
        const rows = await fetchSupervisors(supTableName, uid || undefined);
        if (uid && rows.length === 0) return NextResponse.json({ message: 'Supervisor not found' }, { status: 418 });
        return NextResponse.json(rows);
    } catch (error) {
        return handleDbError(error);
    }
}

// POST: Create a new supervisor
export async function POST(request: Request) {
    const ec_code = await getEcCodeFromClerk();
    if (!ec_code) return NextResponse.json({ error: 'EC_CODE is required' }, { status: 400 });

    const tableName = `TH_SUP_${ec_code}`;

    try {
        const supervisor = await request.json();
        if (!supervisor.UID || !supervisor.NAME || !supervisor.DEPARTMENT || !supervisor.ROLE) {
            return NextResponse.json({ error: 'UID, NAME, DEPARTMENT, and ROLE are required' }, { status: 400 });
        }

        await insertSupervisor(tableName, supervisor);
        const [newSupervisor] = await fetchSupervisors(tableName, supervisor.UID);
        return NextResponse.json(newSupervisor, { status: 201 });
    } catch (error) {
        return handleDbError(error);
    }
}

// PUT: Update an existing supervisor
export async function PUT(request: Request) {
    const { searchParams } = new URL(request.url);
    const ec_code = await getEcCodeFromClerk();
    const uid = searchParams.get('uid');
    if (!ec_code || !uid) return NextResponse.json({ error: 'EC_CODE and UID are required' }, { status: 400 });

    const tableName = `TH_SUP_${ec_code}`;

    try {
        const updates = await request.json();
        if (!updates.NAME && !updates.DEPARTMENT && !updates.ROLE) {
            return NextResponse.json({ error: 'At least one field (NAME, DEPARTMENT, ROLE) is required' }, { status: 400 });
        }

        const affectedRows = await updateSupervisor(tableName, uid, updates);
        if (affectedRows === 0) return NextResponse.json({ message: 'Supervisor not found' }, { status: 418 });

        const [updatedSupervisor] = await fetchSupervisors(tableName, uid);
        return NextResponse.json(updatedSupervisor);
    } catch (error) {
        return handleDbError(error);
    }
}

// DELETE: Delete a supervisor
export async function DELETE(request: Request) {
    const { searchParams } = new URL(request.url);
    const ec_code = await getEcCodeFromClerk();
    const uid = searchParams.get('uid');
    if (!ec_code || !uid) return NextResponse.json({ error: 'EC_CODE and UID are required' }, { status: 400 });

    const tableName = `TH_SUP_${ec_code}`;

    try {
        const [supervisor] = await fetchSupervisors(tableName, uid);
        if (!supervisor) return NextResponse.json({ message: 'Supervisor not found' }, { status: 418 });

        await deleteSupervisor(tableName, uid);
        return NextResponse.json({ status: 'successful', data: supervisor });
    } catch (error) {
        return handleDbError(error);
    }
}

export async function PATCH(req: Request) {
    let conn;
    try {
        const { date, session, block_no, new_supervisor_uid } = await req.json();
        const ec_code = await getEcCodeFromClerk();
        if (!date || !session || !block_no || !new_supervisor_uid) {
            return NextResponse.json({ error: "Missing required fields" }, { status: 400 });
        }

        conn = await pool.getConnection();
        
        // Fetch new supervisor's name
        const [rows] = await conn.execute<RowDataPacket[]>(
            `SELECT NAME AS SUPERVISOR_NAME FROM TH_SUP_${ec_code} WHERE UID = ?`,
            [new_supervisor_uid]
        );

        if (!rows.length) {
            return NextResponse.json({ error: "Supervisor not found" }, { status: 418 });
        }

        const SUPERVISOR_NAME = rows[0].SUPERVISOR_NAME;

        // Update supervisor in block table
        const configTableName = `TH_BLOCK_CONFIG_${ec_code}`;
        await conn.query(
            `UPDATE ${configTableName} SET SUPERVISOR_UID = ?, SUPERVISOR_NAME = ? WHERE BLOCKNO = ? AND DATE = ? AND SESSION = ?`,
            [new_supervisor_uid, SUPERVISOR_NAME, block_no, date, session]
        );

        return NextResponse.json({ message: `Supervisor updated successfully for Block ${block_no}` });
    } catch (error) {
        return NextResponse.json({ error: error instanceof Error ? error.message : 'Unknown error' }, { status: 500 });
    } finally {
        if (conn) conn.release();
    }
}

</app/api/(configurations)/supervisors/route.ts>

<app/api/(configurations)/exam-center/route.ts>
import { NextResponse } from 'next/server';
import type { RowDataPacket, ResultSetHeader } from 'mysql2/promise';
import pool, { getEcCodeFromClerk } from '@/lib/db';
import { ensureBlockConfigTableExists, ensureControllerTableExists, ensureExamCenterTableExists, ensureRelieversTableExists, ensureSupervisorTableExists } from '@/utils/tables';




const handleDbError = (error: unknown) => {
    console.error('Database error:', error);
    return NextResponse.json(
        { error: 'Internal server error', details: error instanceof Error ? error.message : 'Unknown error' },
        { status: 500 }
    );
};

const fetchExamCenter = async (ec_code?: string) => {
    const query = 'SELECT * FROM THC_EC_CONFIG WHERE EC_CODE = ?';
    const params: string[] = [ec_code || ''];
    const [rows] = await pool.execute<RowDataPacket[]>(query, params);
    return rows;
};

const validateRequiredFields = (fields: Record<string, unknown>, required: string[]) => {
    for (const field of required) {
        if (!fields[field]) {
            return NextResponse.json({ error: `${field} is required` }, { status: 400 });
        }
    }
    return null;
};

export async function GET() {
    const ec_code = await getEcCodeFromClerk();

    try {
        await ensureExamCenterTableExists()
        await ensureBlockConfigTableExists(ec_code)
        await ensureControllerTableExists(ec_code)
        await ensureSupervisorTableExists(ec_code)
        await ensureRelieversTableExists(ec_code)
    } catch (error) {
        return handleDbError(error);
    }

    try {
        
        const rows = await fetchExamCenter(ec_code || undefined);
        if (ec_code && rows.length === 0) {
            return NextResponse.json({ message: 'Exam center not found' }, { status: 418 });
        }
        return NextResponse.json(rows);
    } catch (error) {
        return handleDbError(error);
    }
}

export async function POST(request: Request) {
    try {
        const { EC_CODE, EC_INFO, CON_INST, EXAM_INFO, DC_INFO, DEPARTMENTS } = await request.json();
        await ensureExamCenterTableExists();
        const validationError = validateRequiredFields({ EC_CODE, EC_INFO }, ['EC_CODE', 'EC_INFO']);
        if (validationError) return validationError;

        const [existingRows] = await pool.execute<RowDataPacket[]>('SELECT * FROM THC_EC_CONFIG WHERE EC_CODE = ?', [EC_CODE]);
        if (existingRows.length > 0) {
            return NextResponse.json({ error: 'Exam center with this EC_CODE already exists' }, { status: 200 });
        }

        const insertQuery = `
            INSERT INTO THC_EC_CONFIG (EC_CODE, EC_INFO, CON_INST, EXAM_INFO, DC_INFO, DEPARTMENTS)
            VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?);
        `;
        await pool.execute<ResultSetHeader>(insertQuery, [
            EC_CODE,
            JSON.stringify(EC_INFO),
            JSON.stringify(CON_INST || null),
            JSON.stringify(EXAM_INFO || null),
            JSON.stringify(DC_INFO || null),
            JSON.stringify(DEPARTMENTS || null),
        ]);

        const [fetchResult] = await pool.execute<RowDataPacket[]>('SELECT * FROM THC_EC_CONFIG WHERE EC_CODE = ?', [EC_CODE]);
        return NextResponse.json(fetchResult[0], { status: 201 });
    } catch (error) {
        return handleDbError(error);
    }
}

export async function PUT(request: Request) {
  const ec_code = await getEcCodeFromClerk();
  if (!ec_code) {
    return NextResponse.json({ error: 'EC_CODE is required' }, { status: 400 });
  }

  try {
    // Ensure table exists
    await pool.execute(`
      CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS THC_EC_CONFIG (
        ID INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
        EC_CODE VARCHAR(255) UNIQUE NOT NULL,
        EC_INFO JSON NOT NULL,
        CON_INST JSON,
        EXAM_INFO JSON,
        DC_INFO JSON,
        DEPARTMENTS JSON DEFAULT (JSON_ARRAY()),
        isActive BOOLEAN DEFAULT TRUE,
        CREATED_AT TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
        UPDATED_AT TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
      )
    `);

    const { EC_INFO = [], CON_INST = [], EXAM_INFO = [], DC_INFO = [] } = await request.json();

    // Use INSERT ... ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE to handle insert/update in one query
    const [result] = await pool.execute<ResultSetHeader>(
      `INSERT INTO THC_EC_CONFIG (EC_CODE, EC_INFO, CON_INST, EXAM_INFO, DC_INFO, DEPARTMENTS)
       VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, JSON_ARRAY())
       ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE
       EC_INFO = VALUES(EC_INFO),
       CON_INST = VALUES(CON_INST),
       EXAM_INFO = VALUES(EXAM_INFO),
       DC_INFO = VALUES(DC_INFO)`,
      [
        ec_code,
        JSON.stringify(EC_INFO),
        JSON.stringify(CON_INST),
        JSON.stringify(EXAM_INFO),
        JSON.stringify(DC_INFO),
      ]
    );

    // Fetch the updated row only if necessary
    const [rows] = await pool.execute<RowDataPacket[]>(
      'SELECT * FROM THC_EC_CONFIG WHERE EC_CODE = ? LIMIT 1',
      [ec_code]
    );

    return NextResponse.json(rows[0] || {}, { status: result.affectedRows ? 200 : 201 });
  } catch (error) {
    return handleDbError(error);
  }
}

export async function DELETE() {
    const ec_code = await getEcCodeFromClerk();
    if (!ec_code) {
        return NextResponse.json({ error: 'EC_CODE is required' }, { status: 400 });
    }

    try {
        const [fetchResult] = await pool.execute<RowDataPacket[]>('SELECT * FROM THC_EC_CONFIG WHERE EC_CODE = ?', [ec_code]);
        if (fetchResult.length === 0) {
            return NextResponse.json({ message: 'Exam center not found' }, { status: 418 });
        }

        await pool.execute<ResultSetHeader>('DELETE FROM THC_EC_CONFIG WHERE EC_CODE = ?', [ec_code]);
        return NextResponse.json({ status: 'successful', data: fetchResult[0] });
    } catch (error) {
        return handleDbError(error);
    }
}
</app/api/(configurations)/exam-center/route.ts>

<app/api/(configurations)/inst-info/route.ts>
import { NextResponse } from "next/server";
import rawData from "@/config/institute_names.json";

const institutes = new Map(Object.entries(rawData)); // Convert JSON to a Map

export const config = {
  runtime: "edge", // Enable Edge runtime
};

export async function GET(req: Request) {
  const code = new URL(req.url).searchParams.get("code");
  if (!code) {
    return NextResponse.json({ success: false, message: "Institute code is required." }, { status: 400 });
  }

  const response = institutes.has(code)
    ? { CODE: code, NAME: institutes.get(code) }
    : { success: false, message: "Institute not found." };

  return NextResponse.json(response, {
    status: response.success === false ? 404 : 200,
    headers: {
      "Cache-Control": "public, max-age=3600, stale-while-revalidate=86400",
    },
  });
}

</app/api/(configurations)/inst-info/route.ts>

<app/api/(configurations)/sup-order/route.ts>
import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from "next/server";
import type { RowDataPacket } from "mysql2/promise";
import pool, { getEcCodeFromClerk } from "@/lib/db";

interface SupervisionData {
  total_students: number;
  schemes: string[];
  allotted: string[];
}


export async function GET(req: NextRequest) {
  const connection = await pool.getConnection();
  try {
    const { searchParams } = new URL(req.url);
    const [date, session] = [searchParams.get("date"), searchParams.get("session")];
    const ec_code = await getEcCodeFromClerk();

    if (!ec_code) throw new Error("Missing EC_CODE", { cause: 400 });
    if (!date || !session) throw new Error("Missing Date and Session", { cause: 400 });

    const [ttRows] = await connection.query<RowDataPacket[]>(
      `SELECT DATE_FORMAT(DATE, '%Y-%m-%d') AS DATE, SESSION,
              GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT SCHEME) AS SCHEMES, SUM(TOTAL_STUDENTS) AS TOTAL_STUDENTS
       FROM TH_TT_${ec_code}
       WHERE DATE = ? AND SESSION = ?
       GROUP BY DATE, SESSION`,
      [date, session]
    );

    if (!ttRows.length) {
      return NextResponse.json({
        status: 418,
        message: `No timetable data found for EC ${ec_code} on date ${date} and session ${session.toUpperCase()}`
      }, { status: 418 });
    }

    const [blockRows] = await connection.query<RowDataPacket[]>(
      `SELECT AVG(Strength) AS AVG_STRENGTH FROM THC_BLOCK_DETAILS_${ec_code}`
    );
    
    const [supRows] = await connection.query<RowDataPacket[]>(
      `SELECT ID, UID, NAME, DEPARTMENT FROM TH_SUP_${ec_code}`
    );
    
    const [allottedRows] = await connection.query<RowDataPacket[]>(
      `SELECT DATE_FORMAT(DATE, '%Y-%m-%d') AS DATE, SESSION, SUPERVISOR_UID
       FROM TH_SUP_ORD_${ec_code}
       WHERE DATE = ? AND SESSION = ?`,
      [date, session.toUpperCase()] 
    );

    const supervisionRequired = ttRows.reduce((acc: Record<string, Record<string, SupervisionData>>, row) => {
      acc[row.DATE] = {
        [row.SESSION]: {
          total_students: row.TOTAL_STUDENTS,
          schemes: row.SCHEMES.split(","),
          allotted: allottedRows.map(a => a.SUPERVISOR_UID)
        }
      };
      return acc;
    }, {});

    const supervisors = Object.fromEntries(
      supRows.map(sup => [sup.UID, { ID: sup.ID, NAME: sup.NAME, DEPARTMENT: sup.DEPARTMENT }])
    );

    return NextResponse.json({
      avg_strength: Number(blockRows[0]?.AVG_STRENGTH)?.toFixed(2) ?? "0.00",
      supervisors,
      supervision_required: supervisionRequired
    });
  } catch (error: unknown) {
    const err = error as { cause?: number; message?: string };
    console.error("Error fetching supervision data:", error);
    return NextResponse.json({
      status: err.cause || 500,
      message: err.message || "Internal server error"
    }, { status: err.cause || 500 });
  } finally {
    connection.release();
  }
}

export async function POST(req: NextRequest) {
  const connection = await pool.getConnection();
  try {
    const ec_code = await getEcCodeFromClerk();
    if (!ec_code) throw new Error("Missing EC_CODE", { cause: 400 });

    const { date, session, supervisor_ids, supervisor_uids } = await req.json() as {
      date: string;
      session: string;
      supervisor_ids: number[];
      supervisor_uids: string[];
    };
    
    if (!date || !session || !Array.isArray(supervisor_ids) || !Array.isArray(supervisor_uids) || 
        supervisor_ids.length !== supervisor_uids.length) {
      throw new Error("Missing or invalid required fields: date, session, supervisor_ids, supervisor_uids", { cause: 400 });
    }

    const table = `TH_SUP_ORD_${ec_code}`;
    await connection.beginTransaction();

    const values = supervisor_ids.map((id, index) => 
      [date, session.toUpperCase(), id, supervisor_uids[index]]
    );
    
    await connection.query(`
      INSERT INTO ${table} (DATE, SESSION, SUPERVISOR_ID, SUPERVISOR_UID)
      VALUES ?
      ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE 
        SUPERVISOR_ID = VALUES(SUPERVISOR_ID),
        SUPERVISOR_UID = VALUES(SUPERVISOR_UID)
    `, [values]);

    await connection.commit();
    return NextResponse.json({
      status: 200,
      message: "Supervision orders created/updated successfully"
    });
  } catch (error: unknown) {
    await connection.rollback();
    const err = error as { cause?: number; message?: string };
    console.error("Error creating supervision orders:", error);
    return NextResponse.json({
      status: err.cause || 500,
      message: err.message || "Internal server error"
    }, { status: err.cause || 500 });
  } finally {
    connection.release();
  }
}

export async function PUT(req: NextRequest) {
  const connection = await pool.getConnection();
  try {
    const ec_code = await getEcCodeFromClerk();
    if (!ec_code) throw new Error("Missing EC_CODE", { cause: 400 });

    const { date, session, old_supervisor_uid, new_supervisor_uid } = await req.json() as {
      date: string;
      session: string;
      old_supervisor_uid: string;
      new_supervisor_uid: string;
    };
    
    if (!date || !session || !old_supervisor_uid || !new_supervisor_uid) {
      throw new Error("Missing required fields", { cause: 400 });
    }

    const [newSupervisor] = await connection.query<RowDataPacket[]>(
      `SELECT ID FROM TH_SUP_${ec_code} WHERE UID = ?`,
      [new_supervisor_uid]
    );
    
    if (!newSupervisor.length) {
      throw new Error(`New supervisor with UID ${new_supervisor_uid} not found`, { cause: 400 });
    }

    const [result] = await connection.query(
      `UPDATE TH_SUP_ORD_${ec_code}
       SET SUPERVISOR_ID = ?, SUPERVISOR_UID = ?
       WHERE DATE = ? AND SESSION = ? AND SUPERVISOR_UID = ?`,
      [newSupervisor[0].ID, new_supervisor_uid, date, session.toUpperCase(), old_supervisor_uid]
    );

    if ((result as { affectedRows: number }).affectedRows === 0) {
      return NextResponse.json({
        status: 404,
        message: "No matching supervision order found to update"
      }, { status: 404 });
    }

    return NextResponse.json({
      status: 200,
      message: "Supervision order updated successfully"
    });
  } catch (error: unknown) {
    const err = error as { cause?: number; message?: string };
    console.error("Error updating supervision order:", error);
    return NextResponse.json({
      status: err.cause || 500,
      message: err.message || "Internal server error"
    }, { status: err.cause || 500 });
  } finally {
    connection.release();
  }
}
</app/api/(configurations)/sup-order/route.ts>

<app/api/(configurations)/timetable/route.ts>
import { NextResponse } from 'next/server';
import type { RowDataPacket } from 'mysql2/promise';
import pool, { getEcCodeFromClerk } from '@/lib/db';

export async function GET(req: Request) {
  try {
    // Extract query parameters
    const { searchParams } = new URL(req.url);
    const date = searchParams.get("date");
    const session = searchParams.get("session");

    // Get institute code
    const ec_code = await getEcCodeFromClerk();
    if (!ec_code) {
      return NextResponse.json({ status: 400, message: 'Missing inst_id parameter' }, { status: 400 });
    }

    const tableName = `TH_TT_${ec_code}`;

    // Check if table exists
    const [tables] = await pool.query<RowDataPacket[]>(`SHOW TABLES LIKE ?`, [tableName]);
    if (tables.length === 0) {
      return NextResponse.json({ status: 418, message: `Table ${tableName} not found` }, { status: 418 });
    }

    // Build dynamic SQL query
    let query = `
      SELECT 
        ID,
        DATE_FORMAT(DATE, '%Y-%m-%d') AS DATE,
        SESSION,
        TIME_SLOT,
        SUBJECT_CODE ,
        SUBJECT_NAME ,
        SUBJECT_ABBR,
        SCHEME ,
        ABSENT_NUMBERS,
        TOTAL_STUDENTS
      FROM ${tableName}
      WHERE 1=1
    `;
    const queryParams: (string | null)[] = [];

    // Add conditions dynamically
    if (date) {
      query += ` AND DATE = ?`;
      queryParams.push(date);
    }
    if (session) {
      query += ` AND SESSION = ?`;
      queryParams.push(session);
    }

    query += ` ORDER BY ID ASC`;

    // Execute query
    const [rows] = await pool.query<RowDataPacket[]>(query, queryParams);

    if (rows.length === 0) {
      return NextResponse.json({ status: 418, message: `No data found for exam center ${ec_code} on date ${date} and session ${session?.toUpperCase()}` }, { status: 418 });
    }

    // Check if block allocation exists
    const [blockAllocation] = await pool.query<RowDataPacket[]>(
      `SELECT * FROM TH_BLOCK_CONFIG_${ec_code} WHERE DATE = ? AND SESSION = ?`, [date, session]
    );
    const isBlockAllocated = blockAllocation.length > 0;

    // Process the results
    const processedResults = rows.map((row: RowDataPacket) => ({
      ID: row.ID,
      DATE: row.DATE,
      SESSION: row.SESSION,
      TIME_SLOT: row.TIME_SLOT,
      SUBJECT_CODE: row.SUBJECT_CODE,
      SUBJECT_NAME: row.SUBJECT_NAME,
      SUBJECT_ABBR: row.SUBJECT_ABBR,
      SCHEME: row.SCHEME,
      ABSENT_NUMBERS: row.ABSENT_NUMBERS,
      TOTAL_STUDENTS: row.TOTAL_STUDENTS,
      isBlockAllocated: isBlockAllocated,
    }));

    return NextResponse.json(processedResults, { status: 200 });

  } catch (error) {
    console.error('Error fetching timetable data:', error);
    return NextResponse.json({ status: 500, message: 'Internal server error' }, { status: 500 });
  }
}
export async function PUT() {
  try {
    const ec_code = await getEcCodeFromClerk();
    if (!ec_code) {
      return NextResponse.json({ status: 400, message: 'Missing inst_id parameter' }, { status: 400 });
    }

    const tableName = `TH_TT_${ec_code}`;
    const [tables] = await pool.query<RowDataPacket[]>(`SHOW TABLES LIKE ?`, [tableName]);

    if (tables.length === 0) {
      return NextResponse.json({ status: 418, message: `Table ${tableName} not found` }, { status: 418 });
    }

    const [rows] = await pool.query<RowDataPacket[]>(`SELECT * FROM ${tableName}`);
    if (rows.length === 0) {
      return NextResponse.json({ status: 418, message: `No data found in table ${tableName}` }, { status: 418 });
    }

    const jsonData = JSON.stringify(rows, null, 2);
    const stream = new ReadableStream({
      start(controller) {
        controller.enqueue(new TextEncoder().encode(jsonData));
        controller.close();
      },
    });

    return new NextResponse(stream, {
      status: 200,
      headers: {
        'Content-Type': 'application/json',
        'Content-Disposition': `attachment; filename="${tableName}.json"`,
      },
    });
  } catch (error) {
    console.error('Error exporting timetable data:', error);
    return NextResponse.json({ status: 500, message: 'Internal server error' }, { status: 500 });
  }
}
</app/api/(configurations)/timetable/route.ts>

<app/api/(configurations)/controller/route.ts>
import { NextResponse } from 'next/server';
import { RowDataPacket, ResultSetHeader } from 'mysql2/promise';
import pool, { getEcCodeFromClerk } from '@/lib/db';

// Define team member type
interface TeamMember {
    id?: number;
    name: string;
    designation: string;
    post_held_in_examination: string;
}

// Utility function to handle database errors
const handleDbError = (error: unknown) => {
    if (error instanceof Error && 'code' in error && error.code === 'ER_DUP_ENTRY') {
        return NextResponse.json({ error: 'Duplicate entry: ID must be unique' }, { status: 400 });
    }
    return NextResponse.json(
        { error: 'Internal server error', details: error instanceof Error ? error.message : 'Unknown error' },
        { status: 500 }
    );
};


// Fetch team members
const fetchTeamMembers = async (tableName: string, id?: number) => {
    let query = `SELECT * FROM ${tableName}`;
    const params = id ? [id] : [];
    if (id) query += ' WHERE id = ?';
    const [rows] = await pool.execute<RowDataPacket[]>(query, params);
    return rows;
};

// Insert team member
const insertTeamMember = async (tableName: string, teamMember: TeamMember) => {
    const { name, designation, post_held_in_examination } = teamMember;
    const query = `INSERT INTO ${tableName} (name, designation, post_held_in_examination) VALUES (?, ?, ?)`;
    const [result] = await pool.execute<ResultSetHeader>(query, [name, designation, post_held_in_examination]);
    return result.insertId;
};

// Update team member
const updateTeamMember = async (tableName: string, id: number, updates: Partial<TeamMember>) => {
    const fieldsToUpdate = [];
    const values = [];

    if (updates.name !== undefined) {
        fieldsToUpdate.push('name = ?');
        values.push(updates.name);
    }
    if (updates.designation !== undefined) {
        fieldsToUpdate.push('designation = ?');
        values.push(updates.designation);
    }
    if (updates.post_held_in_examination !== undefined) {
        fieldsToUpdate.push('post_held_in_examination = ?');
        values.push(updates.post_held_in_examination);
    }

    // If no fields are provided to update, return early
    if (fieldsToUpdate.length === 0) {
        throw new Error('No fields provided to update');
    }

    // Add the id to the values array for the WHERE clause
    values.push(id);

    // Construct the query dynamically
    const query = `UPDATE ${tableName} SET ${fieldsToUpdate.join(', ')} WHERE id = ?`;
    const [result] = await pool.execute<ResultSetHeader>(query, values);
    return result.affectedRows;
};

// Delete team member
const deleteTeamMember = async (tableName: string, id: number) => {
    const query = `DELETE FROM ${tableName} WHERE id = ?`;
    await pool.execute(query, [id]);
};

// GET: Fetch all or specific team member
export async function GET(request: Request) {
    const { searchParams } = new URL(request.url);
    const ec_code = await getEcCodeFromClerk();
    const id = searchParams.get('id');

    if (!ec_code) return NextResponse.json({ error: 'EC_CODE is required' }, { status: 400 });

    const tableName = `TH_CROOM_${ec_code}`;
    

    try {
        const rows = await fetchTeamMembers(tableName, id ? parseInt(id) : undefined);
        if (id && rows.length === 0) return NextResponse.json({ message: 'Team member not found' }, { status: 418 });
        return NextResponse.json(rows);
    } catch (error) {
        return handleDbError(error);
    }
}

// POST: Create a new team member
export async function POST(request: Request) {
    const ec_code = await getEcCodeFromClerk();
    if (!ec_code) return NextResponse.json({ error: 'EC_CODE is required' }, { status: 400 });

    const tableName = `TH_CROOM_${ec_code}`;
    

    try {
        const teamMember = await request.json();
        if (!teamMember.name || !teamMember.designation || !teamMember.post_held_in_examination) {
            return NextResponse.json({ error: 'Name, Designation, and Post Held in Examination are required' }, { status: 400 });
        }

        const insertId = await insertTeamMember(tableName, teamMember);
        const [newTeamMember] = await fetchTeamMembers(tableName, insertId);
        return NextResponse.json(newTeamMember, { status: 201 });
    } catch (error) {
        return handleDbError(error);
    }
}

// PUT: Update an existing team member
export async function PUT(request: Request) {
    const { searchParams } = new URL(request.url);
    const ec_code = await getEcCodeFromClerk();
    const id = searchParams.get('id');
    if (!ec_code || !id) return NextResponse.json({ error: 'EC_CODE and ID are required' }, { status: 400 });

    const tableName = `TH_CROOM_${ec_code}`;
    

    try {
        const updates = await request.json();
        if (!updates.name && !updates.designation && !updates.post_held_in_examination) {
            return NextResponse.json({ error: 'At least one field (Name, Designation, Post Held in Examination) is required' }, { status: 400 });
        }

        const affectedRows = await updateTeamMember(tableName, parseInt(id), updates);
        if (affectedRows === 0) return NextResponse.json({ message: 'Team member not found' }, { status: 418 });

        const [updatedTeamMember] = await fetchTeamMembers(tableName, parseInt(id));
        return NextResponse.json(updatedTeamMember);
    } catch (error) {
        return handleDbError(error);
    }
}

// DELETE: Delete a team member
export async function DELETE(request: Request) {
    const { searchParams } = new URL(request.url);
    const ec_code = await getEcCodeFromClerk();
    const id = searchParams.get('id');
    if (!ec_code || !id) return NextResponse.json({ error: 'EC_CODE and ID are required' }, { status: 400 });

    const tableName = `TH_CROOM_${ec_code}`;
    

    try {
        const [teamMember] = await fetchTeamMembers(tableName, parseInt(id));
        if (!teamMember) return NextResponse.json({ message: 'Team member not found' }, { status: 418 });

        await deleteTeamMember(tableName, parseInt(id));
        return NextResponse.json({ status: 'successful', data: teamMember });
    } catch (error) {
        return handleDbError(error);
    }
}
</app/api/(configurations)/controller/route.ts>

<app/api/(configurations)/block/route.ts>
import { NextResponse } from "next/server";
import db from "@/lib/db";
import { RowDataPacket } from "mysql2";

interface BlockRow extends RowDataPacket {
    BlockID: string;
    BlockName: string;
    Strength: number;
}

interface BlockDetails {
    Name: string;
    Strength: number;
    currentStrength: number;
    distribution: number[]
}

interface BlockData {
    [key: string]: BlockDetails;
}

export async function GET() {
    let conn;
    try {
        conn = await db.getConnection();
        const query = "SELECT * FROM THC_BLOCK_DETAILS_1740;";
        const [rows] = await conn.query<BlockRow[]>(query);

        const formattedData = rows.reduce((acc: BlockData, row: BlockRow) => {
            acc[row.LOCATION] = {
                Name: row.LOCATION,
                Strength: row.STRENGTH,
                currentStrength: row.STRENGTH,
                distribution: row.DISTRIBUTION,
            };
            return acc;
        }, {});

        return NextResponse.json(formattedData);
    } catch (error) {
        return NextResponse.json({ error: "Failed to fetch block details."+error }, { status: 500 });
    } finally {
        if (conn) conn.release();
    }
}

</app/api/(configurations)/block/route.ts>

<app/api/(configurations)/relievers/route.ts>
import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from "next/server";
import { RowDataPacket, ResultSetHeader } from 'mysql2/promise';
import pool, { getEcCodeFromClerk } from "@/lib/db";

interface Reliever {
    UID: string;
    NAME: string;
    DEPARTMENT: string;
    EMAIL: string;
}

// Fetch reliever(s)
const fetchRelievers = async (tableName: string, uid?: string) => {
    let query = `SELECT * FROM ${tableName}`;
    const params = uid ? [uid] : [];
    if (uid) query += ' WHERE UID = ?';
    const [rows] = await pool.execute<RowDataPacket[]>(query, params);
    return rows;
};

// Insert reliever
const insertReliever = async (tableName: string, reliever: Reliever) => {
    const { UID, NAME, DEPARTMENT, EMAIL } = reliever;
    const query = `INSERT INTO ${tableName} (UID, NAME, DEPARTMENT,  EMAIL) VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?)`;
    const [result] = await pool.execute<ResultSetHeader>(query, [UID, NAME, DEPARTMENT, EMAIL]);
    return result.insertId;
};

// Update reliever
const updateReliever = async (
    tableName: string,
    uid: string,
    updates: Partial<Reliever>
) => {
    const fields: string[] = [];
    const params: (string)[] = [];

    if (updates.NAME !== undefined) {
        fields.push("NAME = ?");
        params.push(updates.NAME);
    }

    if (updates.DEPARTMENT !== undefined) {
        fields.push("DEPARTMENT = ?");
        params.push(updates.DEPARTMENT);
    }

    if (updates.EMAIL !== undefined) {
        fields.push("EMAIL = ?");
        params.push(updates.EMAIL);
    }

    if (fields.length === 0) {
        throw new Error("No fields to update");
    }

    const query = `UPDATE ${tableName} SET ${fields.join(", ")} WHERE UID = ?`;
    params.push(uid);

    const [result] = await pool.execute<ResultSetHeader>(query, params);
    return result.affectedRows;
};

// Delete reliever
const deleteReliever = async (tableName: string, uid: string) => {
    const query = `DELETE FROM ${tableName} WHERE UID = ?`;
    await pool.execute(query, [uid]);
};

// Error handler
const handleDbError = (error: unknown) => {
    console.error('Database error:', error);
    return NextResponse.json(
        { error: error instanceof Error ? error.message : 'Internal server error' },
        { status: 500 }
    );
};

// GET: Fetch all relievers or a specific reliever
export async function GET(req: NextRequest) {

    const n = 3; // Number of blocks per reliever
    const connection = await pool.getConnection();
    try {
        const ec_code = await getEcCodeFromClerk();
        if (!ec_code) {
            return NextResponse.json({ error: "Missing EC_CODE" }, { status: 400 });
        }

        const { searchParams } = new URL(req.url);
        const action = searchParams.get("action");
        const date = searchParams.get("date");
        const session = searchParams.get("session");

        // If no action specified, return all relievers
        if (!action) {
            const [rows] = await connection.query<RowDataPacket[]>(
                `SELECT * FROM TH_REL_${ec_code}`
            );
            return NextResponse.json(rows);
        }

        // For relorder action
        if (action === "relorder") {
            // If no date/session, return all reliever orders
            if (!date || !session) {
                const [orders] = await connection.query<RowDataPacket[]>(
                    `SELECT o.*, r.NAME, r.DEPARTMENT, r.EMAIL 
                    FROM TH_REL_ORD_${ec_code} o
                    LEFT JOIN TH_REL_${ec_code} r ON o.RELIEVER_ID = r.ID 
                    ORDER BY o.ID, o.DATE ASC, o.SESSION DESC`
                );
                return NextResponse.json(orders);
            }

            // Get blocks with supervisors
            const [blocks] = await connection.query<RowDataPacket[]>(
                `SELECT DISTINCT 
                    BLOCKNO, 
                    LOCATION, 
                    SUPERVISOR_NAME, 
                    TIMESLOT 
                FROM TH_BLOCK_CONFIG_${ec_code} 
                WHERE DATE = ? AND SESSION = ? 
                AND SUPERVISOR_NAME IS NOT NULL
                ORDER BY BLOCKNO`,
                [date, session]
            );

            // Get relievers assigned for this date and session
            const [relievers] = await connection.query<RowDataPacket[]>(
                `SELECT 
                    r.ID,
                    r.NAME,
                    r.DEPARTMENT
                FROM TH_REL_${ec_code} r
                JOIN TH_REL_ORD_${ec_code} ro ON r.ID = ro.RELIEVER_ID
                WHERE ro.DATE = ? AND ro.SESSION = ?
                ORDER BY ro.ID, ro.DATE ASC, ro.SESSION DESC`,
                [date, session]
            );

            if (blocks.length === 0) {
                return NextResponse.json({
                    message: "No blocks found for the specified date and session"
                }, { status: 404 });
            }

            // Group blocks into sets of 3
            const blockGroups: RowDataPacket[][] = [];
            for (let i = 0; i < blocks.length; i += n) {
                blockGroups.push(blocks.slice(i, i + n));
            }

            // Assign blocks to relievers
            const transformedData = relievers.map((reliever, index) => {
                const assignedBlocks = blockGroups[index] || [];
                return {
                    name: reliever.NAME,
                    department: reliever.DEPARTMENT,
                    blocks: assignedBlocks.map((block: RowDataPacket) => ({
                        blockNo: block.BLOCKNO,
                        location: block.LOCATION,
                        supervisor: block.SUPERVISOR_NAME,
                        timeslot: block.TIMESLOT
                    }))
                };
            });

            // Filter out relievers with no blocks
            const filteredData = transformedData.filter(reliever => reliever.blocks.length > 0);

            return NextResponse.json(filteredData);
        }

        return NextResponse.json({ error: "Invalid action" }, { status: 400 });
    } catch (error) {
        console.error("Error in relievers route:", error);
        return NextResponse.json(
            { error: "Failed to fetch reliever data" },
            { status: 500 }
        );
    } finally {
        connection.release();
    }
}

// POST: Create a new reliever
export async function POST(request: Request) {
    const ec_code = await getEcCodeFromClerk();
    if (!ec_code) return NextResponse.json({ error: 'EC_CODE is required' }, { status: 400 });

    const tableName = `TH_REL_${ec_code}`;

    try {
        const reliever = await request.json();
        if (!reliever.UID || !reliever.NAME || !reliever.DEPARTMENT) {
            return NextResponse.json({ error: 'UID, NAME, DEPARTMENT are required', data_recieved: { reliever } }, { status: 400 });
        }

        await insertReliever(tableName, reliever);
        const [newReliever] = await fetchRelievers(tableName, reliever.UID);
        return NextResponse.json(newReliever, { status: 201 });
    } catch (error) {
        return handleDbError(error);
    }
}

// PUT: Update a reliever
export async function PUT(request: Request) {
    const ec_code = await getEcCodeFromClerk();
    if (!ec_code) return NextResponse.json({ error: 'EC_CODE is required' }, { status: 400 });

    const tableName = `TH_REL_${ec_code}`;
    const url = new URL(request.url);
    const uid = url.searchParams.get('uid');

    if (!uid) {
        return NextResponse.json({ error: 'UID is required' }, { status: 400 });
    }

    try {
        const updates = await request.json();
        await updateReliever(tableName, uid, updates);
        const [updatedReliever] = await fetchRelievers(tableName, uid);
        return NextResponse.json(updatedReliever);
    } catch (error) {
        return handleDbError(error);
    }
}

// DELETE: Delete a reliever
export async function DELETE(request: Request) {
    const ec_code = await getEcCodeFromClerk();
    if (!ec_code) return NextResponse.json({ error: 'EC_CODE is required' }, { status: 400 });

    const tableName = `TH_REL_${ec_code}`;
    const url = new URL(request.url);
    const uid = url.searchParams.get('uid');

    if (!uid) {
        return NextResponse.json({ error: 'UID is required' }, { status: 400 });
    }

    try {
        await deleteReliever(tableName, uid);
        return NextResponse.json({ message: 'Reliever deleted successfully' });
    } catch (error) {
        return handleDbError(error);
    }
} 
</app/api/(configurations)/relievers/route.ts>
