<app/api/payments/webhook/route.ts>
import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from 'next/server';
import crypto from 'crypto';
import { updateUserMetadata } from '@/lib/clerk-data';

export async function POST(req: NextRequest) {
  try {
    const body = await req.text(); // Webhooks send raw body
    const signature = req.headers.get('x-razorpay-signature');
    if (!signature) {
      return NextResponse.json({ error: 'Missing signature' }, { status: 400 });
    }

    const generatedSignature = crypto
      .createHmac('sha256', process.env.RAZORPAY_WEBHOOK_SECRET!)
      .update(body)
      .digest('hex');

    if (generatedSignature !== signature) {
      return NextResponse.json({ error: 'Invalid webhook signature' }, { status: 400 });
    }

    const { payload } = JSON.parse(body);
    const event = payload?.payment?.entity;

    if (event && event.status === 'captured') {
      const { notes, id: paymentId, amount } = event;
      const { userId, planId } = notes || {};

      if (userId && planId) {
        const expiryDate = getExpiry(planId);
        await updateUserMetadata(userId, planId, amount, expiryDate, paymentId);
      }
    }

    return NextResponse.json({ status: 'success' });
  } catch (error) {
    console.error('Webhook error:', error);
    return NextResponse.json({ error: 'Internal server error' }, { status: 500 });
  }
}

function getExpiry(planId: string): string | null {
  const expiryMap: Record<string, number | null> = {
    lifetime: null,
    '5year_online': 5 * 365,
    '1year_online': 365,
    semester: 180,
  };
  const days = expiryMap[planId] ?? 180;
  return days ? new Date(Date.now() + days * 24 * 60 * 60 * 1000).toISOString() : null;
}
</app/api/payments/webhook/route.ts>

<app/api/payments/checkout/route.ts>
import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from 'next/server';
import Razorpay from 'razorpay';
import crypto from 'crypto';
import { auth } from '@clerk/nextjs/server';
import { getUserMetadata, updateUserMetadata } from '@/lib/clerk-data';

const rzp = new Razorpay({
  key_id: process.env.RAZORPAY_KEY_ID!,
  key_secret: process.env.RAZORPAY_KEY_SECRET!,
});

export async function POST(req: NextRequest) {
  const { userId } = await auth();
  if (!userId) return NextResponse.json({ error: 'Unauthorized' }, { status: 401 });

  try {
    const body = await req.json();
    const { action, planId, amount, razorpay_payment_id, razorpay_order_id, razorpay_signature } = body;

    // Validate request body
    if (!action || !['create', 'verify'].includes(action)) {
      return NextResponse.json({ error: 'Invalid or missing action' }, { status: 400 });
    }

    // Check if user has an active plan
    let userMetadata;
    try {
      userMetadata = await getUserMetadata(userId);
    } catch (error) {
      console.error('Failed to fetch user metadata:', error);
      return NextResponse.json({ error: 'Failed to verify user plan status' }, { status: 500 });
    }

    const isPlanActive =
      userMetadata?.nextPaymentExpiry &&
      (userMetadata.nextPaymentExpiry === null || new Date(userMetadata.nextPaymentExpiry) > new Date());

    if (isPlanActive && action === 'create') {
      return NextResponse.json({ error: 'Active plan exists' }, { status: 403 });
    }

    if (action === 'create') {
      if (!planId || !amount) {
        return NextResponse.json({ error: 'Missing planId or amount' }, { status: 400 });
      }

      // Validate planId and amount against PLANS
      const PLANS = [
        { id: 'semester', amount: 289900 },
        { id: '1year_online', amount: 550000 },
        { id: '5year_online', amount: 2600000 },
        { id: 'lifetime', amount: 3000000 },
      ];
      const validPlan = PLANS.find((p) => p.id === planId && p.amount === amount);
      if (!validPlan) {
        return NextResponse.json({ error: 'Invalid planId or amount' }, { status: 400 });
      }

      const order = await rzp.orders.create({
        amount,
        currency: 'INR',
        receipt: `receipt_${Date.now()}`,
        notes: { userId, planId },
      });
      return NextResponse.json({ order });
    }

    if (action === 'verify') {
      if (!razorpay_payment_id || !razorpay_order_id || !razorpay_signature || !planId) {
        return NextResponse.json({ error: 'Missing required verification fields' }, { status: 400 });
      }

      const generatedSignature = crypto
        .createHmac('sha256', process.env.RAZORPAY_KEY_SECRET!) // Use RAZORPAY_KEY_SECRET
        .update(`${razorpay_order_id}|${razorpay_payment_id}`)
        .digest('hex');

      if (generatedSignature !== razorpay_signature) {
        console.error('Signature mismatch:', { generatedSignature, razorpay_signature });
        return NextResponse.json({ error: 'Invalid signature' }, { status: 400 });
      }

      const expiryDate = getExpiry(planId);
      
      await updateUserMetadata(userId, planId, amount, expiryDate, razorpay_payment_id);
      return NextResponse.json({ status: 'success' });
    }
  } catch (error) {
    console.error('Payment error:', error);
    return NextResponse.json({ error: 'Internal server error' }, { status: 500 });
  }
}

function getExpiry(planId: string): string | null {
  const expiryMap: Record<string, number | null> = {
    lifetime: null,
    '5year_online': 5 * 365,
    '1year_online': 365,
    semester: 180,
  };
  const days = expiryMap[planId] ?? 180;
  return days ? new Date(Date.now() + days * 24 * 60 * 60 * 1000).toISOString() : null;
}
</app/api/payments/checkout/route.ts>

<app/api/(examinee)/cps/route.ts>
import { NextResponse } from "next/server";
import dotenv from "dotenv";
import pool, { getEcCodeFromClerk } from "@/lib/db";
import { RowDataPacket, ResultSetHeader } from "mysql2";

dotenv.config();

const validateDate = (date: string) => !isNaN(Date.parse(date));

interface BlockConfig extends RowDataPacket {
    INST_CODE: string;
    BLOCKNO: string;
    LOCATION: string;
    SCHEME: string;
    SUBJECT_CODE: string;
    SUBJECT_NAME: string;
    ASSIGNED: number;
    SEAT_NUMBERS: string[];
}

interface CpsRecord extends RowDataPacket {
    SUBJECT_CODE: string;
    SCHEME: string;
    CPS_STUDENTS: number[];
}

export async function GET(req: Request) {
    try {
        const url = new URL(req.url);
        const date = url.searchParams.get("date");
        const session = url.searchParams.get("session");
        const ec_code = await getEcCodeFromClerk();

        if (!date || !session || !ec_code || !validateDate(date)) {
            return NextResponse.json({ error: "Invalid input" }, { status: 400 });
        }

        const conn = await pool.getConnection();
        const [[blocks], [cpsAbsentRecords]] = await Promise.all([
            conn.query<BlockConfig[]>(`SELECT * FROM TH_BLOCK_CONFIG_${ec_code} WHERE DATE = ? AND SESSION = ?`, [date, session]),
            conn.query<CpsRecord[]>(`SELECT SUBJECT_CODE, SCHEME, CPS_STUDENTS, ABSENT_NUMBERS FROM TH_TT_${ec_code} WHERE DATE = ? AND SESSION = ?`, [date, session]),
        ]);
        conn.release();

        if (!blocks || blocks.length === 0) {
            return NextResponse.json({ error: "No block allocation found" }, { status: 418 });
        }

        const cpsAbsentMap = Object.fromEntries(
            (cpsAbsentRecords || []).map(({ SUBJECT_CODE, SCHEME, CPS_STUDENTS, ABSENT_NUMBERS }) => [
                `${SUBJECT_CODE}_${SCHEME}`,
                { cps_students: CPS_STUDENTS || [], absent_students: ABSENT_NUMBERS || [] },
            ])
        );

        return NextResponse.json(
            blocks.map(({ INST_CODE, BLOCKNO, LOCATION, SCHEME, SUBJECT_CODE, SUBJECT_NAME, ASSIGNED, SEAT_NUMBERS }) => {
                const key = `${SUBJECT_CODE}_${SCHEME}`;
                return {
                    institute_id: INST_CODE,
                    blockno: BLOCKNO,
                    location: LOCATION,
                    scheme: SCHEME,
                    subject_code: SUBJECT_CODE,
                    subject_name: SUBJECT_NAME,
                    total_students: ASSIGNED,
                    seatNumbers: SEAT_NUMBERS,
                    cps_students: cpsAbsentMap[key]?.cps_students || [],
                    absent_students: cpsAbsentMap[key]?.absent_students || [],
                };
            })
        );
    } catch (error) {
        const err = error as Error;
        return NextResponse.json({ error: "Database error", details: err.message }, { status: 500 });
    }
}


interface PostRequest {
    date: string;
    session: string;
    subject_code: string;
    scheme: string;
    cps_students: number[];
}

export async function POST(req: Request) {
    try {
        const { date, session, subject_code, scheme, cps_students } = await req.json() as PostRequest;
        const ec_code = await getEcCodeFromClerk();

        if (!date || !session || !subject_code || !scheme || !Array.isArray(cps_students)) {
            return NextResponse.json({ error: "Invalid input" }, { status: 400 });
        }

        const conn = await pool.getConnection();
        await conn.query<ResultSetHeader>(
            `UPDATE TH_TT_${ec_code} SET CPS_STUDENTS = ? WHERE DATE = ? AND SESSION = ? AND SUBJECT_CODE = ? AND SCHEME = ?`,
            [JSON.stringify([...new Set(cps_students)].sort()), date, session, subject_code, scheme]
        );
        conn.release();

        return NextResponse.json({ message: "CPS students updated successfully", cps_students });
    } catch (error) {
        const err = error as Error;
        return NextResponse.json({ error: "Database error", details: err.message }, { status: 500 });
    }
}

</app/api/(examinee)/cps/route.ts>

<app/api/(examinee)/qp-acc/route.ts>
import { NextResponse } from "next/server";
import dotenv from "dotenv";
import pool, { getEcCodeFromClerk } from "@/lib/db";
import { RowDataPacket } from "mysql2";

dotenv.config();

interface InventoryRecord extends RowDataPacket {
  E_SUB_CODE: string;
  E_TOTAL_STUDENT: number;
  E_TOTAL_PACKETS: number;
  R_TOTAL_PACKETS: number;
  R_TOTAL_QPS: number;
  DATE: string;
  SESSION: string;
}

export async function GET(req: Request) {
  try {
    const url = new URL(req.url);
    const date = url.searchParams.get("date");
    const ec_code = await getEcCodeFromClerk();

    if (!ec_code || !date) {
      return NextResponse.json({ error: "Invalid input" }, { status: 400 });
    }

    const conn = await pool.getConnection();
    const [inventory] = await conn.query<InventoryRecord[]>(
      `SELECT * FROM TH_IV_${ec_code} WHERE DATE = ? `,
      [date]
    );
    conn.release();

    return NextResponse.json(inventory);
  } catch (error) {
    const err = error as Error;
    return NextResponse.json({ error: "Database error", details: err.message }, { status: 500 });
  }
}

export async function PUT(req: Request) {
  try {
    const url = new URL(req.url);
    const date = url.searchParams.get("date");
    const ec_code = await getEcCodeFromClerk();

    if (!ec_code || !date) {
      return NextResponse.json({ error: "Invalid input" }, { status: 400 });
    }

    const body = await req.json();
    const inventoryData: InventoryRecord[] = body;

    if (!Array.isArray(inventoryData)) {
      return NextResponse.json({ error: "Invalid data format" }, { status: 400 });
    }

    const conn = await pool.getConnection();

    // Update each record in the database
    for (const record of inventoryData) {
      const { E_SUB_CODE, R_TOTAL_PACKETS, QP_PER_PACKET } = record;

      await conn.query(
        `UPDATE TH_IV_${ec_code} 
         SET R_TOTAL_PACKETS = ?, R_TOTAL_QPS = ? 
         WHERE E_SUB_CODE = ? AND DATE = ?`,
        [R_TOTAL_PACKETS, QP_PER_PACKET, E_SUB_CODE, date]
      );
    }

    conn.release();

    return NextResponse.json({ message: "Inventory updated successfully" });
  } catch (error) {
    const err = error as Error;
    return NextResponse.json({ error: "Database error", details: err.message }, { status: 500 });
  }
}
</app/api/(examinee)/qp-acc/route.ts>

<app/api/(examinee)/absent/route.ts>
import { NextResponse } from "next/server";
import dotenv from "dotenv";
import pool, { getEcCodeFromClerk } from "@/lib/db";
import { RowDataPacket, ResultSetHeader } from "mysql2";

dotenv.config();

const validateDate = (date: string) => !isNaN(Date.parse(date));

interface BlockConfig extends RowDataPacket {
  INST_CODE: string;
  BLOCKNO: string;
  LOCATION: string;
  SCHEME: string;
  SUBJECT_CODE: string;
  SUBJECT_NAME: string;
  ASSIGNED: number;
  SEAT_NUMBERS: string[];
}

interface AbsentRecord extends RowDataPacket {
  SUBJECT_CODE: string;
  SCHEME: string;
  ABSENT_NUMBERS: number[];
}

export async function GET(req: Request) {
  try {
    const url = new URL(req.url);
    const date = url.searchParams.get("date");
    const session = url.searchParams.get("session");
    const ec_code = await getEcCodeFromClerk();

    if (!date || !session || !ec_code || !validateDate(date)) {
      return NextResponse.json({ error: "Invalid input" }, { status: 400 });
    }

    const conn = await pool.getConnection();
    const [[blocks], [absents]] = await Promise.all([
      conn.query<BlockConfig[]>(`SELECT * FROM TH_BLOCK_CONFIG_${ec_code} WHERE DATE = ? AND SESSION = ?`, [date, session]),
      conn.query<AbsentRecord[]>(`SELECT SUBJECT_CODE, SCHEME, ABSENT_NUMBERS FROM TH_TT_${ec_code} WHERE DATE = ? AND SESSION = ?`, [date, session]),
    ]);
    conn.release();

    if (!blocks || blocks.length === 0) {
      return NextResponse.json({ error: "No block allocation found" }, { status: 418 });
    }

    const absentMap = Object.fromEntries(
      (absents || []).map(({ SUBJECT_CODE, SCHEME, ABSENT_NUMBERS }) => [
        `${SUBJECT_CODE}_${SCHEME}`,
        ABSENT_NUMBERS || [],
      ])
    );

    return NextResponse.json(
      blocks.map(({ INST_CODE, BLOCKNO, LOCATION, SCHEME, SUBJECT_CODE, SUBJECT_NAME, ASSIGNED, SEAT_NUMBERS }) => ({
        institute_id: INST_CODE,
        blockno: BLOCKNO,
        location: LOCATION,
        scheme: SCHEME,
        subject_code: SUBJECT_CODE,
        subject_name: SUBJECT_NAME,
        total_students: ASSIGNED,
        seatNumbers: SEAT_NUMBERS,
        absent_numbers: absentMap[`${SUBJECT_CODE}_${SCHEME}`] || [],
      }))
    );
  } catch (error) {
    const err = error as Error;
    return NextResponse.json({ error: "Database error", details: err.message }, { status: 500 });
  }
}

interface PostRequest {
  date: string;
  session: string;
  subject_code: string;
  scheme: string;
  absent_numbers: number[];
}

export async function POST(req: Request) {
  try {
    const { date, session, subject_code, scheme, absent_numbers } = await req.json() as PostRequest;
    const ec_code = await getEcCodeFromClerk();

    if (!date || !session || !subject_code || !scheme || !Array.isArray(absent_numbers)) {
      return NextResponse.json({ error: "Invalid input" }, { status: 400 });
    }

    const conn = await pool.getConnection();
    await conn.query<ResultSetHeader>(
      `UPDATE TH_TT_${ec_code} SET ABSENT_NUMBERS = ? WHERE DATE = ? AND SESSION = ? AND SUBJECT_CODE = ? AND SCHEME = ?`,
      [JSON.stringify([...new Set(absent_numbers)].sort()), date, session, subject_code, scheme]
    );
    conn.release();

    return NextResponse.json({ message: "Absent numbers updated successfully", absent_numbers });
  } catch (error) {
    const err = error as Error;
    return NextResponse.json({ error: "Database error", details: err.message }, { status: 500 });
  }
}

</app/api/(examinee)/absent/route.ts>

<app/api/(block-allocation)/packing-slip/route.ts>
import { NextResponse } from 'next/server';
import pool, { getEcCodeFromClerk } from '@/lib/db';
import { RowDataPacket } from 'mysql2';

interface TTRow extends RowDataPacket {
    DATE: string;
    SESSION: string;
    TIME_SLOT: string;
    SCHEME: string;
    SUBJECT_CODE: string;
    SUBJECT_NAME: string;
    TOTAL_STUDENTS: number;
    ABSENT_NUMBERS: string;
    CPS_NUMBERS: string; // Added for copy case students
}

interface MarksheetRow extends RowDataPacket {
    SHEET_NO: string;
    SUBJECT_NAME: string;
    FILE_NAME: string;
}

export async function GET(req: Request) {
    try {
        const { searchParams } = new URL(req.url);
        const date = searchParams.get('date');
        const session = searchParams.get('session');
        const ec_code = await getEcCodeFromClerk();

        if (!date) {
            return NextResponse.json({ error: 'Missing required date parameter' }, { status: 400 });
        }

        const conn = await pool.getConnection();

        try {
            const query = session
                ? `SELECT DATE_FORMAT(DATE, '%Y-%m-%d') AS DATE, SESSION, TIME_SLOT, SCHEME, SUBJECT_CODE, SUBJECT_NAME, TOTAL_STUDENTS, ABSENT_NUMBERS, CPS_STUDENTS 
                   FROM TH_TT_${ec_code} WHERE DATE = ? AND SESSION = ?`
                : `SELECT DATE_FORMAT(DATE, '%Y-%m-%d') AS DATE, SESSION, TIME_SLOT, SCHEME, SUBJECT_CODE, SUBJECT_NAME, TOTAL_STUDENTS, ABSENT_NUMBERS, CPS_STUDENTS 
                   FROM TH_TT_${ec_code} WHERE DATE = ?`;

            const values = session ? [date, session] : [date];

            const [ttData] = await conn.execute<TTRow[]>(query, values);

            if (!ttData.length) {
                return NextResponse.json({ error: 'No data found for the given date and session' }, { status: 404 });
            }

            const result = [];
            for (const row of ttData) {
                const [marksheetData] = await conn.execute<MarksheetRow[]>(
                    `SELECT SHEET_NO, SUBJECT_NAME, FILE_NAME FROM TH_EM_${ec_code} WHERE PAPER_CODE = ? AND SCHEME = ?`,
                    [row.SUBJECT_CODE, row.SCHEME]
                );

                // Parse absent and copy case numbers
                const absentNumbers = row.ABSENT_NUMBERS ? row.ABSENT_NUMBERS : [];
                const cpsNumbers = row.CPS_STUDENTS ? row.CPS_STUDENTS : [];

                // Adjust total students by subtracting absent students

                for (const sheet of marksheetData) {
                    const institute_id = sheet.FILE_NAME.split('.')[0].match(/\d+$/)?.[0];
                    if (!institute_id) continue;

                    result.push({
                        INSTITUTE_CODE: institute_id,
                        DATE: row.DATE,
                        SESSION: row.SESSION,
                        TIME_SLOT: row.TIME_SLOT,
                        SCHEME: row.SCHEME,
                        SUBJECT_CODE: row.SUBJECT_CODE,
                        TOTAL_STUDENTS: row.TOTAL_STUDENTS,
                        SHEET_NO: sheet.SHEET_NO,
                        SUBJECT_NAME: sheet.SUBJECT_NAME,
                        ABSENT_NUMBERS: absentNumbers, // Include absent numbers
                        CPS_NUMBERS: cpsNumbers, // Include copy case numbers
                    });
                }
            }

            return NextResponse.json(result);
        } finally {
            conn.release();
        }
    } catch (error) {
        console.error('Database error:', error);
        return NextResponse.json({ error: 'Internal server error' }, { status: 500 });
    }
}
</app/api/(block-allocation)/packing-slip/route.ts>

<app/api/(block-allocation)/blocks/route.ts>
import db, { getEcCodeFromClerk } from "@/lib/db";
import { NextResponse } from "next/server";
import { z } from "zod";
import { RowDataPacket, ResultSetHeader } from "mysql2";

// Define request schemas using Zod


const RequestPayloadSchema = z.object({
    date: z.string(),
    session: z.string(),
    blocks: z.array(z.object({
        blockName: z.string(),
        scheme: z.string(),
        subCode: z.string(),
        supervisor: z.string(),
        numberOfCandidates: z.string(),
        startFrom: z.string(),
        timeslot: z.string()
    }))
});

const DeleteRequestSchema = z.object({
    date: z.string().regex(/^\d{4}-\d{2}-\d{2}$/),
    session: z.string(),
});

// Create Blocks
// Create Blocks
export async function POST(req: Request) {
    try {

        const eccode = await getEcCodeFromClerk();
        const json = await req.json();
        const { date, session, blocks } = RequestPayloadSchema.parse(json);

        const conn = await db.getConnection();

        await conn.beginTransaction();
        const tableName = `TH_BLOCK_CONFIG_${eccode}`;
        let currentblock = 0;
        const blockNumberMap: Record<string, number> = {};

        for (const block of blocks) {
            // Fetch subject name
            const [subject] = await conn.execute<RowDataPacket[]>(
                "SELECT NAME FROM THC_SCHEME_DETAILS WHERE CODE = ?", [block.subCode]
            );
            if (!subject.length) throw new Error(`SUBJECT_NAME NOT FOUND FOR SUBCODE: ${block.subCode}`);

            // Fetch supervisor name
            const [supervisor] = await conn.execute<RowDataPacket[]>(
                `SELECT NAME FROM TH_SUP_${eccode} WHERE UID = ?`, [block.supervisor]
            );
            if (!supervisor.length) throw new Error(`SUPERVISOR NOT FOUND FOR UID: ${block.supervisor}`);

            // Fetch block strength
            const [strength] = await conn.execute<RowDataPacket[]>(
                `SELECT STRENGTH FROM THC_BLOCK_DETAILS_${eccode} WHERE LOCATION = ?`, [block.blockName]
            );
            if (!strength.length) throw new Error(`STRENGTH NOT FOUND FOR LOCATION: ${block.blockName}`);

            // Fetch seat numbers along with INST_CODE
            const [seatNumbers] = await conn.execute<RowDataPacket[]>(
                `SELECT SEAT_NO, INST_CODE 
                 FROM TH_SC_${eccode} 
                 WHERE JSON_CONTAINS(SUB_CODES, ?) 
                   AND SCHEME = ? 
                 LIMIT ? OFFSET ?`,
                [JSON.stringify(block.subCode), block.scheme, block.numberOfCandidates.toString(), (Number(block.startFrom) - 1).toString()]
            );

            const seatsArray = seatNumbers.map((s: RowDataPacket) => s.SEAT_NO);
            const instCode = seatNumbers.length ? seatNumbers[0].INST_CODE : null;
            const firstEntry = seatsArray.length ? seatsArray[0] : null;
            const lastEntry = seatsArray.length ? seatsArray[seatsArray.length - 1] : null;

            // Change current block number based on block name mapping
            if (!(block.blockName in blockNumberMap)) {
                blockNumberMap[block.blockName] = currentblock;
                currentblock++;
            }

            // Insert into THC_BLOCK_CONFIG
            await conn.execute<ResultSetHeader>(
                `INSERT INTO ${tableName} 
                 (INST_CODE, DATE, SESSION, TIMESLOT, BLOCKNO, LOCATION, SCHEME, SUBJECT_CODE, SUBJECT_NAME, SEAT_NUMBERS, FIRST, LAST, ASSIGNED, STRENGTH, SUPERVISOR_UID, SUPERVISOR_NAME) 
                 VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?);`,
                [instCode, date, session, block.timeslot, currentblock, block.blockName, block.scheme, block.subCode,
                    subject[0].NAME, JSON.stringify(seatsArray), firstEntry, lastEntry, seatsArray.length, strength[0].STRENGTH,
                    block.supervisor, supervisor[0].NAME]
            );
        }

        await conn.commit();
        conn.release();
        return NextResponse.json({ message: "BLOCKS AND CONFIG CREATED SUCCESSFULLY" });

    } catch (error) {
        console.error("DATABASE ERROR:", error);
        return NextResponse.json({ error: error instanceof Error ? error.message : "An unknown error occurred" }, { status: 500 });
    }
}

// Delete Blocks
export async function DELETE(req: Request) {
    try {
        const json = await req.json();
        const { date, session } = DeleteRequestSchema.parse(json);

        const eccode = await getEcCodeFromClerk();
        const tableName = `TH_BLOCK_CONFIG_${eccode}`;

        // check if blocks are allocated
        const [blocks] = await db.execute<RowDataPacket[]>(
            `SELECT * FROM ${tableName} WHERE DATE = ? AND SESSION = ?`,
            [date, session]
        );
        if (blocks.length === 0) {
            return NextResponse.json({ error: `BLOCKS ARE NOT ALLOCATED FOR DATE ${date} AND SESSION ${session}` }, { status: 400 });
        }

        await db.execute<ResultSetHeader>(
            `DELETE FROM ${tableName} WHERE DATE = ? AND SESSION = ?`,
            [date, session]
        );

        return NextResponse.json({ message: `BLOCKS AND CONFIG FOR DATE ${date} AND SESSION ${session} DELETED SUCCESSFULLY` });
    } catch (error) {
        console.error("DATABASE ERROR:", error);
        return NextResponse.json({ error: error instanceof Error ? error.message : "An unknown error occurred" }, { status: 500 });
    }
}

// Fetch Blocks
export async function GET(req: Request) {
    try {
        const { searchParams } = new URL(req.url);
        const dateParam = searchParams.get("date");
        const session = searchParams.get("session");

        const eccode = await getEcCodeFromClerk();
        const tableName = `TH_BLOCK_CONFIG_${eccode}`;
        const conn = await db.getConnection();

        let query = `SELECT * FROM ${tableName}`;
        let params: string[] = [];

        if (dateParam && session) {
            const date = new Date(dateParam).toISOString().split('T')[0];
            query += " WHERE DATE = ? AND SESSION = ?";
            params = [date, session];
        }

        const [blocks] = await conn.execute<RowDataPacket[]>(query, params);
        return NextResponse.json(blocks);
    } catch (error) {
        console.error("DATABASE ERROR:", error);
        return NextResponse.json({ error: error instanceof Error ? error.message : "An unknown error occurred" }, { status: 500 });
    }
}

</app/api/(block-allocation)/blocks/route.ts>

<app/api/(block-allocation)/qp-acc-rep/route.ts>
import { NextResponse } from 'next/server';
import type { RowDataPacket } from 'mysql2/promise';
import pool, { getEcCodeFromClerk } from '@/lib/db';

interface ExamData extends RowDataPacket {
  SCHEME: string;
  SUBJECT_ABBR: string;
  SUBJECT_CODE: string;
  R_TOTAL_QPS: number;
  TOTAL_STUDENTS: number;
  ABSENT_NUMBERS: string;
  DATE: string;
  SESSION: string;
}

export async function GET(req: Request) {
  try {
    // Extract query parameters
    const { searchParams } = new URL(req.url);
    const date = searchParams.get("date");
    const session = searchParams.get("session");

    // Get institute code
    const ec_code = await getEcCodeFromClerk();
    if (!ec_code) {
      return NextResponse.json({ status: 400, message: 'Missing inst_id parameter' }, { status: 400 });
    }

    // Define table names
    const timetableTable = `TH_TT_${ec_code}`;
    const inventoryTable = `TH_IV_${ec_code}`;

    // Check if tables exist
    const [timetableTables] = await pool.query<RowDataPacket[]>(`SHOW TABLES LIKE ?`, [timetableTable]);
    const [inventoryTables] = await pool.query<RowDataPacket[]>(`SHOW TABLES LIKE ?`, [inventoryTable]);

    if (timetableTables.length === 0) {
      return NextResponse.json({ status: 418, message: `Timetable table ${timetableTable} not found` }, { status: 418 });
    }
    if (inventoryTables.length === 0) {
      return NextResponse.json({ status: 418, message: `Inventory table ${inventoryTable} not found` }, { status: 418 });
    }

    // Build dynamic SQL query with LEFT JOIN and collation fix
    let query = `
      SELECT 
        tt.SCHEME,
        tt.SUBJECT_ABBR,
        tt.SUBJECT_CODE,
        COALESCE(iv.R_TOTAL_QPS, 0) AS R_TOTAL_QPS,
        tt.TOTAL_STUDENTS,
        tt.ABSENT_NUMBERS,
        DATE_FORMAT(tt.DATE, '%Y-%m-%d') AS DATE,
        tt.SESSION
      FROM ${timetableTable} tt
      LEFT JOIN ${inventoryTable} iv
        ON tt.SUBJECT_CODE COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci = iv.E_SUB_CODE COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci 
        AND tt.DATE COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci = iv.DATE COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci
      WHERE 1=1
    `;
    const queryParams: (string | null)[] = [];

    // Add conditions dynamically
    if (date) {
      query += ` AND tt.DATE = ?`;
      queryParams.push(date);
    }
    if (session) {
      query += ` AND tt.SESSION = ?`;
      queryParams.push(session);
    }

    query += ` ORDER BY tt.SUBJECT_CODE ASC`;

    // Execute query
    const [rows] = await pool.query<ExamData[]>(query, queryParams);

    if (rows.length === 0) {
      return NextResponse.json(
        { status: 418, message: `No data found for exam center ${ec_code} on date ${date} and session ${session?.toUpperCase()}` },
        { status: 418 }
      );
    }

    // Process the results
    const processedResults = rows.map((row) => ({
      SCHEME: row.SCHEME,
      SUBJECT_ABBR: row.SUBJECT_ABBR,
      SUBJECT_CODE: row.SUBJECT_CODE,
      R_TOTAL_QPS: row.R_TOTAL_QPS,
      TOTAL_STUDENTS: row.TOTAL_STUDENTS,
      ABSENT_NUMBERS: row.ABSENT_NUMBERS,
      DATE: row.DATE,
      SESSION: row.SESSION,
    }));

    return NextResponse.json(processedResults, { status: 200 });

  } catch (error) {
    console.error('Error fetching exam data:', error);
    return NextResponse.json({ status: 500, message: 'Internal server error' }, { status: 500 });
  }
}
</app/api/(block-allocation)/qp-acc-rep/route.ts>

<app/api/(block-allocation)/supervision/route.ts>
import { NextResponse } from "next/server";
import pool, { getEcCodeFromClerk } from "@/lib/db";
import { RowDataPacket } from "mysql2";



interface SchemeData {
    SCHEME: string;
    SUBJECT_CODE: string;
    SUBJECT_NAME: string;
    TOTAL_STUDENTS: number;
    INST_CODE: string;
    TIMESLOT: string;
}

interface SupervisionRecord {
    BLOCKNO: string;
    LOCATION: string;
    SUPERVISOR_NAME: string;
    SUPERVISOR_UID: string;
    SCHEMES: SchemeData[];
}

interface GroupedData {
    DATE: string;
    SESSION: string;
    SUPERVISION_RECORDS: SupervisionRecord[];
}
export async function GET(request: Request) {
    try {
        const { searchParams } = new URL(request.url)
        const date = searchParams.get('date') // Get date from query params
        const session = searchParams.get('session') // Get session from query params

        const ec_code = await getEcCodeFromClerk()
        if (!ec_code) return NextResponse.json({ error: 'Unauthorized' }, { status: 401 })

        const configTable = `TH_BLOCK_CONFIG_${ec_code}`
        const conn = await pool.getConnection()

        // Base query
        let query = `
        SELECT DATE_FORMAT(DATE, '%Y-%m-%d') AS DATE, INST_CODE, SESSION, BLOCKNO, LOCATION, SUPERVISOR_NAME, SUPERVISOR_UID, SCHEME, SUBJECT_CODE, SUBJECT_NAME, TIMESLOT, ASSIGNED 
        FROM \`${configTable}\`
      `

        // Add filters if date and session are provided
        if (date && session) {
            query += ` WHERE DATE = ? AND SESSION = ? ORDER BY (BLOCKNO+0), DATE, SESSION DESC`
        } else {
            query += ` ORDER BY (BLOCKNO+0), DATE, SESSION DESC`
        }

        // Execute query with or without filters
        const [blocks] = await conn.execute<RowDataPacket[]>(
            query,
            date && session ? [date, session] : []
        )

        if (!blocks?.length) return NextResponse.json([], { status: 200 })

        // Grouping data by DATE & SESSION
        const groupedData: Record<string, GroupedData> = {}
        for (const block of blocks) {
            const dateKey = new Date(block.DATE).toISOString().split('T')[0] // Format date as YYYY-MM-DD
            const sessionKey = block.SESSION
            const mainKey = `${dateKey}_${sessionKey}`

            if (!groupedData[mainKey]) {
                groupedData[mainKey] = {
                    DATE: new Date(block.DATE).toLocaleDateString('en-IN', {
                        day: '2-digit',
                        month: '2-digit',
                        year: 'numeric',
                    }),
                    SESSION: sessionKey,
                    SUPERVISION_RECORDS: [],
                }
            }

            // Grouping by block-supervisor pair
            let blockRecord = groupedData[mainKey].SUPERVISION_RECORDS.find(
                (b) =>
                    b.BLOCKNO === block.BLOCKNO &&
                    b.LOCATION === block.LOCATION &&
                    b.SUPERVISOR_NAME === block.SUPERVISOR_NAME
            )

            if (!blockRecord) {
                blockRecord = {
                    BLOCKNO: block.BLOCKNO,
                    LOCATION: block.LOCATION,
                    SUPERVISOR_NAME: block.SUPERVISOR_NAME,
                    SUPERVISOR_UID: block.SUPERVISOR_UID,
                    SCHEMES: [],
                }
                groupedData[mainKey].SUPERVISION_RECORDS.push(blockRecord)
            }

            // Adding scheme data
            blockRecord.SCHEMES.push({
                SCHEME: block.SCHEME,
                INST_CODE: block.INST_CODE,
                SUBJECT_CODE: block.SUBJECT_CODE,
                SUBJECT_NAME: block.SUBJECT_NAME,
                TOTAL_STUDENTS: block.ASSIGNED,
                TIMESLOT: block.TIMESLOT,
            })
        }

        conn.release()
        return NextResponse.json(Object.values(groupedData), { status: 200 })
    } catch (error) {
        console.error('Error fetching supervision records:', error)
        return NextResponse.json({ error: 'Internal Server Error' }, { status: 500 })
    }
}

</app/api/(block-allocation)/supervision/route.ts>

<app/api/(others)/profile/route.ts>
import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from "next/server";
import pool, { getEcCodeFromClerk } from "@/lib/db";
import { RowDataPacket, ResultSetHeader } from "mysql2";

// Define a type for the departments array
type Department = string; // Adjust this type based on what your departments actually are

async function getDepts(ecCode: string): Promise<Department[]> {
    try {
        if (!ecCode) {
            throw new Error("EC_CODE is required.");
        }
        const query = "SELECT DEPARTMENTS FROM THC_EC_CONFIG WHERE EC_CODE = ?";
        const [rows] = await pool.execute<RowDataPacket[]>(query, [ecCode]);
        if (rows.length === 0) {
            throw new Error("EC_CODE not found.");
        }
        let departments = rows[0].DEPARTMENTS;
        if (typeof departments === "string") {
            departments = JSON.parse(departments);
        }
        return departments as Department[];
    } catch (error) {
        console.error("Error fetching departments:", error);
        throw error;
    }
}

async function updateDepts(ecCode: string, departments: Department[]): Promise<boolean> {
    try {
        if (!ecCode || !Array.isArray(departments)) {
            throw new Error("EC_CODE and departments array are required.");
        }
        const departmentsJson = JSON.stringify(departments);
        const updateQuery = `
      UPDATE THC_EC_CONFIG 
      SET DEPARTMENTS = ?
      WHERE EC_CODE = ?;
    `;
        const [result] = await pool.execute<ResultSetHeader>(updateQuery, [
            departmentsJson,
            ecCode,
        ]);
        if (result.affectedRows === 0) {
            throw new Error("EC_CODE not found.");
        }
        return true;
    } catch (error) {
        console.error("Error updating departments:", error);
        throw error;
    }
}

async function getTableData(ecCode: string): Promise<Record<string, boolean>> {
    let connection;
    try {
        if (!ecCode) {
            throw new Error("EC_CODE is required.");
        }

        const tablePrefixes = {
            BLOCK_DETAILS: "THC_BLOCK_DETAILS_",
            SUPERVISOR: "TH_SUP_",
            RELIEVER: "TH_REL_",
            CONTROL_ROOM: "TH_CROOM_",
            TIMETABLE: "TH_TT_",
            SEATING_CHART: "TH_SC_",
            EMARKSHEET: "TH_EM_",
            INVENTORY: "TH_IV_",
            BLOCK_CONFIG: "TH_BLOCK_CONFIG_",
            SUPERVISION_ORDER: "TH_SUP_ORD_",
            RELIEVER_ORDER: "TH_REL_ORD_",
        };
        connection = await pool.getConnection();
        const [rows] = await connection.execute<RowDataPacket[]>("SHOW TABLES");

        // Debug: Log raw rows to see what SHOW TABLES returns
        

        const existingTables = rows.map((row) => Object.values(row)[0].toLowerCase());


        const tableStatus: Record<string, boolean> = {};
        for (const [key, prefix] of Object.entries(tablePrefixes)) {
            const fullTableName = `${prefix}${ecCode}`.toLowerCase();
            tableStatus[key] = existingTables.includes(fullTableName);
        }

        return tableStatus;
    } catch (error) {
        console.error("Error fetching table data:", error);
        throw error;
    } finally {
        if (connection) connection.release();
    }
}

async function updateTableData(ecCode: string): Promise<void> {
    try {
        if (!ecCode) {
            throw new Error("EC_CODE is required.");
        }
        // Implement the logic to update table data here
        throw new Error("Table data update not implemented.");
    } catch (error) {
        console.error("Error updating table data:", error);
        throw error;
    }
}

export async function GET(req: NextRequest) {
    try {
        const { searchParams } = new URL(req.url);
        const action = searchParams.get("action");
        const EC_CODE = await getEcCodeFromClerk();
        if (action === "dept") {
            const departments = await getDepts(EC_CODE);
            return NextResponse.json({ departments }, { status: 200 });
        } else if (action === "table") {
            const tableData = await getTableData(EC_CODE); // Use EC_CODE instead of "1740"
            return NextResponse.json(tableData, { status: 200 });
        } else {
            return NextResponse.json({ error: "Invalid action parameter." }, { status: 400 });
        }
    } catch (error: unknown) {
        if (error instanceof Error) {
            if (error.message === "EC_CODE is required.") {
                return NextResponse.json({ error: error.message }, { status: 400 });
            }
            if (error.message === "EC_CODE not found.") {
                return NextResponse.json({ error: error.message }, { status: 404 });
            }
        }
        return NextResponse.json({ error: "Internal server error." }, { status: 500 });
    }
}

export async function PUT(req: NextRequest) {
    try {
        const { searchParams } = new URL(req.url);
        const action = searchParams.get("action");
        const body = await req.json();
        const EC_CODE = await getEcCodeFromClerk();
        if (action === "dept") {
            const { departments } = body;
            await updateDepts(EC_CODE, departments);
            return NextResponse.json({ message: "Departments updated successfully." }, { status: 200 });
        } else if (action === "table") {
            await updateTableData(EC_CODE);
            return NextResponse.json({ message: "Table data updated successfully." }, { status: 200 });
        } else {
            return NextResponse.json({ error: "Invalid action parameter." }, { status: 400 });
        }
    } catch (error: unknown) {
        if (error instanceof Error) {
            if (error.message === "EC_CODE and departments array are required.") {
                return NextResponse.json({ error: error.message }, { status: 400 });
            }
            if (error.message === "EC_CODE not found.") {
                return NextResponse.json({ error: error.message }, { status: 404 });
            }
        }
        return NextResponse.json({ error: "Internal server error." }, { status: 500 });
    }
}
</app/api/(others)/profile/route.ts>

<app/api/(others)/send-email/route.ts>
import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from 'next/server';
import nodemailer from 'nodemailer';
import { z } from 'zod';
import { getEcCodeFromClerk } from '@/lib/db';
import { currentUser } from '@clerk/nextjs/server';
import pLimit from 'p-limit';
import { clerkClient } from '@clerk/nextjs/server';

// Input validation schema
const EmailRecipientSchema = z.object({
    email: z.string().email('Invalid email address'),
    name: z.string().optional()
});

const EmailRequestSchema = z.object({
    recipients: z.array(EmailRecipientSchema).min(1, 'At least one recipient required'),
    subject: z.string().min(1, 'Subject cannot be empty').max(255, 'Subject too long'),
    html: z.string().min(1, 'Email body cannot be empty')
});

interface EmailResult {
    success: boolean;
    email: string;
    error?: string;
}

export async function POST(request: NextRequest) {
    try {
        // Parse and validate input
        const requestBody = await request.json();
        const validatedData = EmailRequestSchema.parse(requestBody);
        
        const ec_code = await getEcCodeFromClerk();
        const user = await currentUser();
        
        if (!ec_code) {
            return NextResponse.json({ error: 'EC_CODE is required' }, { status: 400 });
        }

        if (!user) {
            return NextResponse.json({ error: 'User not authenticated' }, { status: 401 });
        }

        // Get emails sent from Clerk public metadata
        const userId = user.id;
        const {users} = await clerkClient()
        const clerkUser = await users.getUser(userId);
        const publicMetadata = clerkUser.publicMetadata as { emailsSent?: number };
        const emailsSent = publicMetadata.emailsSent || 0;

        const EMAILS_LIMIT = 200;

        // Check email limit
        const totalSupervisors = validatedData.recipients.length;
        if (emailsSent >= EMAILS_LIMIT) {
            return NextResponse.json(
                { error: 'Email sending limit of 200 reached' },
                { status: 429 }
            );
        }

        if (emailsSent + totalSupervisors > EMAILS_LIMIT) {
            return NextResponse.json(
                { 
                    error: `Email limit exceeded. You can send ${EMAILS_LIMIT - emailsSent} more emails out of ${totalSupervisors} supervisors`,
                    remaining: EMAILS_LIMIT - emailsSent,
                    totalSupervisors
                },
                { status: 429 }
            );
        }

        // Create Nodemailer transporter with Gmail
        const transporter = nodemailer.createTransport({
            service: 'gmail',
            auth: {
                user: process.env.GMAIL_USER || "support@testforge.software",
                pass: process.env.GMAIL_APP_PASSWORD
            },
            pool: true,
            maxConnections: 10,
            rateDelta: 1000,
            rateLimit: 5
        });

        // Verify transporter configuration
        try {
            await transporter.verify();
        } catch (error) {
            console.error('Transporter verification failed:', error);
            return NextResponse.json(
                { 
                    error: 'Email configuration error', 
                    details: error instanceof Error ? error.message : 'Unknown error'
                },
                { status: 500 }
            );
        }

        // Use p-limit for controlled concurrency
        const limit = pLimit(5);

        // Enhanced email sending function with exponential backoff
        const sendEmailWithRetry = async (
            recipient: z.infer<typeof EmailRecipientSchema>, 
            retries = 3
        ): Promise<EmailResult> => {
            const sendEmail = async (attempt: number) => {
                try {
                    await Promise.race([
                        transporter.sendMail({
                            from: process.env.ZOHO_FROM,
                            to: recipient.email,
                            subject: validatedData.subject,
                            html: validatedData.html,
                            headers: {
                                'X-Attempt': attempt.toString()
                            }
                        }),
                        new Promise((_, reject) => 
                            setTimeout(() => reject(new Error('Email sending timeout')), 15000)
                        )
                    ]);
                    return { success: true, email: recipient.email };
                } catch (error) {
                    const delay = Math.pow(2, attempt) * 1000;
                    await new Promise(resolve => setTimeout(resolve, delay));
                    throw error;
                }
            };

            for (let attempt = 1; attempt <= retries; attempt++) {
                try {
                    return await sendEmail(attempt);
                } catch (error) {
                    if (attempt === retries) {
                        console.error(`Failed to send email to ${recipient.email}:`, error);
                        return { 
                            success: false, 
                            email: recipient.email, 
                            error: error instanceof Error ? error.message : 'Unknown error' 
                        };
                    }
                }
            }
            throw new Error('Unexpected error in email sending');
        };

        // Send emails with controlled concurrency
        const results = await Promise.all(
            validatedData.recipients.map(recipient => 
                limit(() => sendEmailWithRetry(recipient))
            )
        );

        const successful = results.filter(r => r.success).length;
        const failed = results.filter(r => !r.success).length;

        // Update emails sent count in Clerk public metadata
        const newEmailsSent = emailsSent + successful;
        await users.updateUser(userId, {
            publicMetadata: {
                ...publicMetadata,
                emailsSent: newEmailsSent
            }
        });

        return NextResponse.json({
            message: `Emails sent. Success: ${successful}, Failed: ${failed}`,
            remainingQuota: EMAILS_LIMIT - newEmailsSent,
            totalSupervisors,
            results
        });
    } catch (error) {
        if (error instanceof z.ZodError) {
            return NextResponse.json(
                { 
                    error: 'Validation failed', 
                    details: error.errors 
                },
                { status: 400 }
            );
        }

        console.error('Error sending emails:', error);
        return NextResponse.json(
            { 
                error: 'Failed to send emails', 
                details: error instanceof Error ? error.message : 'Unknown error',
            },
            { status: 500 }
        );
    }
}
</app/api/(others)/send-email/route.ts>

                                padding: '12px 15px',
                                textAlign: 'center',
                                borderRight: '1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.2)'
                            }}>Date</th>
                            <th style={{
                                padding: '12px 15px',
                                textAlign: 'center'
                            }}>Time Slot</th>
                        </tr>
                    </thead>
                    <tbody>
                        {reliever.ALLOTED.map((block, index) => (
                            <tr key={index} style={{ backgroundColor: index % 2 === 0 ? '#f8fafc' : '#ffffff' }}>
                                <td style={{
                                    padding: '10px 15px',
                                    textAlign: 'center',
                                    border: '1px solid #e2e8f0'
                                }}>{index + 1}</td>
                                <td style={{
                                    padding: '10px 15px',
                                    textAlign: 'center',
                                    border: '1px solid #e2e8f0',
                                    fontWeight: '500'
                                }}>
                                    {new Date(block.DATE).toLocaleDateString('en-IN', {
                                        weekday: 'short',
                                        day: '2-digit',
                                        month: 'short',
                                        year: 'numeric'
                                    })}
                                </td>
                                <td style={{
                                    padding: '10px 15px',
                                    textAlign: 'center',
                                    border: '1px solid #e2e8f0',
                                    fontWeight: '500'
                                }}>{block.SESSION}</td>
                            </tr>
                        ))}
                    </tbody>
                </table>
            </div>

            {/* Reliever-specific notes */}
            <div style={{
                marginBottom: '30px',
                padding: '15px',
                backgroundColor: '#eef2ff',
                borderLeft: '4px solid #4f46e5',
                borderRadius: '4px',
                fontSize: '14px'
            }}>
                <p style={{ margin: '0 0 10px', fontWeight: 'bold' }}>Reliever Responsibilities:</p>
                <ul style={{ margin: '0', paddingLeft: '20px' }}>
                    <li>Be present throughout the assigned examination sessions.</li>
                    <li>Provide temporary relief to Block Supervisors as needed.</li>
                    <li>Assist with distribution of answer books and question papers as required.</li>
                    <li>Report any examination irregularities to the Chief Officer In-charge immediately.</li>
                </ul>
            </div>

            {/* Signature */}
            <div style={{
                textAlign: 'right',
                marginTop: '40px',
                borderTop: '1px solid #e2e8f0',
                paddingTop: '20px'
            }}>
                <SignatureBlock examCenterCode={examCenterCode} examCenterName={examCenterName} name={chiefName} role="Chief Officer In-charge" />
            </div>

            {/* Footer */}
            <div style={{
                marginTop: '30px',
                borderTop: '1px solid #e2e8f0',
                paddingTop: '15px',
                textAlign: 'center',
                fontSize: '12px',
                color: '#718096'
            }}>
                <p style={{ margin: '0' }}>This is an official document. Please retain for your records.</p>
                <p style={{ margin: '5px 0 0' }}>For any queries, please contact the examination department.</p>
                <p style={{ margin: '5px 0 0' }}>generated by <a style={{ color: '#1e3a8a' }} href="https://testforge.software">testforge.software</a></p>
            </div>
        </div>
    );
};
