</app/api/(others)/send-email/emailtemplates.tsx>

<app/api/(others)/send-supervisor-email/route.ts>
import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from 'next/server';
import nodemailer from 'nodemailer';
import { getEcCodeFromClerk } from '@/lib/db';

interface Supervisor {
  NAME: string;
  EMAIL: string;
  ROLE: string;
  DEPARTMENT: string;
  ALLOTED: Array<{
    DATE: string;
    SESSION: string;
  }>;
}

interface SupervisorMap {
  [uid: string]: Supervisor;
}

export async function POST(request: NextRequest) {
    try {
        const { supervisors, orderKey } = await request.json();
        const ec_code = await getEcCodeFromClerk();
        
        if (!ec_code) {
            return NextResponse.json({ error: 'EC_CODE is required' }, { status: 400 });
        }

        if (!supervisors || Object.keys(supervisors).length === 0) {
            return NextResponse.json({ error: 'No supervisors data provided' }, { status: 400 });
        }

        // Create Nodemailer transporter with Zoho configuration
        const transporter = nodemailer.createTransport({
            host: process.env.ZOHO_SMTP_HOST,
            port: parseInt(process.env.ZOHO_SMTP_PORT || '587'),
            secure: false, // true for 465, false for 587
            auth: {
                user: process.env.ZOHO_USER,
                pass: process.env.ZOHO_APP_PASSWORD
            },
            tls: {
                rejectUnauthorized: false,
                ciphers: 'SSLv3'
            }
        });

        // Verify transporter configuration
        try {
            await transporter.verify();
        } catch (error) {
            console.error('Transporter verification failed:', error);
            return NextResponse.json(
                { 
                    error: 'Email configuration error', 
                    details: error instanceof Error ? error.message : 'Unknown error',
                    env: {
                        hasUser: !!process.env.ZOHO_USER,
                        hasPassword: !!process.env.ZOHO_APP_PASSWORD,
                        hasHost: !!process.env.ZOHO_SMTP_HOST,
                        hasPort: !!process.env.ZOHO_SMTP_PORT
                    }
                },
                { status: 500 }
            );
        }

        // Send emails to all supervisors
        const emailPromises = Object.entries(supervisors as SupervisorMap).map(async ([uid, supervisor]) => {
            if (!supervisor.EMAIL) {
                console.warn(`No email found for supervisor ${uid}`);
                return;
            }

            // Generate HTML content for the email
            const htmlContent = `
                <div style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; max-width: 800px; margin: 0 auto;">
                    <h2 style="text-align: center; text-transform: uppercase;">OFFICE ORDER</h2>
                    <div style="margin-bottom: 20px;">
                        <p>
                            To,<br>
                            <strong>${supervisor.NAME}</strong><br>
                            ${supervisor.ROLE}, ${supervisor.DEPARTMENT}<br>
                            ${supervisor.EMAIL}<br>
                            Diploma<br>
                            ${ec_code}
                        </p>
                        <p>
                            <strong>Subject:</strong> Order of Block Supervisor for Theory Exam<br>
                            <strong>Reference:</strong> ${orderKey}
                        </p>
                        <p>
                            Sir/Madam,<br>
                            You have to work as Invigilator (Block Supervisor) for MSBTE Theory Examination as per the following schedule. 
                            You have to make all the necessary arrangements for smooth conduct of the Examination.
                        </p>
                        <table style="width: 100%; border-collapse: collapse; margin: 20px 0;">
                            <tr style="background-color: #f2f2f2;">
                                <th style="border: 1px solid #ddd; padding: 8px; text-align: center;">Sr. No</th>
                                <th style="border: 1px solid #ddd; padding: 8px; text-align: center;">Date</th>
                                <th style="border: 1px solid #ddd; padding: 8px; text-align: center;">Slot</th>
                            </tr>
                            ${supervisor.ALLOTED.map((block, index) => `
                                <tr>
                                    <td style="border: 1px solid #ddd; padding: 8px; text-align: center;">${index + 1}</td>
                                    <td style="border: 1px solid #ddd; padding: 8px; text-align: center;">${new Date(block.DATE).toLocaleDateString('en-IN')}</td>
                                    <td style="border: 1px solid #ddd; padding: 8px; text-align: center;">${block.SESSION.toUpperCase()}</td>
                                </tr>
                            `).join('')}
                        </table>
                        <div style="text-align: right; margin-top: 40px;">
                            <p><strong>Chief Officer In-charge</strong></p>
                            <p>${ec_code}</p>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                </div>
            `;

            try {
                // Send email with timeout
                await Promise.race([
                    transporter.sendMail({
                        from: process.env.ZOHO_FROM,
                        to: supervisor.EMAIL,
                        subject: `Supervision Order - ${orderKey}`,
                        html: htmlContent
                    }),
                    new Promise((_, reject) => 
                        setTimeout(() => reject(new Error('Email sending timeout')), 10000)
                    )
                ]);
            } catch (error) {
                console.error(`Failed to send email to ${supervisor.EMAIL}:`, error);
                throw error;
            }
        });

        // Wait for all emails to be sent
        await Promise.all(emailPromises);

        return NextResponse.json({ message: 'All emails sent successfully' });
    } catch (error) {
        console.error('Error sending emails:', error);
        return NextResponse.json(
            { 
                error: 'Failed to send emails', 
                details: error instanceof Error ? error.message : 'Unknown error',
                stack: error instanceof Error ? error.stack : undefined
            },
            { status: 500 }
        );
    }
}
</app/api/(others)/send-supervisor-email/route.ts>

<app/api/(others)/send-message/route.ts>
import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from "next/server";
import { createHash } from "crypto";
import modulesData from "@/config/modules.json";
import helpDeskContext from "@/config/help-desk-context.json";

// Constants and Configuration
const SYSTEM_CONTEXT = helpDeskContext.context;

// Interfaces for type safety
interface Module {
  module_name: string;
  premium: boolean;
  submodules: Submodule[];
}

interface Submodule {
  name: string;
  file: string;
  fallback?: string;
}

interface ModuleMatch {
  name: string;
  route: string;
  score: number;
}

// Session Management
class ConversationManager {
  private static store = new Map<string, string[]>();
  private static MAX_HISTORY_LENGTH = 20;

  static getSessionId(req: NextRequest): string {
    const userAgent = req.headers.get('user-agent') || '';
    const ip = req.headers.get('x-forwarded-for') || '';
    return createHash('sha256')
      .update(`${ip}-${userAgent}`)
      .digest('hex')
      .slice(0, 16);
  }

  static addToHistory(sessionId: string, message: string, isUser: boolean) {
    const history = this.store.get(sessionId) || [];
    history.push(`${isUser ? 'User' : 'Assistant'}: ${message}`);
    
    if (history.length > this.MAX_HISTORY_LENGTH) {
      history.splice(0, 2);
    }
    
    this.store.set(sessionId, history);
    return history;
  }

  static getHistory(sessionId: string): string[] {
    return this.store.get(sessionId) || [];
  }
}

// Intent and Module Matching Utilities
class IntentClassifier {
  static classify(message: string): string {
    const msg = message.toLowerCase();
    const intents = [
      { type: 'instructional', keywords: ['how to', 'help with'] },
      { type: 'navigational', keywords: ['where', 'find'] },
      { type: 'troubleshooting', keywords: ['error', 'issue'] },
      { type: 'pricing', keywords: ['cost', 'premium'] },
      { type: 'gratitude', keywords: ['thank'] }
    ];

    for (const intent of intents) {
      if (intent.keywords.some(keyword => msg.includes(keyword))) {
        return intent.type;
      }
    }

    return 'general';
  }
}

class ModuleMatcher {
  static findMatchingModules(query: string): ModuleMatch[] {
    const matches: ModuleMatch[] = [];
    const keywords = query.toLowerCase().split(/\s+/);
    
    (modulesData as Module[]).forEach(module => {
      module.submodules.forEach(submodule => {
        let score = 0;
        const moduleName = module.module_name.toLowerCase();
        const submoduleName = submodule.name.toLowerCase();

        if (moduleName === query.toLowerCase()) score += 20;
        if (submoduleName === query.toLowerCase()) score += 25;
        if (moduleName.includes(query.toLowerCase())) score += 10;
        if (submoduleName.includes(query.toLowerCase())) score += 15;

        keywords.forEach(k => {
          if (k.length > 3) {
            if (moduleName.includes(k)) score += 5;
            if (submoduleName.includes(k)) score += 8;
          }
        });

        if (score > 0) {
          matches.push({ 
            name: `${module.module_name} - ${submodule.name}`, 
            route: module.premium && submodule.fallback ? `/${submodule.fallback}` : `/${submodule.file}`,
            score 
          });
        }
      });
    });
    
    return matches
  .sort((a, b) => b.score - a.score)
  .slice(0, 3)
  .map(m => ({ name: m.name, route: m.route, score: m.score })) as ModuleMatch[];
  }
}



// Main Route Handler
export async function POST(req: NextRequest) {
  try {
    const { message } = await req.json();
    if (!message || typeof message !== "string") {
      return NextResponse.json({ error: "Invalid message" }, { status: 400 });
    }

    const GEMINI_API_KEY = process.env.GEMINI_API_KEY;
    const GEMINI_API_URL = process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_GEMINI_API_URL || "https://generativelanguage.googleapis.com/v1/models/gemini-2.0-flash:generateContent";
    
    if (!GEMINI_API_KEY || !GEMINI_API_URL) {
      return NextResponse.json({ error: "Missing API configuration" }, { status: 500 });
    }

    const sessionId = ConversationManager.getSessionId(req);
    ConversationManager.addToHistory(sessionId, message, true);

    const matches = ModuleMatcher.findMatchingModules(message);
    const intent = IntentClassifier.classify(message);

    const context = `${SYSTEM_CONTEXT}\n\nHistory:\n${ConversationManager.getHistory(sessionId).join("\n")}\n\nIntent: ${intent}\n\nMatches:\n${matches.map(m => `${m.name} (${m.route})`).join("\n")}`;

    try {
      const response = await fetch(GEMINI_API_URL, {
        method: "POST",
        headers: { 
          "Content-Type": "application/json", 
          "x-goog-api-key": GEMINI_API_KEY 
        },
        body: JSON.stringify({
          contents: [{ 
            parts: [
              { text: context },
              { text: `User: "${message}"\n\nRespond conversationally based on intent (${intent}) and matches.` }
            ]
          }],
        }),
        cache: 'no-store',
        next: { revalidate: 0 }
      });

      if (!response.ok) {
        console.error('Gemini API error:', response.status, response.statusText);
        const errorBody = await response.text();
        console.error('Error response body:', errorBody);
        throw new Error(`Gemini API error: ${response.status} ${response.statusText}`);
      }

      const data = await response.json();
      let reply = data.candidates[0]?.content?.parts[0]?.text || "Sorry, I couldn't process that.";

      // Fallback response handling
      if (reply.length < 20 || reply.toLowerCase().includes("sorry")) {
        reply = matches.length 
          ? `Try ${matches[0].name} at ${matches[0].route}.` 
          : "Can you provide more details?";

        if (intent === 'troubleshooting') {
          reply = "Try refreshing or check your inputs. Still stuck? Contact support.";
        }
        if (intent === 'pricing') {
          reply = "Free features cover basics; premium adds automation and notifications. Contact sales for details.";
        }
      }

      ConversationManager.addToHistory(sessionId, reply, false);

      return NextResponse.json({ 
        response: reply, 
        suggestions: matches 
      });
    } catch (apiError) {
      console.error('Gemini API call failed:', apiError);
      
      // Provide a more helpful fallback response based on matches
      const fallbackResponse = matches.length > 0
        ? `I'm having trouble connecting to my knowledge base right now, but I can suggest checking out ${matches[0].name} at ${matches[0].route}.`
        : "I'm having trouble connecting to my knowledge base right now. Please try again in a moment.";
      
      // Implement retry logic with exponential backoff
      return NextResponse.json({ 
        response: fallbackResponse,
        error: apiError instanceof Error ? apiError.message : "Unknown error",
        suggestions: matches,
        retry: true
      }, { status: 200 }); // Return 200 with error message in response
    }
  } catch (error) {
    console.error('TestForge AI Assistant Error:', error);
    return NextResponse.json({ 
      error: "Failed to process request",
      response: "Something went wrong with your request. Please try again or contact support if the issue persists."
    }, { status: 500 });
  }
}

export async function GET() {
  return NextResponse.json({ 
    status: 'TestForge Assistant API running',
    version: '1.1.0'
  });
}
</app/api/(others)/send-message/route.ts>

<app/api/(others)/exam-booklet/route.ts>
import { NextResponse } from "next/server";
import pool, { getEcCodeFromClerk } from "@/lib/db";
import { RowDataPacket } from "mysql2/promise"; // Ensure correct import
import { ensureBlockConfigTableExists, ensureControllerTableExists, ensureExamCenterTableExists, ensureRelieverOrderTableExists, ensureRelieversTableExists, ensureSupervisionOrderTableExists, ensureSupervisorTableExists } from "@/utils/tables";

export async function GET() {
  let connection;
  const ec_code = await getEcCodeFromClerk();
  try {
    await ensureExamCenterTableExists()
    await ensureBlockConfigTableExists(ec_code)
    await ensureControllerTableExists(ec_code)
    await ensureSupervisorTableExists(ec_code)
    await ensureSupervisionOrderTableExists(ec_code)
    await ensureRelieversTableExists(ec_code)
    await ensureRelieverOrderTableExists(ec_code)
    console.log("Ensured!!!")
  } catch (error) {
    console.error("Database Error:", error);
    return NextResponse.json({ MESSAGE: "Internal Server Error" }, { status: 500 });
  }

  try {

    connection = await pool.getConnection();

    const [tableRows] = await connection.query<RowDataPacket[]>(`SHOW TABLES LIKE 'TH_SC_${ec_code}'`);
    if (!tableRows.length) {
      return NextResponse.json({ MESSAGE: "Table does not exist" }, { status: 418 });
    }

    const [summaryResult] = await connection.query<RowDataPacket[]>(`
      SELECT 
        (SELECT COUNT(SEAT_NO) FROM TH_SC_${ec_code}) AS seat_count,
        (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT ENROLLMENT) FROM TH_SC_${ec_code}) AS enrollment_count,
        (SELECT SUM(TOTAL_STUDENTS) FROM TH_TT_${ec_code}) AS paper_count,
        (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT SUBJECT_CODE) FROM TH_TT_${ec_code}) AS subject_count,
        (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT DATE) FROM TH_TT_${ec_code}) AS days,
        (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT CONCAT(DATE, ' - ', SESSION)) FROM TH_TT_${ec_code}) AS total_sessions,
        (
          SELECT CONCAT(DATE, ' - ', SESSION) 
          FROM TH_TT_${ec_code}
          GROUP BY DATE, SESSION
          ORDER BY SUM(TOTAL_STUDENTS) DESC
          LIMIT 1
        ) AS max_appearing,
        (
          SELECT SUM(TOTAL_STUDENTS)
          FROM TH_TT_${ec_code}
          GROUP BY DATE, SESSION
          ORDER BY SUM(TOTAL_STUDENTS) DESC
          LIMIT 1
        ) AS max_appearing_students,
        (
          SELECT CONCAT(DATE, ' - ', SESSION) 
          FROM TH_TT_${ec_code}
          GROUP BY DATE, SESSION
          ORDER BY SUM(TOTAL_STUDENTS) ASC
          LIMIT 1
        ) AS min_appearing,
        (
          SELECT SUM(TOTAL_STUDENTS)
          FROM TH_TT_${ec_code}
          GROUP BY DATE, SESSION
          ORDER BY SUM(TOTAL_STUDENTS) ASC
          LIMIT 1
        ) AS min_appearing_students,
        (
          SELECT SUBJECT_CODE 
          FROM TH_TT_${ec_code}
          GROUP BY SUBJECT_CODE
          ORDER BY SUM(TOTAL_STUDENTS) DESC
          LIMIT 1
        ) AS max_student_subject_code,
        (
          SELECT SUM(TOTAL_STUDENTS)
          FROM TH_TT_${ec_code}
          GROUP BY SUBJECT_CODE
          ORDER BY SUM(TOTAL_STUDENTS) DESC
          LIMIT 1
        ) AS max_student_subject_count,
        (
          SELECT SUBJECT_CODE 
          FROM TH_TT_${ec_code}
          GROUP BY SUBJECT_CODE
          ORDER BY SUM(TOTAL_STUDENTS) ASC
          LIMIT 1
        ) AS min_student_subject_code,
        (
          SELECT SUM(TOTAL_STUDENTS)
          FROM TH_TT_${ec_code}
          GROUP BY SUBJECT_CODE
          ORDER BY SUM(TOTAL_STUDENTS) ASC
          LIMIT 1
        ) AS min_student_subject_count
    `);

    const [sessionDistribution] = await connection.query<RowDataPacket[]>(`
      SELECT 
        DATE,
        SESSION,
        SUM(TOTAL_STUDENTS) AS student_count
      FROM TH_TT_${ec_code}
      GROUP BY DATE, SESSION
      ORDER BY DATE, SESSION
    `);

    const [schemeData] = await connection.query<RowDataPacket[]>(`
      SELECT 
        SUBSTRING_INDEX(SCHEME, '-', 1) AS scheme_prefix, 
        SUM(TOTAL_STUDENTS) AS scheme_paper_count 
      FROM TH_TT_${ec_code} 
      GROUP BY scheme_prefix
      ORDER BY scheme_prefix
    `);

    const [deptDistribution] = await connection.query<RowDataPacket[]>(`
      SELECT 
        SUBSTRING_INDEX(SCHEME, '-', 1) AS scheme_prefix, 
        COUNT(DISTINCT ENROLLMENT) AS student_count
      FROM TH_SC_${ec_code}
      GROUP BY scheme_prefix
      ORDER BY scheme_prefix
    `);

    connection.release();

    const sessionDistributionTransformed: Record<string, Record<string, number>> = {};
    sessionDistribution.forEach((row) => {
      const DATE = new Date(row.DATE).toLocaleDateString('en-IN');

      if (!sessionDistributionTransformed[DATE]) sessionDistributionTransformed[DATE] = {};
      sessionDistributionTransformed[DATE][row.SESSION] = Number(row.student_count);
    });

    const schemePapersTransformed: Record<string, number> = {};
    schemeData.forEach((row) => {
      schemePapersTransformed[row.scheme_prefix] = Number(row.scheme_paper_count);
    });

    const deptDistributionTransformed: Record<string, number> = {};
    deptDistribution.forEach((row) => {
      deptDistributionTransformed[row.scheme_prefix] = Number(row.student_count);
    });

    console.log({
      MESSAGE: "Seating chart table exists",
      SUMMARY: {
        DAYS: summaryResult[0]?.days || 0,
        SESSIONS: summaryResult[0]?.total_sessions || 0,
        SUBJECTS: summaryResult[0]?.subject_count || 0,
        EXAMINEES: summaryResult[0]?.seat_count || 0,
        STUDENTS: summaryResult[0]?.enrollment_count || 0,
        PAPERS: Number(summaryResult[0]?.paper_count) || 0,
      },
      SCHEME_PAPERS: schemePapersTransformed,
      MAX_APPEARING: {
        SESSION: summaryResult[0]?.max_appearing || "N/A",
        STUDENTS: Number(summaryResult[0]?.max_appearing_students) || 0,
      },
      MIN_APPEARING: {
        SESSION: summaryResult[0]?.min_appearing || "N/A",
        STUDENTS: Number(summaryResult[0]?.min_appearing_students) || 0,
      },
      STUDENT_SUBJECT: {
        MIN: {
          CODE: summaryResult[0]?.min_student_subject_code || "N/A",
          COUNT: Number(summaryResult[0]?.min_student_subject_count) || 0,
        },
        MAX: {
          CODE: summaryResult[0]?.max_student_subject_code || "N/A",
          COUNT: Number(summaryResult[0]?.max_student_subject_count) || 0,
        },
      },
      SESSION_DISTRIBUTION: sessionDistributionTransformed,
      DEPT_DISTRIBUTION: deptDistributionTransformed,
    })
    return NextResponse.json({
      MESSAGE: "Seating chart table exists",
      SUMMARY: {
        DAYS: summaryResult[0]?.days || 0,
        SESSIONS: summaryResult[0]?.total_sessions || 0,
        SUBJECTS: summaryResult[0]?.subject_count || 0,
        EXAMINEES: summaryResult[0]?.seat_count || 0,
        STUDENTS: summaryResult[0]?.enrollment_count || 0,
        PAPERS: Number(summaryResult[0]?.paper_count) || 0,
      },
      SCHEME_PAPERS: schemePapersTransformed,
      MAX_APPEARING: {
        SESSION: summaryResult[0]?.max_appearing || "N/A",
        STUDENTS: Number(summaryResult[0]?.max_appearing_students) || 0,
      },
      MIN_APPEARING: {
        SESSION: summaryResult[0]?.min_appearing || "N/A",
        STUDENTS: Number(summaryResult[0]?.min_appearing_students) || 0,
      },
      STUDENT_SUBJECT: {
        MIN: {
          CODE: summaryResult[0]?.min_student_subject_code || "N/A",
          COUNT: Number(summaryResult[0]?.min_student_subject_count) || 0,
        },
        MAX: {
          CODE: summaryResult[0]?.max_student_subject_code || "N/A",
          COUNT: Number(summaryResult[0]?.max_student_subject_count) || 0,
        },
      },
      SESSION_DISTRIBUTION: sessionDistributionTransformed,
      DEPT_DISTRIBUTION: deptDistributionTransformed,
    }, { status: 200 });

  } catch (error) {
    console.error("Database Error:", error);
    return NextResponse.json({ MESSAGE: "Internal Server Error" }, { status: 500 });
  } finally {
    if (connection) connection.release();
  }
}

</app/api/(others)/exam-booklet/route.ts>

<app/api/(others)/send-reliever-email/route.ts>
import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from "next/server";
import nodemailer from 'nodemailer';
import { getEcCodeFromClerk } from "@/lib/db";

type RelieverData = {
    NAME: string;
    DEPARTMENT: string;
    EMAIL: string;
    ALLOTED: {
        DATE: string;
        SESSION: string;
    }[];
};

export async function POST(req: NextRequest) {
    try {
        const { relievers, orderKey } = await req.json();
        const ec_code = await getEcCodeFromClerk();
        
        if (!ec_code) {
            return NextResponse.json({ error: 'EC_CODE is required' }, { status: 400 });
        }

        if (!relievers || Object.keys(relievers).length === 0) {
            return NextResponse.json({ error: 'No relievers data provided' }, { status: 400 });
        }

        // Create Nodemailer transporter with Zoho configuration
        const transporter = nodemailer.createTransport({
            host: process.env.ZOHO_SMTP_HOST,
            port: parseInt(process.env.ZOHO_SMTP_PORT || '587'),
            secure: false, // true for 465, false for 587
            auth: {
                user: process.env.ZOHO_USER,
                pass: process.env.ZOHO_APP_PASSWORD
            },
            tls: {
                rejectUnauthorized: false,
                ciphers: 'SSLv3'
            }
        });

        // Verify transporter configuration
        try {
            await transporter.verify();
        } catch (error) {
            console.error('Transporter verification failed:', error);
            return NextResponse.json(
                { 
                    error: 'Email configuration error', 
                    details: error instanceof Error ? error.message : 'Unknown error',
                    env: {
                        hasUser: !!process.env.ZOHO_USER,
                        hasPassword: !!process.env.ZOHO_APP_PASSWORD,
                        hasHost: !!process.env.ZOHO_SMTP_HOST,
                        hasPort: !!process.env.ZOHO_SMTP_PORT
                    }
                },
                { status: 500 }
            );
        }

        // Send emails to all relievers
        const emailPromises = Object.entries(relievers).map(async ([uid, reliever]) => {
            const typedReliever = reliever as RelieverData;
            if (!typedReliever.EMAIL) {
                console.warn(`No email found for reliever ${uid}`);
                return { success: false, email: null, error: 'No email address provided' };
            }

            // Generate HTML content for the email
            const htmlContent = `
                <div style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; max-width: 800px; margin: 0 auto;">
                    <h2 style="text-align: center; text-transform: uppercase;">OFFICE ORDER</h2>
                    <div style="margin-bottom: 20px;">
                        <p>
                            To,<br>
                            <strong>${typedReliever.NAME}</strong><br>
                            ${typedReliever.DEPARTMENT}<br>
                            ${typedReliever.EMAIL}<br>
                            Diploma<br>
                            ${ec_code}
                        </p>
                        <p>
                            <strong>Subject:</strong> Order of Block Reliever for Theory Exam<br>
                            <strong>Reference:</strong> ${orderKey}
                        </p>
                        <p>
                            Sir/Madam,<br>
                            You have been assigned as a Reliever for MSBTE Theory Examination as per the following schedule. 
                            Please ensure your presence at the examination center at least 30 minutes before the scheduled time.
                        </p>
                        <table style="width: 100%; border-collapse: collapse; margin: 20px 0;">
                            <tr style="background-color: #f2f2f2;">
                                <th style="border: 1px solid #ddd; padding: 8px; text-align: center;">Sr. No</th>
                                <th style="border: 1px solid #ddd; padding: 8px; text-align: center;">Date</th>
                                <th style="border: 1px solid #ddd; padding: 8px; text-align: center;">Slot</th>
                            </tr>
                            ${typedReliever.ALLOTED.map((block, index) => `
                                <tr>
                                    <td style="border: 1px solid #ddd; padding: 8px; text-align: center;">${index + 1}</td>
                                    <td style="border: 1px solid #ddd; padding: 8px; text-align: center;">${new Date(block.DATE).toLocaleDateString('en-IN')}</td>
                                    <td style="border: 1px solid #ddd; padding: 8px; text-align: center;">${block.SESSION.toUpperCase()}</td>
                                </tr>
                            `).join('')}
                        </table>
                        <div style="text-align: right; margin-top: 40px;">
                            <p><strong>Chief Officer In-charge</strong></p>
                            <p>${ec_code}</p>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                </div>
            `;

            try {
                // Send email with timeout
                await Promise.race([
                    transporter.sendMail({
                        from: process.env.ZOHO_FROM,
                        to: typedReliever.EMAIL,
                        subject: `Reliever Order - ${orderKey}`,
                        html: htmlContent
                    }),
                    new Promise((_, reject) => 
                        setTimeout(() => reject(new Error('Email sending timeout')), 10000)
                    )
                ]);
                return { success: true, email: typedReliever.EMAIL };
            } catch (error) {
                console.error(`Failed to send email to ${typedReliever.EMAIL}:`, error);
                return { success: false, email: typedReliever.EMAIL, error };
            }
        });

        // Wait for all emails to be sent
        const results = await Promise.all(emailPromises);
        const successful = results.filter(r => r?.success).length;
        const failed = results.filter(r => !r?.success).length;

        return NextResponse.json({
            message: `Emails sent successfully. Success: ${successful}, Failed: ${failed}`,
            results
        });
    } catch (error) {
        console.error('Error sending emails:', error);
        return NextResponse.json(
            { 
                error: 'Failed to send emails', 
                details: error instanceof Error ? error.message : 'Unknown error',
                stack: error instanceof Error ? error.stack : undefined
            },
            { status: 500 }
        );
    }
} 
</app/api/(others)/send-reliever-email/route.ts>

<app/active/layout.tsx>
"use client";

import { Header } from "@/components/main/header";
import { Sidebar } from "@/components/main/sidebar";
import { useSidebarToggle } from "@/hooks/useToggleSidebar";
import { useUser } from "@clerk/nextjs";
import { Flip, ToastContainer } from "react-toastify";
import "react-toastify/dist/ReactToastify.css";
import "./style.css";
import { useEffect, useState } from "react";
import { Loader2 } from "lucide-react";
import { useRouter } from "next/navigation";
import { getUserMetadata } from "@/lib/clerk-data";

// Define LocalesArgument type for TypeScript
type LocalesArgument = string | string[] | undefined;

export default function RootLayout({ children }: { children: React.ReactNode }) {
  const { isSidebarVisible, toggleSidebar } = useSidebarToggle();
  const { user, isLoaded } = useUser();
  const router = useRouter();
  const [isLoadingMetadata, setIsLoadingMetadata] = useState(true);
  // Removed unused userMetadata state
  const [error, setError] = useState<string | null>(null);
  const [isPlanActive, setIsPlanActive] = useState<boolean | null>(null);

  // Override Date.toLocaleString to use en-IN locale and DD-MM-YYYY format
  useEffect(() => {
    const originalToLocaleString = Date.prototype.toLocaleString;

    Date.prototype.toLocaleString = function (
      locales?: LocalesArgument,
      options?: Intl.DateTimeFormatOptions
    ): string {
      const locale = locales || "en-IN";
      const mergedOptions: Intl.DateTimeFormatOptions = {
        ...options,
        day: "2-digit",
        month: "2-digit",
        year: "numeric",
      };
      return originalToLocaleString.call(this, locale, mergedOptions);
    };

    return () => {
      Date.prototype.toLocaleString = originalToLocaleString;
    };
  }, []);

  // Fetch user metadata
  useEffect(() => {
    async function fetchMetadata() {
      if (!user) {
        setIsLoadingMetadata(false);
        return;
      }

      try {
        const metadata = await getUserMetadata(user.id);
        // Removed setUserMetadata(metadata) since userMetadata is unused
        const planActive =
          metadata?.nextPaymentExpiry !== undefined &&
          (metadata.nextPaymentExpiry === null ||
            new Date(metadata.nextPaymentExpiry) > new Date());
        setIsPlanActive(Boolean(planActive));
      } catch (error) {
        console.error("Failed to fetch user metadata:", error);
        setError("Unable to verify plan status. Please try again later.");
        setIsPlanActive(false);
      } finally {
        setIsLoadingMetadata(false);
      }
    }
    fetchMetadata();
  }, [user]);

  // Redirect based on plan status
  useEffect(() => {
    if (!isLoaded || isLoadingMetadata) return;

    if (!user) {
      router.push("/login");
      return;
    }

    if (error || isPlanActive === false) {
      router.push("/inactive");
      return;
    }
  }, [user, isLoaded, isLoadingMetadata, isPlanActive, error, router]);

  // Show loading state
  if (!isLoaded || isLoadingMetadata) {
    return (
      <div className="min-h-screen bg-gradient-to-br from-navy-900 via-navy-950 to-emerald-950 flex items-center justify-center">
        <Loader2 className="h-8 w-8 animate-spin text-emerald-500" />
      </div>
    );
  }

  // Show error state or inactive plan
  if (error || isPlanActive === false) {
    return (
      <div className="min-h-screen bg-gradient-to-br from-navy-900 via-navy-950 to-emerald-950 flex items-center justify-center">
        <div className="text-center text-white">
          <p className="text-lg font-semibold">
            {error || "Your plan is inactive. Please renew to continue."}
          </p>
          <button
            className="mt-4 px-4 py-2 bg-emerald-500 text-white rounded hover:bg-emerald-600"
            onClick={() => router.push("/login")}
          >
            Go to Sign In
          </button>
        </div>
      </div>
    );
  }

  // Render layout only if plan is active
  if (isPlanActive) {
    return (
      <div className="min-h-screen ">
        <Header toggleSidebar={toggleSidebar} />
        <div className="flex">
          <Sidebar isSidebarVisible={isSidebarVisible} />
          <main
            className="flex-1 p-8 overflow-auto transition-all duration-300"
            style={{ height: "calc(100vh - 4rem)" }}
          >
            {children}
          </main>
        </div>
        <ToastContainer
          position="top-right"
          autoClose={5000}
          hideProgressBar={false}
          closeOnClick
          pauseOnHover
          transition={Flip}
          theme="dark"
        />
        <footer className="border-t py-2 fixed bottom-0 left-0 right-0 text-center text-sm text-gray-400 backdrop-blur-lg shadow-lg z-10">
          © {new Date().getFullYear()} TestForge {user?.fullName || "User"}. All rights reserved.
        </footer>
      </div>
    );
  }

  // Fallback return (should not be reached due to redirects)
  return null;
}
</app/active/layout.tsx>

<app/active/style.css>
@media print {
    .print-page {
        page-break-before: always;
    }
    table {
        width: 100%;
    }
}

</app/active/style.css>

<app/active/[...modules]/page.tsx>
"use client";

import { useEffect, useState, useTransition, Suspense } from "react";
import { notFound, useParams } from "next/navigation";
import Image from "next/image";
import dynamic from "next/dynamic";
import { cn } from "@/lib/utils"; // Assuming a utility for classNames

// Define types for better type safety
interface ModuleComponent {
  default: React.ComponentType;
}

// Fallback loading component
const LoadingFallback = () => (
  <div className="fixed inset-0 z-50 flex flex-col items-center justify-center bg-black/60 backdrop-blur-sm transition-opacity duration-300">
    <Image
      src="/msbte.jpg"
      alt="MSBTE Logo"
      width={120}
      height={120}
      priority
      className="mb-6 mix-blend-multiply bg-muted rounded-full"
    />
    <div className="flex space-x-3">
      <div className="h-10 w-10 bg-gradient-to-r from-orange-500 to-orange-400 rounded-full animate-[bounce_1.2s_infinite_100ms]" />
      <div className="h-10 w-10 bg-gradient-to-r from-white to-primary-fbg-primary-foreground rounded-full animate-[bounce_1.2s_infinite_300ms]" />
      <div className="h-10 w-10 bg-gradient-to-r from-green-500 to-green-400 rounded-full animate-[bounce_1.2s_infinite_500ms]" />
    </div>
    <p className="mt-6 text-white text-xl font-semibold animate-pulse">
      Loading module...
    </p>
  </div>
);

// Error fallback component
const ErrorFallback = () => (
  <div className="min-h-screen flex flex-col items-center justify-center bg-primary-foreground">
    <h2 className="text-2xl font-bold text-red-600">Error Loading Module</h2>
    <p className="mt-2 text-primary-fbg-primary-foreground">The requested module could not be loaded.</p>
    <button
      className="mt-4 px-4 py-2 bg-blue-500 text-white rounded hover:bg-blue-600 transition-colors"
      onClick={() => window.location.reload()}
    >
      Try Again
    </button>
  </div>
);

export default function ModulePage() {
  const { modules } = useParams();
  const [Component, setComponent] = useState<React.ComponentType | null>(null);
  const [isPending, startTransition] = useTransition();
  const [error, setError] = useState<string | null>(null);

  useEffect(() => {
    if (!modules) {
      setError("No module specified");
      return;
    }

    startTransition(async () => {
      try {
        const formattedFile = Array.isArray(modules) ? modules.join("/") : modules;
        const componentModule: ModuleComponent = await import(`@/modules/${formattedFile}`);
        
        // Validate component exists
        if (!componentModule.default) {
          throw new Error("Module default export not found");
        }

        const DynamicComponent = dynamic(() => Promise.resolve(componentModule.default), {
          ssr: false,
          loading: () => <LoadingFallback />,
        });

        setComponent(() => DynamicComponent);
      } catch (err) {
        console.error("Failed to load module:", err);
        setError(err instanceof Error ? err.message : "Unknown error");
      }
    });
  }, [modules]);

  // Handle no modules case
  if (!modules) {
    notFound();
    return null;
  }

  // Handle error case
  if (error) {
    return <ErrorFallback />;
  }

  return (
    <div className="relative min-h-screen">
      <Suspense fallback={<LoadingFallback />}>
        {isPending ? (
          <LoadingFallback />
        ) : Component ? (
          <div className={cn("transition-opacity duration-300", isPending ? "opacity-50" : "opacity-100")}>
            <Component />
          </div>
        ) : null}
      </Suspense>
    </div>
  );
}
</app/active/[...modules]/page.tsx>

<app/active/page.tsx>
"use client"
import { useEffect, useState } from "react"
import { Bar, Doughnut } from "react-chartjs-2"
import { motion } from "framer-motion"
import {
  Chart as ChartJS,
  CategoryScale,
  LinearScale,
  BarElement,
  Title,
  Tooltip,
  Legend,
  ArcElement,
  type ChartData,
  type ChartOptions,
} from "chart.js"
import { useEcCode } from "@/lib/helper"
import { useExamCenter } from "@/hooks/useExamCenter"
import axios from "axios"
import { Button } from "@/components/ui/button"
import { Card, CardContent, CardHeader, CardTitle } from "@/components/ui/card-premium"
import Link from "next/link"

ChartJS.register(CategoryScale, LinearScale, BarElement, Title, Tooltip, Legend, ArcElement)

const COLORS = {
  primary: ["#1e3a8a", "#3b82f6", "#60a5fa", "#93c5fd", "#bfdbfe"],
  secondary: ["#6d28d9", "#8b5cf6", "#a78bfa", "#c4b5fd", "#ddd6fe"],
  accent: ["#c2410c", "#f97316", "#fb923c", "#fdba74", "#fed7aa"],
  neutral: ["#1e293b", "#334155", "#475569", "#64748b", "#94a3b8"],
  success: ["#166534", "#22c55e", "#4ade80", "#86efac", "#bbf7d0"],
  warning: ["#854d0e", "#eab308", "#facc15", "#fde047", "#fef08a"],
  error: ["#7f1d1d", "#ef4444", "#f87171", "#fca5a5", "#fee2e2"],
  chart: [
    "#4338ca",  "#059669",  "#2563eb","#db2777","#d97706",
  "#0d9488", "#dc2626", "#7c3aed", "#34d399", "#ef4444",
  "#4a7ef0", "#f59e0b", "#9f7aea", "#2dd4bf", "#ec4899",
  "#0ea5e9", "#f97316", "#a78bfa"
  ],
}

interface ApiResponse {
  MESSAGE: string
  SUMMARY: {
    DAYS: number
    SESSIONS: number
    SUBJECTS: number
    EXAMINEES: number
    STUDENTS: number
    PAPERS: number
  }
  SCHEME_PAPERS: Record<string, number>
  MAX_APPEARING: { SESSION: string; STUDENTS: number }
  MIN_APPEARING: { SESSION: string; STUDENTS: number }
  STUDENT_SUBJECT: {
    MIN: { CODE: string; COUNT: number }
    MAX: { CODE: string; COUNT: number }
  }
  SESSION_DISTRIBUTION: Record<string, Record<string, number>>
  DEPT_DISTRIBUTION: Record<string, number>
}

interface SessionDistributionItem {
  date: string
  session: string
  count: number
}

const Dashboard = () => {
  const [data, setData] = useState<ApiResponse | null>(null)
  const [error, setError] = useState<string | null>(null)
  const [loadingMessage, setLoadingMessage] = useState("Loading dashboard...")
  const eccode = useEcCode()
  const { getDepartmentByCode, getExamCenterInfo } = useExamCenter(eccode)

  const loadingMessages = [
    "Retrieving timetable data, please wait...",
    "Processing exam center details...",
    "Fetching seating chart information...",
    "Verifying supervisor assignments...",
    "Loading student attendance records...",
    "Compiling reports, hold on...",
];


  useEffect(() => {
    const interval = setInterval(() => {
      setLoadingMessage(loadingMessages[Math.floor(Math.random() * loadingMessages.length)])
    }, 500)
    return () => clearInterval(interval)
  }, [])

  useEffect(() => {
    const fetchData = async () => {
      try {
        const response = await axios.get<ApiResponse>('/api/exam-booklet')
        setData(response.data)
      } catch (err) {
        if (axios.isAxiosError(err)) {
          setError(err.response?.status === 418 
            ? "Server says: You haven’t done all exam setup!" 
            : err.response?.data?.message || "Failed to load data"
          )
        } else {
          setError("An unexpected error occurred")
        }
        console.error("Fetch error:", err)
      }
    }
    fetchData()
  }, [])

  if (error) {
    return (
      <div className="flex items-center justify-center min-h-screen">
        <Card className="p-6">
          <CardHeader>
            <CardTitle className="text-xl text-red-600 dark:text-red-400">Oops! Something went wrong</CardTitle>
          </CardHeader>
          <CardContent className="text-center">
            <p className="mb-4 text-muted-foreground">{error}</p>
            <Link href="/active/configs/ec_config/">
              <Button>Retry</Button>
            </Link>
          </CardContent>
        </Card>
      </div>
    )
  }

  if (!data) {
    return (
      <div className="flex items-center justify-center min-h-screen">
        <div className="text-center space-y-4 flex items-center justify-center flex-col">
          <motion.div
            className="w-12 h-12 border-4 border-primary border-t-transparent rounded-full"
            animate={{ rotate: 360 }}
            transition={{ duration: 1, repeat: Infinity, ease: "linear" }}
          />
          <motion.p
            className="text-muted-foreground"
            key={loadingMessage}
            initial={{ opacity: 0 }}
            animate={{ opacity: 1 }}
            transition={{ duration: 0.5 }}
          >
            {loadingMessage}
          </motion.p>
        </div>
      </div>
    )
  }

  const summaryBarChartData: ChartData<"bar"> = {
    labels: ["Subjects", "Students", "Examinees", "Papers Required"],
    datasets: [{
      label: "Count",
      data: [data.SUMMARY.SUBJECTS, data.SUMMARY.STUDENTS, data.SUMMARY.EXAMINEES, data.SUMMARY.PAPERS],
      backgroundColor: [COLORS.secondary[1], COLORS.primary[1], COLORS.neutral[1], COLORS.accent[1]],
      borderRadius: 6,
    }],
  }

  const formattedSessionData: SessionDistributionItem[] = Object.entries(data.SESSION_DISTRIBUTION)
    .flatMap(([dateStr, sessions]) => {
      const [day, month, year] = dateStr.split('/').map(Number)
      const formattedDate = `${new Date(year, month - 1, day).toLocaleString("en-IN", { month: "short" ,year:'2-digit'})}`
      return Object.entries(sessions).map(([session, count]) => ({ date: formattedDate, session, count }))
    })

  const dates = [...new Set(formattedSessionData.map(item => item.date))].sort((a, b) => 
    new Date(a).getTime() - new Date(b).getTime()
  )

  const sessionBarChartData: ChartData<"bar"> = {
    labels: dates,
    datasets: [
      {
        label: "Morning",
        data: dates.map(date => formattedSessionData.find(item => item.date === date && item.session.toLowerCase() === "morning")?.count || 0),
        backgroundColor: COLORS.primary[2],
        borderRadius: 6,
      },
      {
        label: "Afternoon",
        data: dates.map(date => formattedSessionData.find(item => item.date === date && item.session.toLowerCase() === "afternoon")?.count || 0),
        backgroundColor: COLORS.warning[2],
        borderRadius: 6,
      },
    ],
  }

  const deptDistributionEntries = Object.entries(data.DEPT_DISTRIBUTION).map(([code, count]) => ({
    SCHEME: code,
    student_count: count
  }))

  const schemeChartData: ChartData<"doughnut"> = {
    labels: deptDistributionEntries.map(item => getDepartmentByCode(item.SCHEME)?.name || item.SCHEME),
    datasets: [{
      data: deptDistributionEntries.map(item => item.student_count),
      backgroundColor: COLORS.chart,
      borderWidth: 0,
    }],
  }

  const schemePaperEntries = Object.entries(data.SCHEME_PAPERS).map(([code, count]) => ({
    SCHEME: code,
    scheme_paper_count: count
  }))

  const barChartOptions: ChartOptions<"bar"> = {
    responsive: true,
    maintainAspectRatio: false,
    plugins: {
      legend: { display: false },
      tooltip: { backgroundColor: COLORS.neutral[0], titleColor: "#fff", bodyColor: "#fff", padding: 12, cornerRadius: 8 },
    },
    scales: {
      y: { beginAtZero: true, grid: { color: "rgba(156, 163, 175, 0.1)" }, ticks: { color: COLORS.neutral[3] } },
      x: { grid: { display: false }, ticks: { color: COLORS.neutral[3] } },
    },
  }

  const sessionBarChartOptions: ChartOptions<"bar"> = {
    responsive: true,
    maintainAspectRatio: false,
    plugins: {
      legend: { position: "top", align: "end", labels: { color: COLORS.neutral[3], usePointStyle: true, pointStyle: "circle" } },
      tooltip: { backgroundColor: COLORS.neutral[0], titleColor: "#fff", bodyColor: "#fff", padding: 12, cornerRadius: 8 },
    },
    scales: {
      y: { beginAtZero: true, stacked: true, grid: { color: "rgba(156, 163, 175, 0.1)" }, ticks: { color: COLORS.neutral[3] } },
      x: { stacked: true, grid: { display: false }, ticks: { color: COLORS.neutral[3], maxRotation: 45, minRotation: 45 } },
    },
  }

  const doughnutChartOptions: ChartOptions<"doughnut"> = {
    responsive: true,
    maintainAspectRatio: false,
    plugins: {
      legend: { position: "right", labels: { color: COLORS.neutral[3], usePointStyle: true, pointStyle: "circle" } },
      tooltip: {
        backgroundColor: COLORS.neutral[0],
        titleColor: "#fff",
        bodyColor: "#fff",
        padding: 12,
        cornerRadius: 8,
        callbacks: {
          label: context => {
            const total = context.dataset.data.reduce((acc, val) => acc + Number(val), 0)
            const percentage = Math.round((Number(context.raw) / total) * 100)
            return `${context.label}: ${context.formattedValue} (${percentage}%)`
          },
        },
      },
    },
    cutout: "60%",
  }

  const formatDateFromString = (dateString: string) =>
    new Date(dateString).toLocaleDateString("default", { month: "short", day: "numeric" })

  return (
    <div className="min-h-screen p-6">
      <div className="max-w-7xl mx-auto space-y-6">
        <Card>
          <CardHeader className="text-center">
            <CardTitle className="text-3xl font-bold">{getExamCenterInfo().NAME}</CardTitle>
            <p className="text-muted-foreground">Exam Management Dashboard</p>
          </CardHeader>
          <CardContent>
            <p className="text-sm text-muted-foreground text-center">{data.MESSAGE}</p>
          </CardContent>
        </Card>

        <div className="grid grid-cols-1 lg:grid-cols-12 gap-6">
          <aside className="lg:col-span-3 space-y-6">
            <Card>
              <CardHeader>
                <CardTitle className="text-lg">Key Metrics</CardTitle>
              </CardHeader>
              <CardContent className="grid gap-4">
                {[
                  { label: "Total Days", value: data.SUMMARY.DAYS, color: COLORS.primary[1], icon: "📅" },
                  { label: "Total Sessions", value: data.SUMMARY.SESSIONS, color: COLORS.secondary[1], icon: "⏱️" },
                  { label: "Students", value: data.SUMMARY.STUDENTS, color: COLORS.success[1], icon: "👨‍🎓" },
                  { label: "Examinees", value: data.SUMMARY.EXAMINEES, color: COLORS.accent[1], icon: "✏️" },
                  { label: "Subjects", value: data.SUMMARY.SUBJECTS, color: COLORS.secondary[2], icon: "📚" },
                  { label: "Papers Required", value: data.SUMMARY.PAPERS, color: COLORS.error[1], icon: "📝" },
                ].map((metric, idx) => (
                  <div key={idx} className="flex items-center p-3 bg-muted rounded-lg">
                    <span className="text-2xl mr-3">{metric.icon}</span>
                    <div>
                      <p className="text-sm text-muted-foreground">{metric.label}</p>
                      <p className="text-lg font-bold" style={{ color: metric.color }}>
                        {metric.value.toLocaleString()}
                      </p>
                    </div>
                  </div>
                ))}
              </CardContent>
            </Card>

            <Card>
              <CardHeader>
                <CardTitle className="text-lg">Attendance Extremes</CardTitle>
              </CardHeader>
              <CardContent className="space-y-4">
                <div className="p-4 bg-blue-50 dark:bg-blue-900/20 rounded-lg">
                  <div className="flex justify-between items-center mb-2">
                    <p className="font-medium text-blue-700 dark:text-blue-300">Max Attendance</p>
                    <span className="text-xs bg-blue-500 text-white px-2 py-1 rounded-full">
                      {formatDateFromString(data.MAX_APPEARING.SESSION.split(" - ")[0])}
                    </span>
                  </div>
                  <p className="text-sm text-muted-foreground">
                    {data.MAX_APPEARING.SESSION.split(" - ")[1]} Session
                  </p>
                  <p className="text-2xl font-bold text-blue-700 dark:text-blue-300 mt-2">
                    {data.MAX_APPEARING.STUDENTS.toLocaleString()}
                  </p>
                </div>
                <div className="p-4 bg-amber-50 dark:bg-amber-900/20 rounded-lg">
                  <div className="flex justify-between items-center mb-2">
                    <p className="font-medium text-amber-700 dark:text-amber-300">Min Attendance</p>
                    <span className="text-xs bg-amber-500 text-white px-2 py-1 rounded-full">
                      {formatDateFromString(data.MIN_APPEARING.SESSION.split(" - ")[0])}
                    </span>
                  </div>
                  <p className="text-sm text-muted-foreground">
                    {data.MIN_APPEARING.SESSION.split(" - ")[1]} Session
                  </p>
                  <p className="text-2xl font-bold text-amber-700 dark:text-amber-300 mt-2">
                    {data.MIN_APPEARING.STUDENTS.toLocaleString()}
                  </p>
                </div>
              </CardContent>
            </Card>
          </aside>

          <main className="lg:col-span-9 grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 gap-6">
          <Card>
              <CardHeader>
                <CardTitle className="text-lg">Departmental Distribution</CardTitle>
              </CardHeader>
              <CardContent className="h-72 flex items-center justify-center">
                {schemeChartData.datasets[0].data.length > 0 ? (
                  <Doughnut data={schemeChartData} options={doughnutChartOptions} />
                ) : (
                  <p className="text-muted-foreground">No data available</p>
                )}
              </CardContent>
            </Card>

            <Card>
              <CardHeader>
                <CardTitle className="text-lg">Exam Statistics</CardTitle>
              </CardHeader>
              <CardContent className="h-72">
                <Bar data={summaryBarChartData} options={barChartOptions} />
              </CardContent>
            </Card>

            <Card>
              <CardHeader>
                <CardTitle className="text-lg">Session Distribution</CardTitle>
              </CardHeader>
              <CardContent className="h-72">
                <Bar data={sessionBarChartData} options={sessionBarChartOptions} />
              </CardContent>
            </Card>


            <Card>
              <CardHeader>
                <CardTitle className="text-lg">Paper Distribution</CardTitle>
              </CardHeader>
              <CardContent className="h-72 overflow-y-auto space-y-3">
                {schemePaperEntries.sort((a, b) => b.scheme_paper_count - a.scheme_paper_count).map((scheme, idx) => {
                  const total = schemePaperEntries.reduce((sum, item) => sum + item.scheme_paper_count, 0)
                  const percentage = ((scheme.scheme_paper_count / total) * 100).toFixed(1)
                  return (
                    <div key={idx} className="flex items-center p-3 bg-muted rounded-lg">
                      <div className="w-4 h-4 rounded-full mr-3" style={{ backgroundColor: COLORS.chart[idx % COLORS.chart.length] }} />
                      <div className="flex-1">
                        <div className="flex justify-between mb-1">
                          <p className="text-sm font-medium">
                            {getDepartmentByCode(scheme.SCHEME)?.name || scheme.SCHEME}
                          </p>
                          <span className="text-xs text-muted-foreground">{percentage}%</span>
                        </div>
                        <div className="w-full bg-muted rounded-full h-2">
                          <div
                            className="h-2 rounded-full"
                            style={{ width: `${percentage}%`, backgroundColor: COLORS.chart[idx % COLORS.chart.length] }}
                          />
                        </div>
                      </div>
                    </div>
                  )
                })}
              </CardContent>
            </Card>

            <Card className="col-span-1 md:col-span-2">
              <CardHeader>
                <CardTitle className="text-lg">Subject Enrollment</CardTitle>
              </CardHeader>
              <CardContent className="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 gap-4">
                <div className="p-4 bg-green-50 dark:bg-green-900/20 rounded-lg text-center">
                  <p className="font-medium text-green-700 dark:text-green-300">Highest Enrollment</p>
                  <p className="text-2xl font-bold text-green-700 dark:text-green-300 mt-2">{data.STUDENT_SUBJECT.MAX.COUNT}</p>
                  <p className="text-sm text-muted-foreground mt-1">Subject: {data.STUDENT_SUBJECT.MAX.CODE}</p>
                </div>
                <div className="p-4 bg-red-50 dark:bg-red-900/20 rounded-lg text-center">
                  <p className="font-medium text-red-700 dark:text-red-300">Lowest Enrollment</p>
                  <p className="text-2xl font-bold text-red-700 dark:text-red-300 mt-2">{data.STUDENT_SUBJECT.MIN.COUNT}</p>
                  <p className="text-sm text-muted-foreground mt-1">Subject: {data.STUDENT_SUBJECT.MIN.CODE}</p>
                </div>
              </CardContent>
            </Card>
          </main>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  )
}

export default Dashboard
</app/active/page.tsx>

<app/not-found.tsx>
"use client";

import { Button } from "@/components/ui/button";
import { useState } from "react";
import { motion } from "framer-motion";
import { Bug, HomeIcon } from "lucide-react";
import Link from "next/link";
import { useClerk } from "@clerk/nextjs";

export default function NotFound() {
  const [isFlipped, setIsFlipped] = useState(false);
  const {user} = useClerk()
  return (
    <>
      <div className="flex items-center justify-center min-h-screen bg-gradient-to-tr from-gray-900 to-blue-950 text-white">
        <div className="text-center">
          <motion.div
            className="w-72 h-56 mx-auto mb-8 perspective cursor-pointer"
            initial={{ scale: 0.9 }}
            animate={{ scale: 1 }}
            transition={{ duration: 0.5 }}
            onClick={() => setIsFlipped(!isFlipped)}
          >
            <div
              className={`relative w-full h-full transition-transform duration-700 transform-style-3d ${isFlipped ? "rotate-y-180" : ""
                }`}
            >
              <div className="absolute w-full h-full rounded-xl shadow-lg p-6 border border-emerald-400/30 backface-hidden bg-gray-800/80 backdrop-blur-sm">
                <div className="text-left">
                  <div className="text-xs text-emerald-300">To: {user?.fullName || "TestForge User"}</div>
                  <div className="text-xs text-gray-400">From: TestForge Team</div>
                </div>
                <div className="mt-6 text-5xl font-bold text-transparent bg-clip-text bg-gradient-to-r from-emerald-400 to-blue-500 animate-pulse">
                  404
                </div>
                <div className="mt-2 text-sm text-gray-300">Page Not Found</div>
              </div>

              <div className="absolute w-full h-full rounded-xl shadow-lg p-6 border border-emerald-400/30 rotate-y-180 backface-hidden bg-gray-800/80 backdrop-blur-sm">
                <div className="text-left">
                  <div className="text-xs text-emerald-300">Dear Explorer,</div>
                  <div className="text-sm text-gray-400 mt-2">
                    It seems the page you&apos;re looking for has wandered off. Don&apos;t worry—our exam management tools are still here to help! Check our features or head back.
                  </div>
                </div>
                <div className="mt-4 text-sm text-gray-400 italic">Best, The TestForge Team</div>
              </div>
            </div>
          </motion.div>

          <p className="text-xl text-emerald-300 mb-4 animate-bounce">
            Lost in the Exam Realm...
          </p>
          <p className="text-md text-gray-400 mb-8 animate-fade-in">
            &ldquo;Even the best schedules can’t find this page.&rdquo;
          </p>

          <Button
            asChild
            size="lg"
            className="bg-emerald-500 hover:bg-emerald-600 text-white rounded-lg transition-all duration-300 shadow-md hover:shadow-lg"
          >
            <Link href="/">
            <HomeIcon/>Back to Home</Link>
          </Button>
        </div>

        <style>
          {`
          .perspective {
            perspective: 1000px;
          }
          .transform-style-3d {
            transform-style: preserve-3d;
          }
          .rotate-y-180 {
            transform: rotateY(180deg);
          }
          .backface-hidden {
            backface-visibility: hidden;
          }
          @keyframes float {
            0%, 100% { transform: translateY(0) rotate(2deg); }
            50% { transform: translateY(-15px) rotate(-2deg); }
          }
          @keyframes pulse {
            0%, 100% { opacity: 1; }
            50% { opacity: 0.8; }
          }
          .animate-pulse {
            animation: pulse 2s ease-in-out infinite;
          }
          @keyframes bounce {
            0%, 100% { transform: translateY(0); }
            50% { transform: translateY(-8px); }
          }
          .animate-bounce {
            animation: bounce 2s ease-in-out infinite;
          }
          @keyframes fade-in {
            0% { opacity: 0; }
            100% { opacity: 1; }
          }
          .animate-fade-in {
            animation: fade-in 1.5s ease-in-out;
          }
        `}
        </style>

        <motion.footer
          className="border-t border-emerald-400/20 py-4 text-center fixed bottom-0 w-full text-sm text-gray-400 backdrop-blur-md"
          initial={{ opacity: 0, y: 20 }}
          animate={{ opacity: 1, y: 0 }}
          transition={{ duration: 0.5, ease: "easeOut" }}
        >
          <div className="container mx-auto px-4">
            <div className="flex items-center justify-center space-x-2">
              <motion.div
                whileHover={{ scale: 1.1, rotate: 10 }}
                whileTap={{ scale: 0.9 }}
                transition={{ type: "spring", stiffness: 300 }}
              >
                <Bug className="text-emerald-400" />
              </motion.div>
              <span>
                Powered by{" "}
                <Link
                  href="https://1ndrajeet.is-a.dev"
                  className="text-emerald-300 hover:text-emerald-200 transition-colors duration-300"
                >
                  1ndrajeet
                </Link>
              </span>
            </div>
            <motion.div
              className="mt-2 text-xs text-gray-500"
              initial={{ opacity: 0 }}
              animate={{ opacity: 1 }}
              transition={{ delay: 0.5, duration: 0.5 }}
            >
              © 2025 TestForge. All rights reserved.
            </motion.div>
          </div>
        </motion.footer>
      </div>
    </>
  );
}
