<app/layout.tsx>
import type { Metadata } from "next";
import "./globals.css";
import { ClerkProvider } from "@clerk/nextjs";
import { ThemeProvider } from "@/components/theme-provider";
import { Montserrat } from "next/font/google"


export const metadata: Metadata = {
  title: "TestForge",
  description: "Streamline your MSBTE exam management with ease.",
};

const font = Montserrat({ subsets: ['latin'], weight: '500' })
export default function RootLayout({
  children,
}: Readonly<{
  children: React.ReactNode;
}>) {
  return (
    <ClerkProvider afterSignOutUrl="/">
      <html lang="en" suppressHydrationWarning className="scroll-smooth">
        <body className={`${font.className} antialiased`}>
          <ThemeProvider attribute="class" defaultTheme="light" enableSystem>
            {children}
          </ThemeProvider>
        </body>
      </html>
    </ClerkProvider>
  );
}
</app/layout.tsx>

<app/inactive/page.tsx>
'use client';
import { useUser } from '@clerk/nextjs';
import { useState, useEffect } from 'react';
import { CheckCircle, Loader2, AlertCircle, Star } from 'lucide-react';
import { Button } from '@/components/ui/button';
import { getUserMetadata } from '@/lib/clerk-data';
import PLANS from '@/data/pricing.json';

// Define interfaces for Razorpay
interface RazorpayResponse {
  razorpay_payment_id: string;
  razorpay_order_id: string;
  razorpay_signature: string;
}

interface RazorpayOptions {
  key: string;
  amount: number;
  currency: string;
  order_id: string;
  name: string;
  description: string;
  handler: (response: RazorpayResponse) => void;
  prefill: { name: string; email: string };
  theme: { color: string };
}

interface Razorpay {
  new(options: RazorpayOptions): { open: () => void };
}

declare global {
  interface Window {
    Razorpay: Razorpay;
  }
}

// Define the Plan interface based on pricing.json structure
interface Plan {
  id: string;
  title: string;
  subtitle?: string; // Made optional to match pricing.json
  description?: string; // Added to match pricing.json
  amount: number;
  price: string;
  period: string;
  features: string[];
  popular?: boolean;
  originalPrice?: string;
  discount?: string;
  cta?: string;
  savings?: string;
  highlight?: string;
  highlightDetail?: string;
  targetDate?: string;
  offer?: string | boolean;
}

// Define UserMetadata interface
interface UserMetadata {
  plan?: string;
  nextPaymentExpiry?: string | null;
}

// PricingCard component props
interface PricingCardProps {
  plan: Plan;
  onSuccess: (planId: string) => void;
  isPlanActive: boolean;
}

const PricingCard = ({ plan, onSuccess, isPlanActive }: PricingCardProps) => {
  const { user } = useUser();
  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(false);

  const loadRazorpay = () =>
    new Promise<boolean>((resolve) => {
      const script = document.createElement('script');
      script.src = 'https://checkout.razorpay.com/v1/checkout.js';
      script.onload = () => resolve(true);
      script.onerror = () => resolve(false);
      document.body.appendChild(script);
    });

  const handlePayment = async () => {
    if (!user || loading || isPlanActive) return;
    setLoading(true);

    try {
      const amount = plan.amount;

      const response = await fetch('/api/payments/checkout', {
        method: 'POST',
        headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
        body: JSON.stringify({ action: 'create', planId: plan.id, amount }),
      });

      if (response.status === 403) {
        alert('You already have an active plan.');
        setLoading(false);
        return;
      }

      if (!response.ok) {
        throw new Error(`Order creation failed: ${response.statusText}`);
      }

      const { order } = await response.json();
      if (!(await loadRazorpay())) throw new Error('Payment gateway failed to load');

      const options: RazorpayOptions = {
        key: process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_RAZORPAY_KEY_ID!,
        amount: order.amount,
        currency: order.currency,
        order_id: order.id,
        name: 'TestForge',
        description: plan.title,
        handler: async (response: RazorpayResponse) => {
          try {
            const verifyResponse = await fetch('/api/payments/checkout', {
              method: 'POST',
              headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
              body: JSON.stringify({ action: 'verify', planId: plan.id, ...response }),
            });

            if (!verifyResponse.ok) {
              throw new Error('Payment verification failed');
            }

            onSuccess(plan.id);
          } catch (error) {
            console.error('Verification failed:', error);
            alert('Payment verification failed. Please contact support.');
          }
        },
        prefill: {
          name: user.fullName || '',
          email: user.primaryEmailAddress?.emailAddress || '',
        },
        theme: { color: '#14b8a6' },
      };

      new window.Razorpay(options).open();
    } catch (error) {
      console.error('Payment failed:', error);
      alert('Payment failed. Please try again or contact support.');
    } finally {
      setLoading(false);
    }
  };

  return (
    <div
      className={`relative p-[1px] rounded-xl bg-gradient-to-b from-white/[0.08] to-transparent ${plan.popular ? 'ring-1 ring-emerald-500/50' : ''
        }`}
    >
      {plan.popular && (
        <div className="absolute -top-3 left-1/2 -translate-x-1/2 z-10">
          <div className="bg-gradient-to-r from-emerald-500 to-cyan-500 px-3 py-1 rounded-full text-white text-xs font-medium">
            Popular
          </div>
        </div>
      )}

      <div className="bg-navy-900/90 backdrop-blur-sm rounded-xl p-6 h-full">
        <div className="flex items-center gap-3 mb-4">
          <div className="w-8 h-8 rounded-lg bg-white/[0.08] flex items-center justify-center">
            <Star className="h-5 w-5 text-emerald-400" />
          </div>
          <div>
            <h3 className="text-white font-semibold text-sm">{plan.title}</h3>
            <p className="text-gray-400 text-xs">{plan.subtitle || plan.description}</p>
          </div>
        </div>

        <div className="mb-6">
          <div className="flex items-baseline gap-1 mb-1">
            {plan.originalPrice && (
              <span className="text-gray-500 line-through text-sm">{plan.originalPrice}</span>
            )}
            {plan.discount && (
              <span className="text-emerald-400 text-xs font-medium bg-emerald-500/10 px-2 py-0.5 rounded">
                {plan.discount}
              </span>
            )}
          </div>
          <div className="text-2xl font-bold text-white">{plan.price}</div>
          <div className="text-gray-400 text-sm">per {plan.period}</div>
        </div>

        <ul className="space-y-3 mb-6 flex-1">
          {plan.features.map((feature: string, idx: number) => (
            <li key={idx} className="flex items-start gap-2">
              <CheckCircle className="h-4 w-4 text-emerald-400 mt-0.5 flex-shrink-0" />
              <span className="text-gray-300 text-sm">{feature}</span>
            </li>
          ))}
        </ul>

        <Button
          onClick={handlePayment}
          disabled={loading || isPlanActive}
          className={`w-full h-10 text-sm font-medium rounded-lg transition-all ${isPlanActive
              ? 'bg-gray-700 text-gray-400 cursor-not-allowed'
              : plan.popular
                ? 'bg-gradient-to-r from-emerald-500 to-cyan-500 hover:from-emerald-600 hover:to-cyan-600 text-white'
                : 'bg-white/10 hover:bg-white/20 text-white border border-white/20'
            }`}
        >
          {loading ? (
            <Loader2 className="h-4 w-4 animate-spin" />
          ) : isPlanActive ? (
            'Active'
          ) : (
            'Get Started'
          )}
        </Button>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
};

const SuccessModal = ({ planId, onClose }: { planId: string; onClose: () => void }) => {
  const plan = PLANS.find((p) => p.id === planId);

  useEffect(() => {
    const timer = setTimeout(() => {
      onClose();
      window.location.href = '/active';
    }, 3000);
    return () => clearTimeout(timer);
  }, [onClose]);

  return (
    <div className="fixed inset-0 bg-black/60 backdrop-blur-sm flex items-center justify-center z-50 p-4">
      <div className="bg-white rounded-xl p-6 max-w-sm w-full text-center">
        <div className="w-12 h-12 bg-emerald-500 rounded-full flex items-center justify-center mx-auto mb-4">
          <CheckCircle className="w-6 h-6 text-white" />
        </div>
        <h2 className="text-xl font-bold text-gray-900 mb-2">Payment Successful!</h2>
        <p className="text-gray-600 mb-4">Your {plan?.title} subscription is now active.</p>
        <div className="text-sm text-gray-500">Redirecting to dashboard...</div>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
};

const CurrentPlanPage = ({ planId, expiryDate }: { planId: string; expiryDate: string | null }) => {
  const plan = PLANS.find((p) => p.id === planId);

  return (
    <div className="min-h-screen bg-gradient-to-br from-navy-900 via-navy-950 to-emerald-950 flex items-center justify-center p-4">
      <div className="max-w-md w-full">
        <div className="text-center mb-8">
          <h1 className="text-2xl font-bold text-white mb-2">Current Plan</h1>
          <p className="text-gray-400">You&apos;re subscribed to {plan?.title}</p>
        </div>

        <div className="bg-navy-900/90 backdrop-blur-sm border border-white/10 rounded-xl p-6">
          <div className="flex items-center gap-3 mb-4">
            <div className="w-10 h-10 rounded-lg bg-white/[0.08] flex items-center justify-center">
              <Star className="h-5 w-5 text-emerald-400" />
            </div>
            <div>
              <h2 className="text-white font-semibold">{plan?.title}</h2>
              <p className="text-gray-400 text-sm">
                {plan?.price} per {plan?.period}
              </p>
            </div>
          </div>

          <div className="mb-6">
            <p className="text-gray-300 text-sm">
              {expiryDate === null ? 'Lifetime access' : `Expires ${new Date(expiryDate).toLocaleDateString()}`}
            </p>
          </div>

          <ul className="space-y-2 mb-6">
            {plan?.features.map((feature: string, idx: number) => (
              <li key={idx} className="flex items-center gap-2">
                <CheckCircle className="h-4 w-4 text-emerald-400" />
                <span className="text-gray-300 text-sm">{feature}</span>
              </li>
            ))}
          </ul>

          <Button
            onClick={() => (window.location.href = '/active')}
            className="w-full bg-gradient-to-r from-emerald-500 to-cyan-500 hover:from-emerald-600 hover:to-cyan-600 text-white h-10 rounded-lg"
          >
            Go to Dashboard
          </Button>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
};

export default function ModernPricingPage() {
  const { user, isLoaded } = useUser();
  const [successPlanId, setSuccessPlanId] = useState<string | null>(null);
  const [userMetadata, setUserMetadata] = useState<UserMetadata | null>(null);
  const [isLoadingMetadata, setIsLoadingMetadata] = useState(true);
  const [error, setError] = useState<string | null>(null);

  useEffect(() => {
    async function fetchMetadata() {
      if (user) {
        try {
          const metadata = await getUserMetadata(user.id);
          setUserMetadata(metadata);
        } catch (error: unknown) {
          console.error('Failed to fetch user metadata:', error);
          setError(
            error instanceof Error
              ? error.message
              : 'Failed to load plan details. Please try again or contact support.',
          );
        } finally {
          setIsLoadingMetadata(false);
        }
      } else {
        setIsLoadingMetadata(false);
      }
    }
    fetchMetadata();
  }, [user]);

  if (!isLoaded || isLoadingMetadata) {
    return (
      <div className="min-h-screen bg-gradient-to-br from-navy-900 via-navy-950 to-emerald-950 flex items-center justify-center">
        <Loader2 className="h-6 w-6 animate-spin text-emerald-500" />
      </div>
    );
  }

  if (!user) {
    return (
      <div className="min-h-screen bg-gradient-to-br from-navy-900 via-navy-950 to-emerald-950 flex items-center justify-center">
        <div className="text-center">
          <AlertCircle className="h-12 w-12 mx-auto mb-4 text-red-400" />
          <h2 className="text-xl font-bold text-white mb-2">Login Required</h2>
          <p className="text-gray-400">Please log in to view pricing plans</p>
        </div>
      </div>
    );
  }

  if (error) {
    return (
      <div className="min-h-screen bg-gradient-to-br from-navy-900 via-navy-950 to-emerald-950 flex items-center justify-center">
        <div className="text-center max-w-md">
          <AlertCircle className="h-12 w-12 mx-auto mb-4 text-red-400" />
          <h2 className="text-xl font-bold text-white mb-2">Error</h2>
          <p className="text-gray-400 mb-4">{error}</p>
          <Button
            onClick={() => window.location.reload()}
            className="bg-gradient-to-r from-emerald-500 to-cyan-500 text-white h-10 px-6 rounded-lg"
          >
            Retry
          </Button>
        </div>
      </div>
    );
  }

  const isPlanActive =
    userMetadata?.nextPaymentExpiry &&
    (userMetadata.nextPaymentExpiry === null || new Date(userMetadata.nextPaymentExpiry) > new Date());

  if (isPlanActive) {
    return <CurrentPlanPage planId={userMetadata.plan as string} expiryDate={userMetadata.nextPaymentExpiry as string} />;
  }

  return (
    <div className="min-h-screen bg-gradient-to-br from-navy-900 via-navy-950 to-emerald-950 flex items-center justify-center p-4">
      <div className="max-w-4xl w-full">
        <div className="text-center mb-12">
          <div className="inline-flex items-center gap-2 px-3 py-1 rounded-full bg-white/[0.05] border border-white/10 text-emerald-300 text-sm font-medium mb-4">
            <Star className="w-4 h-4" />
            Choose Your Plan
          </div>
          <h1 className="text-3xl md:text-4xl font-bold text-white mb-3">
            Simple, transparent pricing
          </h1>
          <p className="text-gray-400 max-w-2xl mx-auto">
            Unlock TestForge&apos;s powerful features with the perfect plan for your institution
          </p>
        </div>

        <div className="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-4 gap-4">
          {PLANS.map((plan) => (
            <PricingCard
              key={plan.id}
              plan={plan}
              onSuccess={setSuccessPlanId}
              isPlanActive={!!isPlanActive}
            />
          ))}
        </div>

        <div className="text-center mt-8">
          <p className="text-gray-400 text-sm">
            Need a custom solution?
            <button className="text-emerald-400 hover:text-emerald-300 ml-1 underline">Contact us</button>
          </p>
        </div>
      </div>

      {successPlanId && <SuccessModal planId={successPlanId} onClose={() => setSuccessPlanId(null)} />}
    </div>
  );
}
</app/inactive/page.tsx>

<app/docs/layout.tsx>
"use client";
import { Header } from "@/components/main/header";
import { useState, useEffect } from "react";
import Link from "next/link";
import { usePathname } from "next/navigation";
import { ChevronDown, Book, FileText, Info, HelpCircle, Shield } from 'lucide-react';
import { cn } from "@/lib/utils";
import { Collapsible, CollapsibleContent, CollapsibleTrigger } from "@/components/ui/collapsible";
import { Input } from "@/components/ui/input";

import { useUser } from "@clerk/nextjs";
import { Flip, ToastContainer } from "react-toastify";
import 'react-toastify/dist/ReactToastify.css';

type DocItem = {
  name: string;
  path: string;
  icon?: React.ReactNode;
};

type DocSection = {
  section: string;
  items: DocItem[];
  icon?: React.ReactNode;
};

const useSidebarToggle = () => {
  const [isMobile, setIsMobile] = useState(false);
  const [isSidebarVisible, setSidebarVisible] = useState(true);

  useEffect(() => {
    const checkIfMobile = () => {
      const mobile = window.innerWidth < 768;
      setIsMobile(mobile);
      setSidebarVisible(!mobile); // Close sidebar by default on mobile, open on desktop
    };

    // Check on initial load
    checkIfMobile();

    // Add event listener for window resize
    window.addEventListener('resize', checkIfMobile);

    // Cleanup
    return () => window.removeEventListener('resize', checkIfMobile);
  }, []);

  const toggleSidebar = () => {
    setSidebarVisible((prev) => !prev);
  };

  return { isSidebarVisible, toggleSidebar, isMobile };
};


function DocsSidebar({ isSidebarVisible }: { isSidebarVisible: boolean }) {
  const [searchQuery, setSearchQuery] = useState("");
  const pathname = usePathname();
  const { isMobile } = useSidebarToggle();

  const docSections: DocSection[] = [
    {
      section: "Getting Started",
      icon: <Book className="h-4 w-4" />,
      items: [
        { name: "Introduction", path: "/docs/introduction", icon: <Info className="h-4 w-4" /> },
        { name: "Quick Start Guide", path: "/docs/quick-start", icon: <FileText className="h-4 w-4" /> },
        { name: "All Reports PDF", path: "/pdfs/TestForge_Merged.pdf", icon: <FileText className="h-4 w-4" />, },
      ]
    },
    {
      section: "Documentation",
      icon: <FileText className="h-4 w-4" />,
      items: [
        { name: "Installation", path: "/docs/installation", icon: <FileText className="h-4 w-4" /> },
        { name: "Configuration", path: "/docs/configuration", icon: <FileText className="h-4 w-4" /> },
      ]
    },
    {
      section: "Legal",
      icon: <Shield className="h-4 w-4" />,
      items: [
        { name: "Terms and Conditions", path: "/docs/terms", icon: <FileText className="h-4 w-4" /> },
        { name: "Privacy Policy", path: "/docs/privacy", icon: <FileText className="h-4 w-4" /> },
        { name: "Cookie Policy", path: "/docs/cookies", icon: <FileText className="h-4 w-4" /> }
      ]
    },
    {
      section: "Support",
      icon: <HelpCircle className="h-4 w-4" />,
      items: [
        { name: "FAQ", path: "/docs/faq", icon: <FileText className="h-4 w-4" /> },
        { name: "Contact Us", path: "/docs/contact", icon: <FileText className="h-4 w-4" /> }
      ]
    }
  ];

  // Filter sections and items based on search query
  const filteredSections = docSections.map(section => ({
    ...section,
    items: section.items.filter(item =>
      item.name.toLowerCase().includes(searchQuery.toLowerCase())
    )
  })).filter(section => section.items.length > 0);

  return (
    <div className={cn(
      "w-64 border-r h-[calc(100vh-6.5rem)] sticky top-0 transition-all duration-300 ease-in-out bg-muted backdrop-blur ",
      !isSidebarVisible && "hidden",
      isMobile && isSidebarVisible && "backdrop-blur-md bg-black/20 transition-all duration-300 w-full"
    )}>
      <div className="p-3">
        <Input
          type="text"
          placeholder="Search docs..."
          value={searchQuery}
          onChange={(e) => setSearchQuery(e.target.value)}
          className="w-full p-2 rounded-lg border border-neutral-200 dark:border-neutral-800 bg-transparent text-sm focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-primary"
        />
      </div>
      <nav className="flex flex-col h-[calc(100vh-10rem)] p-3 space-y-1 overflow-y-auto">
        {filteredSections.map((section) => (
          <DocSection key={section.section} section={section} currentPath={pathname} />
        ))}
      </nav>
    </div>
  );
}

function DocSection({ section, currentPath }: { section: DocSection; currentPath: string }) {
  const [isOpen, setIsOpen] = useState(
    // Auto-expand section if it contains the current path
    section.items.some(item => currentPath === item.path)
  );

  return (
    <Collapsible open={isOpen} onOpenChange={setIsOpen} className="transition-all duration-300 ease-in-out">
      <CollapsibleTrigger
        className={cn(
          "flex w-full items-center justify-between p-2 rounded-lg text-sm font-medium hover:bg-neutral-200 dark:hover:bg-neutral-800 transition-colors duration-200",
          isOpen && "bg-neutral-200 dark:bg-neutral-800"
        )}
      >
        <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
          {section.icon || <Book className="h-4 w-4 text-primary" />}
          <span>{section.section}</span>
        </div>
        <ChevronDown className={cn("h-4 w-4 text-primary transition-transform duration-300", isOpen && "rotate-180")} />
      </CollapsibleTrigger>
      <CollapsibleContent className="pl-6 mt-1 space-y-1 transition-all duration-300 ease-in-out overflow-hidden">
        {section.items.map((item) => (
          <Link
            key={item.path}
            href={item.path}
            className={cn(
              "flex items-center gap-2 p-2 rounded-lg text-sm transition-colors duration-200 hover:bg-neutral-200 dark:hover:bg-neutral-800",
              currentPath === item.path && "bg-neutral-200 dark:bg-neutral-800 font-semibold"
            )}
          >
            {item.icon || <FileText className="h-4 w-4 text-primary" />}
            <span>{item.name}</span>
          </Link>
        ))}
      </CollapsibleContent>
    </Collapsible>
  );
}

export default function DocsLayout({ children }: { children: React.ReactNode }) {
  const { isSidebarVisible, toggleSidebar, isMobile } = useSidebarToggle();
  const user = useUser();

  return (
    <div className="min-h-screen">
      <Header toggleSidebar={toggleSidebar} />
      <div className="flex relative">
        <DocsSidebar isSidebarVisible={isSidebarVisible} />
        <main className={cn(
          "flex-1 p-8 overflow-auto transition-all duration-300",
          isMobile && "w-full",
          isMobile && isSidebarVisible && "backdrop-blur-md bg-black/20 transition-all duration-300"
        )} style={{ height: 'calc(100vh - 6.5rem)' }}>
          {children}
        </main>
      </div>
      <ToastContainer
        position="top-right"
        autoClose={5000}
        hideProgressBar={false}
        closeOnClick
        pauseOnHover
        transition={Flip}
        theme="dark"
      />
      <footer
        className="border-t py-2 z-10 bottom-0 fixed left-0 right-0 text-center text-sm text-muted-foreground backdrop-blur-lg shadow-lg"
      >
        © {new Date().getUTCFullYear()} TestForge {user?.user?.fullName}. All rights reserved.
      </footer>
    </div>
  );
}
</app/docs/layout.tsx>

<app/docs/[...slug]/page.tsx>
"use client";
import { useEffect, useState, useTransition } from "react";
import { useParams } from "next/navigation";
import Image from "next/image";
import dynamic from "next/dynamic";
import { AlertCircle, Sparkles, BookOpen } from "lucide-react";
import { Alert, AlertDescription, AlertTitle } from "@/components/ui/alert";
import Link from "next/link";

export default function DocPage() {
  const { slug } = useParams();
  const [Component, setComponent] = useState<React.ComponentType | null>(null);
  const [isPending, startTransition] = useTransition();
  const [error, setError] = useState(false);
  const [loadingMessage, setLoadingMessage] = useState("Loading documentation...");
  const [artificialLoading, setArtificialLoading] = useState(true);

  // Fun loading messages
  const loadingMessages = [
    "Summoning knowledge from the digital realm...",
    "Brewing your documentation with extra care...",
    "Fetching wisdom bytes...",
    "Assembling pixels of knowledge...",
    "Dusting off the digital scrolls...",
  ];

  useEffect(() => {
    // Cycle through fun loading messages
    if (isPending) {
      const interval = setInterval(() => {
        setLoadingMessage(loadingMessages[Math.floor(Math.random() * loadingMessages.length)]);
      }, 2000);
      return () => clearInterval(interval);
    }
  }, [isPending, loadingMessages]);

  useEffect(() => {
    // Artificial loading delay to show loading animation
    const timer = setTimeout(() => {
      setArtificialLoading(false);
    }, 500);
    
    return () => clearTimeout(timer);
  }, []);

  useEffect(() => {
    if (!slug || artificialLoading) return;

    startTransition(() => {
      const loadComponent = async () => {
        try {
          const formattedFile = Array.isArray(slug) ? slug.join("/") : slug;
          // If no slug is provided, load the index page
          const filePath = formattedFile || "index";

          const componentModule = await import(`@/docs/${filePath}`);
          const DynamicComponent = dynamic(() => Promise.resolve(componentModule.default), {
            ssr: false,
            loading: () => <div className="flex items-center justify-center p-8"><Sparkles className="animate-spin mr-2" /> Loading magic...</div>,
          });

          setComponent(() => DynamicComponent);
        } catch (err) {
          console.error("Failed to load document:", err);
          setError(true);
        }
      };

      loadComponent();
    });
  }, [slug, artificialLoading]);

  if (error) {
    return (
      <div className="flex flex-col items-center justify-center min-h-[50vh] p-6">
        <Alert variant="destructive" className="max-w-md mb-4">
          <AlertCircle className="h-4 w-4" />
          <AlertTitle>Oops! We&apos;ve hit a snag!</AlertTitle>
          <AlertDescription>
            The document seems to have gone on vacation without telling us.
          </AlertDescription>
        </Alert>
        <div className="text-center">
          <h2 className="text-2xl font-bold mb-2">Document Gone Exploring</h2>
          <p className="text-muted-foreground mb-4">
            We searched high and low, but <strong className="text-primary">{Array.isArray(slug) ? slug.join('/') : slug}</strong> is playing hide and seek.
          </p>
          <div className="flex flex-col gap-4 items-center">
            <p className="text-sm text-muted-foreground">
              Let&apos;s find you something even better! Click below to discover our treasure trove of docs.
            </p>
            <Link
              href="/docs/introduction"
              className="px-4 py-2 rounded-md bg-primary text-primary-foreground hover:bg-primary/90 transition-colors text-sm font-medium flex items-center gap-2 animate-pulse hover:animate-none"
            >
              <BookOpen className="h-4 w-4" /> Embark on a Documentation Adventure
            </Link>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    );
  }

  return (
    <div className="relative">
      {isPending || artificialLoading ? (
        <div className="fixed inset-0 z-50 flex flex-col items-center justify-center bg-black/50 backdrop-blur-sm">
          <Image
            src="/logo.svg"
            alt="Documentation Logo"
            width={100}
            height={100}
            className="mb-4 mix-blend-multiply animate-bounce transition-all duration-1000 ease-in-out"
            priority
          />
          <div className="flex space-x-2">
            <div className="h-8 w-8 bg-gradient-to-r from-blue-500 to-blue-400 rounded-full animate-[bounce_1.5s_infinite_100ms]" />
            <div className="h-8 w-8 bg-gradient-to-r from-white to-gray-200 rounded-full animate-[bounce_1.5s_infinite_300ms]" />
            <div className="h-8 w-8 bg-gradient-to-r from-purple-500 to-purple-400 rounded-full animate-[bounce_1.5s_infinite_500ms]" />
          </div>
          <p className="mt-4 text-white text-lg font-medium animate-pulse">{loadingMessage}</p>
          <p className="mt-2 text-white/70 text-sm">Hold tight, we&apos;re making it extra special!</p>
        </div>
      ) : Component ? (
        <div className="doc-container">
          <Sparkles className="absolute top-0 right-0 h-6 w-6  animate-pulse text-primary trasition-all duration-1000 " />
          <Component />
        </div>
      ) : null}
    </div>
  );
}
</app/docs/[...slug]/page.tsx>

<app/page.tsx>
"use client";

import { useState, useEffect } from "react";
import { motion } from "framer-motion";
import { Moon, Sun, ArrowRight, Menu, BookOpen } from "lucide-react";
import { Button } from "@/components/ui/button";
import { Show, UserButton } from "@clerk/nextjs"; 
import Link from "next/link";

import Hero2 from "@/components/landing/hero2";
import Features from "@/components/landing/features";
import Testimonials from "@/components/landing/testimonials";
import Premium from "@/components/landing/premium";
import FAQ from "@/components/landing/faq";
import Working from "@/components/landing/working";
import Contact from "@/components/landing/contact";
import Footer from "@/components/landing/footer";
import Landing2 from "@/components/landing/landing2";
import Pricing from "@/components/landing/pricing";

import {
  DropdownMenu,
  DropdownMenuContent,
  DropdownMenuItem,
  DropdownMenuTrigger,
} from "@/components/ui/dropdown-menu";

const fadeInUp = {
  hidden: { opacity: 0, y: 30 },
  visible: {
    opacity: 1,
    y: 0,
    transition: { duration: 0.8, ease: "easeOut" },
  },
} as const;

export default function Home() {
  const [darkMode, setDarkMode] = useState(false);
  const [mounted, setMounted] = useState(false);
  const [mobileMenuOpen, setMobileMenuOpen] = useState(false);

  useEffect(() => {
    setMounted(true);
    setDarkMode(localStorage.getItem("darkMode") === "true");
  }, []);

  useEffect(() => {
    if (mounted) {
      document.documentElement.classList.toggle("dark", darkMode);
      localStorage.setItem("darkMode", darkMode.toString());
    }
  }, [darkMode, mounted]);

  if (!mounted) return null;

  const navLinks = [
    { name: "Features", id: "features" },
    { name: "How It Works", id: "how-it-works" },
    { name: "Pricing", id: "pricing" },
    { name: "Testimonials", id: "testimonials" },
    { name: "Premium", id: "premium" },
    { name: "Contact", id: "contact" },
  ];

  return (
    <div
      className={`min-h-screen flex flex-col ${
        darkMode ? "dark" : ""
      } bg-gradient-to-br from-gray-100 to-emerald-500 dark:from-navy-950 dark:to-emerald-900 text-gray-900 dark:text-white transition-all duration-500`}
    >
      {/* Header */}
      <motion.header
        initial={{ y: -50, opacity: 0 }}
        animate={{ y: 0, opacity: 1 }}
        transition={{ duration: 0.6 }}
        className="sticky top-0 z-50 bg-white/80 dark:bg-navy-900/80 backdrop-blur-lg shadow-lg py-4"
      >
        <div className="container mx-auto px-6 flex justify-between items-center">
          <Link href="/" className="flex items-center space-x-2">
            <span className="text-2xl font-extrabold bg-gradient-to-r from-emerald-600 to-navy-900 dark:from-emerald-400 dark:to-emerald-200 bg-clip-text text-transparent">
              TestForge
            </span>
          </Link>

          {/* Desktop Navigation */}
          <nav className="hidden md:flex space-x-6">
            {navLinks.map((link) => (
              <Link
                key={link.name}
                href={`#${link.id}`}
                className="text-base font-medium text-gray-700 dark:text-emerald-200 hover:text-emerald-600 dark:hover:text-emerald-400 transition-all duration-300 hover:scale-105"
              >
                {link.name}
              </Link>
            ))}
            <Link
              href="/docs/introduction"
              className="text-base font-medium text-gray-700 dark:text-emerald-200 hover:text-emerald-600 dark:hover:text-emerald-400 flex items-center gap-2"
            >
              <BookOpen className="h-4 w-4" />
              Docs
            </Link>
          </nav>

          <div className="flex items-center gap-3">
            {/* Dark mode */}
            <Button
              variant="ghost"
              size="icon"
              onClick={() => setDarkMode(!darkMode)}
              className="rounded-full h-9 w-9"
            >
              {darkMode ? (
                <Sun className="h-5 w-5" />
              ) : (
                <Moon className="h-5 w-5" />
              )}
            </Button>

            {/* Mobile Menu */}
            <div className="md:hidden">
              <DropdownMenu
                open={mobileMenuOpen}
                onOpenChange={setMobileMenuOpen}
              >
                <DropdownMenuTrigger asChild>
                  <Button variant="ghost" size="icon">
                    <Menu className="h-5 w-5" />
                  </Button>
                </DropdownMenuTrigger>

                <DropdownMenuContent align="end" className="w-56">
                  {navLinks.map((link) => (
                    <DropdownMenuItem key={link.name}>
                      <Link
                        href={`#${link.id}`}
                        onClick={() => setMobileMenuOpen(false)}
                      >
                        {link.name}
                      </Link>
                    </DropdownMenuItem>
                  ))}
                </DropdownMenuContent>
              </DropdownMenu>
            </div>

            {/* ✅ AUTH UI */}
            <Show when="signed-in">
              <UserButton />

              <motion.div initial="hidden" animate="visible" variants={fadeInUp}>
                <Link href="/active">
                  <Button>
                    Get Started <ArrowRight className="ml-2 h-4 w-4" />
                  </Button>
                </Link>
              </motion.div>
            </Show>

            <Show when="signed-out">
              <Link href="/login">
                <Button>Sign In</Button>
              </Link>
            </Show>
          </div>
        </div>
      </motion.header>

      {/* Logged OUT */}
      <Show when="signed-out">
        <Hero2 />
        <div id="features">
          <Features />
        </div>
        <div id="pricing">
          <Pricing />
        </div>
        <div id="testimonials">
          <Testimonials />
        </div>
        <div id="premium">
          <Premium />
        </div>
        <div id="working">
          <Working />
        </div>
        <div id="contact">
          <Contact />
        </div>
        <div id="faq">
          <FAQ />
        </div>
      </Show>

      {/* Logged IN */}
      <Show when="signed-in">
        <Landing2 />
      </Show>

      <Footer />
    </div>
  );
}
</app/page.tsx>

<docs/quick-start.tsx>
import { Card, CardHeader, CardTitle, CardContent } from "@/components/ui/card";
import { Button } from "@/components/ui/button";
import { CheckCircle, Download,  Users, CalendarDays, FileText, ClipboardList } from "lucide-react";
import { Badge } from "@/components/ui/badge";

const QuickStartGuide = () => {
    interface Action {
        label: string;
        module: string;
        template?: boolean;
        premium?: boolean;
    }

    interface Step {
        icon: React.ReactNode;
        title: string;
        description: string;
        actions: Action[];
    }

    const essentialSteps: Step[] = [
        {
            icon: <ClipboardList className="h-5 w-5" />,
            title: "1. Exam Center Setup",
            description: "Configure your center details",
            actions: [
                {
                    label: "Set Center Info",
                    module: "Exam Center Management"
                },
                {
                    label: "Add Institutes",
                    module: "Exam Center Management"
                }
            ]
        },
        {
            icon: <Download className="h-5 w-5" />,
            title: "2. Import MSBTE Data",
            description: "Bring official data into system",
            actions: [
                {
                    label: "Fetch Timetable",
                    module: "Timetable Management"
                },
                {
                    label: "Upload Seating Charts",
                    module: "Seating Chart Configuration",
                    template: true
                }
            ]
        },
        {
            icon: <Users className="h-5 w-5" />,
            title: "3. Staff Configuration",
            description: "Assign exam responsibilities",
            actions: [
                {
                    label: "Main Supervisors",
                    module: "Supervisors Management"
                },
                {
                    label: "Relievers",
                    module: "Relievers Management"
                },
                {
                    label: "Control Room",
                    module: "Control Room Management"
                }
            ]
        },
        {
            icon: <CalendarDays className="h-5 w-5" />,
            title: "4. Block Allocation",
            description: "Organize exam sessions",
            actions: [
                {
                    label: "Allocate Students",
                    module: "Block Allocation"
                },
                {
                    label: "Set Supervision Order",
                    module: "Supervision Order"
                }
            ]
        },
        {
            icon: <FileText className="h-5 w-5" />,
            title: "5. Generate Reports",
            description: "Print required documents",
            actions: [
                {
                    label: "Format 5/6 (Attendance)",
                    module: "Datewise Attendance"
                },
                {
                    label: "Format 7 (Packing Slip)",
                    module: "Packing Slip"
                },
                {
                    premium: true,
                    label: "Supervision Orders",
                    module: "Generate Supervision Order"
                }
            ]
        }
    ];

    return (
        <div className="max-w-4xl mx-auto p-4">
            <Card className="border-0 shadow-none">
                <CardHeader>
                    <CardTitle className="flex items-center gap-2">
                        <CheckCircle className="text-green-600" />
                        MSBTE Exam Quick Start
                    </CardTitle>
                    <p className="text-sm text-muted-foreground">
                        Complete these 5 essential steps to conduct exams
                    </p>
                </CardHeader>
                <CardContent className="space-y-6">
                    {essentialSteps.map((step, index) => (
                        <div key={index} className="flex gap-4">
                            <div className="bg-primary/10 p-3 rounded-full h-fit">
                                {step.icon}
                            </div>
                            <div className="flex-1">
                                <h3 className="font-medium">{step.title}</h3>
                                <p className="text-sm text-muted-foreground mb-3">
                                    {step.description}
                                </p>
                                <div className="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 gap-2">
                                    {step.actions.map((action, i) => (
                                        <div key={i} className="flex items-center gap-2">
                                            <Button variant="outline" size="sm" className="w-full justify-start">
                                                {action.label}
                                                {action.template && (
                                                    <Badge variant="secondary" className="ml-2">
                                                        Template
                                                    </Badge>
                                                )}
                                                {action.premium && (
                                                    <Badge variant="default" className="ml-2">
                                                        Premium
                                                    </Badge>
                                                )}
                                            </Button>
                                        </div>
                                    ))}
                                </div>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                    ))}

                    <div className="bg-blue-50 p-4 rounded-lg border border-blue-200 mt-6">
                        <h4 className="font-medium flex items-center gap-2">
                            <CheckCircle className="text-blue-600 h-4 w-4" />
                            Pro Tips for MSBTE Exams
                        </h4>
                        <ul className="text-sm mt-2 space-y-1">
                            <li>• Use <strong>Exam Day Edits</strong> for absent students/copy cases</li>
                            <li>• Generate <strong>Format 3A</strong> immediately after QP distribution</li>
                            <li>• Print <strong>Format 16 (Vigilance Register)</strong> for each block</li>
                            <li>• Verify <strong>Format 18</strong> against physical QP inventory</li>
                        </ul>
                    </div>
                </CardContent>
            </Card>
        </div>
    );
};

export default QuickStartGuide;
</docs/quick-start.tsx>

<docs/privacy.tsx>
import { Card, CardContent, CardHeader, CardTitle } from "@/components/ui/card";
import Link from "next/link";

const Privacy = () => {
  return (
    <div className="min-h-screen py-6 px-3 sm:px-6 lg:px-8 flex items-center justify-center">
      <Card className="w-full max-w-3xl mx-auto shadow-lg rounded-lg border border-gray-200 dark:border-navy-700 transition-all duration-300 hover:shadow-xl">
        <CardHeader className="pb-3 px-4 sm:px-6">
          <CardTitle className="text-xl sm:text-2xl lg:text-3xl font-bold text-center text-navy-900 dark:text-white">
            Privacy Policy for TestForge
          </CardTitle>
          <p className="text-xs sm:text-sm text-center mt-1 sm:mt-2 text-gray-600 dark:text-gray-400">
            Effective Date: April 1, 2025
          </p>
        </CardHeader>
        <CardContent className="space-y-5 px-4 sm:px-6 pb-6 text-gray-700 dark:text-gray-300">
          {/* Section 1 */}
          <section className="space-y-2">
            <h2 className="text-base sm:text-lg lg:text-xl font-semibold text-navy-800 dark:text-emerald-400">
              1. Our Commitment to Your Privacy
            </h2>
            <p className="text-xs sm:text-sm lg:text-base leading-relaxed">
              At <strong>TestForge</strong>, developed by <strong>Omkar Kulkarni</strong>, your privacy is our priority.
              This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, and protect your data in both the{" "}
              <strong>Offline (One-Time Purchase)</strong> and <strong>Online (Subscription-Based)</strong> versions.
              Our pledge: your data remains yours, safeguarded with care.
            </p>
          </section>

          {/* Section 2 */}
          <section className="space-y-2">
            <h2 className="text-base sm:text-lg lg:text-xl font-semibold text-navy-800 dark:text-emerald-400">
              2. Data We Collect
            </h2>
            <div className="space-y-3">
              <div>
                <h3 className="text-sm sm:text-base lg:text-lg font-medium text-gray-800 dark:text-gray-200">
                  2.1 Institutional Data
                </h3>
                <ul className="list-disc ml-3 sm:ml-4 lg:ml-5 text-xs sm:text-sm lg:text-base space-y-1">
                  <li>
                    We collect data your institution provides—like exam records and user details (e.g., names, IDs)—to
                    run TestForge smoothly.
                  </li>
                  <li>
                    Offline: Data stays on your system. Online: It’s securely stored on our isolated servers.
                  </li>
                </ul>
              </div>
              <div>
                <h3 className="text-sm sm:text-base lg:text-lg font-medium text-gray-800 dark:text-gray-200">
                  2.2 Usage Data
                </h3>
                <ul className="list-disc ml-3 sm:ml-4 lg:ml-5 text-xs sm:text-sm lg:text-base space-y-1">
                  <li>
                    Anonymized usage stats (e.g., feature use) may be collected to enhance TestForge—no personal data
                    included.
                  </li>
                  <li>
                    Offline: No data sent to us unless shared for support. Online: Minimal, anonymized data only.
                  </li>
                </ul>
              </div>
            </div>
          </section>

          {/* Section 3 */}
          <section className="space-y-2">
            <h2 className="text-base sm:text-lg lg:text-xl font-semibold text-navy-800 dark:text-emerald-400">
              3. How We Protect Your Data
            </h2>
            <div className="space-y-3">
              <div>
                <h3 className="text-sm sm:text-base lg:text-lg font-medium text-gray-800 dark:text-gray-200">
                  3.1 Data Isolation
                </h3>
                <ul className="list-disc ml-3 sm:ml-4 lg:ml-5 text-xs sm:text-sm lg:text-base space-y-1">
                  <li>
                    Your institution’s data is <strong>fully isolated</strong>. Offline: On your system. Online: On
                    dedicated, segregated servers.
                  </li>
                  <li>
                    Online users benefit from industry-standard encryption and secure architecture.
                  </li>
                </ul>
              </div>
              <div>
                <h3 className="text-sm sm:text-base lg:text-lg font-medium text-gray-800 dark:text-gray-200">
                  3.2 No Sharing Policy
                </h3>
                <ul className="list-disc ml-3 sm:ml-4 lg:ml-5 text-xs sm:text-sm lg:text-base space-y-1">
                  <li>
                    We <strong>never share, sell, or disclose</strong> your data to third parties—except if legally
                    required or with your consent.
                  </li>
                  <li>
                  Acharya Technologies staff access data only for support, with your permission.
                  </li>
                </ul>
              </div>
              <div>
                <h3 className="text-sm sm:text-base lg:text-lg font-medium text-gray-800 dark:text-gray-200">
                  3.3 Security Measures
                </h3>
                <ul className="list-disc ml-3 sm:ml-4 lg:ml-5 text-xs sm:text-sm lg:text-base space-y-1">
                  <li>
                    We use encryption, secure backups, and regular audits to prevent unauthorized access or loss.
                  </li>
                  <li>
                    Offline: Your system’s security matters—keep it updated and protected.
                  </li>
                </ul>
              </div>
            </div>
          </section>

          {/* Section 4 */}
          <section className="space-y-2">
            <h2 className="text-base sm:text-lg lg:text-xl font-semibold text-navy-800 dark:text-emerald-400">
              4. Your Control Over Your Data
            </h2>
            <p className="text-xs sm:text-sm lg:text-base leading-relaxed">
              You’re in control:

<docs/cookies.tsx>
import { Card, CardContent, CardHeader, CardTitle } from "@/components/ui/card";
import Link from "next/link";

const CookiePolicy = () => {
  return (
    <div className="min-h-screen  py-6 px-3 sm:px-6 lg:px-8 flex items-center text-justify justify-center">
      <Card className="w-full max-w-3xl mx-auto shadow-lg rounded-lg border border-gray-200 dark:border-navy-700 transition-all duration-300 hover:shadow-xl">
        <CardHeader className="pb-3 px-4 sm:px-6">
          <CardTitle className="text-xl sm:text-2xl lg:text-3xl font-bold text-center text-navy-900 dark:text-white">
            Cookie Policy for TestForge
          </CardTitle>
          <p className="text-xs sm:text-sm text-center mt-1 sm:mt-2 text-gray-600 dark:text-gray-400">
            Effective Date: April 1, 2025
          </p>
        </CardHeader>
        <CardContent className="space-y-5 px-4 sm:px-6 pb-6 text-gray-700 dark:text-gray-300">
          {/* Section 1 */}
          <section className="space-y-2">
            <h2 className="text-base sm:text-lg lg:text-xl font-semibold text-navy-800 dark:text-emerald-400">
              1. Introduction to Our Cookie Policy
            </h2>
            <p className="text-xs sm:text-sm lg:text-base leading-relaxed">
              Welcome to <strong>TestForge</strong>, an exam management system by{" "}
              <strong>Acharya Technologies</strong>. We value transparency in enhancing your experience. This Cookie Policy
              details how we use cookies—small data files—on your device for the{" "}
              <strong>Offline (One-Time Purchase)</strong> and <strong>Online (Subscription-Based)</strong> versions.
              Our approach is minimal: temporary session data, deleted upon logout.
            </p>
          </section>

          {/* Section 2 */}
          <section className="space-y-2">
            <h2 className="text-base sm:text-lg lg:text-xl font-semibold text-navy-800 dark:text-emerald-400">
              2. What Are Cookies and Why We Use Them
            </h2>
            <div className="space-y-3">
              <div>
                <h3 className="text-sm sm:text-base lg:text-lg font-medium text-gray-800 dark:text-gray-200">
                  2.1 Understanding Cookies
                </h3>
                <p className="mt-1 text-xs sm:text-sm lg:text-base leading-relaxed">
                  Cookies are small text files stored on your device (e.g., phone, computer) during TestForge use.
                  They save session details like login status, ensuring a seamless experience without constant re-entry.
                </p>
              </div>
              <div>
                <h3 className="text-sm sm:text-base lg:text-lg font-medium text-gray-800 dark:text-gray-200">
                  2.2 Our Purpose
                </h3>
                <ul className="list-disc ml-3 sm:ml-4 lg:ml-5 text-xs sm:text-sm lg:text-base space-y-1">
                  <li>
                    We use <strong>session cookies</strong> only—temporary files active during use—to maintain login
                    and session state.
                  </li>
                  <li>
                    Example: They track actions like exam management without repeated logins.
                  </li>
                  <li>
                    No persistent or tracking cookies—just pure functionality.
                  </li>
                </ul>
              </div>
            </div>
          </section>

          {/* Section 3 */}
          <section className="space-y-2">
            <h2 className="text-base sm:text-lg lg:text-xl font-semibold text-navy-800 dark:text-emerald-400">
              3. How We Store Data on Your Machine
            </h2>
            <div className="space-y-3">
              <div>
                <h3 className="text-sm sm:text-base lg:text-lg font-medium text-gray-800 dark:text-gray-200">
                  3.1 Temporary Storage
                </h3>
                <ul className="list-disc ml-3 sm:ml-4 lg:ml-5 text-xs sm:text-sm lg:text-base space-y-1">
                  <li>
                    Upon login, minimal data (e.g., session ID) is stored in a cookie to verify you and keep your session active.
                  </li>
                  <li>
                    Data is local (offline) or briefly server-linked (online)—a temporary handshake.
                  </li>
                  <li>
                    Only authentication essentials—no excess personal details.
                  </li>
                </ul>
              </div>
              <div>
                <h3 className="text-sm sm:text-base lg:text-lg font-medium text-gray-800 dark:text-gray-200">
                  3.2 Offline vs. Online Versions
                </h3>
                <ul className="list-disc ml-3 sm:ml-4 lg:ml-5 text-xs sm:text-sm lg:text-base space-y-1">
                  <li>
                    <strong>Offline:</strong> Cookies remain local, no external communication.
                  </li>
                  <li>
                    <strong>Online:</strong> Cookies sync briefly with secure servers, expiring post-use.
                  </li>
                </ul>
              </div>
            </div>
          </section>

          {/* Section 4 */}
          <section className="space-y-2">
            <h2 className="text-base sm:text-lg lg:text-xl font-semibold text-navy-800 dark:text-emerald-400">
              4. Deletion When You Log Out
            </h2>
            <div className="space-y-3">
              <div>
                <h3 className="text-sm sm:text-base lg:text-lg font-medium text-gray-800 dark:text-gray-200">
                  4.1 Automatic Cleanup
                </h3>
                <ul className="list-disc ml-3 sm:ml-4 lg:ml-5 text-xs sm:text-sm lg:text-base space-y-1">
                  <li>
                    Cookies are <strong>auto-deleted</strong> upon logout—like erasing a note.
                  </li>
                  <li>
                    Instant deletion on logout or timeout leaves no trace.
                  </li>
                  <li>
                    Online: Server link ends, session data becomes inaccessible.
                  </li>
                </ul>
              </div>
              <div>
                <h3 className="text-sm sm:text-base lg:text-lg font-medium text-gray-800 dark:text-gray-200">
                  4.2 Why This Matters
                </h3>
                <ul className="list-disc ml-3 sm:ml-4 lg:ml-5 text-xs sm:text-sm lg:text-base space-y-1">
                  <li>
                    Prevents unauthorized access on shared devices.
                  </li>
                  <li>
                    Upholds our privacy promise—no lingering data.
                  </li>
                  <li>
                    Fresh start every time, offline or online.
                  </li>
                </ul>
              </div>
            </div>
          </section>

          {/* Section 5 */}
          <section className="space-y-2">
            <h2 className="text-base sm:text-lg lg:text-xl font-semibold text-navy-800 dark:text-emerald-400">
              5. Managing Cookies Yourself
            </h2>
            <p className="text-xs sm:text-sm lg:text-base leading-relaxed">
              You control your device’s cookies:
            </p>
            <ul className="list-disc ml-3 sm:ml-4 lg:ml-5 text-xs sm:text-sm lg:text-base space-y-1">
              <li>
                Session cookies are essential, but you can disable them in your browser.
              </li>
              <li>
                Disabling may block login or functionality.
              </li>
              <li>
                Clear cookies manually—logout does it automatically.
              </li>
            </ul>
          </section>

          {/* Section 6 */}
          <section className="space-y-2">
            <h2 className="text-base sm:text-lg lg:text-xl font-semibold text-navy-800 dark:text-emerald-400">
              6. Contact Us
            </h2>
            <p className="text-xs sm:text-sm lg:text-base">
              Questions about cookies? Reach out:
            </p>
            <ul className="list-none ml-0 text-xs sm:text-sm lg:text-base space-y-2">
              <li className="flex items-center flex-wrap">
                <span className="mr-2">📞</span> <strong>Omkar Kulkarni:</strong> 8208607477
              </li>
              <li className="flex items-center flex-wrap">
                <span className="mr-2">📧</span> <strong>Email:</strong>{" "}

                            let benchNum;
                            if (colIndex === 0) benchNum = 39 - rowIndex;
                            else if (colIndex === 1) benchNum = 20 + rowIndex;
                            else if (colIndex === 2) benchNum = 19 - rowIndex;
                            else benchNum = 1 + rowIndex;

                                key={`bench-${colIndex}-${rowIndex}`}
                                className="border border-emerald-400 dark:border-emerald-600 flex justify-center items-center text-center shadow-sm rounded bg-white "

                                <div className="font-bold text-emerald-800 dark:text-emerald-400 rounded-r-md px-4 border-l border-emerald-400 dark:border-emerald-600 p-2">B{benchNum}</div>
                              </div>
                            );
                          })}
                        </div>
                      ))}
                    </div>

                    <div className="mt-6 text-sm bg-white  p-4 rounded-lg border border-emerald-200 dark:border-emerald-800">
                      <p className="font-medium text-emerald-800 dark:text-emerald-400">Room Layout Information:</p>

                          <Check size={16} className="text-green-600 dark:text-green-500 mr-2" />
                          Row 2: 10 benches (B11 to B19)
                        </li>
                        <li className="flex items-center">
                          <Check size={16} className="text-green-600 dark:text-green-500 mr-2" />
                          Row 3: 10 benches (B20 to B29)
                        </li>
                        <li className="flex items-center">
                          <Check size={16} className="text-green-600 dark:text-green-500 mr-2" />
                          Row 4: 9 benches (B30 to B39)
                        </li>
                      </ul>
                    </div>
                  </div>

                  <div className="mt-4 text-sm bg-muted p-4 rounded-lg">
                    <p className="font-medium dark:text-slate-300">For each block in your PDF, please include:</p>
                    <ul className="mt-2 space-y-1 dark:text-slate-300">
                      {["Block number and name", "Capacity (total number of benches)", 
                        "Bench arrangement in a grid format", "Clear bench numbering (B1, B2, etc.)"].map(item => (
                        <li key={item} className="flex items-center">
                          <Check size={16} className="text-green-600 dark:text-green-500 mr-2" />
                          {item}
                        </li>
                      ))}
                    </ul>
                  </div>
                </CardContent>
              </Card>
            </TabsContent>

            {/* Support Tab */}
            <TabsContent value="support" className="space-y-6">
              <h2 className="text-2xl font-semibold text-emerald-800 dark:text-emerald-400 mb-4">We&apos;re Here to Help</h2>

              <div className="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 gap-6">
                {[
                  { 
                    icon: <Phone size={28} className="text-emerald-700 dark:text-emerald-400" />, 
                    title: "Phone Support",
                    content: contactInfo.phone,
                    subtext: "Available 9 AM - 6 PM, Monday through Friday"
                  },
                  { 
                    icon: <Mail size={28} className="text-emerald-700 dark:text-emerald-400" />, 
                    title: "Email Support",

                    isLink: true,
                    href: `mailto:${contactInfo.email}`
                  },
                  { 
                    icon: <Globe size={28} className="text-emerald-700 dark:text-emerald-400" />,

                    isLink: true,

                  }

                      <div className="flex flex-col items-center text-center">
                        <div className="bg-accent p-4 rounded-full mb-4">
                          {item.icon}
                        </div>

          </Tabs>

    </div>
  );
};

            question: "Can TestForge integrate with our existing systems?",
