                                {`${index + 1}. ${item.question}`}
                            </h2>
                            <p className="text-xs sm:text-sm lg:text-base leading-relaxed">{item.answer}</p>
                        </section>
                    ))}

                    <p className="text-center text-xs sm:text-sm lg:text-base mt-6">
                        Still have questions? We’re here to help. Contact us at{" "}
                        <a
                            href="mailto:support@testforge.software"
                            className="text-emerald-600 dark:text-emerald-400 hover:underline"
                        >
                            support@testforge.software
                        </a>
                        , call <strong>Omkar Kulkarni</strong> at <strong>8208607477</strong>, or visit{" "}
                        <Link
                            href="http://testforge.software"
                            className="text-emerald-600 dark:text-emerald-400 hover:underline"
                        >
                            testforge.software
                        </Link>
                        .
                    </p>
                </CardContent>
            </Card>
        </div>
    );
};

export default FAQ;
</docs/faq.tsx>

<modules/sample/v1/generate_supervision_order.tsx>
"use client";

import { Alert, AlertDescription } from "@/components/ui/alert";
import { Button } from "@/components/ui/button-premium";
import { Card, CardContent, CardHeader, CardTitle } from "@/components/ui/card-premium";
import { Input } from "@/components/ui/input";
import { Label } from "@/components/ui/label";
import { Table, TableBody, TableCell, TableHead, TableHeader, TableRow } from "@/components/ui/table";
import { useExamCenter } from "@/hooks/useExamCenter";
import { useEcCode } from "@/lib/helper";
import { AlertCircle, Loader2, Printer, Mail } from "lucide-react";
import type React from "react";
import { useRef, useState } from "react";
import { useReactToPrint } from "react-to-print";
import { toast } from "react-toastify";
import CollegeHeader from "@/components/misc/CollegeHeaders";
import { generateSupervisionOrderEmail } from '@/app/api/(others)/send-email/emailtemplates';

interface OfficeOrderData {
    NAME: string;
    ROLE: string;
    DEPARTMENT: string;
    EMAIL: string;
    ALLOTED: {
        DATE: string;
        SESSION: string;
    }[];
}

interface EmailResult {
    email: string;
    success: boolean;
}

const PAGE_STYLE: React.CSSProperties = {
    pageBreakAfter: "always",
    width: "210mm",
    height: "297mm",
    margin: "0 auto",
    marginBlockEnd: "8px",
    padding: "20mm",
    boxSizing: "border-box",
};

const data: { [key: string]: OfficeOrderData } = {
    E01103: {
        NAME: "JADHAV A.U",
        ROLE: "LECTURER",
        DEPARTMENT: "CO",
        EMAIL: "support@testforge.software",
        ALLOTED: [
            {
                DATE: "2024-12-03",
                SESSION: "Afternoon",
            },
            {
                DATE: "2024-12-17",
                SESSION: "Afternoon",
            },
        ],
    },
    E01104: {
        NAME: "PATIL N.N",
        ROLE: "LECTURER",
        DEPARTMENT: "CO",
        EMAIL: "support@testforge.software",
        ALLOTED: [
            {
                DATE: "2024-12-03",
                SESSION: "Morning",
            },
            {
                DATE: "2024-12-14",
                SESSION: "Afternoon",
            },
        ],
    },
    E01105: {
        NAME: "KHODAVE N.G",
        ROLE: "LECTURER",
        DEPARTMENT: "CO",
        EMAIL: "support@testforge.software",
        ALLOTED: [
            {
                DATE: "2024-12-04",
                SESSION: "Afternoon",
            },
            {
                DATE: "2024-12-17",
                SESSION: "Afternoon",
            }, {
                DATE: "2024-12-21",
                SESSION: "Morning",
            },
        ],
    },
};

export default function OfficeOrderReport() {
    const ec_code = useEcCode();
    const { getExamSeason, getExamCenterInfo, getExamCenterCode, getExamYear, getDepartmentByCode } = useExamCenter(ec_code);

    const contentRef = useRef<HTMLDivElement>(null);
    const [orderKey, setOrderKey] = useState("");
    const [collegeRefKey, setCollegeRefKey] = useState("");
    const [officeOrderData, setOfficeOrderData] = useState<{ [key: string]: OfficeOrderData }>({});
    const [isLoading, setIsLoading] = useState(false);
    const [error, setError] = useState("");
    const [showReport, setShowReport] = useState(false);
    const reactToPrintFn = useReactToPrint({ contentRef });

    const fetchData = async () => {
        if (!orderKey || !collegeRefKey) {
            toast.error("Please enter an ORDER REF and COLLEGE REF string.");
            return;
        }

        setIsLoading(true);
        setError("");
        try {
            if (Object.keys(data).length === 0) {
                toast.info("No data found for the provided ORDER REF key.");
                setShowReport(false);
            } else {
                setOfficeOrderData(data);
                setShowReport(true);
            }
        } catch (error) {
            console.error("Error fetching office order data:", error);
            setError("Failed to fetch office order data. Please try again.");
            toast.error("Failed to fetch office order data. Please try again.");
        } finally {
            setIsLoading(false);
        }
    };

    const handleReset = () => {
        setOrderKey("");
        setCollegeRefKey("");
        setOfficeOrderData({});
        setShowReport(false);
    };

    const sendEmails = async () => {
        try {
            setIsLoading(true);

            const emailPromises = Object.entries(officeOrderData).map(async ([uid, supervisor]) => {
                console.error(uid.slice(0,0))
                const emailHtml = generateSupervisionOrderEmail({
                    supervisor,
                    examCenterName: getExamCenterInfo()?.NAME || "Unknown Exam Center",
                    examSeason: getExamSeason(),
                    examYear: getExamYear(),
                    orderKey,
                    chiefName: getExamCenterInfo().OFFICER_INCHARGE,
                    examCenterCode: getExamCenterCode(),
                    departmentName: getDepartmentByCode(supervisor.DEPARTMENT)?.name || "Unknown Department"
                });

                return fetch('/api/send-email', {
                    method: 'POST',
                    headers: {
                        'Content-Type': 'application/json',
                    },
                    body: JSON.stringify({
                        recipients: [{ email: supervisor.EMAIL, name: supervisor.NAME }],
                        subject: `Block Supervisor Order for ${getExamSeason()} ${getExamYear()}`,
                        html: emailHtml
                    }),
                });
            });

            const responses = await Promise.all(emailPromises);
            const results = await Promise.all(responses.map(r => r.json()));

            const successful = results.reduce((acc, result) =>
                acc + (result.results?.filter((r: EmailResult) => r.success)?.length || 0), 0);

            toast.success(`Successfully sent ${successful} emails`);
        } catch (error) {
            console.error('Error sending emails:', error);
            toast.error('Failed to send emails');
        } finally {
            setIsLoading(false);
        }
    };

    return (
        <div className="container mx-auto px-4 py-8">
            {!showReport && (
                <Card className="max-w-md mx-auto p-6 space-y-5">
                    <CardHeader className="pb-2">
                        <CardTitle className="text-2xl font-bold text-center">Block Supervisors Office Order Report</CardTitle>
                    </CardHeader>
                    <CardContent className="space-y-5">
                        {/* Input Fields */}
                        <div className="grid gap-3">
                            <div className="space-y-1">
                                <Label htmlFor="orderKey" className="text-sm font-medium">
                                    MSBTE ORDER REF Key
                                </Label>
                                <Input
                                    id="orderKey"
                                    type="text"
                                    placeholder="Enter MSBTE ORDER REF key"
                                    value={orderKey}
                                    onChange={(e) => setOrderKey(e.target.value)}
                                    className="w-full"
                                />
                            </div>
                            <div className="space-y-1">
                                <Label htmlFor="collegeRefKey" className="text-sm font-medium">
                                    INSTITUTE ORDER REF Key
                                </Label>
                                <Input
                                    id="collegeRefKey"
                                    type="text"
                                    placeholder="Enter INSTITUTE ORDER REF key"
                                    value={collegeRefKey}
                                    onChange={(e) => setCollegeRefKey(e.target.value)}
                                    className="w-full"
                                />
                            </div>
                        </div>

                        {/* Fetch Data Button */}
                        <Button onClick={fetchData} disabled={isLoading} className="w-full flex items-center justify-center gap-2 py-2">
                            {isLoading ? (
                                <>
                                    <Loader2 className="h-4 w-4 animate-spin" />
                                    Loading...
                                </>
                            ) : (
                                "Fetch Data"
                            )}
                        </Button>

                        {/* Error Message */}
                        {error && (
                            <Alert variant="destructive" className="flex items-center gap-2">
                                <AlertCircle className="h-4 w-4" />
                                <AlertDescription>{error}</AlertDescription>
                            </Alert>
                        )}
                    </CardContent>
                </Card>
            )}

            {showReport && (
                <div className="space-y-4">
                    <div className="flex justify-between items-center">
                        <Button onClick={handleReset} variant="outline">
                            Back to Search
                        </Button>
                        <div className="space-x-2">
                            <Button onClick={() => reactToPrintFn()} className="flex items-center gap-2">
                                <Printer className="h-4 w-4" />
                                Print Report
                            </Button>
                            <Button
                                onClick={sendEmails}
                                disabled={isLoading}
                                className="flex items-center gap-2"
                            >
                                {isLoading ? (
                                    <>
                                        <Loader2 className="h-4 w-4 animate-spin" />
                                        Sending...
                                    </>
                                ) : (
                                    <>
                                        <Mail className="h-4 w-4" />
                                        Send Emails
                                    </>
                                )}
                            </Button>
                        </div>
                    </div>

                    <div ref={contentRef} className="space-y-8">
                        {Object.entries(officeOrderData).map(([uid, supervisor]) => (
                            <Card key={uid} style={PAGE_STYLE} className="border times border-gray-300 shadow-lg relative">
                                <CollegeHeader collegeRefKey={collegeRefKey} />
                                <CardContent className="p-8">
                                    <h2 className="text-2xl font-bold text-center my-6 uppercase tracking-wide">OFFICE ORDER</h2>
                                    <div className="space-y-6 text-sm leading-relaxed">
                                        <p>
                                            To,
                                            <br />
                                            <span className="font-semibold">{supervisor.NAME}</span>
                                            <br />
                                            {supervisor.ROLE}, {getDepartmentByCode(supervisor.DEPARTMENT)?.name || "Unknown Department"}
                                            <br />
                                            {supervisor.EMAIL}
                                            <br />
                                            Diploma
                                            <br />
                                            {getExamCenterInfo()?.NAME || "Unknown Exam Center"}
                                        </p>
                                        <p>
                                            <span className="font-semibold">Subject:</span> Order of Block Supervisor for {getExamSeason()}{" "}
                                            Theory Exam – {getExamYear()}
                                            <br />
                                            <span className="font-semibold">Reference:</span> {orderKey}
                                        </p>
                                        <p>
                                            Sir/Madam,
                                            <br />
                                            You have to work as Invigilator (Block Supervisor) for MSBTE Theory Examination of{" "}
                                            {getExamSeason()} {getExamYear()} as per the following schedule. You have to make all the
                                            necessary arrangements for smooth conduct of the Examination.
                                        </p>
                                        <Table>
                                            <TableHeader>
                                                <TableRow>
                                                    <TableHead className="text-center">Sr. No</TableHead>
                                                    <TableHead className="text-center">Date</TableHead>
                                                    <TableHead className="text-center">Slot</TableHead>
                                                </TableRow>
                                            </TableHeader>
                                            <TableBody>
                                                {supervisor.ALLOTED.map((block, index) => (
                                                    <TableRow key={index}>
                                                        <TableCell className="text-center">{index + 1}</TableCell>
                                                        <TableCell className="text-center">{new Date(block.DATE).toLocaleDateString('en-IN')}</TableCell>
                                                        <TableCell className="text-center">{block.SESSION}</TableCell>
                                                    </TableRow>
                                                ))}
                                            </TableBody>
                                        </Table>
                                        <div className="text-right absolute bottom-4 right-4">
                                            <p className="font-semibold">Chief Officer In-charge</p>
                                            <p>
                                                {getExamCenterCode()} - {getExamCenterInfo()?.NAME || "Unknown Exam Center"}
                                            </p>
                                        </div>
                                    </div>
                                </CardContent>
                            </Card>
                        ))}
                    </div>
                </div>
            )}
        </div>
    );
}
</modules/sample/v1/generate_supervision_order.tsx>

<modules/formats/format3.tsx>
import React, { CSSProperties, useRef, useState } from 'react';
import { Button } from '@/components/ui/button';
import { useReactToPrint } from 'react-to-print';
import { useEcCode } from '@/lib/helper';
import { useExamCenter } from '@/hooks/useExamCenter';
import { Card, CardContent, CardHeader } from '@/components/ui/card';
import { Input } from '@/components/ui/input';
import { toast } from 'react-toastify';
import Image from 'next/image';
import { ArrowLeft, LucidePrinter } from 'lucide-react';

interface ExamRecord {
    ID: number;
    DAY: number;
    DATE: string;
    SESSION: string;
    E_SUB_CODE: string;
    E_TOTAL_STUDENT: number;
    E_TOTAL_PACKETS: number;
    R_TOTAL_PACKETS: number;
    R_TOTAL_QPS: number;
}
const PAGE_STYLE: CSSProperties = {
    pageBreakAfter: "always",
    width: "210mm",
    height: "297mm",
    margin: "0 auto",
    marginBlockEnd: "8px",
};


interface SessionSummary {
    subjectCodes: string[];
    totalStudents: number;
    totalPackets: number;
    receivedPackets: number;
}

const Format3Report: React.FC = () => {
    const ec_code = useEcCode();
    const { getDistributionCenterInfo } = useExamCenter(ec_code);
    const [data, setData] = useState<ExamRecord[]>([]);
    const [loading, setLoading] = useState(false);
    const [error, setError] = useState<string | null>(null);
    const componentRef = useRef<HTMLDivElement>(null);
    const [date, setDate] = useState(() => {
        const today = new Date();
        return today.toISOString().split('T')[0];
    });
    const [showReport, setShowReport] = useState(false);

    const handlePrint = useReactToPrint({
        contentRef: componentRef,
    });

    const fetchData = async (selectedDate: string) => {
        try {
            setLoading(true);
            const response = await fetch(`/api/qp-acc?date=${selectedDate}`);
            if (!response.ok) throw new Error('Failed to fetch data');
            const rawData = await response.json();
            if (!rawData.length) { toast.error("No data available for selected date"); return }
            setData(rawData);
            setShowReport(true);
        } catch (err) {
            setError(err instanceof Error ? err.message : 'An error occurred');
            setShowReport(false);
        } finally {
            setLoading(false);
        }
    };

    const handleFetchReport = () => {
        if (!date) {
            setError('Please select a date');
            return;
        }
        fetchData(date);
    };

    const getSessionSummary = (session: string): SessionSummary => {
        const sessionRecords = data.filter(record => record.SESSION === session);
        return {
            subjectCodes: [...new Set(sessionRecords.map(record => record.E_SUB_CODE))],
            totalStudents: sessionRecords.reduce((sum, record) => sum + record.E_TOTAL_STUDENT, 0),
            totalPackets: sessionRecords.reduce((sum, record) => sum + record.E_TOTAL_PACKETS, 0),
            receivedPackets: sessionRecords.reduce((sum, record) => sum + record.R_TOTAL_QPS, 0),
        };
    };

    if (!showReport) {
        return (
            <Card className="mb-6 max-w-2xl m-auto">
                <CardHeader>
                    <h2 className="text-2xl font-bold text-center">FORMAT 3 REPORT</h2>
                </CardHeader>
                <CardContent className="space-y-4">
                    <div className="space-y-2">
                        <label className="text-sm font-medium">Date</label>
                        <Input
                            type="date"
                            value={date}
                            onChange={(e) => setDate(e.target.value)}
                            max={new Date().toISOString().split('T')[0]}
                        />
                    </div>

                    <Button
                        onClick={handleFetchReport}
                        disabled={loading}
                        className="w-full"
                    >
                        {loading ? 'Loading...' : 'Fetch QP Accounting'}
                    </Button>
                    {error && <div className="text-red-500">{error}</div>}
                </CardContent>
            </Card>
        );
    }

    if (loading) return <div className="p-4">Loading...</div>;
    if (error) return <div className="p-4 text-red-500">Error: {error}</div>;
    if (!data.length) return <div className="p-4">No data available for selected date</div>;

    const morningSummary = getSessionSummary('Morning');
    const afternoonSummary = getSessionSummary('Afternoon');
    const firstRecord = data[0];
    const totalBundles = (afternoonSummary.receivedPackets > 0 ? 1 : 0) +
        (morningSummary.receivedPackets > 0 ? 1 : 0);

    return (
        <div className="p-4">
            <div className="mb-4 flex justify-between items-center">
                <Button onClick={() => setShowReport(false)} className="mb-6 group transition-transform duration-300 hover:scale-105">
                    <ArrowLeft className="transition-transform duration-300 group-hover:scale-105" /> Back
                </Button>
                <Button onClick={() => handlePrint()} className="mb-6 group transition-transform duration-300 hover:scale-105">
                    <LucidePrinter className="transition-transform duration-300 group-hover:scale-105" /> Print Report
                </Button>
                </div>

            <div
                ref={componentRef}
                className="p-6 shadow-lg border border-primary rounded"
                style={PAGE_STYLE}
            >
                <h1 className="text-2xl font-bold text-center mb-4 flex items-center justify-center gap-4">
                    <Image src={'/msbte.jpg'} alt='MSBTE Logo' className='w-12 h-12' height={100} width={100} />
                    Maharashtra State Board of Technical Education
                </h1>
                <h2 className="text-xl font-semibold text-center mb-6">FORMAT NO. 3</h2>

                <div className="text-center mb-4 text-sm">
                    <p>Receipt to be given by the Officer in Charge of examination centre</p>
                    <p>on receipt of question paper bundle from Controller of Examination</p>
                </div>

                <div className="mb-4 space-y-2">
                    <p><strong>EC: {ec_code}</strong></p>
                    <p><strong>Day of Examination:</strong> {firstRecord.DAY}</p>
                    <p><strong>Date:</strong> {new Date(firstRecord.DATE).toLocaleDateString('en-IN')}</p>
                </div>

                <div className="mb-4">
                    <p>Received from Name: ________________________</p>
                    <p>the Controller of examination from the distribution Centre {getDistributionCenterInfo().CODE}</p>
                    <p>The question paper bundle as per details below:</p>
                </div>

                <table className="w-full border-collapse border border-primary mb-4">
                    <thead>
                        <tr>
                            <th className="border border-primary p-2">Examination Centre Code</th>
                            <th className="border border-primary p-2">Day of examination</th>
                            <th className="border border-primary p-2">Date of Examination</th>
                            <th className="border border-primary p-2">Session</th>
                            <th className="border border-primary p-2">Bundle details (QP/ Subject code)</th>
                            <th className="border border-primary p-2">Total bundles received</th>
                        </tr>
                    </thead>
                    <tbody>
                        <tr>
                            <td rowSpan={totalBundles || 1} className="border border-primary p-2 text-center">
                                {ec_code}
                            </td>
                            <td rowSpan={totalBundles || 1} className="border border-primary p-2 text-center">
                                {firstRecord.DAY}
                            </td>
                            <td rowSpan={totalBundles || 1} className="border border-primary p-2 text-center">
                                {new Date(firstRecord.DATE).toLocaleDateString('en-IN')}
                            </td>
                            <td className="border border-primary p-2">
                                {morningSummary.receivedPackets > 0 ? 'Morning' : 'Afternoon'}
                            </td>
                            <td className="border border-primary p-2">
                                {morningSummary.receivedPackets > 0
                                    ? `One bundle with total of ${morningSummary.totalPackets} question paper packets`
                                    : `One bundle with total of ${afternoonSummary.totalPackets} question paper packets`
                                }
                            </td>
                            <td rowSpan={totalBundles || 1} className="border border-primary p-2 text-center">
                                {totalBundles === 2 ? "Two" : "One"}
                            </td>
                        </tr>
                        {totalBundles === 2 && (
                            <tr>
                                <td className="border border-primary p-2">Afternoon</td>
                                <td className="border border-primary p-2">
                                    One bundle with total of {afternoonSummary.totalPackets} question paper packets
                                </td>
                            </tr>
                        )}
                    </tbody>
                </table>

                <div className="mt-8 space-y-4">
                    <div>
                        <p>(Name & Designation)</p>
                        <p><strong>Officer in charge EC:</strong> ________________________</p>
                    </div>
                    <div>
                        <p><strong>Contact Cell No:</strong> ________________________</p>
                    </div>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>
    );
};

export default Format3Report;
</modules/formats/format3.tsx>

<modules/formats/format3a.tsx>
import React, { CSSProperties } from 'react';
import { Button } from '@/components/ui/button';
import { useReactToPrint } from 'react-to-print';
import { useEcCode } from '@/lib/helper';
import { useExamCenter } from '@/hooks/useExamCenter';
import { Card, CardContent, CardHeader } from '@/components/ui/card';
import { Input } from '@/components/ui/input';
import { toast } from 'react-toastify';
import Image from 'next/image';
import { ArrowLeft, LucidePrinter } from 'lucide-react';

interface ExamRecord {
    ID: number;
    DAY: number;
    DATE: string;
    SESSION: string;
    E_SUB_CODE: string;
    E_TOTAL_STUDENT: number;
    E_TOTAL_PACKETS: number;
    R_TOTAL_PACKETS: number;
    R_TOTAL_QPS: number;
}

const PAGE_STYLE: CSSProperties = {
    pageBreakAfter: "always",
    width: "210mm",
    minHeight: "297mm",
    margin: "0 auto",
    marginBlockEnd: "8px",
};

const Format3AReport: React.FC = () => {
    const ec_code = useEcCode();
    const { getDistributionCenterInfo } = useExamCenter(ec_code);
    const [data, setData] = React.useState<ExamRecord[]>([]);
    const [loading, setLoading] = React.useState(false);
    const [error, setError] = React.useState<string | null>(null);
    const componentRef = React.useRef<HTMLDivElement>(null);
    const [date, setDate] = React.useState(() => {
        const today = new Date();
        return today.toISOString().split('T')[0];
    });
    const [showReport, setShowReport] = React.useState(false);

    const handlePrint = useReactToPrint({
        contentRef: componentRef,
    });

    const fetchData = async (selectedDate: string) => {
        try {
            setLoading(true);
            const response = await fetch(`/api/qp-acc?date=${selectedDate}`);
            if (!response.ok) throw new Error('Failed to fetch data');
            const rawData = await response.json();
            if (!rawData.length) {
                toast.error("No data available for selected date");
                return;
            }
            setData(rawData);
            setShowReport(true);
        } catch (err) {
            setError(err instanceof Error ? err.message : 'An error occurred');
            setShowReport(false);
        } finally {
            setLoading(false);
        }
    };

    const handleFetchReport = () => {
        if (!date) {
            setError('Please select a date');
            return;
        }
        fetchData(date);
    };

    if (!showReport) {
        return (
            <Card className="mb-6 max-w-2xl m-auto">
                <CardHeader>
                    <h2 className="text-2xl font-bold text-center">FORMAT 3A REPORT</h2>
                </CardHeader>
                <CardContent className="space-y-4">
                    <div className="space-y-2">
                        <label className="text-sm font-medium">Date</label>
                        <Input
                            type="date"
                            value={date}
                            onChange={(e) => setDate(e.target.value)}
                            max={new Date().toISOString().split('T')[0]}
                        />
                    </div>
                    <Button
                        onClick={handleFetchReport}
                        disabled={loading}
                        className="w-full"
                    >
                        {loading ? 'Loading...' : 'Fetch Report'}
                    </Button>
                    {error && <div className="text-red-500">{error}</div>}
                </CardContent>
            </Card>
        );
    }

    if (loading) return <div className="p-4">Loading...</div>;
    if (error) return <div className="p-4 text-red-500">Error: {error}</div>;
    if (!data.length) return <div className="p-4">No data available for selected date</div>;

    const firstRecord = data[0];
    const sessions = ['Morning', 'Afternoon'];

    return (
        <div className="p-4">
            <div className="mb-4 flex justify-between items-center">
                <Button onClick={() => setShowReport(false)} className="mb-6 group transition-transform duration-300 hover:scale-105">
                    <ArrowLeft className="transition-transform duration-300 group-hover:scale-105" /> Back
                </Button>
                <Button onClick={() => handlePrint()} className="mb-6 group transition-transform duration-300 hover:scale-105">
                    <LucidePrinter className="transition-transform duration-300 group-hover:scale-105" /> Print Report
                </Button> </div>

            <div
                ref={componentRef}
                className="border border-primary rounded p-6 shadow-lg"
                style={PAGE_STYLE}
            >
                <h1 className="text-2xl font-bold text-center mb-4 flex items-center justify-center gap-4">
                    <Image src={'/msbte.jpg'} alt='MSBTE Logo' className='w-12 h-12 mix-blend-multiply' height={100} width={100} />
                    Maharashtra State Board of Technical Education
                </h1>
                <h2 className="text-xl font-semibold text-center mb-6">FORMAT NO. 3A</h2>

                <div className="text-center mb-4">
                    <p className="font-medium">Receipt to be given by the Officer in Charge of examination centre to the officer in charge, DC</p>
                    <p className="font-medium">Receipt of question paper packets</p>
                </div>

                <div className="mb-4">
                    <p>The question paper bundles received form Name: ________________________ the Controller of examination from the</p>
                    <p>Distribution Centre {getDistributionCenterInfo().CODE} were opened in the examination control room and the contents were as below;</p>
                </div>

                <table className="w-full border-collapse border border-primary mb-4">
                    <thead>
                        <tr>
                            <th className="border border-primary p-2 text-center" rowSpan={2}>Sr.No</th>
                            <th className="border border-primary p-2 text-center" rowSpan={2}>Date</th>
                            <th className="border border-primary p-2 text-center" rowSpan={2}>Session</th>
                            <th className="border border-primary p-2 text-center" rowSpan={2}>Time of Opening</th>
                            <th className="border border-primary p-2 text-center" colSpan={2}>Content as per label on bundle</th>
                            <th className="border border-primary p-2 text-center" colSpan={2}>Actual content in the bundle</th>
                            <th className="border border-primary p-2 text-center" rowSpan={2}>Remark</th>
                        </tr>
                        <tr>
                            <th className="border border-primary p-2 text-center">Q.P. Code</th>
                            <th className="border border-primary p-2 text-center">Number</th>
                            <th className="border border-primary p-2 text-center">Q.P. Code</th>
                            <th className="border border-primary p-2 text-center">Number</th>
                        </tr>
                    </thead>
                    <tbody>
                        {sessions.map((session, sessionIdx) => {
                            const sessionRecords = data.filter(record => record.SESSION === session);
                            if (sessionRecords.length === 0) return null;

                            return (
                                <tr key={session}>
                                    <td className="border border-primary p-1 text-center align-top">{sessionIdx + 1}</td>
                                    <td className="border border-primary p-1 text-center align-top">
                                        {new Date(firstRecord.DATE).toLocaleDateString('en-IN')}
                                    </td>
                                    <td className="border border-primary p-1 text-center align-top">{session}</td>
                                    <td className="border border-primary p-1 text-center align-top">
                                        {session === 'Morning' ? '9.10 am' : '1.40 pm'}
                                    </td>
                                    <td className="border border-primary p-1 align-top">
                                        {sessionRecords.map(record => (
                                            <div key={record.E_SUB_CODE} className="text-center py-1">{record.E_SUB_CODE}</div>
                                        ))}
                                    </td>
                                    <td className="border border-primary p-1 align-top">
                                        {sessionRecords.map(record => (
                                            <div key={record.E_SUB_CODE} className="text-center py-1">{record.E_TOTAL_PACKETS || '0'}</div>
                                        ))}
                                    </td>
                                    <td className="border border-primary p-1 align-top">
                                        {sessionRecords.map(record => (
                                            <div key={record.E_SUB_CODE} className="text-center py-1">{record.E_SUB_CODE}</div>
                                        ))}
                                    </td>
                                    <td className="border border-primary p-1 align-top">
                                        {sessionRecords.map(record => (
                                            <div key={record.E_SUB_CODE} className="text-center py-1">{record.R_TOTAL_PACKETS || '0'}</div>
                                        ))}
                                    </td>
                                    <td className="border border-primary p-1 text-center align-top">Matched</td>
                                </tr>
                            );
                        })}
                    </tbody>
                </table>

                <div className="mt-20 flex justify-between">
                    <div>
                        <p>Seal of the Institute.</p>
                    </div>
                    <div className="text-right ">
                        <p>(Name & Designation)</p>
                        <p>Officer in charge EC: ________________________</p>
                    </div>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>
    );
};

export default Format3AReport;
</modules/formats/format3a.tsx>

<modules/formats/format11.tsx>
import React from 'react';
import { useReactToPrint } from 'react-to-print';
import { Button } from '@/components/ui/button';
import Image from 'next/image';
import { LucidePrinter } from 'lucide-react';
import { useExamCenter } from '@/hooks/useExamCenter';
import { useEcCode } from '@/lib/helper';

const PAGE_STYLE: React.CSSProperties = {
    pageBreakAfter: "always",
    width: "297mm", // Landscape A4 width
    height: "210mm", // Landscape A4 height
    margin: "0 auto",
    marginBlockEnd: "8px",
}

const Format11Report: React.FC = () => {
    const componentRef = React.useRef<HTMLDivElement>(null);

    const handlePrint = useReactToPrint({
        contentRef: componentRef,
        pageStyle: `
            @page { 
                size: A4 landscape; 
                margin: 12mm; 
            }
            @media print {
                * {
                    -webkit-print-color-adjust: exact !important;
                    color-adjust: exact !important;
                }
                body { 
                    margin: 0 !important; 
                    padding: 0 !important;
                    font-family: 'Times New Roman', serif !important;
                    font-size: 12px !important;
                    line-height: 1.2 !important;
                    width: 100% !important;
                }
                .print-container {
                    width: 100% !important;
                    height: 100% !important;
                    margin: 0 !important;
                    padding: 0 !important;
                    box-shadow: none !important;
                    border: none !important;
                    page-break-after: avoid !important;
                }
                table { 
                    border-collapse: collapse !important; 
                    width: 100% !important;
                    margin: 0 !important;
                    page-break-inside: avoid !important;
                }
                th, td { 
                    border: 1px solid #000 !important; 
                    padding: 3px 2px !important; 
                    text-align: center !important;
                    vertical-align: middle !important;
                    font-size: 9px !important;
                    line-height: 1.1 !important;
                }
                th {
                    font-weight: bold !important;
                    background-color: #f5f5f5 !important;
                }
                .header-section {
                    margin-bottom: 8px !important;
                }
                .info-section {
                    margin-bottom: 10px !important;
                }
                .table-section {
                    margin-bottom: 8px !important;
                }
                .note-section {
                    font-size: 10px !important;
                }
            }
        `,
    });

    const ec_code = useEcCode();
    const { getExamCenterInfo } = useExamCenter(ec_code);
    const examCenterInfo = getExamCenterInfo() || {};

    return (
        <div className="p-4">
            <div className="mb-4 flex justify-end">
                <Button onClick={() => handlePrint()} className="mb-6 group transition-transform duration-300 hover:scale-105">
                    <LucidePrinter className="transition-transform duration-300 group-hover:scale-105" /> Print Report
                </Button>
            </div>

            <div style={PAGE_STYLE} className="times w-fit m-auto shadow-lg">
                <div className="border border-primary print:border-0 p-4" ref={componentRef}>
                    {/* Header Section */}
                    <div className="header-section">
                        <h1 className="text-2xl font-bold text-center mb-4 flex items-center justify-center gap-4">
                            <Image src='/msbte.jpg' alt='MSBTE Logo' className='w-12 h-12' height={100} width={100} />
                            Maharashtra State Board of Technical Education
                        </h1>
                        <h2 className="text-xl font-semibold text-center mb-6 underline">
                            FORMAT NO. 11
                        </h2>
                        <h3 className="text-lg font-bold text-center mb-4">
                            Account of Bundle/Paper Issued
                        </h3>
                    </div>

                    {/* Info Section */}
                    <div className="info-section space-y-1 text-base">
                        <div className="flex justify-between items-center">
                            <span>Examination Summer/Winter 20 ____</span>
                        </div>
                        <div className="flex justify-between items-center">
                            <span>Name of the Institute: <span className='font-semibold underline'>{examCenterInfo.NAME || '___________________________'}</span></span>

                            <span>Code No: <span className='font-semibold underline'>{ec_code}</span></span>
                        </div>
                    </div>

                    {/* Table Section */}
                    <div className="table-section">
                        <table className="w-full border-collapse border border-black">
                            <thead>
                                <tr>
                                    <th className="border border-black p-1 w-12">Sr. No.</th>
                                    <th className="border border-black p-1 w-20">Date<br />Time</th>
                                    <th className="border border-black p-1 w-24">Course Sem<br />Year Master</th>
                                    <th className="border border-black p-1 w-16">From</th>
                                    <th className="border border-black p-1 w-16">To</th>
                                    <th className="border border-black p-1 w-16">Total<br />No.</th>
                                    <th className="border border-black p-1">Nos. of Answer<br />books issued to<br />examiner in this<br />session</th>
                                    <th className="border border-black p-1">Nos. of Answer<br />books already<br />provided/unused/<br />Ans. books</th>
                                    <th className="border border-black p-1">Sr. No. of Ans.<br />books in bundle<br />received in this<br />session</th>
                                    <th className="border border-black p-1">Total Answer<br />books used</th>
                                    <th className="border border-black p-1">Dated sign of<br />O.I.C/sign of<br />change</th>
                                </tr>
                            </thead>
                            <tbody>
                                {Array.from({ length: 10 }).map((_, index) => (
                                    <tr key={index} className="h-8">
                                        <td className="border border-black text-center">{index + 1}</td>
                                        <td className="border border-black"></td>
                                        <td className="border border-black"></td>
                                        <td className="border border-black"></td>
                                        <td className="border border-black"></td>
                                        <td className="border border-black"></td>
                                        <td className="border border-black"></td>
                                        <td className="border border-black"></td>
                                        <td className="border border-black"></td>
                                        <td className="border border-black"></td>
                                        <td className="border border-black"></td>
                                    </tr>
                                ))}
                            </tbody>
                        </table>
                    </div>

                    {/* Note Section */}
                    <div className="note-section mt-2">
                        <p className="text-sm font-bold">
                            <strong>NOTE:</strong> This account should be maintained in a bound book / register and not on loose sheets of paper.
                        </p>
                    </div>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>
    );
};

export default Format11Report;
</modules/formats/format11.tsx>

<modules/formats/format10.tsx>
import React from 'react';
import { useReactToPrint } from 'react-to-print';
import { Button } from '@/components/ui/button';
import { LucidePrinter } from 'lucide-react';
import Image from 'next/image';

const PAGE_STYLE: React.CSSProperties = {
    pageBreakAfter: "always",
    width: "210mm",
    height: "297mm",
    margin: "0 auto",
    marginBlockEnd: "8px",
}

const Format10Report: React.FC = () => {
    const componentRef = React.useRef<HTMLDivElement>(null);

    const handlePrint = useReactToPrint({
        contentRef: componentRef,
    });

    return (
        <div className="p-4">
            <div className="mb-4 flex justify-end">
                <Button onClick={() => handlePrint()} className="mb-6 group transition-transform duration-300 hover:scale-105">
                    <LucidePrinter className="transition-transform duration-300 group-hover:scale-105" /> Print Report
                </Button>
            </div>

            <div ref={componentRef} className="times w-fit m-auto shadow-lg">
                <div style={PAGE_STYLE} className='border border-primary p-4'>
                    <h1 className="text-2xl font-bold text-center mb-4 flex items-center justify-center gap-4">
                        <Image src={'/msbte.jpg'} alt='MSBTE Logo' className='w-12 h-12' height={100} width={100} />
                        Maharashtra State Board of Technical Education
                    </h1>
                    <h2 className="text-xl font-semibold text-center mb-6 underline">
                        FORMAT NO. 10
                    </h2>
                    <h3 className="text-lg font-bold text-center mb-4">
                        Format of Inventory and receipt for submitting written answer book bundles to R.A.C.
                    </h3>

                    <section className="mb-6 space-y-2">
                        <div className="flex justify-between">
                            <p>Examination Summer/Winter 20 ____</p>
                        </div>

                        <div className="flex justify-between">
                            <p>Name of the Inst (Distribution Centre): _______________________________</p>
                            <p>Inst. Code no: _______</p>
                        </div>

                        <div className="flex justify-between">
                            <p>Name of the Inst (RAC): _____________________________________</p>
                            <p>Inst. Code no: _______</p>
                        </div>

                        <div className="flex justify-between">
                            <p>Date of despatch from DC: __________________</p>
                            <p>Date of receipt at RAC: _______</p>
                        </div>
                    </section>



                    <section className="mb-6">
                        <table className="w-full border-collapse border border-black">
                            <thead>
                                <tr className="">
                                    <th className="border border-black p-2">Bundle No.</th>
                                    <th className="border border-black p-2">Inst Code No.</th>
                                    <th className="border border-black p-2">Course/ Sem/ Year/ Master</th>
                                    <th className="border border-black p-2">Subject Code No.</th>
                                    <th className="border border-black p-2">Nos. of answer books in the bundle</th>
                                    <th className="border border-black p-2">Mark Sheet No.</th>
                                    <th className="border border-black p-2">Dated Signature of Receiving officer of RAC</th>
                                </tr>
                            </thead>
                            <tbody>
                                {Array.from({ length: 20 }).map((_, index) => (
                                    <tr key={index}>
                                        <td className="border border-black p-3"></td>
                                        <td className="border border-black p-2"></td>
                                        <td className="border border-black p-2"></td>
                                        <td className="border border-black p-2"></td>
                                        <td className="border border-black p-2"></td>
                                        <td className="border border-black p-2"></td>
                                        <td className="border border-black p-2"></td>
                                    </tr>
                                ))}
                            </tbody>
                        </table>
                    </section>

                    <section className="mt-20 mb-6">
                        <div className="flex justify-between">
                            <p>SIGNATURE OF SUPERVISOR</p>
                            <p>SIGNATURE OF OFFICER-IN-CHARGE</p>
                        </div>
                        <div className="flex justify-between">
                            <p>DISTRIBUTION CENTRE</p>
                            <p>DISTRIBUTION CENTRE</p>
                        </div>
                    </section>

                    <section className='border-t border-black border-dashed'>
                        <p>1. Copy for Officer-in-charge, R.A.C</p>
                        <p>2. Copy for Distribution center.</p>
                    </section>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>
    );
};

export default Format10Report;
</modules/formats/format10.tsx>

<modules/formats/format1.tsx>
import React from 'react';
import { useReactToPrint } from 'react-to-print';
import { Button } from '@/components/ui/button';
import Image from 'next/image';
import { LucidePrinter } from 'lucide-react';


const PAGE_STYLE: React.CSSProperties = {
    pageBreakAfter: "always",
    width: "210mm",
    height: "297mm",
    margin: "0 auto",
    marginBlockEnd: "8px",
}

const Format1Report: React.FC = () => {
    const componentRef = React.useRef<HTMLDivElement>(null);

    const handlePrint = useReactToPrint({
        contentRef: componentRef,
    });

    return (
        <div className="p-4">
            <div className="mb-4 flex justify-end">
                <Button onClick={() => handlePrint()} className="mb-6 group transition-transform duration-300 hover:scale-105">
                    <LucidePrinter className="transition-transform duration-300 group-hover:scale-105" /> Print Report
                </Button> </div>

            <div ref={componentRef} className="times w-fit m-auto shadow-lg">
                {/* Page 1 */}
                <div style={PAGE_STYLE} className='border border-primary p-4'>
                    <h1 className="text-2xl font-bold text-center mb-4 flex items-center justify-center gap-4">
                        <Image src={'/msbte.jpg'} alt='MSBTE Logo' className='w-12 h-12' height={100} width={100} />
                        Maharashtra State Board of Technical Education
                    </h1>
                    <h2 className="text-xl font-semibold text-center mb-6 underline">
                        FORMAT NO. 1
                    </h2>
                    <h3 className="text-lg font-bold text-center mb-4">
                        Instructions to Examinees
                    </h3>

                    <section className="mb-6">
                        <h4 className="font-bold mb-2">A. General Instructions:</h4>
                        <ol className="list-decimal pl-6">
                            <li className="mb-2">
                                The examinee is expected to be present at the examination centre 10 minutes before the
                                commencement of examination.
                            </li>
                            <li className="mb-2">
                                No examinee shall be admitted to the examination hall after 30 minutes of commencement
                                of the examination.
                            </li>
                            <li className="mb-2">
                                The examinee shall have the proper hall ticket duly signed by Principal / Head of
                                Institute. The valid institutional identity card for producing when demanded, without
                                which he/she shall not be eligible to appear for the examination.
                            </li>
                            <li className="mb-2">
                                Examinees are not permitted to leave examination hall in the initial 30 minutes and last
                                10 minutes of the paper duration.
                            </li>
                            <li className="mb-2">
                                A bell will be sounded 10 minutes before the commencement of the examination after
                                which the examinees are allowed to enter the examination hall/s.
                            </li>
                            <li className="mb-2">
                                Next ringing of the bell shall announce the commencement of the examination.
                            </li>
                            <li className="mb-2">
                                A warning bell will be sounded 10 minutes before the close of the examination. Examinees
                                shall tie the supplements and enclosures to the main answer book and be ready to hand
                                over it to the invigilator at the ringing of the final bell announcing the end of the
                                examination.
                            </li>
                            <li className="mb-2">
                                Exchange of answer books, supplements, calculators, and drawing instruments etc. among
                                the examinees is strictly prohibited.
                            </li>
                            <li className="mb-2">
                                Possession of any arms, weapons, etc. in the examination hall or at the examination
                                center by the examinee is strictly prohibited.
                            </li>
                        </ol>
                    </section>

                    <section className="mb-6">
                        <h4 className="font-bold mb-2">B. Instructions regarding writing answer books:</h4>
                        <ol className="list-decimal pl-6">
                            <li className="mb-2">
                                The examinee shall check the answer book issued to him for loose sheets or improper
                                printing etc. and if found so he shall get it changed before commencing to write the
                                answers.
                            </li>
                            <li className="mb-2">
                                The examinee shall enter the requisite information on the face sheet of the answer book
                                properly before commencing to write the answers.
                            </li>
                            <li className="mb-2">
                                Start each answer on a fresh page and write question number at the beginning of each
                                answer. Do not write anything in the margin of the answer book.
                            </li>
                            <li className="mb-2">
                                Use only blue or black ink pen to write answers. If there is a change in ink, it shall be
                                got attested by the supervisor/invigilator.
                            </li>
                            <li className="mb-2">
                                Do not leave blank page/s between the answers. If a page is left blank inadvertently,
                                write “Please Turn Over (PTO).” Answers written beyond a blank page may not be assessed.
                            </li>
                            <li className="mb-2">
                                The examinee shall use a separate answer book for each section, where there are sections
                                in the question paper.
                            </li>
                        </ol>
                    </section>
                </div>

                {/* Page 2 */}
                <div style={PAGE_STYLE} className='border border-primary p-4 '>
                    <section className="mb-6">
                        <ol className="list-decimal pl-6" start={7}>

                            <li className="mb-2">
                                Do not write your name or examination seat no. or any objectionable matter anywhere
                                inside the answer book. If any answer requires name or signature, write “XYZ”.
                            </li>
                            <li className="mb-2">
                                Do not tear off any page from the answer book.
                            </li>
                            <li className="mb-2">
                                Before submitting, tie securely additional answer book (supplements) and other
                                enclosures, if any, to the main answer book. Write the total no. of enclosures (main
                                answer book + graph sheet + drawing sheet + supplement if any) attached in the column
                                provided on the cover page of the answer book.
                            </li>
                        </ol>
                    </section>

                    <section className="mb-6">
                        <h4 className="font-bold mb-2">C. Special instructions:</h4>
                        <ol className="list-decimal pl-6">
                            <li className="mb-2">
                                The examinee is prohibited from keeping in his possession in the examination hall any
                                blank paper, notes, scribbles, chits, book/s, mobile phone, pager, programmable
                                calculator, electronic communication devices etc. The violation of this instruction
                                shall attract suitable punitive action.
                            </li>
                            <li className="mb-2">
                                The examinee shall behave properly before, during, or after the examination to maintain
                                the conducive environment at the examination center.
                            </li>
                            <li className="mb-2">
                                The examinee found guilty of misbehavior or using or attempting to use unfair means
                                shall be liable for suitable punitive action.
                            </li>
                            <li className="mb-2">
                                Discloser of identity on the part of examinee by way of communicating name/seat
                                number/signature or any request to the examiner in the answer book is a punishable
                                offence.
                            </li>
                            <li className="mb-2">
                                The examinee is prohibited from taking away the answer book/s or any enclosure/s issued
                                to him out of the examination hall. Violation shall attract punitive action under the
                                extant rules.
                            </li>
                        </ol>
                    </section>

                    <section>
                        <p className="font-bold">
                            Important: The instructions to examinee shall be displayed on the notice board of the
                            institute and/or at entry places of the examination center, so as to make the examinee
                            fully aware about these instructions and their implications.
                        </p>
                    </section>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>
    );
};

export default Format1Report;
</modules/formats/format1.tsx>

<modules/formats/format18.tsx>
import React from 'react';

<modules/formats/format2.tsx>
import React, { CSSProperties, useRef, useState } from 'react';
import { Button } from '@/components/ui/button';
import { useReactToPrint } from 'react-to-print';
import { useEcCode } from '@/lib/helper';
import { useExamCenter } from '@/hooks/useExamCenter';
import { Card, CardContent, CardHeader } from '@/components/ui/card';
import { Input } from '@/components/ui/input';
import { toast } from 'react-toastify';
import Image from 'next/image';
import { ArrowLeft, LucidePrinter } from 'lucide-react';

interface ExamRecord {
    ID: number;
    DAY: number;
    DATE: string;
    SESSION: string;
    E_SUB_CODE: string;
    E_TOTAL_STUDENT: number;
    E_TOTAL_PACKETS: number;
    R_TOTAL_PACKETS: number;
    R_TOTAL_QPS: number;
}
const PAGE_STYLE: CSSProperties = {
    pageBreakAfter: "always",
    width: "210mm",
    height: "297mm",
    margin: "0 auto",
    marginBlockEnd: "8px",
};


interface SessionSummary {
    subjectCodes: string[];
    totalStudents: number;
    totalPackets: number;
    receivedPackets: number;
}

const Format2Report: React.FC = () => {
    const ec_code = useEcCode();
    const { getDistributionCenterInfo } = useExamCenter(ec_code);
    const [data, setData] = useState<ExamRecord[]>([]);
    const [loading, setLoading] = useState(false);
    const [error, setError] = useState<string | null>(null);
    const componentRef = useRef<HTMLDivElement>(null);
    const [date, setDate] = useState(() => {
        const today = new Date();
        return today.toISOString().split('T')[0];
    });
    const [showReport, setShowReport] = useState(false);

    const handlePrint = useReactToPrint({
        contentRef: componentRef,
    });

    const fetchData = async (selectedDate: string) => {
        try {
            setLoading(true);
            const response = await fetch(`/api/qp-acc?date=${selectedDate}`);
            if (!response.ok) throw new Error('Failed to fetch data');
            const rawData = await response.json();
            if (!rawData.length) { toast.error("No data available for selected date"); return }
            setData(rawData);
            setShowReport(true);
        } catch (err) {
            setError(err instanceof Error ? err.message : 'An error occurred');
            setShowReport(false);
        } finally {
            setLoading(false);
        }
    };

    const handleFetchReport = () => {
        if (!date) {
            setError('Please select a date');
            return;
        }
        fetchData(date);
    };

    const getSessionSummary = (session: string): SessionSummary => {
        const sessionRecords = data.filter(record => record.SESSION === session);
        return {
            subjectCodes: [...new Set(sessionRecords.map(record => record.E_SUB_CODE))],
            totalStudents: sessionRecords.reduce((sum, record) => sum + record.E_TOTAL_STUDENT, 0),
            totalPackets: sessionRecords.reduce((sum, record) => sum + record.E_TOTAL_PACKETS, 0),
            receivedPackets: sessionRecords.reduce((sum, record) => sum + record.R_TOTAL_QPS, 0),
        };
    };

    if (!showReport) {
        return (
            <Card className="mb-6 max-w-2xl m-auto">
                <CardHeader>
                    <h2 className="text-2xl font-bold text-center">FORMAT 2 REPORT</h2>
                </CardHeader>
                <CardContent className="space-y-4">
                    <div className="space-y-2">
                        <label className="text-sm font-medium">Date</label>
                        <Input
                            type="date"
                            value={date}
                            onChange={(e) => setDate(e.target.value)}
                            max={new Date().toISOString().split('T')[0]}
                        />
                    </div>

                    <Button
                        onClick={handleFetchReport}
                        disabled={loading}
                        className="w-full"
                    >
                        {loading ? 'Loading...' : 'Fetch QP Accounting'}
                    </Button>
                    {error && <div className="text-red-500">{error}</div>}
                </CardContent>
            </Card>
        );
    }

    if (loading) return <div className="p-4">Loading...</div>;
    if (error) return <div className="p-4 text-red-500">Error: {error}</div>;
    if (!data.length) return <div className="p-4">No data available for selected date</div>;

    const morningSummary = getSessionSummary('Morning');
    const afternoonSummary = getSessionSummary('Afternoon');
    const firstRecord = data[0];
    const totalBundles = (afternoonSummary.receivedPackets > 0 ? 1 : 0) +
        (morningSummary.receivedPackets > 0 ? 1 : 0);

    return (
        <div className="p-4">
            <div className="mb-4 flex justify-between items-center">
                <Button variant={'secondary'} onClick={() => setShowReport(false)} className="mb-6 group transition-transform duration-300 hover:scale-105">
                    <ArrowLeft className="transition-transform duration-300 group-hover:scale-105" /> Back
                </Button><Button onClick={() => handlePrint()} className="mb-6 group transition-transform duration-300 hover:scale-105">
                    <LucidePrinter className="transition-transform duration-300 group-hover:scale-105" /> Print Report
                </Button>
            </div>

            <div
                ref={componentRef}
                className="p-6 shadow-lg border rounded"
                style={PAGE_STYLE}
            >
                <h1 className="text-2xl font-bold text-center mb-4 flex items-center justify-center gap-4">
                    <Image src={'/msbte.jpg'} alt='MSBTE Logo' className='w-12 h-12 mix-blend-multiply' height={100} width={100} />
                    Maharashtra State Board of Technical Education
                </h1>
                <h2 className="text-xl font-semibold text-center mb-6">FORMAT NO. 2</h2>

                <div className="text-center mb-4 text-sm">
                    <p>Receipt to be given by the Officer in Charge of examination centre</p>
                    <p>on receipt of question paper bundle from Controller of Examination</p>
                </div>

                <div className="mb-4 space-y-2">
                    <p><strong>EC: {ec_code}</strong></p>
                    <p><strong>Day of Examination:</strong> {firstRecord.DAY}</p>
                    <p><strong>Date:</strong> {new Date(firstRecord.DATE).toLocaleDateString('en-IN')}</p>
                </div>

                <div className="mb-4">
                    <p>Received from Name: ________________________</p>
                    <p>the Controller of examination from the distribution Centre {getDistributionCenterInfo().CODE}</p>
                    <p>The question paper bundle as per details below:</p>
                </div>

                <table className="w-full border-collapse border border-primary dark:border-primary mb-4">
                    <thead>
                        <tr>
                            <th className="border border-primary dark:border-primary p-2">Examination Centre Code</th>
                            <th className="border border-primary dark:border-primary p-2">Day of examination</th>
                            <th className="border border-primary dark:border-primary p-2">Date of Examination</th>
                            <th className="border border-primary dark:border-primary p-2">Session</th>
                            <th className="border border-primary dark:border-primary p-2">Bundle details (QP/ Subject code)</th>
                            <th className="border border-primary dark:border-primary p-2">Total bundles received</th>
                        </tr>
                    </thead>
                    <tbody>
                        <tr>
                            <td rowSpan={totalBundles || 1} className="border border-primary dark:border-primary p-2 text-center">
                                {ec_code}
                            </td>
                            <td rowSpan={totalBundles || 1} className="border border-primary dark:border-primary p-2 text-center">
                                {firstRecord.DAY}
                            </td>
                            <td rowSpan={totalBundles || 1} className="border border-primary dark:border-primary p-2 text-center">
                                {new Date(firstRecord.DATE).toLocaleDateString('en-IN')}
                            </td>
                            <td className="border border-primary dark:border-primary p-2">
                                {morningSummary.receivedPackets > 0 ? 'Morning' : 'Afternoon'}
                            </td>
                            <td className="border border-primary dark:border-primary p-2">
                                {morningSummary.receivedPackets > 0
                                    ? `One bundle for morning session`
                                    : `One bundle for afternoon session`
                                }
                            </td>
                            <td rowSpan={totalBundles || 1} className="border border-primary dark:border-primary p-2 text-center">
                                {totalBundles === 2 ? "Two" : "One"}
                            </td>
                        </tr>
                        {totalBundles === 2 && (
                            <tr>
                                <td className="border border-primary dark:border-primary p-2">Afternoon</td>
                                <td className="border border-primary dark:border-primary p-2">
                                    One bundle for afternoon session
                                </td>
                            </tr>
                        )}
                    </tbody>
                </table>

                <div className="mt-20 space-y-4 text-right">
                    <div>
                        <p>(Name & Designation)</p><br />
                        <p><strong>Officer in charge EC:</strong> ________________________</p>
                    </div>
                    <div>
                        <p><strong>Contact Cell No:</strong> ________________________</p>
                    </div>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>
    );
};

export default Format2Report;
</modules/formats/format2.tsx>

<modules/formats/format16.tsx>
import React from 'react';
import { useReactToPrint } from 'react-to-print';
import { Button } from '@/components/ui/button';
import Image from 'next/image';
import { useEcCode } from '@/lib/helper';
import { useExamCenter } from '@/hooks/useExamCenter';
import { LucidePrinter } from 'lucide-react';

const PAGE_STYLE: React.CSSProperties = {
    width: "210mm",
    height: "297mm",
    margin: "0 auto",
    padding: "5mm",
};

const Format16Report: React.FC = () => {
    const componentRef = React.useRef<HTMLDivElement>(null);
    const eccode = useEcCode()
    const {getExamSeason,getExamYear} = useExamCenter(eccode)
    const handlePrint = useReactToPrint({
        contentRef: componentRef,
    });

    return (
        <div className="p-2">
            <div className="mb-2 flex justify-end">
          <Button onClick={() => handlePrint()} className="mb-6 group transition-transform duration-300 hover:scale-105">
                    <LucidePrinter className="transition-transform duration-300 group-hover:scale-105" /> Print Report
                </Button>  </div>

            <div ref={componentRef} className=" w-fit m-auto shadow-lg text-sm" style={PAGE_STYLE}>
                <div className="border border-primary p-2">
                    <div className="text-center mb-2">
                        <h1 className="text-xl font-bold mb-1 flex items-center justify-center gap-2">
                            <Image src={'/msbte.jpg'} alt='MSBTE Logo' className='w-10 h-10' height={40} width={40} />
                            Maharashtra State Board of Technical Education
                        </h1>

<modules/formats/format12.tsx>
import React from 'react';
import { useReactToPrint } from 'react-to-print';
import { Button } from '@/components/ui/button';
import Image from 'next/image';
import { useEcCode } from '@/lib/helper';
import { useExamCenter } from '@/hooks/useExamCenter';
import { LucidePrinter } from 'lucide-react';

const PAGE_STYLE: React.CSSProperties = {
    width: "210mm",
    height: "297mm",
    margin: "0 auto",
    padding: "10mm",
};

const Format12Report: React.FC = () => {

        contentRef: componentRef,
    });

    return (
        <div className="p-4">
            <div className="mb-4 flex justify-end">
              <Button onClick={() => handlePrint()} className="mb-6 group transition-transform duration-300 hover:scale-105">
                    <LucidePrinter className="transition-transform duration-300 group-hover:scale-105" /> Print Report
                </Button></div>

            <div ref={componentRef} className=" w-fit m-auto shadow-lg" style={PAGE_STYLE}>
                <div className="border border-primary p-4">
                    <h1 className="text-2xl font-bold text-center mb-4 flex items-center justify-center gap-4">
                        <Image src={'/msbte.jpg'} alt='MSBTE Logo' className='w-12 h-12' height={100} width={100} />
                        Maharashtra State Board of Technical Education

                        FORMAT NO. 12
                    </h2>

                        Format of Certificate to be Given by External Examiner
                    </h3>

                    <div className="space-y-4 text-base">
