<modules/formats/format9.tsx>
'use client';

import React, { CSSProperties, useRef, useState } from "react";
import { Button } from "@/components/ui/button";
import { Card, CardHeader, CardContent } from "@/components/ui/card";
import { Loader2, LucidePrinter, XIcon } from 'lucide-react';
import { Input } from "@/components/ui/input";
import { useReactToPrint } from 'react-to-print';
import { toast } from "react-toastify";
import { useEcCode } from "@/lib/helper";
import { useExamCenter } from "@/hooks/useExamCenter";
import Image from "next/image";
import { Table, TableBody, TableCell, TableHead, TableHeader, TableRow } from "@/components/ui/table";
import { Label } from "@/components/ui/label";

interface ExamData {
    INSTITUTE_CODE: number;
    DATE: string;
    SESSION: string;
    TIME_SLOT: string;
    SCHEME: string;
    SUBJECT_CODE: string;
    TOTAL_STUDENTS: number;
    SHEET_NO: string;
    SUBJECT_NAME: string;
}

const PAGE_STYLE: CSSProperties = {
    pageBreakAfter: "always",
    width: "210mm", // A4 width
    height: "297mm", // A4 height
    margin: "0 auto",
    padding: "4mm",
};

const ReportComponent = ({ data, toggleReport, ec_code, date }: { data: ExamData[]; toggleReport: () => void, ec_code: string, date: string }) => {
    const contentRef = useRef<HTMLDivElement>(null);
    const handlePrint = useReactToPrint({ contentRef });

    const { getExamSeason, getExamYear, getExamCenterInfo } = useExamCenter(ec_code);
    const totalBundles = data.reduce((sum, item) => sum + (item.TOTAL_STUDENTS || 0), 0);

    return (
        <div className="p-6 min-h-screen">
            <div className="max-w-7xl mx-auto">
                <div className="flex justify-between mb-6">
                    <Button variant="secondary" onClick={toggleReport} className="flex items-center gap-2 group">
                        <XIcon className="transition-transform duration-500 group-hover:rotate-180 group-hover:scale-110" />
                        <span className="transition-opacity duration-500 group-hover:opacity-80 group-hover:translate-x-1">Clear Report</span>
                    </Button>
                    <Button onClick={() => handlePrint()} className="group transition-transform duration-300 hover:scale-105">
                        <LucidePrinter className="transition-transform duration-300 group-hover:scale-105" /> Print Format 9
                    </Button>
                </div>

                <div ref={contentRef} className="border px-6 py-0 w-min border-primary rounded shadow-md times" style={PAGE_STYLE}>
                    {/* Header Section */}
                    <div className="text-center mb-4">
                        <h2 className="text-lg font-bold uppercase flex justify-center items-center gap-2">
                            <Image src="/msbte.jpg" alt="MSBTE" width={48} height={48} className="h-12 w-12" />
                            Maharashtra State Board of Technical Education
                        </h2>
                        <h3 className="text-base mt-2 underline">FORMAT NO. 9</h3>
                        <p className="text-sm">
                            Receipt for sealed answer book bundles to be given by the Officer in charge Distribution center to the Controller of examination
                        </p>
                        <p className="mt-2"><strong>Examination:</strong> {getExamSeason()} {getExamYear()}</p>
                        <p><strong>Name of the Institute (EC): </strong> ({ec_code}) {getExamCenterInfo().NAME} <br /></p>
                        <h4 className="font-bold underline mt-2">RECEIPT</h4>
                        <p className="mt-1 text-xs">
                            Received sealed packets of written answer books in intact condition from the Officer-in-Charge, Exam Center, Institute Code {ec_code}.
                        </p>
                    </div>


                    {/* Table Section */}
                    <Table className="w-full border-collapse border border-primary text-sm">
                        <TableHeader>
                            <TableRow className=" text-center">
                                <TableHead className="border border-primary px-2 py-0 w-min">Sr. No.</TableHead>
                                <TableHead className="border border-primary px-2 py-0 w-min">Inst Code</TableHead>
                                <TableHead className="border border-primary px-2 py-0 w-min">C/S/Y/M</TableHead>
                                <TableHead className="border border-primary px-2 py-0 w-min">Subject Title</TableHead>
                                <TableHead className="border border-primary px-2 py-0 w-min">Subject Code</TableHead>
                                <TableHead className="border border-primary px-2 py-0 w-min">Number of Packets (if sections)</TableHead>
                                <TableHead className="border border-primary px-2 py-0 w-min">Number of Answer Books in Each Bundle</TableHead>
                            </TableRow>
                        </TableHeader>
                        <TableBody>
                            {data.map((item, index) => (
                                <TableRow key={index} className={`text-center ${item.SESSION === 'Morning' && 'bg-muted-foreground print:bg-inherit'}`}>
                                    <TableCell className="border border-primary px-2 py-0 w-min">{index + 1}</TableCell>
                                    <TableCell className="border border-primary px-2 py-0 w-min">{item.INSTITUTE_CODE || ""}</TableCell>
                                    <TableCell className="border border-primary px-2 py-0 w-min">{item.SCHEME || ""}</TableCell>
                                    <TableCell className="border border-primary px-2 py-0 w-min">{item.SUBJECT_NAME || ""}</TableCell>
                                    <TableCell className="border border-primary px-2 py-0 w-min">{item.SUBJECT_CODE || ""}</TableCell>
                                    <TableCell className="border border-primary px-2 py-0 w-min">1</TableCell>
                                    <TableCell className="border border-primary px-2 py-0 w-min">{item.TOTAL_STUDENTS || ""}</TableCell>
                                </TableRow>
                            ))}
                        </TableBody>
                    </Table>

                    {/* Total Answer Book Bundles */}
                    <div className="mt-2 border-dashed border-t border-primary py-1 flex justify-between">
                        <p><strong>Total number of answer book bundles:</strong> {data.length}</p>
                        <p><strong>Total number of answer books:</strong> {totalBundles}</p>
                    </div>

                    {/* Signature Section */}
                    <div className="mt-2">
                        <p><strong>Name of Officer-Incharge (Dist. Center):</strong> _______________________________</p>
                        <p className="mt-2"><strong>Signature of Officer-Incharge (Dist. Center):</strong> ___________________________</p>
                        <p className="flex gap-4"><strong>Date:</strong> {date} <strong>Time:</strong> _________ AM / PM</p>
                    </div>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>
    );
};

const Format9 = () => {
    const [data, setData] = useState<ExamData[]>([]);
    const [isLoading, setIsLoading] = useState(false);
    const [error, setError] = useState<string | null>(null);
    const [date, setDate] = useState(new Date().toISOString().split('T')[0]);
    const [showReport, setShowReport] = useState(false);

    const fetchData = async () => {
        if (!date) {
            toast.warn("Select a valid date");
            return;
        }

        setIsLoading(true);
        try {
            const response = await fetch(`/api/packing-slip?date=${date}`);
            if (!response.ok) throw new Error('Failed to fetch data');

            const result = await response.json();
            setData(result);
            setShowReport(true);
        } catch (error: unknown) {
            setError(error instanceof Error ? error.message : 'An unknown error occurred');
        } finally {
            setIsLoading(false);
        }
    };

    const ec_code = useEcCode();

    return (
        <div className="p-6 min-h-screen">
            <div className="max-w-7xl mx-auto">
                {!showReport && (
                    <Card className="max-w-md mx-auto mb-6">
                        <CardHeader>
                            <h2 className="text-2xl font-bold text-center">Format 9</h2>
                        </CardHeader>
                        <CardContent className="space-y-4">
                            <Label className="text-sm font-medium">Date</Label>
                            <Input type="date" value={date} onChange={(e) => setDate(e.target.value)} />
                            <Button onClick={fetchData} disabled={isLoading} className="w-full">
                                {isLoading ? <Loader2 className="animate-spin" /> : "Generate Format 9"}
                            </Button>
                            {error && <div className="text-red-500 text-sm">{error}</div>}
                        </CardContent>
                    </Card>
                )}
                {data.length > 0 && showReport && <ReportComponent data={data} toggleReport={() => setShowReport(false)} ec_code={ec_code} date={date} />}
            </div>
        </div>
    );
};

export default Format9;
</modules/formats/format9.tsx>

                            ))}
                            {/* Add more rows as needed */}
                        </tbody>
                    </table>

                    <div className='flex justify-between pt-20'>
                        <section className="mb-6">
                            <h4 className="font-bold mb-2">Officer in charge DC</h4>

                            </div>
                            <div className="flex gap-x-1 items-center"> {/* Reduced gap */}
                                <p className=" whitespace-nowrap">2. Alleged examinee’s examination seat number</p>
                                <div className="border-b border-primary flex-1 h-4"></div>
                            </div>
                            <div className="flex gap-x-1 items-center"> {/* Reduced gap */}
                                <p className=" whitespace-nowrap">3. Alleged examinee’s Institute name</p>

                            </div>

                            </div>
                            <div className="flex gap-x-1 items-center"> {/* Reduced gap */}
                                <p className=" whitespace-nowrap">8. Material found at the time of crime detection</p>

                            </div>
                        </div>

                        <p className=" ">
                            Shri/Smt. __________________________________ (examinee’s name) has committed a crime as per section (7) of The Maharashtra Prevention of Malpractices at University, Board and other specified Examinations Act, 1982 and this is the legal complaint for the same.
                        </p>

                        <div className="mt-2 flex gap-x-1 items-center"> {/* Reduced margin and gap */}

                            <div className="border-b border-primary flex-1 h-4"></div>

                            <div className="border-b border-primary flex-1 h-4"></div>
                        </div>
                        <p className="">(Officer-in-charge / controller of examination)</p>

                        <div className="flex gap-x-1 items-center"> {/* Reduced gap */}
                            <p className=" whitespace-nowrap">Name of Officer-in-charge / controller of examination</p>
                            <div className="border-b border-primary flex-1 h-4"></div>
                        </div>
                        <div className="flex gap-x-1 items-center"> {/* Reduced gap */}
                            <p className=" whitespace-nowrap">Name of the examination center</p>
                            <div className="border-b border-primary flex-1 h-4"></div>
                        </div>


                    </div>

<modules/formats/format15_17.tsx>
import React from 'react';
import { Button } from '@/components/ui/button';
import { Download, FileText, AlertCircle, Info } from 'lucide-react';

const Format15_17: React.FC = () => {
    const handleDownload = (fileName: string) => {
        const link = document.createElement('a');
        link.href = `/pdfs/${fileName}.pdf`;
        link.download = `${fileName}.pdf`;
        document.body.appendChild(link);
        link.click();
        document.body.removeChild(link);
    };

    return (
        <div className="min-h-screen p-6">
            <div className="max-w-4xl mx-auto">


                {/* Important Notice */}
                <div className="bg-amber-50 border border-amber-200 rounded-lg p-6 mb-8">
                    <div className="flex items-start gap-3">
                        <AlertCircle className="h-6 w-6 text-amber-600 mt-1 flex-shrink-0" />
                        <div>
                            <h3 className="font-semibold text-amber-800 mb-2">Document Access Notice</h3>
                            <p className="text-amber-700 leading-relaxed">
                                These official MSBTE documents are stored as PDF files to preserve their original formatting,
                                official seals, and layout integrity. Due to security and authenticity requirements,
                                they cannot be displayed in web browsers and must be downloaded to your device for viewing.
                                Please ensure you have a PDF reader installed on your device.
                            </p>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                </div>

                {/* Document Sections */}
                <div className="grid gap-6">
                    {/* Format 15 Section */}
                    <div className="bg-white rounded-lg shadow-lg border border-gray-200 overflow-hidden">
                        <div className="bg-sky-50 border-b border-sky-100 p-6">
                            <div className="flex items-center justify-between">
                                <div className="flex items-center gap-3">
                                    <div className="bg-sky-100 p-2 rounded-full">
                                        <AlertCircle className="h-6 w-6 text-sky-600" />
                                    </div>
                                    <div>
                                        <h2 className="text-xl font-bold text-sky-800">Format 15</h2>
                                        <p className="text-sky-600 font-medium">Consolidated Statement of Absentees</p>
                                    </div>
                                </div>
                                <div className="bg-sky-100 px-3 py-1 rounded-full">
                                    <span className="text-sky-700 text-sm font-medium">Official Report</span>
                                </div>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                        <div className="p-6">
                            <p className="text-gray-700 mb-4 leading-relaxed">
                                This official MSBTE format records all candidates who remained absent for a given examination session. It lists seat numbers, subjects, and candidate details, certified by block supervisors and the chief conductor.<br />
                                To preserve its official layout, signatures, and seals, this document cannot be previewed in a browser and must be downloaded as a PDF</p>
                            <div className="flex items-center gap-2 mb-4">
                                <Info className="h-4 w-4 text-blue-500" />
                                <span className="text-sm text-gray-600">Includes candidate details and official signatures</span>
                            </div>
                            <Button
                                onClick={() => handleDownload('format15')}
                                className="bg-sky-600 hover:bg-sky-700 text-white font-medium px-6 py-2 rounded-lg transition-all duration-200 hover:shadow-lg transform hover:-translate-y-0.5"
                            >
                                <Download className="h-4 w-4 mr-2" />
                                Download Format 15
                            </Button>
                        </div>
                    </div>

                    {/* Format 17 Section */}
                    <div className="bg-white rounded-lg shadow-lg border border-gray-200 overflow-hidden">
                        <div className="bg-green-50 border-b border-green-100 p-6">
                            <div className="flex items-center justify-between">
                                <div className="flex items-center gap-3">
                                    <div className="bg-green-100 p-2 rounded-full">
                                        <FileText className="h-6 w-6 text-green-600" />
                                    </div>
                                    <div>
                                        <h2 className="text-xl font-bold text-green-800">Format 17</h2>
                                        <p className="text-green-600 font-medium">Exam Related Reporting Format</p>
                                    </div>
                                </div>
                                <div className="bg-green-100 px-3 py-1 rounded-full">
                                    <span className="text-green-700 text-sm font-medium">Official Form</span>
                                </div>
                            </div>
                        </div>

                            <p className="text-gray-700 mb-4 leading-relaxed">
                                This MSBTE-prescribed format is used by exam centers to report cases of unfair means, misconduct, or malpractice. It is a sensitive report that may also be forwarded to the police or higher authorities for action.
                                <br />
                                Due to its legal and confidential nature, this format must remain in PDF form and can only be downloaded, not previewed online </p>
                            <div className="flex items-center gap-2 mb-4">
                                <Info className="h-4 w-4 text-blue-500" />
                                <span className="text-sm text-gray-600">Ensures standardized reporting and compliance</span>
                            </div>

                        </tbody>
                    </table>

                    <div className='flex justify-between pt-20'>
                        <section className="mb-6">
                            <h4 className="font-bold mb-2">Officer in charge EC</h4>

<modules/formats/format8.tsx>
'use client';

import React, { CSSProperties, useRef, useState } from "react";
import { Button } from "@/components/ui/button";
import { Card, CardHeader, CardContent } from "@/components/ui/card";
import { Loader2, LucidePrinter, XIcon } from 'lucide-react';
import { Input } from "@/components/ui/input";
import { useReactToPrint } from 'react-to-print';
import { toast } from "react-toastify";
import { useEcCode } from "@/lib/helper";
import { useExamCenter } from "@/hooks/useExamCenter";
import Image from "next/image";
import { Table, TableBody, TableCell, TableHead, TableHeader, TableRow } from "@/components/ui/table";
import { Label } from "@/components/ui/label";

interface ExamData {
    INSTITUTE_CODE: number;
    DATE: string;
    SESSION: string;
    TIME_SLOT: string;
    SCHEME: string;
    SUBJECT_CODE: string;
    TOTAL_STUDENTS: number;
    SHEET_NO: string;
    SUBJECT_NAME: string;
}

const PAGE_STYLE: CSSProperties = {
    pageBreakAfter: "always",
    width: "210mm", // A4 width
    height: "297mm", // A4 height
    margin: "0 auto",
    padding: "4mm",
};

const ReportComponent = ({ data, toggleReport, ec_code, date }: { data: ExamData[]; toggleReport: () => void, ec_code: string, date: string }) => {
    const contentRef = useRef<HTMLDivElement>(null);
    const handlePrint = useReactToPrint({ contentRef });

    const { getExamSeason, getExamYear, getExamCenterInfo } = useExamCenter(ec_code);
    const totalBundles = data.reduce((sum, item) => sum + (item.TOTAL_STUDENTS || 0), 0);

    return (
        <div className="p-6 min-h-screen">
            <div className="max-w-7xl mx-auto">
                <div className="flex justify-between mb-6">
                    <Button variant="secondary" onClick={toggleReport} className="flex items-center gap-2 group">
                        <XIcon className="transition-transform duration-500 group-hover:rotate-180 group-hover:scale-110" />
                        <span className="transition-opacity duration-500 group-hover:opacity-80 group-hover:translate-x-1">Clear Report</span>
                    </Button>
                    <Button onClick={() => handlePrint()} className="group transition-transform duration-300 hover:scale-105">
                        <LucidePrinter className="transition-transform duration-300 group-hover:scale-105" /> Print Format 8
                    </Button>
                </div>

                <div ref={contentRef} className="border px-6 py-0 w-min shadow-md times" style={PAGE_STYLE}>
                    {/* Header Section */}
                    <div className="text-center mb-4">
                        <h2 className="text-lg font-bold uppercase flex justify-center items-center gap-2">
                            <Image src="/msbte.jpg" alt="MSBTE" width={48} height={48} className="h-12 w-12" />
                            Maharashtra State Board of Technical Education
                        </h2>
                        <h3 className="text-base mt-2 underline">FORMAT NO. 8</h3>
                        <p className="text-sm">
                            Receipt for sealed answer book bundles given by the Controller of Examination to the Exam Center Officer-in-Charge.
                        </p>
                        <p className="mt-2"><strong>Examination:</strong> {getExamSeason()} {getExamYear()}</p>
                        <p><strong>Institute (EC):</strong> {getExamCenterInfo().NAME} <strong>EC Code:</strong> {ec_code}</p>
                        <h4 className="font-bold underline mt-3">RECEIPT</h4>
                        <p className="mt-1 text-xs">
                            Received sealed packets of written answer books in intact condition from the Officer-in-Charge, Exam Center, Institute Code {ec_code}.
                        </p>
                    </div>


                    {/* Table Section */}
                    <Table className="w-full border-collapse border border-primary text-sm">
                        <TableHeader>
                            <TableRow className="text-center">
                                <TableHead className="border border-primary px-2 py-0 w-min">Sr. No.</TableHead>
                                <TableHead className="border border-primary px-2 py-0 w-min">Inst Code</TableHead>
                                <TableHead className="border border-primary px-2 py-0 w-min">Course / Sem / Year / Master</TableHead>
                                <TableHead className="border border-primary px-2 py-0 w-min">Subject Title</TableHead>
                                <TableHead className="border border-primary px-2 py-0 w-min">Subject Code</TableHead>
                                <TableHead className="border border-primary px-2 py-0 w-min">Number of Packets (if sections)</TableHead>
                                <TableHead className="border border-primary px-2 py-0 w-min">Number of Answer Books in Each Bundle</TableHead>
                            </TableRow>
                        </TableHeader>
                        <TableBody>
                            {data.map((item, index) => (
                                <TableRow key={index} className={`text-center  ${item.SESSION === 'Morning' && 'bg-muted-foreground print:bg-inherit'}`}>
                                    <TableCell className="border border-primary px-2 py-0 w-min">{index + 1}</TableCell>
                                    <TableCell className="border border-primary px-2 py-0 w-min">{item.INSTITUTE_CODE}</TableCell>
                                    <TableCell className="border border-primary px-2 py-0 w-min">{item.SCHEME || ""}</TableCell>
                                    <TableCell className="border border-primary px-2 py-0 w-min">{item.SUBJECT_NAME || ""}</TableCell>
                                    <TableCell className="border border-primary px-2 py-0 w-min">{item.SUBJECT_CODE || ""}</TableCell>
                                    <TableCell className="border border-primary px-2 py-0 w-min">1</TableCell>
                                    <TableCell className="border border-primary px-2 py-0 w-min">{item.TOTAL_STUDENTS || ""}</TableCell>
                                </TableRow>
                            ))}
                        </TableBody>
                    </Table>

                    {/* Total Answer Book Bundles */}
                    <div className="mt-2 border-dashed border-t border-primary py-1 flex justify-between">
                        <p><strong>Total number of answer book bundles:</strong> {data.length}</p>
                        <p><strong>Total number of answer books:</strong> {totalBundles}</p>
                    </div>

                    {/* Signature Section */}
                    <div className="mt-2">
                        <p><strong>Name of Controller:</strong> _______________________________</p>
                        <p className="mt-2"><strong>Signature of Controller:</strong> ___________________________</p>
                        <p className="flex gap-4"><strong>Date:</strong> {date} <strong>Time:</strong> _________ AM / PM</p>
                    </div>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>
    );
};

const Format8 = () => {
    const [data, setData] = useState<ExamData[]>([]);
    const [isLoading, setIsLoading] = useState(false);
    const [error, setError] = useState<string | null>(null);
    const [date, setDate] = useState(new Date().toISOString().split('T')[0]);
    const [showReport, setShowReport] = useState(false);

    const fetchData = async () => {
        if (!date) {
            toast.warn("Select a valid date");
            return;
        }

        setIsLoading(true);
        try {
            const response = await fetch(`/api/packing-slip?date=${date}`);
            if (!response.ok) throw new Error('Failed to fetch data');

            const result = await response.json();
            setData(result);
            setShowReport(true);
        } catch (error: unknown) {
            setError(error instanceof Error ? error.message : 'An unknown error occurred');
        } finally {
            setIsLoading(false);
        }
    };

    const ec_code = useEcCode();

    return (
        <div className="p-6 min-h-screen">
            <div className="max-w-7xl mx-auto">
                {!showReport && (
                    <Card className="max-w-md mx-auto mb-6">
                        <CardHeader>
                            <h2 className="text-2xl font-bold text-center">Format 8</h2>
                        </CardHeader>
                        <CardContent className="space-y-4">
                            <Label className="text-sm font-medium">Date</Label>
                            <Input type="date" value={date} onChange={(e) => setDate(e.target.value)} />
                            <Button onClick={fetchData} disabled={isLoading} className="w-full">
                                {isLoading ? <Loader2 className="animate-spin" /> : "Generate Format 8"}
                            </Button>
                            {error && <div className="text-red-500 text-sm">{error}</div>}
                        </CardContent>
                    </Card>
                )}
                {data.length > 0 && showReport && <ReportComponent data={data} toggleReport={() => setShowReport(false)} ec_code={ec_code} date={date} />}
            </div>
        </div>
    );
};

export default Format8;
</modules/formats/format8.tsx>

<modules/formats/format20.tsx>
import React from 'react';
import { useReactToPrint } from 'react-to-print';
import { Button } from '@/components/ui/button';
import Image from 'next/image';
import { LucidePrinter } from 'lucide-react';

const PAGE_STYLE: React.CSSProperties = {
    pageBreakAfter: "always",
    width: "210mm",
    height: "297mm",
    margin: "0 auto",
    marginBlockEnd: "8px",
}

const Format20Report: React.FC = () => {
    const componentRef = React.useRef<HTMLDivElement>(null);

    const handlePrint = useReactToPrint({
        contentRef: componentRef,
    });

    return (
        <div className="p-4">
            <div className="mb-4 flex justify-end">
                <Button onClick={() => handlePrint()} className="mb-6 group transition-transform duration-300 hover:scale-105">
                    <LucidePrinter className="transition-transform duration-300 group-hover:scale-105" /> Print Report
                </Button>  </div>

            <div ref={componentRef} className="times  w-fit m-auto shadow-lg">
                {/* Page 1 */}
                <div style={PAGE_STYLE} className='border border-primary p-4'>
                    <h1 className="text-2xl font-bold text-center mb-4 flex items-center justify-center gap-4">
                        <Image src={'/msbte.jpg'} alt='MSBTE Logo' className='w-12 h-12' height={100} width={100} />
                        Maharashtra State Board of Technical Education
                    </h1>
                    <h2 className="text-xl font-semibold text-center mb-6 underline">
                        FORMAT NO. 20
                    </h2>
                    <h3 className="text-lg font-bold text-center mb-4">
                        Inventory Receipt
                    </h3>

                    <section className="mb-6">
                        <div className="mb-4">
                            <label className="font-bold">DC No:</label>
                            <input type="text" className="border-b border-primary ml-2" />
                        </div>
                        <div className="mb-4">
                            <label className="font-bold">Date:</label>
                            <input type="text" className="border-b border-primary ml-2" />
                        </div>
                        <p className="mb-4">
                            Received the EC-wise boxes for the DC on <input type="text" className="border-b border-primary mx-2" />. The boxes containing question paper bundles were opened and the bundles were arranged EC-wise / Day-wise manner and compared with the EC-wise time table for the EC. The bundles for all examination sessions for each EC are received.
                        </p>
                    </section>

                    <div className='flex justify-between pt-20'>
                        <section className="mb-6">
                            <h4 className="font-bold mb-2">Officer in charge DC</h4>
                            <div className="mb-4">
                                <label className="">Name:</label>
                                <input type="text" className="border-b border-primary ml-2" />
                            </div>
                            <div className="mb-4">
                                <label className="">Contact Cell No:</label>
                                <input type="text" className="border-b border-primary ml-2" />
                            </div>
                        </section>

                        <section className="mb-6">
                            <h4 className="font-bold mb-2">Chief Officer in Charge DC</h4>
                            <div className="mb-4">
                                <label className="">Name:</label>
                                <input type="text" className="border-b border-primary ml-2" />
                            </div>
                            <div className="mb-4">
                                <label className="">Contact Cell No:</label>
                                <input type="text" className="border-b border-primary ml-2" />
                            </div>
                        </section>
                    </div>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>
    );
};

export default Format20Report;
</modules/formats/format20.tsx>

<modules/premium/v1/generate_office_order.tsx>
"use client";

import { Alert, AlertDescription } from "@/components/ui/alert";
import { Button } from "@/components/ui/button-premium";
import { Card, CardContent, CardHeader, CardTitle } from "@/components/ui/card-premium";
import { Input } from "@/components/ui/input";
import { Label } from "@/components/ui/label";
import { useExamCenter } from "@/hooks/useExamCenter";
import { useEcCode } from "@/lib/helper";
import { AlertCircle, Loader2, Printer } from "lucide-react";
import type React from "react";
import { useRef, useState } from "react";
import { useReactToPrint } from "react-to-print";
import { toast } from "react-toastify";
import CollegeHeader from "@/components/misc/CollegeHeaders";

interface TeamMemberData {
    id: number;
    name: string;
    designation: string;
    post_held_in_examination: string;
}

const PAGE_STYLE: React.CSSProperties = {
    pageBreakAfter: "always",
    width: "210mm",
    height: "297mm",
    margin: "0 auto",
    marginBlockEnd: "8px",
    padding: "20mm",
    boxSizing: "border-box",
};

export default function ControlRoomOrderReport() {
    const ec_code = useEcCode();
    const { getExamSeason, getExamYear, getExamStartDate, getExamEndDate, getExamCenterInfo } = useExamCenter(ec_code);

    const contentRef = useRef<HTMLDivElement>(null);
    const [orderKey, setOrderKey] = useState("");
    const [collegeRefKey, setCollegeRefKey] = useState("");
    const [teamData, setTeamData] = useState<{ [key: string]: TeamMemberData }>({});
    const [isLoading, setIsLoading] = useState(false);
    const [error, setError] = useState("");
    const [showReport, setShowReport] = useState(false);
    const reactToPrintFn = useReactToPrint({ contentRef });

    const fetchData = async () => {
        if (!orderKey || !collegeRefKey) {
            toast.error("Please enter an ORDER REF and COLLEGE REF string.");
            return;
        }

        setIsLoading(true);
        setError("");
        try {
            const response = await fetch(`/api/controller`);
            if (!response.ok) throw new Error(`HTTP error! Status: ${response.status}`);
            const data = await response.json();

            // Assuming data is an array, transform it into an object with id as key
            const transformedData = data.reduce((acc: { [key: string]: TeamMemberData }, item: TeamMemberData) => {
                acc[item.id.toString()] = item;
                return acc;
            }, {});

            if (Object.keys(transformedData).length === 0) {
                toast.info("No control room team order data found.");
                setShowReport(false);
            } else {
                setTeamData(transformedData);
                setShowReport(true);
            }
        } catch (error) {
            console.error("Error fetching control room team data:", error);
            setError("Failed to fetch control room team data. Please try again.");
            toast.error("Failed to fetch control room team data. Please try again.");
        } finally {
            setIsLoading(false);
        }
    };

    const handleReset = () => {
        setOrderKey("");
        setCollegeRefKey("");
        setTeamData({});
        setShowReport(false);
    };

    return (
        <div className="container mx-auto px-4 py-8">
            {!showReport && (
                <Card className="max-w-md mx-auto p-6 space-y-5">
                    <CardHeader className="pb-2">
                        <CardTitle className="text-2xl font-bold text-center">Control Room Team Office Order Report</CardTitle>
                    </CardHeader>
                    <CardContent className="space-y-5">
                        <div className="grid gap-3">
                            <div className="space-y-1">
                                <Label htmlFor="orderKey" className="text-sm font-medium">MSBTE ORDER REF Key</Label>
                                <Input
                                    id="orderKey"
                                    type="text"
                                    placeholder="Enter MSBTE ORDER REF key"
                                    value={orderKey}
                                    onChange={(e) => setOrderKey(e.target.value)}
                                    className="w-full"
                                />
                            </div>
                            <div className="space-y-1">
                                <Label htmlFor="collegeRefKey" className="text-sm font-medium">INSTITUTE ORDER REF Key</Label>
                                <Input
                                    id="collegeRefKey"
                                    type="text"
                                    placeholder="Enter INSTITUTE ORDER REF key"
                                    value={collegeRefKey}
                                    onChange={(e) => setCollegeRefKey(e.target.value)}
                                    className="w-full"
                                />
                            </div>
                        </div>

                        <Button onClick={fetchData} disabled={isLoading} className="w-full flex items-center justify-center gap-2 py-2">
                            {isLoading ? (
                                <>
                                    <Loader2 className="h-4 w-4 animate-spin" />
                                    Loading...
                                </>
                            ) : (
                                "Fetch Data"
                            )}
                        </Button>

                        {error && (
                            <Alert variant="destructive" className="flex items-center gap-2">
                                <AlertCircle className="h-4 w-4" />
                                <AlertDescription>{error}</AlertDescription>
                            </Alert>
                        )}
                    </CardContent>
                </Card>
            )}

            {showReport && (
                <div className="space-y-4">
                    <div className="flex justify-between items-center">
                        <Button onClick={handleReset} variant="outline">
                            Back to Search
                        </Button>
                        <Button onClick={() => reactToPrintFn()} className="flex items-center gap-2">
                            <Printer className="h-4 w-4" />
                            Print Report
                        </Button>
                    </div>

                    <div ref={contentRef} className="space-y-8">
                        {Object.entries(teamData).map(([uid, member]) => (
                            <Card key={uid} style={PAGE_STYLE} className="border times border-gray-300 shadow-lg relative">
                                <CollegeHeader collegeRefKey={collegeRefKey} />
                                <CardContent className="p-8">
                                    <h2 className="text-2xl font-bold text-center my-6 uppercase tracking-wide">OFFICE ORDER</h2>
                                    <div className="space-y-6 text-sm leading-relaxed">
                                        <p>
                                            To,
                                            <br />
                                            <span className="font-semibold">{member.name}</span>
                                            <br />
                                            {member.designation}
                                            <br />
                                            {getExamCenterInfo().NAME}
                                        </p>
                                        <p>
                                            <span className="font-semibold">Subject:</span> Appointment of {member.post_held_in_examination} ({ec_code}) for {getExamSeason()} {getExamYear()} Exam
                                            <br />
                                            <span className="font-semibold">Reference:</span> {orderKey}
                                        </p>
                                        <p>
                                            Sir/Madam,
                                            <br />
                                            As per norms and directions from MSBTE, you are hereby appointed as {member.post_held_in_examination} for the {getExamSeason()} {getExamYear()} exam at exam center {ec_code}.
                                            <br />
                                            You will look after all examination related duties from <strong>{new Date(getExamStartDate()).toLocaleDateString('en-IN')}</strong> to <strong>{new Date(getExamEndDate()).toLocaleDateString('en-IN')}</strong> and see that  {getExamSeason()} {getExamYear()} examination is conducted in smooth manner within the law and order of MSBTE, Mumbai.
                                        </p>
                                        <p>Thanking You,</p>
                                        <div className="text-right absolute bottom-4 right-4">
                                            <p className="font-semibold">Chief Officer In-charge</p>
                                            <p>
                                                {ec_code} - {getExamCenterInfo().NAME}
                                            </p>
                                        </div>
                                    </div>
                                </CardContent>
                            </Card>
                        ))}
                    </div>
                </div>
            )}
        </div>
    );
}
</modules/premium/v1/generate_office_order.tsx>

<modules/premium/v1/generate_chief_order.tsx>
"use client";

import { Button } from "@/components/ui/button-premium";
import { Card, CardContent, CardHeader, CardTitle } from "@/components/ui/card-premium";
import { Input } from "@/components/ui/input";
import { Label } from "@/components/ui/label";
import { Select, SelectContent, SelectItem, SelectTrigger, SelectValue } from "@/components/ui/select";
import { useExamCenter } from "@/hooks/useExamCenter";
import { useEcCode } from "@/lib/helper";
import { Loader2, Printer, Plus, Mail } from "lucide-react";
import type React from "react";
import { useRef, useState } from "react";
import { useReactToPrint } from "react-to-print";
import { toast } from "react-toastify";
import CollegeHeader from "@/components/misc/CollegeHeaders";
import { ReportFooter } from "@/modules/misc/footers";
import { generateChiefOrderEmail } from "@/app/api/(others)/send-email/emailtemplates";

interface OfficerData {
    name: string;
    department: string;
    role: string;
    post: string;
    email: string;
}

interface EmailResult {
    email: string;
    success: boolean;
}

const PAGE_STYLE: React.CSSProperties = {
    pageBreakAfter: "always",
    width: "210mm",
    height: "297mm",
    margin: "0 auto",
    marginBlockEnd: "8px",
    padding: "20mm",
    boxSizing: "border-box",
};

export default function OfficerOrderReport() {
    const ec_code = useEcCode();
    const { getExamSeason, getExamYear, getExamCenterInfo } = useExamCenter(ec_code);

    const contentRef = useRef<HTMLDivElement>(null);
    const [officers, setOfficers] = useState<OfficerData[]>([]);
    const [newOfficer, setNewOfficer] = useState<OfficerData>({ name: "", department: "", role: "", post: "", email: "" });
    const [collegeRefKey, setCollegeRefKey] = useState("");
    const [msbteRefKey, setMsbteRefKey] = useState("");
    const [showReport, setShowReport] = useState(false);
    const [sendingEmails, setSendingEmails] = useState(false);
    const reactToPrintFn = useReactToPrint({ contentRef });

    const handleInputChange = (e: React.ChangeEvent<HTMLInputElement>) => {
        const { name, value } = e.target;
        setNewOfficer((prev) => ({ ...prev, [name]: value }));
    };

    const handleRoleChange = (value: string) => {
        setNewOfficer((prev) => ({ ...prev, role: value }));
    };

    const handlePostChange = (value: string) => {
        setNewOfficer((prev) => ({ ...prev, post: value }));
    };

    const addOfficer = () => {
        if (!newOfficer.name || !newOfficer.department || !newOfficer.role || !newOfficer.post || !newOfficer.email) {
            toast.error("Please fill in all officer fields, including email, before adding.");
            return;
        }
        setOfficers((prev) => [...prev, newOfficer]);
        setNewOfficer({ name: "", department: "", role: "", post: "", email: "" });
    };

    const generateReport = () => {
        if (officers.length === 0) {
            toast.error("Please add at least one officer before generating the report.");
            return;
        }
        if (!collegeRefKey || !msbteRefKey) {
            toast.error("Please enter both Institute Ref Key and MSBTE Ref Key.");
            return;
        }
        setShowReport(true);
    };

    const handleReset = () => {
        setOfficers([]);
        setNewOfficer({ name: "", department: "", role: "", post: "", email: "" });
        setCollegeRefKey("");
        setMsbteRefKey("");
        setShowReport(false);
    };

    const handleSendAllEmails = async () => {
        try {
            setSendingEmails(true);
            
            const emailPromises = officers.map(async (officer) => {
                const emailHtml = generateChiefOrderEmail({
                    officer,
                    examCenterName: getExamCenterInfo().NAME,
                    examCenterAddress: getExamCenterInfo().ADDRESS,
                    examSeason: getExamSeason(),
                    examYear: getExamYear(),
                    msbteRefKey,
                    examCenterCode: ec_code,
                    chiefName: "Director"
                });

                return fetch('/api/send-email', {
                    method: 'POST',
                    headers: {
                        'Content-Type': 'application/json',
                    },
                    body: JSON.stringify({
                        recipients: [{ email: officer.email, name: officer.name }],
                        subject: `Officer Duty Order for ${getExamSeason()} ${getExamYear()}`,
                        html: emailHtml
                    }),
                });
            });

            const responses = await Promise.all(emailPromises);
            const results = await Promise.all(responses.map(r => r.json()));
            
          
            
            const successful = results.reduce((acc, result) => 
                acc + (result.results?.filter((r: EmailResult) => r.success)?.length || 0), 0);
            
            toast.success(`Successfully sent ${successful} out of ${officers.length} emails`);

            const failedEmails = results.flatMap(result => 
                result.results?.filter((r: EmailResult) => !r.success).map((r: EmailResult) => r.email) || []
            );

            if (failedEmails.length > 0) {
                toast.error(`Failed to send emails to: ${failedEmails.join(', ')}`);
            }

        } catch (error) {
            console.error('Error sending emails:', error);
            toast.error('Failed to send emails. Please try again.');
        } finally {
            setSendingEmails(false);
        }
    };

    const roleOptions = ["Lecturer", "HOD", "Lab Assistant"];
    const postOptions = ["Chief Officer In-Charge", "Officer In-Charge", "Sealing Supervisor", "Exam Controller"];

    return (
        <div className="container mx-auto px-4 py-8">
            {!showReport ? (
                <Card className="max-w-5xl mx-auto p-6 space-y-5">
                    <CardHeader className="pb-2">
                        <CardTitle className="text-2xl font-bold text-center">Officer Order Report</CardTitle>
                    </CardHeader>
                    <CardContent className="space-y-5">
                        <div className="flex flex-row gap-4 items-end flex-wrap">
                            <div className="flex-1 min-w-[200px] space-y-1">
                                <Label htmlFor="name" className="text-sm font-medium">Name</Label>
                                <Input
                                    id="name"
                                    name="name"
                                    type="text"
                                    placeholder="Enter officer's name"
                                    value={newOfficer.name}
                                    onChange={handleInputChange}
                                    className="w-full"
                                />
                            </div>
                            <div className="flex-1 min-w-[200px] space-y-1">
                                <Label htmlFor="department" className="text-sm font-medium">Department</Label>
                                <Input
                                    id="department"
                                    name="department"
                                    type="text"
                                    placeholder="Enter department"
                                    value={newOfficer.department}
                                    onChange={handleInputChange}
                                    className="w-full"
                                />
                            </div>
                            <div className="flex-1 min-w-[200px] space-y-1">
                                <Label htmlFor="email" className="text-sm font-medium">Email</Label>
                                <Input
                                    id="email"
                                    name="email"
                                    type="email"
                                    placeholder="Enter officer's email"
                                    value={newOfficer.email}
                                    onChange={handleInputChange}
                                    className="w-full"
                                />
                            </div>
                            <div className="flex-1 min-w-[200px] space-y-1">
                                <Label htmlFor="role" className="text-sm font-medium">Role</Label>
                                <Select onValueChange={handleRoleChange} value={newOfficer.role}>
                                    <SelectTrigger className="w-full">
                                        <SelectValue placeholder="Select role" />
                                    </SelectTrigger>
                                    <SelectContent>
                                        {roleOptions.map((role) => (
                                            <SelectItem key={role} value={role}>
                                                {role}
                                            </SelectItem>
                                        ))}
                                    </SelectContent>
                                </Select>
                            </div>
                            <div className="flex-1 min-w-[200px] space-y-1">
                                <Label htmlFor="post" className="text-sm font-medium">Post</Label>
                                <Select onValueChange={handlePostChange} value={newOfficer.post}>
                                    <SelectTrigger className="w-full">
                                        <SelectValue placeholder="Select post" />
                                    </SelectTrigger>
                                    <SelectContent>
                                        {postOptions.map((post) => (
                                            <SelectItem key={post} value={post}>
                                                {post}
                                            </SelectItem>
                                        ))}
                                    </SelectContent>
                                </Select>
                            </div>
                            <Button onClick={addOfficer} className="flex items-center gap-2">
                                <Plus className="h-4 w-4" />
                                Add
                            </Button>
                        </div>

                        {officers.length > 0 && (
                            <div className="space-y-2">
                                <p className="text-sm font-medium">Added Officers:</p>
                                <ul className="list-disc pl-5">
                                    {officers.map((officer, index) => (
                                        <li key={index}>
                                            <strong>{officer.name}</strong> - {officer.role}, {officer.department} (Post: {officer.post}, Email: {officer.email})
                                        </li>
                                    ))}
                                </ul>
                            </div>
                        )}

                        <div className="grid gap-3">
                            <div className="space-y-1">
                                <Label htmlFor="collegeRefKey" className="text-sm font-medium">Institute Ref Key</Label>
                                <Input
                                    id="collegeRefKey"
                                    type="text"
                                    placeholder="Enter INSTITUTE REF key"
                                    value={collegeRefKey}
                                    onChange={(e) => setCollegeRefKey(e.target.value)}
                                    className="w-full"
                                />
                            </div>
                            <div className="space-y-1">
                                <Label htmlFor="msbteRefKey" className="text-sm font-medium">MSBTE Ref Key</Label>
                                <Input
                                    id="msbteRefKey"
                                    type="text"
                                    placeholder="Enter MSBTE REF key"
                                    value={msbteRefKey}
                                    onChange={(e) => setMsbteRefKey(e.target.value)}
                                    className="w-full"
                                />
                            </div>
                        </div>

                        <div className="flex justify-between items-center">
                            <Button onClick={handleReset} variant="outline">
                                Reset
                            </Button>
                            <Button onClick={generateReport} className="flex items-center gap-2">
                                Generate Report
                            </Button>
                        </div>
                    </CardContent>
                </Card>
            ) : (
                <div className="space-y-4">
                    <div className="flex justify-between items-center">
                        <Button onClick={handleReset} variant="outline">
                            Back to Input
                        </Button>
                        <div className="flex gap-2">
                            <Button
                                onClick={handleSendAllEmails}
                                disabled={sendingEmails}
                                variant={sendingEmails ? "outline" : "secondary"}
                                className="flex items-center gap-2"
                            >
                                {sendingEmails ? (
                                    <>
                                        <Loader2 className="h-4 w-4 animate-spin" />
                                        Sending Emails...
                                    </>
                                ) : (
                                    <>
                                        <Mail className="h-4 w-4" />
                                        Send All Emails ({officers.length})
                                    </>
                                )}
                            </Button>
                            <Button onClick={() => reactToPrintFn()} className="flex items-center gap-2">
                                <Printer className="h-4 w-4" />
                                Print Report
                            </Button>
                        </div>
                    </div>

                    <div ref={contentRef} className="space-y-8">
                        {officers.map((officer, index) => (
                            <Card key={index} style={PAGE_STYLE} className="border border-gray-300 shadow-lg relative">
                                <CollegeHeader collegeRefKey={collegeRefKey} />
                                <CardContent className="p-8">
                                    <h2 className="text-2xl font-bold text-center my-6 uppercase tracking-wide">OFFICE ORDER</h2>
                                    <div className="space-y-6 text-sm leading-relaxed">
                                        <p>
                                            To,
                                            <br />
                                            <strong>{officer.name}</strong>
                                            <br />
                                            {officer.role}, {officer.department}
                                            <br />
                                            <span>{officer.email}</span>
                                            <br />
                                            Diploma,
                                            <br />
                                            {getExamCenterInfo().NAME}
                                        </p>
                                        <p>
                                            <span className="font-semibold">Subject:</span> <strong>Appointment of {officer.post} ({ec_code}) for {getExamSeason()} Exam {getExamYear()}</strong>
                                            <br />
                                            <span className="font-semibold">Reference:</span> {msbteRefKey}
                                        </p>
                                        <p>
                                            Sir/Madam,
                                            <br />
                                            As per norms and directions from <strong>MSBTE</strong>, you are hereby <strong>appointed as {officer.post}</strong> for <strong>{getExamSeason()} Exam – {getExamYear()}</strong> at exam center <strong>{ec_code}</strong>.
                                            <br />
                                            You will look after all examination-related duties and ensure that the <strong>{getExamSeason()} – {getExamYear()} examination</strong> is conducted in a smooth manner within the law and order of <strong>MSBTE, Mumbai</strong>.
                                        </p>
                                        <p>Thanking You,</p>
                                        <div className="text-right absolute bottom-28 right-4">
                                            <p className="font-semibold">Director</p>
                                            <p>{getExamCenterInfo().NAME}</p>
                                            <p>{getExamCenterInfo().ADDRESS}</p>
                                        </div>
                                    </div>
                                    <ReportFooter alignment="left" />
                                </CardContent>
                            </Card>
                        ))}
                    </div>
                </div>
            )}
        </div>
    );
}
</modules/premium/v1/generate_chief_order.tsx>

<modules/premium/v1/generate_reliever_order.tsx>
"use client";

import { Alert, AlertDescription } from "@/components/ui/alert";
import { Button } from "@/components/ui/button-premium";
import { Card, CardContent, CardHeader, CardTitle } from "@/components/ui/card-premium";
import { Input } from "@/components/ui/input";
import { Label } from "@/components/ui/label";
import { Table, TableBody, TableCell, TableHead, TableHeader, TableRow } from "@/components/ui/table";
import { useExamCenter } from "@/hooks/useExamCenter";
import { useEcCode } from "@/lib/helper";
import { AlertCircle, Loader2, Printer, Mail } from "lucide-react";
import type React from "react";
import { useRef, useState } from "react";
import { useReactToPrint } from "react-to-print";
import { toast } from "react-toastify";
import CollegeHeader from "@/components/misc/CollegeHeaders";
import { ReportFooter } from "@/modules/misc/footers";
import { generateRelieverOrderEmail } from "@/app/api/(others)/send-email/emailtemplates";

interface OfficeOrderData {
    NAME: string;
    ROLE: string;
    DEPARTMENT: string;
    EMAIL: string;
    ALLOTED: {
        DATE: string;
        SESSION: string;
    }[];
}

interface RelieverOrder {
    RELIEVER_UID: string;
    NAME: string;
    DEPARTMENT: string;
    EMAIL: string;
    DATE: string;
    SESSION: string;
}

interface EmailResult {
    email: string;
    success: boolean;
}


const PAGE_STYLE: React.CSSProperties = {
    pageBreakAfter: "always",
    width: "210mm",
    height: "297mm",
    margin: "0 auto",
    marginBlockEnd: "8px",
    padding: "20mm",
    boxSizing: "border-box",
};

export default function RelieverOrderReport() {
    const ec_code = useEcCode();
    const { getExamSeason, getExamCenterInfo, getExamCenterCode, getExamYear, getDepartmentByCode } = useExamCenter(ec_code);

    const contentRef = useRef<HTMLDivElement>(null);
    const [orderKey, setOrderKey] = useState("");
    const [collegeRefKey, setCollegeRefKey] = useState("");
    const [officeOrderData, setOfficeOrderData] = useState<{ [key: string]: OfficeOrderData }>({});
    const [isLoading, setIsLoading] = useState(false);
    const [error, setError] = useState("");
    const [showReport, setShowReport] = useState(false);
    const reactToPrintFn = useReactToPrint({ contentRef });
    const [sendingEmails, setSendingEmails] = useState(false);

    const fetchData = async () => {
        if (!orderKey || !collegeRefKey) {
            toast.error("Please enter an ORDER REF and COLLEGE REF string.");
            return;
        }

        setIsLoading(true);
        setError("");
        try {
            const response = await fetch(`/api/relievers?action=relorder&orderKey=${encodeURIComponent(orderKey)}&collegeRefKey=${encodeURIComponent(collegeRefKey)}`);
            if (!response.ok) throw new Error(`HTTP error! Status: ${response.status}`);
            const relieverOrders: RelieverOrder[] = await response.json();

            if (!relieverOrders || relieverOrders.length === 0 || 'message' in relieverOrders) {
                toast.info((relieverOrders as unknown as { message: string }).message || "No reliever order data found.");
                setShowReport(false);
                return;
            }

            const transformedData = relieverOrders.reduce((acc: { [key: string]: OfficeOrderData }, order: RelieverOrder) => {
                const uid = order.RELIEVER_UID;
                if (!acc[uid]) {
                    acc[uid] = {
                        NAME: order.NAME || order.RELIEVER_UID,
                        ROLE: "Reliever",
                        DEPARTMENT: order.DEPARTMENT || "Unknown",
                        EMAIL: order.EMAIL || "",
                        ALLOTED: [],
                    };
                }
                acc[uid].ALLOTED.push({
                    DATE: new Date(order.DATE).toISOString().split('T')[0],
                    SESSION: order.SESSION,
                });
                return acc;
            }, {});

            if (Object.keys(transformedData).length === 0) {
                toast.info("No valid reliever order data found.");
                setShowReport(false);
            } else {
                setOfficeOrderData(transformedData);
                setShowReport(true);
            }
        } catch (error) {
            console.error("Error fetching reliever order data:", error);
            setError("Failed to fetch reliever order data. Please try again.");
            toast.error("Failed to fetch reliever order data. Please try again.");
        } finally {
            setIsLoading(false);
        }
    };

    const handleReset = () => {
        setOrderKey("");
        setCollegeRefKey("");
        setOfficeOrderData({});
        setShowReport(false);
    };

    const handleSendAllEmails = async () => {
        try {
            setSendingEmails(true);
            const emailPromises = Object.entries(officeOrderData).map(async ([uid, reliever]) => {
                console.error(uid.slice(0,0))
                const emailHtml = generateRelieverOrderEmail({
                    reliever,
                    examCenterName: getExamCenterInfo().NAME,
                    examSeason: getExamSeason(),
                    examYear: getExamYear(),
                    orderKey,
                    examCenterCode: getExamCenterCode(),
                    departmentName: getDepartmentByCode(reliever.DEPARTMENT).name,
                    chiefName: getExamCenterInfo().OFFICER_INCHARGE
                });

                return fetch('/api/send-email', {
                    method: 'POST',
                    headers: {
                        'Content-Type': 'application/json',
                    },
                    body: JSON.stringify({
                        recipients: [{ email: reliever.EMAIL, name: reliever.NAME }],
                        subject: `Block Reliever Order for ${getExamSeason()} ${getExamYear()}`,
                        html: emailHtml
                    }),
                });
            });

            const responses = await Promise.all(emailPromises);
            const results = await Promise.all(responses.map(r => r.json()));

            const successful = results.reduce((acc, result) =>
                acc + (result.results?.filter((r: EmailResult) => r.success)?.length || 0), 0);

            const totalRelievers = Object.keys(officeOrderData).length;

            toast.success(`Successfully sent ${successful} out of ${totalRelievers} emails`);

            const failedEmails = results.flatMap(result =>
                result.results?.filter((r: EmailResult) => !r.success).map((r: EmailResult) => r.email) || []
            );

            if (failedEmails.length > 0) {
                toast.error(`Failed to send emails to: ${failedEmails.join(', ')}`);
            }

        } catch (error) {
            console.error('Error sending emails:', error);
            toast.error('Failed to send emails. Please try again.');
        } finally {
            setSendingEmails(false);
        }
    };

    return (
        <div className="container mx-auto px-4 py-8">
            {!showReport && (
                <Card className="max-w-md mx-auto p-6 space-y-5">
                    <CardHeader className="pb-2">
                        <CardTitle className="text-2xl font-bold text-center">Block Relievers Office Order Report</CardTitle>
                    </CardHeader>
                    <CardContent className="space-y-5">
                        <div className="grid gap-3">
                            <div className="space-y-1">
                                <Label htmlFor="orderKey" className="text-sm font-medium">MSBTE ORDER REF Key</Label>
                                <Input
                                    id="orderKey"
                                    type="text"
                                    placeholder="Enter MSBTE ORDER REF key"
                                    value={orderKey}
                                    onChange={(e) => setOrderKey(e.target.value)}
                                    className="w-full"
                                />
                            </div>
                            <div className="space-y-1">
                                <Label htmlFor="collegeRefKey" className="text-sm font-medium">INSTITUTE ORDER REF Key</Label>
                                <Input
                                    id="collegeRefKey"
                                    type="text"
                                    placeholder="Enter INSTITUTE ORDER REF key"
                                    value={collegeRefKey}
                                    onChange={(e) => setCollegeRefKey(e.target.value)}
                                    className="w-full"
                                />
                            </div>
                        </div>
                        <Button onClick={fetchData} disabled={isLoading} className="w-full flex items-center justify-center gap-2 py-2">
                            {isLoading ? (
                                <>
                                    <Loader2 className="h-4 w-4 animate-spin" />
                                    Loading...
                                </>
                            ) : (
                                "Fetch Data"
                            )}
                        </Button>
                        {error && (
                            <Alert variant="destructive" className="flex items-center gap-2">
                                <AlertCircle className="h-4 w-4" />
                                <AlertDescription>{error}</AlertDescription>
                            </Alert>
                        )}
                    </CardContent>
                </Card>
            )}

            {showReport && (
                <div className="space-y-4">
                    <div className="flex justify-between items-center">
                        <Button onClick={handleReset} variant="outline">
                            Back to Search
                        </Button>
                        <div className="flex gap-2">
                            <Button
                                onClick={handleSendAllEmails}
                                disabled={sendingEmails}
                                variant={sendingEmails ? "outline" : "secondary"}
                                className="flex items-center gap-2"
                            >
                                {sendingEmails ? (
                                    <>
                                        <Loader2 className="h-4 w-4 animate-spin" />
                                        Sending Emails...
                                    </>
                                ) : (
                                    <>
                                        <Mail className="h-4 w-4" />
                                        Send All Emails ({Object.keys(officeOrderData).length})
                                    </>
                                )}
                            </Button>
                            <Button onClick={() => reactToPrintFn()} className="flex items-center gap-2">
                                <Printer className="h-4 w-4" />
                                Print Report
                            </Button>
                        </div>
                    </div>

                    <div ref={contentRef} className="space-y-8">
                        {Object.entries(officeOrderData).map(([uid, reliever]) => (
                            <Card key={uid} style={PAGE_STYLE} className="border border-gray-300 shadow-lg relative">
                                <CollegeHeader collegeRefKey={collegeRefKey} />
                                <CardContent className="p-8">
                                    <h2 className="text-2xl font-bold text-center my-6 uppercase tracking-wide">OFFICE ORDER</h2>
                                    <div className="space-y-6 text-sm leading-relaxed">
                                        <p>
                                            To,
                                            <br />
                                            <span className="font-semibold">{reliever.NAME}</span>
                                            <br />
                                            {reliever.ROLE}, {getDepartmentByCode(reliever.DEPARTMENT).name}
                                            <br />
                                            <span>{reliever.EMAIL}</span>
                                            <br />
                                            Diploma
                                            <br />
                                            {getExamCenterInfo().NAME}
                                        </p>
                                        <p>
                                            <span className="font-semibold">Subject:</span> Order of Block Reliever for {getExamSeason()}{" "}
                                            Theory Exam – {getExamYear()}
                                            <br />
                                            <span className="font-semibold">Reference:</span> {orderKey}
                                        </p>
                                        <p>
                                            Sir/Madam,
                                            <br />
                                            You have been appointed as Reliever for the MSBTE Theory Examination of{" "}
                                            {getExamSeason()} {getExamYear()} as per the following schedule. Please ensure all necessary
                                            arrangements are made for the smooth conduct of the examination.
                                        </p>
                                        <Table>
                                            <TableHeader>
                                                <TableRow>
                                                    <TableHead className="text-center">Sr. No</TableHead>
                                                    <TableHead className="text-center">Date</TableHead>
                                                    <TableHead className="text-center">Slot</TableHead>
                                                </TableRow>
                                            </TableHeader>
                                            <TableBody>
                                                {reliever.ALLOTED.map((block, index) => (
                                                    <TableRow key={index}>
                                                        <TableCell className="text-center">{index + 1}</TableCell>
                                                        <TableCell className="text-center">{new Date(block.DATE).toLocaleDateString('en-IN')}</TableCell>
                                                        <TableCell className="text-center">{block.SESSION.toUpperCase()}</TableCell>
                                                    </TableRow>
                                                ))}
                                            </TableBody>
                                        </Table>
                                        <div className="text-right absolute bottom-4 right-4">
                                            <p className="font-semibold">Chief Officer In-charge</p>
                                            <p>
                                                {getExamCenterCode()} - {getExamCenterInfo().NAME}
                                            </p>
                                        </div>
                                    </div>
                                    <ReportFooter alignment="left" />
                                </CardContent>
                            </Card>
                        ))}
                    </div>
                </div>
            )}
        </div>
    );
}
</modules/premium/v1/generate_reliever_order.tsx>

<modules/premium/v1/generate_supervision_order.tsx>
"use client";

import { Alert, AlertDescription } from "@/components/ui/alert";
import { Button } from "@/components/ui/button-premium";
import { Card, CardContent, CardHeader, CardTitle } from "@/components/ui/card-premium";
import { Input } from "@/components/ui/input";
import { Label } from "@/components/ui/label";
import { Table, TableBody, TableCell, TableHead, TableHeader, TableRow } from "@/components/ui/table";
import { useExamCenter } from "@/hooks/useExamCenter";
import { useEcCode } from "@/lib/helper";
import { AlertCircle, Loader2, Printer, Mail } from "lucide-react";
import type React from "react";
import { useRef, useState } from "react";
import { useReactToPrint } from "react-to-print";
import { toast } from "react-toastify";
import CollegeHeader from "@/components/misc/CollegeHeaders";
import { ReportFooter } from "@/modules/misc/footers";
import { generateSupervisionOrderEmail } from '@/app/api/(others)/send-email/emailtemplates';

interface OfficeOrderData {
    NAME: string;
    ROLE: string;
    DEPARTMENT: string;
    EMAIL: string;
    ALLOTED: {
        DATE: string;
        SESSION: string;
    }[];
}

interface SupervisorItem {
    SUPERVISOR_UID: string;
    NAME: string;
    ROLE: string;
    DEPARTMENT: string;
    EMAIL: string;
    DATE: string;
    SESSION: string;
}

interface EmailResult {
    email: string;
    success: boolean;
}


const PAGE_STYLE: React.CSSProperties = {
    pageBreakAfter: "always",
    width: "210mm",
    height: "297mm",
    margin: "0 auto",
    marginBlockEnd: "8px",
    padding: "20mm",
    boxSizing: "border-box",
};

export default function OfficeOrderReport() {
    const ec_code = useEcCode();
    const { getExamSeason, getExamCenterInfo, getExamCenterCode, getExamYear, getDepartmentByCode } = useExamCenter(ec_code);

    const contentRef = useRef<HTMLDivElement>(null);
    const [orderKey, setOrderKey] = useState("");
    const [collegeRefKey, setCollegeRefKey] = useState("");
    const [officeOrderData, setOfficeOrderData] = useState<{ [key: string]: OfficeOrderData }>({});
    const [isLoading, setIsLoading] = useState(false);
    const [error, setError] = useState("");
    const [showReport, setShowReport] = useState(false);
    const reactToPrintFn = useReactToPrint({ contentRef });
    const [sendingEmails, setSendingEmails] = useState(false);

    const fetchData = async () => {
        if (!orderKey || !collegeRefKey) {
            toast.error("Please enter an ORDER REF and COLLEGE REF string.");
            return;
        }

        setIsLoading(true);
        setError("");
        try {
