            const response = await fetch(`/api/supervisors?action=suporder`);
            if (!response.ok) throw new Error(`HTTP error! Status: ${response.status}`);
            const data = await response.json();

            const transformedData = data.reduce((acc: { [key: string]: OfficeOrderData }, item: SupervisorItem) => {
                const uid = item.SUPERVISOR_UID;
                if (!acc[uid]) {
                    acc[uid] = {
                        NAME: item.NAME,
                        ROLE: item.ROLE,
                        DEPARTMENT: item.DEPARTMENT,
                        EMAIL: item.EMAIL,
                        ALLOTED: [],
                    };
                }
                acc[uid].ALLOTED.push({
                    DATE: item.DATE,
                    SESSION: item.SESSION,
                });
                return acc;
            }, {});

            if (Object.keys(transformedData).length === 0) {
                toast.info("No supervision order data found.");
                setShowReport(false);
            } else {
                setOfficeOrderData(transformedData);
                setShowReport(true);
            }
        } catch (error) {
            console.error("Error fetching office order data:", error);
            setError("Failed to fetch office order data. Please try again.");
            toast.error("Failed to fetch office order data. Please try again.");
        } finally {
            setIsLoading(false);
        }
    };

    const handleReset = () => {
        setOrderKey("");
        setCollegeRefKey("");
        setOfficeOrderData({});
        setShowReport(false);
    };

    const handleSendAllEmails = async () => {
        try {
            setSendingEmails(true);
            const emailPromises = Object.entries(officeOrderData).map(async ([uid, supervisor]) => {
                console.error(uid.slice(0,0))
                const emailHtml = generateSupervisionOrderEmail({
                    supervisor,
                    examCenterName: getExamCenterInfo().NAME,
                    examSeason: getExamSeason(),
                    examYear: getExamYear(),
                    orderKey,
                    examCenterCode: getExamCenterCode(),
                    departmentName: getDepartmentByCode(supervisor.DEPARTMENT).name,
                    chiefName: getExamCenterInfo().OFFICER_INCHARGE
                });

                return fetch('/api/send-email', {
                    method: 'POST',
                    headers: {
                        'Content-Type': 'application/json',
                    },
                    body: JSON.stringify({
                        recipients: [{ email: supervisor.EMAIL, name: supervisor.NAME }],
                        subject: `Block Supervisor Order for ${getExamSeason()} ${getExamYear()}`,
                        html: emailHtml
                    }),
                });
            });

            const responses = await Promise.all(emailPromises);
            const results = await Promise.all(responses.map(r => r.json()));
            
            const successful = results.reduce((acc, result) => 
                acc + (result.results?.filter((r: EmailResult) => r.success)?.length || 0), 0);
            
            const totalSupervisors = Object.keys(officeOrderData).length;
            
            toast.success(`Successfully sent ${successful} out of ${totalSupervisors} emails`);

            // Check for any failed emails
            const failedEmails = results.flatMap(result => 
                result.results?.filter((r: EmailResult) => !r.success).map((r: EmailResult) => r.email) || []
            );

            if (failedEmails.length > 0) {
                toast.error(`Failed to send emails to: ${failedEmails.join(', ')}`);
            }

            // Show remaining quota if available
            const quotaInfo = results[0]?.remainingQuota;
            if (quotaInfo) {
                toast.info(`Remaining email quota: ${quotaInfo}`);
            }

        } catch (error) {
            console.error('Error sending emails:', error);
            toast.error('Failed to send emails. Please try again.');
        } finally {
            setSendingEmails(false);
        }
    };

    return (
        <div className="container mx-auto px-4 py-8">
            {!showReport && (
                <Card className="max-w-md mx-auto p-6 space-y-5">
                    <CardHeader className="pb-2">
                        <CardTitle className="text-2xl font-bold text-center">Block Supervisors Office Order Report</CardTitle>
                    </CardHeader>
                    <CardContent className="space-y-5">
                        <div className="grid gap-3">
                            <div className="space-y-1">
                                <Label htmlFor="orderKey" className="text-sm font-medium">MSBTE ORDER REF Key</Label>
                                <Input
                                    id="orderKey"
                                    type="text"
                                    placeholder="Enter MSBTE ORDER REF key"
                                    value={orderKey}
                                    onChange={(e) => setOrderKey(e.target.value)}
                                    className="w-full"
                                />
                            </div>
                            <div className="space-y-1">
                                <Label htmlFor="collegeRefKey" className="text-sm font-medium">INSTITUTE ORDER REF Key</Label>
                                <Input
                                    id="collegeRefKey"
                                    type="text"
                                    placeholder="Enter INSTITUTE ORDER REF key"
                                    value={collegeRefKey}
                                    onChange={(e) => setCollegeRefKey(e.target.value)}
                                    className="w-full"
                                />
                            </div>
                        </div>
                        <Button onClick={fetchData} disabled={isLoading} className="w-full flex items-center justify-center gap-2 py-2">
                            {isLoading ? (
                                <>
                                    <Loader2 className="h-4 w-4 animate-spin" />
                                    Loading...
                                </>
                            ) : (
                                "Fetch Data"
                            )}
                        </Button>
                        {error && (
                            <Alert variant="destructive" className="flex items-center gap-2">
                                <AlertCircle className="h-4 w-4" />
                                <AlertDescription>{error}</AlertDescription>
                            </Alert>
                        )}
                    </CardContent>
                </Card>
            )}

            {showReport && (
                <div className="space-y-4">
                    <div className="flex justify-between items-center">
                        <Button onClick={handleReset} variant="outline">
                            Back to Search
                        </Button>
                        <div className="flex gap-2">
                            <Button
                                onClick={handleSendAllEmails}
                                disabled={sendingEmails}
                                variant={sendingEmails ? "outline" : "secondary"}
                                className="flex items-center gap-2"
                            >
                                {sendingEmails ? (
                                    <>
                                        <Loader2 className="h-4 w-4 animate-spin" />
                                        Sending Emails...
                                    </>
                                ) : (
                                    <>
                                        <Mail className="h-4 w-4" />
                                        Send All Emails ({Object.keys(officeOrderData).length})
                                    </>
                                )}
                            </Button>
                            <Button onClick={() => reactToPrintFn()} className="flex items-center gap-2">
                                <Printer className="h-4 w-4" />
                                Print Report
                            </Button>
                        </div>
                    </div>

                    <div ref={contentRef} className="space-y-8">
                        {Object.entries(officeOrderData).map(([uid, supervisor]) => (
                            <Card key={uid} style={PAGE_STYLE} className="border border-gray-300 shadow-lg relative">
                                <CollegeHeader collegeRefKey={collegeRefKey} />
                                <CardContent className="p-8">
                                    <h2 className="text-2xl font-bold text-center my-6 uppercase tracking-wide">OFFICE ORDER</h2>
                                    <div className="space-y-6 text-sm leading-relaxed">
                                        <p>
                                            To,
                                            <br />
                                            <span className="font-semibold">{supervisor.NAME}</span>
                                            <br />
                                            {supervisor.ROLE}, {getDepartmentByCode(supervisor.DEPARTMENT).name}
                                            <br />
                                            <span>{supervisor.EMAIL}</span>
                                            <br />
                                            Diploma
                                            <br />
                                            {getExamCenterInfo().NAME}
                                        </p>
                                        <p>
                                            <span className="font-semibold">Subject:</span> Order of Block Supervisor for {getExamSeason()}{" "}
                                            Theory Exam – {getExamYear()}
                                            <br />
                                            <span className="font-semibold">Reference:</span> {orderKey}
                                        </p>
                                        <p>
                                            Sir/Madam,
                                            <br />
                                            You have to work as Invigilator (Block Supervisor) for MSBTE Theory Examination of{" "}
                                            {getExamSeason()} {getExamYear()} as per the following schedule. You have to make all the
                                            necessary arrangements for smooth conduct of the Examination.
                                        </p>
                                        <Table>
                                            <TableHeader>
                                                <TableRow>
                                                    <TableHead className="text-center">Sr. No</TableHead>
                                                    <TableHead className="text-center">Date</TableHead>
                                                    <TableHead className="text-center">Slot</TableHead>
                                                </TableRow>
                                            </TableHeader>
                                            <TableBody>
                                                {supervisor.ALLOTED.map((block, index) => (
                                                    <TableRow key={index}>
                                                        <TableCell className="text-center">{index + 1}</TableCell>
                                                        <TableCell className="text-center">{new Date(block.DATE).toLocaleDateString('en-IN')}</TableCell>
                                                        <TableCell className="text-center">{block.SESSION.toLocaleUpperCase()}</TableCell>
                                                    </TableRow>
                                                ))}
                                            </TableBody>
                                        </Table>
                                        <div className="text-right absolute bottom-4 right-4">
                                            <p className="font-semibold">Chief Officer In-charge</p>
                                            <p>
                                                {getExamCenterCode()} - {getExamCenterInfo().NAME}
                                            </p>
                                        </div>
                                    </div>
                                    <ReportFooter alignment="left" />
                                </CardContent>
                            </Card>
                        ))}
                    </div>
                </div>
            )}
        </div>
    );
}
</modules/premium/v1/generate_supervision_order.tsx>

<modules/extra-reports/blank_reliever.tsx>
import React, { CSSProperties, useEffect, useState, useRef, useCallback } from 'react';
import { Card, CardHeader, CardContent } from '@/components/ui/card';
import { Label } from '@/components/ui/label';
import { Table, TableBody, TableCell, TableHead, TableHeader, TableRow } from '@/components/ui/table';
import { useExamCenter } from '@/hooks/useExamCenter';
import axios from 'axios';
import { Loader2, RefreshCcw, LucidePrinter, XIcon } from 'lucide-react';
import { Button } from '@/components/ui/button';
import { toast } from 'react-toastify';
import { useEcCode } from '@/lib/helper';
import { useReactToPrint } from 'react-to-print';
import { Input } from '@/components/ui/input';
import { ReportFooter } from '../misc/footers';

const PAGE_STYLE: CSSProperties = {
    width: "210mm",
    height: "297mm",
    margin: "0 auto",
    marginBottom: "8px",
    padding: "10mm 5mm",
    position: "relative",
    boxSizing: "border-box",
    pageBreakAfter: "always",
};

interface Block {
    blockNo: string;
    location: string;
    supervisor: string;
    timeslot: string;
}

interface RelieverRecord {
    name: string;
    department: string;
    blocks: Block[];
}

interface DataEntry {
    DATE: string;
    SESSION: string;
    RELIEVER_RECORDS: RelieverRecord[];
}


const DataDisplay = () => {
    const [data, setData] = useState<DataEntry[]>([]);
    const ec_code = useEcCode();
    const { getDepartmentByCode, getExamSeason, getExamYear, getExamCenterInfo } = useExamCenter(ec_code);
    const [loading, setLoading] = useState(false);
    const contentRef = useRef<HTMLDivElement>(null);
    const [date, setDate] = useState(() => {
        const today = new Date();
        return today.toISOString().split('T')[0];
    });
    const [session, setSession] = useState('');
    const [showReport, setShowReport] = useState(false);

    const fetchData = useCallback(async (selectedDate: string, selectedSession: string) => {
        setLoading(true);
        try {
            const response = await axios.get(`/api/relievers?action=relorder&date=${selectedDate}&session=${selectedSession}`);
            if (!response.data || response.data.length === 0) {
                toast.error("No reliever assignments found for selected date and session");
                setData([]);
                return;
            }
            setData([{
                DATE: selectedDate,
                SESSION: selectedSession,
                RELIEVER_RECORDS: response.data
            }]);
            setShowReport(true);
        } catch (error) {
            console.error('Error fetching data:', error);
            toast.error('Failed to fetch data. Please try again.');
            setData([]);
            setShowReport(false);
        } finally {
            setLoading(false);
        }
    }, []);

    useEffect(() => {
        if (showReport) {
            fetchData(date, session);
        }
    }, [date, session, fetchData, showReport]);

    const handlePrint = useReactToPrint({
        contentRef,
        documentTitle: "Reliever_Report",
    });

    const handleReset = () => {
        setData([]);
        setDate(new Date().toISOString().split('T')[0]);
        setSession('');
        setShowReport(false);
    };

    const handleFetchReport = () => {
        if (!date || !session) {
            toast.error('Please select both date and session');
            return;
        }
        fetchData(date, session);
    };

    const MAX_ROWS_PER_PAGE = 10;

    const chunkedData = useCallback((blocks: Block[]) => {
        const chunks: Block[][] = [];
        for (let i = 0; i < blocks.length; i += MAX_ROWS_PER_PAGE) {
            chunks.push(blocks.slice(i, i + MAX_ROWS_PER_PAGE));
        }
        return chunks;
    }, []);

    if (loading) {
        return (
            <div className="flex justify-center items-center h-screen">
                <Loader2 className="animate-spin size-6 text-blue-500" />
            </div>
        );
    }

    return (
        <div className="flex flex-col gap-8 pb-8">
            {!showReport ? (
                <Card className="w-full max-w-2xl mx-auto">
                    <CardHeader>
                        <h2 className="text-2xl font-bold text-center">Blank Reliever Report</h2>
                    </CardHeader>
                    <CardContent className="space-y-4">
                        <div className="space-y-2">
                            <Label htmlFor="date" className="text-sm font-medium">Date</Label>
                            <Input
                                id="date"
                                type="date"
                                value={date}
                                onChange={(e) => setDate(e.target.value)}
                                max={new Date().toISOString().split('T')[0]}
                            />
                        </div>
                        <div className="space-y-2">
                            <Label htmlFor="session" className="text-sm font-medium">Session</Label>
                            <select
                                id="session"
                                value={session}
                                onChange={(e) => setSession(e.target.value)}
                                className="w-full p-2 border rounded-md"
                            >
                                <option value="">Select Session</option>
                                <option value="MORNING">Morning</option>
                                <option value="AFTERNOON">Afternoon</option>
                            </select>
                        </div>
                        <Button
                            onClick={handleFetchReport}
                            disabled={loading}
                            className="w-full"
                        >
                            {loading ? 'Loading...' : 'Fetch Report'}
                        </Button>
                    </CardContent>
                </Card>
            ) : (
                <>
                    <div className="flex justify-center gap-4 w-full print:hidden">
                        <Button
                            onClick={() => handlePrint()}
                            size="lg"
                            className="w-40 group transition-transform duration-300 hover:scale-105"
                        >
                            <LucidePrinter className="size-4 mr-2 transition-transform duration-300 group-hover:scale-105" />
                            Print Report
                        </Button>
                        <Button
                            variant="ghost"
                            size="lg"
                            className="w-40"
                            disabled={loading}
                            onClick={() => fetchData(date, session)}
                        >
                            {loading ? (
                                <>
                                    <Loader2 className="animate-spin size-4 mr-2" /> Refreshing...
                                </>
                            ) : (
                                <>
                                    <RefreshCcw className="size-4 mr-2" /> Refresh
                                </>
                            )}
                        </Button>
                        <Button
                            variant="secondary"
                            size="lg"
                            className="w-40 flex items-center gap-2 group"
                            onClick={handleReset}
                        >
                            <XIcon className="transition-transform duration-500 group-hover:rotate-180 group-hover:scale-110" />
                            <span className="transition-opacity duration-500 group-hover:opacity-80 group-hover:translate-x-1">
                                Clear
                            </span>
                        </Button>
                    </div>
                    <div ref={contentRef}>
                        {data.map((entry) => {
                            // Filter out relievers with no blocks
                            const relieversWithBlocks = entry.RELIEVER_RECORDS.filter(reliever => reliever.blocks.length > 0);

                            return relieversWithBlocks.map((reliever, relieverIndex) => {
                                const pages = chunkedData(reliever.blocks);

                                return pages.map((pageData, pageIndex) => (
                                    <Card
                                        key={relieverIndex}
                                        className="shadow-xl print:shadow-none rounded-lg overflow-hidden dark:bg-neutral-800 w-full mx-auto my-6 p-4 border-primary"
                                        style={PAGE_STYLE}
                                    >
                                        <CardHeader className="px-6 border-b-2 border-primary mb-6">
                                            {pageIndex === 0 && (
                                                <>
                                                    <p className="text-center text-sm text-neutral-500 dark:text-neutral-400">
                                                        {getExamSeason()} - {getExamYear()}
                                                    </p>
                                                    <h1 className="text-center text-xl font-bold mb-2">
                                                        {getExamCenterInfo()?.NAME}
                                                    </h1>
                                                    <h2 className="text-center text-2xl font-semibold mb-4 border-b-2 border-primary w-fit m-auto">
                                                        Session Wise Blank Reliever Report
                                                    </h2>
                                                </>
                                            )}
                                            <div className="flex justify-between items-center mt-2 text-sm">
                                                <p className="font-medium">Date: {new Date(entry.DATE).toLocaleDateString('en-IN')}</p>
                                                <p className="font-medium">Session: {entry.SESSION}</p>
                                                <p className="font-medium">
                                                    Page: {pageIndex + 1} of {pages.length}
                                                </p>
                                            </div>
                                            <div className="text-sm mt-2">
                                                <p className="font-medium">Reliever: {reliever.name}</p>
                                                <p className="font-medium">Department: {getDepartmentByCode(reliever.department).name}</p>
                                            </div>
                                        </CardHeader>

                                        <CardContent className="p-6">
                                            <Table className="w-full border-collapse border border-primary">
                                                <TableHeader>
                                                    <TableRow className="bg-neutral-100 dark:bg-neutral-700">
                                                        <TableHead className="text-center font-bold px-3 py-1 border-b border-r border-primary">
                                                            Block No/<br />Location
                                                        </TableHead>
                                                        <TableHead className="text-center font-bold px-3 py-1 border-b border-r border-primary">
                                                            Supervisor
                                                        </TableHead>
                                                        <TableHead className="text-center font-bold px-3 py-1 border-b border-r border-primary">
                                                            Start Time
                                                        </TableHead>
                                                        <TableHead className="text-center font-bold px-3 py-1 border-b border-r border-primary">
                                                            End Time
                                                        </TableHead>
                                                        <TableHead className="text-center font-bold px-3 py-1 border-b border-primary">
                                                            Signature
                                                        </TableHead>
                                                    </TableRow>
                                                </TableHeader>
                                                <TableBody>
                                                    {pageData.map((block, index) => (
                                                        <TableRow
                                                            key={index}
                                                            className="border-b border-primary hover:bg-neutral-50 dark:hover:bg-neutral-700 transition-colors duration-150"
                                                        >
                                                            <TableCell className="text-center border-r border-primary px-3 py-1 font-medium">
                                                                <b>{block.blockNo}</b><br />
                                                                {block.location}
                                                            </TableCell>
                                                            <TableCell className="text-center border-r border-primary px-3 py-1">
                                                                {block.supervisor}
                                                            </TableCell>
                                                            <TableCell className="text-center border-r border-primary px-3 py-1 h-12">
                                                            </TableCell>
                                                            <TableCell className="text-center border-r border-primary px-3 py-1 h-12">
                                                            </TableCell>
                                                            <TableCell className="text-center border-primary px-3 py-1 h-12">
                                                            </TableCell>
                                                        </TableRow>
                                                    ))}
                                                </TableBody>
                                            </Table>

                                            <ReportFooter />
                                        </CardContent>
                                    </Card>
                                ));
                            });
                        })}
                    </div>
                </>
            )}
        </div>
    );
};

export default DataDisplay;
</modules/extra-reports/blank_reliever.tsx>

<modules/extra-reports/blank_absent.tsx>
import React, { CSSProperties, useEffect, useState, useRef, useCallback } from 'react';
import { Card, CardHeader, CardContent } from '@/components/ui/card';
import { Label } from '@/components/ui/label';
import { Table, TableBody, TableCell, TableHead, TableHeader, TableRow } from '@/components/ui/table';
import { motion } from 'framer-motion';
import { useExamCenter } from '@/hooks/useExamCenter';
import axios from 'axios';
import { Loader2, RefreshCcw, LucidePrinter, XIcon } from 'lucide-react';
import { Button } from '@/components/ui/button';
import { toast } from 'react-toastify';
import { useEcCode } from '@/lib/helper';
import { useReactToPrint } from 'react-to-print';
import { Input } from '@/components/ui/input';
import { ReportFooter } from '../misc/footers';

const PAGE_STYLE: CSSProperties = {
    width: "210mm",
    height: "297mm", 
    margin: "0 auto",
    marginBottom: "8px",
    padding: "10mm 5mm",
    position: "relative",
    boxSizing: "border-box",
    pageBreakAfter: "always",
};

interface Scheme {
    SCHEME: string;
    INST_CODE: string;
    SUBJECT_CODE: string;
    TOTAL_STUDENTS: string;
}

interface SupervisionRecord {
    BLOCKNO: string;
    LOCATION: string;
    SUPERVISOR_NAME: string;
    SCHEMES: Scheme[];
}

interface DataEntry {
    DATE: string;
    SESSION: string;
    SUPERVISION_RECORDS: SupervisionRecord[];
}

interface FlattenedRow {
    BLOCKNO: string;
    LOCATION: string;
    SCHEME: string;
    TOTAL_STUDENTS: string;
    INST_CODE: string;
    SUBJECT_CODE: string;
    SUPERVISOR_NAME: string;
    isFirstInGroup: boolean;
    groupSize: number;
}

const DataDisplay = () => {
    const [data, setData] = useState<DataEntry[]>([]);
    const ec_code = useEcCode();
    const { getExamSeason, getExamYear, getExamCenterInfo } = useExamCenter(ec_code);
    const [loading, setLoading] = useState(false);
    const contentRef = useRef<HTMLDivElement>(null);
    const [date, setDate] = useState(() => {
        const today = new Date();
        return today.toISOString().split('T')[0];
    });
    const [session, setSession] = useState('');
    const [showReport, setShowReport] = useState(false);

    const fetchData = useCallback(async (selectedDate: string, selectedSession: string) => {
        setLoading(true);
        try {
            const response = await axios.get(`/api/supervision?date=${selectedDate}&session=${selectedSession}`);
            if (!response.data.length) {
                toast.error("No data available for selected date and session");
                setData([]);
                return;
            }
            setData(response.data);
            setShowReport(true);
        } catch (error) {
            console.error('Error fetching data:', error);
            toast.error('Failed to fetch data. Please try again.');
            setData([]);
            setShowReport(false);
        } finally {
            setLoading(false);
        }
    }, []);

    useEffect(() => {
        if (showReport) {
            fetchData(date, session);
        }
    }, [date, session, fetchData, showReport]);

    const flattenData = useCallback((records: SupervisionRecord[]): FlattenedRow[] => {
        return records.flatMap(record =>
            record.SCHEMES.map((scheme, index) => ({
                BLOCKNO: record.BLOCKNO,
                LOCATION: record.LOCATION,
                SCHEME: scheme.SCHEME,
                TOTAL_STUDENTS: scheme.TOTAL_STUDENTS,
                SUBJECT_CODE: scheme.SUBJECT_CODE,
                SUPERVISOR_NAME: record.SUPERVISOR_NAME,
                INST_CODE: scheme.INST_CODE,
                isFirstInGroup: index === 0,
                groupSize: record.SCHEMES.length
            }))
        );
    }, []);

    const calculateTotalStudents = (entry: DataEntry) => {
        return flattenData(entry.SUPERVISION_RECORDS).reduce(
            (sum, row) => sum + parseInt(row.TOTAL_STUDENTS || "0"),
            0
        );
    };

    const handlePrint = useReactToPrint({
        contentRef,
        documentTitle: "Supervision_Report",
    });

    const handleReset = () => {
        setData([]);
        setDate(new Date().toISOString().split('T')[0]);
        setSession('');
        setShowReport(false);
    };

    const handleFetchReport = () => {
        if (!date || !session) {
            toast.error('Please select both date and session');
            return;
        }
        fetchData(date, session);
    };

    const MAX_ROWS_PER_PAGE = 10;

    const chunkedData = useCallback((data: FlattenedRow[]) => {
        const chunks: FlattenedRow[][] = [];
        for (let i = 0; i < data.length; i += MAX_ROWS_PER_PAGE) {
            chunks.push(data.slice(i, i + MAX_ROWS_PER_PAGE));
        }
        return chunks;
    }, []);

    if (loading) {
        return (
            <div className="flex justify-center items-center h-screen">
                <Loader2 className="animate-spin size-6 text-blue-500" />
            </div>
        );
    }

    return (
        <div className="flex flex-col gap-8 pb-8">
            {!showReport ? (
                <Card className="w-full max-w-2xl mx-auto">
                    <CardHeader>
                        <h2 className="text-2xl font-bold text-center">Blank Absent Report</h2>
                    </CardHeader>
                    <CardContent className="space-y-4">
                        <div className="space-y-2">
                            <Label htmlFor="date" className="text-sm font-medium">Date</Label>
                            <Input
                                id="date"
                                type="date"
                                value={date}
                                onChange={(e) => setDate(e.target.value)}
                                max={new Date().toISOString().split('T')[0]}
                            />
                        </div>
                        <div className="space-y-2">
                            <Label htmlFor="session" className="text-sm font-medium">Session</Label>
                            <select
                                id="session"
                                value={session}
                                onChange={(e) => setSession(e.target.value)}
                                className="w-full p-2 border rounded-md"
                            >
                                <option value="">Select Session</option>
                                <option value="Morning">Morning</option>
                                <option value="Afternoon">Afternoon</option>
                            </select>
                        </div>
                        <Button
                            onClick={handleFetchReport}
                            disabled={loading}
                            className="w-full"
                        >
                            {loading ? 'Loading...' : 'Fetch Report'}
                        </Button>
                    </CardContent>
                </Card>
            ) : (
                <>
                    <div className="flex justify-center gap-4 w-full print:hidden">
                        <Button
                            onClick={() => handlePrint()}
                            size="lg"
                            className="w-40 group transition-transform duration-300 hover:scale-105"
                        >
                            <LucidePrinter className="size-4 mr-2 transition-transform duration-300 group-hover:scale-105" />
                            Print Report
                        </Button>
                        <Button
                            variant="ghost"
                            size="lg"
                            className="w-40"
                            disabled={loading}
                            onClick={() => fetchData(date, session)}
                        >
                            {loading ? (
                                <>  
                                    <Loader2 className="animate-spin size-4 mr-2" /> Refreshing...
                                </>
                            ) : (
                                <>
                                    <RefreshCcw className="size-4 mr-2" /> Refresh
                                </>
                            )}
                        </Button>
                        <Button
                            variant="secondary"
                            size="lg"
                            className="w-40 flex items-center gap-2 group"
                            onClick={handleReset}
                        >
                            <XIcon className="transition-transform duration-500 group-hover:rotate-180 group-hover:scale-110" />
                            <span className="transition-opacity duration-500 group-hover:opacity-80 group-hover:translate-x-1">
                                Clear
                            </span>
                        </Button>
                    </div>
                    <div ref={contentRef}>
                        {data.map((entry, entryIndex) => {
                            const flattenedData = flattenData(entry.SUPERVISION_RECORDS);
                            const pages = chunkedData(flattenedData);
                            const totalStudents = calculateTotalStudents(entry);

                            return pages.map((pageData, pageIndex) => (
                                <motion.div
                                    key={`${entryIndex}-${pageIndex}`}
                                    initial={{ opacity: 0, y: 20 }}
                                    animate={{ opacity: 1, y: 0 }}
                                    transition={{ duration: 0.5, delay: pageIndex * 0.1 }}
                                    className="print:block"
                                >
                                    <Card
                                        className="shadow-xl print:shadow-none rounded-lg overflow-hidden dark:bg-neutral-800 w-full mx-auto my-6 p-4 border border-primary"
                                        style={PAGE_STYLE}
                                    >
                                        <CardHeader className="px-6 border-b-2 border-primary mb-6">
                                            {pageIndex === 0 && (
                                                <>
                                                    <p className="text-center text-sm text-neutral-500 dark:text-neutral-400">
                                                        {getExamSeason()} - {getExamYear()}
                                                    </p>
                                                    <h1 className="text-center text-xl font-bold mb-2">
                                                        {getExamCenterInfo()?.NAME}
                                                    </h1>
                                                    <h2 className="text-center text-2xl font-semibold mb-4 border-b-2 border-primary w-fit m-auto">
                                                        Session Wise Blank Absent Report
                                                    </h2>
                                                </>
                                            )}
                                            <div className="flex justify-between items-center mt-2 text-sm">
                                                <p className="font-medium">Date: {new Date(entry.DATE).toLocaleDateString('en-IN')}</p>
                                                <p className="font-medium">Session: {entry.SESSION}</p>
                                                <p className="font-medium">
                                                    Page: {pageIndex + 1} of {pages.length}
                                                </p>
                                            </div>
                                            <p className="text-center text-sm font-semibold uppercase mt-2">
                                                Total Examinee allowed for examination: {totalStudents}
                                            </p>
                                        </CardHeader>

                                        <CardContent className="p-6">
                                            <Table className="w-full border-collapse border border-primary">
                                                <TableHeader>
                                                    <TableRow className="border border-primary">
                                                        <TableHead className="text-center font-bold px-3 py-1 border border-primary">
                                                            Block No/<br />Location
                                                        </TableHead>
                                                        <TableHead className="text-center font-bold px-3 py-1 border border-primary">
                                                            Supervisor
                                                        </TableHead>
                                                        <TableHead className="text-center font-bold px-3 py-1 border border-primary">
                                                            Scheme
                                                        </TableHead>
                                                        <TableHead className="text-center font-bold px-3 py-1 border border-primary">
                                                            Present<br />Absent<br />Total
                                                        </TableHead>
                                                        <TableHead className="text-center font-bold px-3 py-1 border border-primary">
                                                            Absent Candidates Seat No
                                                        </TableHead>
                                                    </TableRow>
                                                </TableHeader>
                                                <TableBody>
                                                    {pageData.map((row, rowIndex) => (
                                                        <TableRow
                                                            key={rowIndex}
                                                            className="border border-primary"
                                                        >
                                                            {row.isFirstInGroup && (
                                                                <>
                                                                    <TableCell
                                                                        rowSpan={row.groupSize}
                                                                        className="text-center border border-primary px-3 py-1 font-medium"
                                                                    >
                                                                        <b>{row.BLOCKNO}</b><br />
                                                                        {row.LOCATION}
                                                                    </TableCell>
                                                                    <TableCell
                                                                        rowSpan={row.groupSize}
                                                                        className="text-center border border-primary px-3 py-1"
                                                                    >
                                                                        {row.SUPERVISOR_NAME}
                                                                    </TableCell>
                                                                </>
                                                            )}
                                                            <TableCell className="text-center border border-primary px-3 py-1">
                                                                <b>({row.INST_CODE})-{row.SCHEME}</b><br />
                                                                {row.SUBJECT_CODE}
                                                            </TableCell>
                                                            <TableCell className="text-left border border-primary px-3 py-1 w-fit">
                                                                P = <br />A = <br /><hr className="border-primary" />T = <b>{row.TOTAL_STUDENTS}</b>
                                                            </TableCell>
                                                            <TableCell className="text-center border border-primary px-3 py-1 w-full">
                                                            </TableCell>
                                                        </TableRow>
                                                    ))}
                                                </TableBody>
                                            </Table>

                                            <ReportFooter/>
                                        </CardContent>
                                    </Card>
                                </motion.div>
                            ));
                        })}
                    </div>
                </>
            )}
        </div>
    );
};

export default React.memo(DataDisplay);
</modules/extra-reports/blank_absent.tsx>

<modules/extra-reports/offsup.tsx>
"use client";

import { Button } from "@/components/ui/button";
import { Card, CardContent, CardFooter, CardHeader, CardTitle } from "@/components/ui/card";
import { Table, TableBody, TableCell, TableHead, TableHeader, TableRow } from "@/components/ui/table";
import { Badge } from "@/components/ui/badge";
import { Separator } from "@/components/ui/separator";
import { Loader2, Download, Printer } from "lucide-react";
import { useEffect, useRef, useState } from "react";
import { useReactToPrint } from "react-to-print";
import { toast } from "react-toastify";
import { useExamCenter } from "@/hooks/useExamCenter";
import { useEcCode } from "@/lib/helper";
import { ReportFooter } from "../misc/footers";

// Type definitions
interface SupervisionItemRaw {
    DATE: string;
    SESSION: string;
    SUPERVISOR_UID: string;
    NAME: string;
    DEPARTMENT: string;
    ROLE: string;
}

interface SupervisionDetailsData {
    NAME: string;
    ROLE: string;
    DEPARTMENT: string;
    SUPERVISION_SCHEDULE: string;
}

// Constants
const ROWS_PER_PAGE = 12;

const PAGE_STYLE: React.CSSProperties = {
    pageBreakAfter: "always",
    width: "210mm",
    height: "297mm",
    margin: "0 auto",
    marginBlockEnd: "8px",
    padding: "15mm 20mm",
    boxSizing: "border-box",
};

export default function SupervisionReport() {
    // State and refs
    const [supervisionData, setSupervisionData] = useState<{ [key: string]: SupervisionDetailsData }>({});
    const [isLoading, setIsLoading] = useState<boolean>(true);
    const [error, setError] = useState<string>("");
    const contentRef = useRef<HTMLDivElement>(null);

    // Print handler
    const handlePrint = useReactToPrint({
        contentRef,
    });
    const ec_code = useEcCode()
    const { getExamCenterInfo, getDepartmentByCode } = useExamCenter(ec_code)
    // Fetch data on mount
    useEffect(() => {
        const fetchData = async () => {
            setIsLoading(true);
            setError("");
            try {
                const response = await fetch("/api/supervisors?action=suporder");
                if (!response.ok) throw new Error(`HTTP error! Status: ${response.status}`);
                const data: SupervisionItemRaw[] = await response.json();

                if (!data.length) {
                    toast.info("No supervision data found.");
                    setSupervisionData({});
                    return;
                }

                // Transform data
                const transformedData = data.reduce((acc: { [key: string]: SupervisionDetailsData }, item) => {
                    const uid = item.SUPERVISOR_UID;

                    if (!acc[uid]) {
                        acc[uid] = {
                            NAME: item.NAME,
                            ROLE: item.ROLE,
                            DEPARTMENT: item.DEPARTMENT,
                            SUPERVISION_SCHEDULE: "",
                        };
                    }

                    const formattedDate = new Date(item.DATE).toLocaleDateString("en-IN", {
                        day: "2-digit",
                        month: "2-digit",
                        year: "numeric",
                    });
                    const scheduleEntry = `${formattedDate} ${item.SESSION.slice(0, 3)}`;

                    acc[uid].SUPERVISION_SCHEDULE = acc[uid].SUPERVISION_SCHEDULE
                        ? `${acc[uid].SUPERVISION_SCHEDULE}, ${scheduleEntry}`
                        : scheduleEntry;

                    return acc;
                }, {});

                setSupervisionData(transformedData);
            } catch (err) {
                console.error("Error fetching supervision data:", err);
                setError("Failed to fetch supervision data. Please try again.");
                toast.error("Failed to fetch supervision data.");
            } finally {
                setIsLoading(false);
            }
        };

        fetchData();
    }, []);

    // Derived data
    const supervisorsArray = Object.entries(supervisionData);
    const totalPages = Math.ceil(supervisorsArray.length / ROWS_PER_PAGE);
    const pages = Array.from({ length: totalPages }, (_, i) =>
        supervisorsArray.slice(i * ROWS_PER_PAGE, (i + 1) * ROWS_PER_PAGE)
    );

    // Export to CSV
    const exportToCsv = () => {
        try {
            const headers = ["Sr. No", "Name", "Role", "Department", "Supervision Assignment"];
            const csvRows = [headers.join(",")];

            supervisorsArray.forEach(([, supervisor], index) => {
                const values = [
                    index + 1,
                    `"${supervisor.NAME}"`,
                    `"${supervisor.ROLE}"`,
                    `"${getDepartmentByCode(supervisor.DEPARTMENT).name}"`,
                    `"${supervisor.SUPERVISION_SCHEDULE}"`,
                ];
                csvRows.push(values.join(","));
            });

            const csvContent = "data:text/csv;charset=utf-8," + csvRows.join("\n");
            const encodedUri = encodeURI(csvContent);
            const link = document.createElement("a");
            link.setAttribute("href", encodedUri);
            link.setAttribute("download", `Supervision_Report_${new Date().toLocaleDateString("en-IN", {
                day: "2-digit",
                month: "2-digit",
                year: "numeric"
            })
                }.csv`);
            document.body.appendChild(link);
            link.click();
            document.body.removeChild(link);

            toast.success("CSV exported successfully");
        } catch (err) {
            console.error("Error exporting CSV:", err);
            toast.error("Failed to export CSV");
        }
    };

    // Render
    return (
        <div className="container mx-auto px-4 py-8">
            {isLoading ? (
                <div className="flex justify-center items-center h-64">
                    <div className="flex flex-col items-center gap-2">
                        <Loader2 className="h-8 w-8 animate-spin text-primary" />
                        <span className="text-lg font-medium">Loading supervision data...</span>
                    </div>
                </div>
            ) : error ? (
                <div className="max-w-md mx-auto p-4 bg-red-50 text-red-700 rounded-lg flex items-center gap-2">
                    <span>Error: {error}</span>
                </div>
            ) : (
                <div className="space-y-6">
                    <Card className="shadow-md">
                        <CardHeader className="flex flex-row items-center justify-between pb-2">
                            <div>
                                <CardTitle className="text-2xl font-bold">Supervision Report</CardTitle>
                                <p className="text-muted-foreground mt-1">
                                    {ec_code} - {getExamCenterInfo().NAME}
                                </p>
                            </div>
                            <div className="flex gap-2">
                                <Button
                                    onClick={exportToCsv}
                                    variant="outline"
                                    size="sm"
                                    className="flex items-center gap-2"
                                >
                                    <Download className="h-4 w-4" />
                                    Export CSV
                                </Button>
                                <Button
                                    onClick={() => handlePrint()}
                                    size="sm"
                                    className="flex items-center gap-2"
                                    disabled={supervisorsArray.length === 0}
                                >
                                    <Printer className="h-4 w-4" />
                                    Print Report
                                </Button>
                            </div>
                        </CardHeader>
                        <CardContent>
                            <div className="mb-4">
                                <Badge variant="outline" className="font-normal">
                                    {supervisorsArray.length} {supervisorsArray.length === 1 ? "Supervisor" : "Supervisors"}
                                </Badge>
                                {totalPages > 1 && (
                                    <Badge variant="outline" className="ml-2 font-normal">
                                        {totalPages} Pages
                                    </Badge>
                                )}
                            </div>

                            {supervisorsArray.length === 0 ? (
                                <div className="bg-muted/30 rounded-lg p-6 text-center">
                                    <p className="text-muted-foreground">No supervision data available.</p>
                                </div>
                            ) : (
                                <div className="overflow-x-auto rounded-lg border">
                                    <Table>
                                        <TableHeader>
                                            <TableRow className="bg-muted/50">
                                                <TableHead className="text-center w-16">Sr. No</TableHead>
                                                <TableHead>Name</TableHead>
                                                <TableHead className="w-32">Role</TableHead>
                                                <TableHead>Department</TableHead>
                                                <TableHead>Supervision Assignment</TableHead>
                                            </TableRow>
                                        </TableHeader>
                                        <TableBody>
                                            {supervisorsArray.map(([, supervisor], index) => (
                                                <TableRow key={index} className="hover:bg-muted/30">
                                                    <TableCell className="text-center font-medium">{index + 1}</TableCell>
                                                    <TableCell>{supervisor.NAME}</TableCell>
                                                    <TableCell>{supervisor.ROLE}</TableCell>
                                                    <TableCell>{getDepartmentByCode(supervisor.DEPARTMENT).name}</TableCell>
                                                    <TableCell className="max-w-md">
                                                        <div className="flex flex-wrap gap-1">
                                                            {supervisor.SUPERVISION_SCHEDULE.split(", ").map((schedule, idx) => (
                                                                <Badge
                                                                    key={idx}
                                                                    variant="outline"
                                                                    className="bg-blue-50 text-blue-700 border-blue-200"
                                                                >
                                                                    {schedule}
                                                                </Badge>
                                                            ))}
                                                        </div>
                                                    </TableCell>
                                                </TableRow>
                                            ))}
                                        </TableBody>
                                    </Table>
                                </div>
                            )}
                        </CardContent>
                    </Card>

                    {/* Printable content */}
                    <div ref={contentRef} className="hidden print:block space-y-8">
                        {pages.map((page, pageIndex) => (
                            <Card key={pageIndex} style={PAGE_STYLE} className="border border-gray-300">
                                <CardContent className="p-0">
                                    <div className="text-center my-6">
                                        <h2 className="text-xl font-bold uppercase tracking-wide">
                                            Supervision Report
                                        </h2>
                                        <p className="text-sm mt-1">
                                            {ec_code} - {getExamCenterInfo().NAME}
                                        </p>
                                        <p className="text-xs mt-1">{getExamCenterInfo().ADDRESS}</p>
                                        {totalPages > 1 && (
                                            <p className="text-sm mt-1">Page {pageIndex + 1} of {totalPages}</p>
                                        )}
                                    </div>

                                    <Separator className="my-4" />

                                    <Table className="h-full">
                                        <TableHeader>
                                            <TableRow className="bg-gray-100">
                                                <TableHead className="text-center py-2 px-2">Sr.</TableHead>
                                                <TableHead className="py-2 px-2">Name</TableHead>
                                                <TableHead className="py-2 px-2">Role</TableHead>
                                                <TableHead className="py-2 px-2">Department</TableHead>
                                                <TableHead className="py-2 px-2">Supervision Assignment</TableHead>
                                            </TableRow>
                                        </TableHeader>
                                        <TableBody>
                                            {page.map(([, supervisor], index) => (
                                                <TableRow key={index} className="border-b border-black/50">
                                                    <TableCell className="text-center py-2 px-2">
                                                        {pageIndex * ROWS_PER_PAGE + index + 1}
                                                    </TableCell>
                                                    <TableCell className="py-2 px-2">{supervisor.NAME}</TableCell>
                                                    <TableCell className="py-2 px-2">{supervisor.ROLE}</TableCell>
                                                    <TableCell className="py-2 px-2">
                                                        {getDepartmentByCode(supervisor.DEPARTMENT).name}
                                                    </TableCell>
                                                    <TableCell className="py-2 px-2">{supervisor.SUPERVISION_SCHEDULE}</TableCell>
                                                </TableRow>
                                            ))}
                                        </TableBody>
                                    </Table>

                                    <ReportFooter alignment="left" />
                                </CardContent>
                                <CardFooter>
                                    <div className="text-right mt-10 w-full">
                                        <p className="font-semibold">Chief Officer In-Charge</p>
                                        <p className="text-sm">{getExamCenterInfo().NAME}</p>
                                        <p className="text-xs">Date: {new Date().toLocaleDateString("en-IN")}</p>
                                    </div>
                                </CardFooter>
                            </Card>
                        ))}
                    </div>
                </div>
            )}
        </div>
    );
}
</modules/extra-reports/offsup.tsx>

<modules/extra-reports/qp-account.tsx>
"use client";

import React, { CSSProperties, useEffect, useState, useRef, useCallback } from 'react';
import { Card, CardHeader, CardContent } from '@/components/ui/card';
import { Label } from '@/components/ui/label';
import { Table, TableBody, TableCell, TableHead, TableHeader, TableRow } from '@/components/ui/table';
import { motion } from 'framer-motion';
import { useExamCenter } from '@/hooks/useExamCenter';
import axios from 'axios';
import { Loader2, RefreshCcw, LucidePrinter, XIcon } from 'lucide-react';
import { Button } from '@/components/ui/button';
import { toast } from 'react-toastify';
import { useEcCode } from '@/lib/helper';
import { useReactToPrint } from 'react-to-print';
import { Input } from '@/components/ui/input';
import { ReportFooter } from '../misc/footers';

const PAGE_STYLE: CSSProperties = {
  width: "210mm",
  height: "297mm",
  margin: "0 auto",
  marginBottom: "8px",
  padding: "10mm 5mm",
  position: "relative",
  backgroundColor: "white",
  boxSizing: "border-box",
  pageBreakAfter: "always",
};

// Define interfaces
interface QPAccountingRecord {
  SCHEME: string;
  SUBJECT_ABBR: string;
  SUBJECT_CODE: string;
  R_TOTAL_QPS: number;
  TOTAL_STUDENTS: number;
  ABSENT_NUMBERS: string | null;
  DATE: string;
  SESSION: string;
}

interface GroupedRecord {
  SCHEMES: string;
  SUBJECT_ABBR: string;
  SUBJECT_CODE: string;
  R_TOTAL_QPS: number;
  TOTAL_STUDENTS: number;
}

interface DataEntry {
  DATE: string;
  RECORDS: GroupedRecord[];
}

const QPAccountingReport = () => {
  const ec_code = useEcCode();
  const { getExamCenterInfo } = useExamCenter(ec_code);
  const [data, setData] = useState<DataEntry[]>([]);
  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(false);
  const contentRef = useRef<HTMLDivElement>(null);
  const [date, setDate] = useState(() => {
    const today = new Date();
    return today.toISOString().split('T')[0];
  });
  const [showReport, setShowReport] = useState(false);

  const fetchData = useCallback(async (selectedDate: string) => {
    setLoading(true);
    try {
      const response = await axios.get(`/api/qp-acc-rep?date=${selectedDate}`);
      if (!response.data || !response.data.length) {
        toast.error("No data available for selected date");
        setData([]);
        return;
      }

      // Group data by SUBJECT_CODE with explicit type for accumulator
      const groupedData = response.data.reduce((acc: { [key: string]: QPAccountingRecord[] }, record: QPAccountingRecord) => {
        const codeKey = record.SUBJECT_CODE;
        if (!acc[codeKey]) {
          acc[codeKey] = [];
        }
        acc[codeKey].push(record);
        return acc;
      }, {});

      // Aggregate data for each subject code
      const aggregatedRecords: GroupedRecord[] = Object.keys(groupedData)
        .map((codeKey: string): GroupedRecord | null => {
          const group = groupedData[codeKey];

          // Skip if group is empty
          if (!group || group.length === 0) {
            return null;
          }

          const schemes = group
            .map((record: QPAccountingRecord) => record.SCHEME)
            .filter(Boolean)
            .join(', ');
          if (!schemes) {
            return null;
          }

          return {
            SCHEMES: schemes,
            SUBJECT_ABBR: group[0].SUBJECT_ABBR || 'Unknown',
            SUBJECT_CODE: codeKey,
            R_TOTAL_QPS: group[0].R_TOTAL_QPS || 0,
            TOTAL_STUDENTS: group.reduce((sum: number, record: QPAccountingRecord) => sum + (record.TOTAL_STUDENTS || 0), 0),
          };
        })
        .filter((record): record is GroupedRecord => record !== null && record.R_TOTAL_QPS > 0);
      // Transform into DataEntry format
      const formattedData: DataEntry = {
        DATE: selectedDate,
        RECORDS: aggregatedRecords,
      };

      setData([formattedData]);
      setShowReport(true);
    } catch (error) {
      console.error('Error fetching QP accounting data:', error);
      toast.error('Failed to fetch data. Please try again.');
      setData([]);
      setShowReport(false);
    } finally {
      setLoading(false);
    }
  }, []);

  useEffect(() => {
    if (showReport) {
      fetchData(date);
    }
  }, [date, fetchData, showReport]);

  const handlePrint = useReactToPrint({
    contentRef,
    documentTitle: "QP_Accounting_Report",
  });

  const handleReset = () => {
    setData([]);
    setDate(new Date().toISOString().split('T')[0]);
    setShowReport(false);
  };

  const handleFetchReport = () => {
    if (!date) {
      toast.error('Please select a date');
      return;
    }
    fetchData(date);
  };

  const MAX_ROWS_PER_PAGE = 20;

  const chunkedData = useCallback((records: GroupedRecord[]) => {
    const chunks: GroupedRecord[][] = [];
    for (let i = 0; i < records.length; i += MAX_ROWS_PER_PAGE) {
      chunks.push(records.slice(i, i + MAX_ROWS_PER_PAGE));
    }
    return chunks;
  }, []);

  if (loading) {
    return (
      <div className="flex justify-center items-center h-screen">
        <Loader2 className="animate-spin size-6 text-blue-500" />
      </div>
    );
  }

  const examCenterInfo = getExamCenterInfo() || {};

  return (
    <div className="flex flex-col gap-8 pb-8">
      {!showReport ? (
        <Card className="w-full max-w-2xl mx-auto">
          <CardHeader>
            <h2 className="text-2xl font-bold text-center">Question Paper Accounting Report</h2>
          </CardHeader>
          <CardContent className="space-y-4">
            <div className="space-y-2">
              <Label htmlFor="date" className="text-sm font-medium">Date</Label>
              <Input
                id="date"
                type="date"
                value={date}
                onChange={(e) => setDate(e.target.value)}
                max={new Date().toISOString().split('T')[0]}
              />
            </div>
            <Button
              onClick={handleFetchReport}
              disabled={loading}
              className="w-full"
            >
              {loading ? 'Loading...' : 'Fetch Report'}
            </Button>
          </CardContent>
        </Card>
      ) : (
        <>
          <div className="flex justify-center gap-4 w-full print:hidden">
            <Button
              onClick={() => handlePrint()}
              size="lg"
              className="w-40 group transition-transform duration-300 hover:scale-105"
            >
              <LucidePrinter className="size-4 mr-2 transition-transform duration-300 group-hover:scale-105" />
              Print Report
            </Button>
            <Button
              variant="ghost"
              size="lg"
              className="w-40"
              disabled={loading}
              onClick={() => fetchData(date)}
            >
              {loading ? (
                <>
                  <Loader2 className="animate-spin size-4 mr-2" /> Refreshing...
                </>
              ) : (
                <>
                  <RefreshCcw className="size-4 mr-2" /> Refresh
                </>
              )}
            </Button>
            <Button
              variant="secondary"
              size="lg"
              className="w-40 flex items-center gap-2 group"
              onClick={handleReset}
            >
              <XIcon className="transition-transform duration-500 group-hover:rotate-180 group-hover:scale-110" />
              <span className="transition-opacity duration-500 group-hover:opacity-80 group-hover:translate-x-1">
                Clear
              </span>
            </Button>
          </div>
          <div ref={contentRef}>
            {data.map((entry, entryIndex) => {
              const pages = chunkedData(entry.RECORDS);

              return pages.map((pageData, pageIndex) => (
                <motion.div
                  key={`${entryIndex}-${pageIndex}`}
                  initial={{ opacity: 0, y: 20 }}
                  animate={{ opacity: 1, y: 0 }}
                  transition={{ duration: 0.5, delay: pageIndex * 0.1 }}
                  className="print:block"
                >
                  <Card
                    className="shadow-xl print:shadow-none rounded-lg overflow-hidden dark:bg-neutral-800 w-full mx-auto my-6 p-4"
                    style={PAGE_STYLE}
                  >
                    <CardHeader className="px-6 border-b-2 border-primary mb-6">
                      <h1 className="text-center text-xl font-bold">
                        {examCenterInfo.NAME || 'Unknown Center'}
                      </h1>
                      <h2 className="text-center text-2xl font-semibold mb-4 border-b-2 border-primary w-fit m-auto">
                        ACCOUNT OF QUESTION PAPERS
                      </h2>
                      <div className="flex justify-center items-center mt-2 text-sm">
                        <p className="font-medium">Date: {new Date(entry.DATE).toLocaleDateString('en-IN')}</p>
                      </div>
                    </CardHeader>

                    <CardContent className="p-6">
                      {pageData.length === 0 ? (
                        <p className="text-center text-sm text-gray-500">
                          No records available with Total Received greater than 0.
                        </p>
                      ) : (
                        <Table className="w-full border-collapse border border-primary">
                          <TableHeader>
                            <TableRow className="bg-neutral-100 dark:bg-neutral-700">
                              <TableHead className="text-center font-bold px-3 py-1 border-b border-r border-primary">Sr. No.</TableHead>
                              <TableHead className="text-center font-bold px-3 py-1 border-b border-r border-primary">Scheme</TableHead>
                              <TableHead className="text-center font-bold px-3 py-1 border-b border-r border-primary">Subject Abbr.</TableHead>
                              <TableHead className="text-center font-bold px-3 py-1 border-b border-r border-primary">Subject Code</TableHead>
                              <TableHead className="text-center font-bold px-3 py-1 border-b border-r border-primary">Total Received</TableHead>
                              <TableHead className="text-center font-bold px-3 py-1 border-b border-r border-primary">Total Students</TableHead>
                              <TableHead className="text-center font-bold px-3 py-1 border-b border-r border-primary">Used for RAC</TableHead>
                              <TableHead className="text-center font-bold px-3 py-1 border-b border-r border-primary">Code Wise Total Used</TableHead>
                              <TableHead className="text-center font-bold px-3 py-1 border-b border-primary">Code Wise Balance</TableHead>
                            </TableRow>
                          </TableHeader>
                          <TableBody>
                            {pageData.map((record, rowIndex) => {
                              const schemesCount = record.SCHEMES.split(', ').length;
                              const usedForRAC = 2 * schemesCount; // 2 per scheme
                              const totalStudents = record.TOTAL_STUDENTS;
                              const codeWiseTotalUsed = usedForRAC + totalStudents;
                              const codeWiseBalance = record.R_TOTAL_QPS - codeWiseTotalUsed;

                              return (
                                <TableRow
                                  key={rowIndex}
                                  className="border-b border-primary transition-colors duration-150"
                                >
                                  <TableCell className="text-center border-r px-3 py-1 border-primary">
                                    {(pageIndex * MAX_ROWS_PER_PAGE) + rowIndex + 1}
                                  </TableCell>
                                  <TableCell className="text-center border-r px-3 py-1 border-primary">
                                    {record.SCHEMES}
                                  </TableCell>
                                  <TableCell className="text-center border-r px-3 py-1 border-primary">
                                    {record.SUBJECT_ABBR.split("-")[0] || record.SUBJECT_ABBR}
                                  </TableCell>
                                  <TableCell className="text-center border-r px-3 py-1 border-primary">
                                    {record.SUBJECT_CODE}
                                  </TableCell>
                                  <TableCell className="text-center border-r px-3 py-1 border-primary">
                                    {record.R_TOTAL_QPS}
                                  </TableCell>
                                  <TableCell className="text-center border-r px-3 py-1 border-primary">
                                    {totalStudents}
                                  </TableCell>
                                  <TableCell className="text-center border-r px-3 py-1 border-primary">
                                    {usedForRAC}
                                  </TableCell>
                                  <TableCell className="text-center border-r px-3 py-1 border-primary">
                                    {codeWiseTotalUsed}
                                  </TableCell>
                                  <TableCell className="text-center px-3 py-1 border-primary">
                                    {codeWiseBalance}
                                  </TableCell>
                                </TableRow>
                              );
                            })}
                          </TableBody>
                        </Table>
                      )}

                      <div className="absolute bottom-20 right-4 flex flex-col items-end gap-1">
                        <p className="text-sm">{examCenterInfo.OFFICER_INCHARGE || 'Unknown Officer'}</p>
                        <p className="text-sm font-semibold">Officer In-Charge</p>
                        <p className="text-sm">Examination Center - {ec_code || 'Unknown'}</p>
                      </div>
                      <ReportFooter/>
                    </CardContent>
                  </Card>
                </motion.div>
              ));
            })}
          </div>
        </>
      )}
    </div>
  );
};

export default React.memo(QPAccountingReport);
</modules/extra-reports/qp-account.tsx>

<modules/misc/footers.tsx>
import { Label } from '@radix-ui/react-dropdown-menu'
import React from 'react'

export const ReportFooter = ({ alignment = 'right' }: { alignment?: 'left' | 'right' }) => {
    return (
        <div className={`absolute bottom-4 ${alignment === 'left' ? 'left-4' : 'right-4'} flex flex-col ${alignment === 'left' ? 'items-start' : 'items-end'} gap-1 opacity-0 print:opacity-100`}>
            <Label className="text-neutral-500 dark:text-neutral-400 text-xs">
                Generated on: {new Date().toLocaleDateString('en-IN')}
            </Label>
            <Label className="text-neutral-500 dark:text-neutral-400 text-xs">
                Printed by TestForge
            </Label>
        </div>
    )
}

</modules/misc/footers.tsx>

<modules/misc/profile.tsx>
"use client";

import { useUser } from "@clerk/nextjs";
import { useState, useEffect } from "react";
import { Card, CardContent, CardHeader, CardTitle } from "@/components/ui/card";
import { Alert, AlertDescription } from "@/components/ui/alert";
import { CheckCircle, Loader2, AlertCircle, Star, User, Mail, Crown, Zap, Shield, Sparkles } from "lucide-react";
import { Label } from "@/components/ui/label";
import PLANS from "@/data/pricing.json";

// Define the UserMetadata interface for Clerk's publicMetadata
interface UserMetadata {
  plan?: string;
  nextPaymentExpiry?: string | null;
}


const SubscriptionProfile = () => {
  const { user, isLoaded } = useUser();
  const [userMetadata, setUserMetadata] = useState<UserMetadata | null>(null);
  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);
  const [error, setError] = useState<string | null>(null);

  useEffect(() => {
    if (isLoaded && user) {
      try {
        setUserMetadata(user.publicMetadata as UserMetadata);
        setLoading(false);
      } catch {
        setError("Failed to load subscription details.");
        setLoading(false);
      }
    } else if (isLoaded && !user) {
      setError("Please log in to view your subscription profile.");
      setLoading(false);
    }
  }, [user, isLoaded]);

  const plan = userMetadata?.plan ? PLANS.find((p) => p.id === userMetadata.plan) : null;
  const isLifetime = userMetadata?.nextPaymentExpiry === null;
  const expiryDate = userMetadata?.nextPaymentExpiry ? new Date(userMetadata.nextPaymentExpiry) : null;

  if (loading) {
    return (
      <div className="min-h-screen  flex items-center justify-center">
