        <div className="flex flex-col items-center gap-4">
          <Loader2 className="h-8 w-8 animate-spin text-accent-foreground" />
          <p className="text-accent-foreground text-sm">Loading your profile...</p>
        </div>
      </div>
    );
  }

  if (error || !user) {
    return (
      <div className="min-h-screen  flex items-center justify-center p-6">
        <Card className="w-full max-w-md border-red-200 bg-red-50">
          <CardContent className="p-6 text-center">
            <AlertCircle className="h-8 w-8 text-red-500 mx-auto mb-4" />
            <h2 className="text-lg font-semibold text-popover-foreground mb-2">
              {error ? "Error" : "Access Required"}
            </h2>
            <p className="text-accent-foreground text-sm">
              {error || "Please log in to view your subscription profile."}
            </p>
          </CardContent>
        </Card>
      </div>
    );
  }

  return (
    <div className="min-h-screen  p-4">
      <div className="max-w-7xl mx-auto">
        {/* Header */}
        <div className="mb-6">
          <div className="flex items-center gap-3 mb-2">
            <div className=" p-2 rounded-lg shadow-md bg-amber-100">
              <Crown className="h-5 w-5 text-amber-500 font-bold" />
            </div>
            <h1 className="text-2xl font-semibold text-popover-foreground">Subscription Profile</h1>
          </div>
          <p className="text-accent-foreground text-sm">Manage your account and subscription details</p>
        </div>

        <div className="grid grid-cols-1 lg:grid-cols-3 gap-6">
          {/* User Information */}
          <Card className="lg:col-span-1 border-primary/30 shadow-sm">
            <CardHeader className="pb-4">
              <CardTitle className="flex items-center gap-2 text-lg text-popover-foreground">
                <User className="h-4 w-4 text-accent-foreground" />
                Account Details
              </CardTitle>
            </CardHeader>
            <CardContent className="space-y-4">
              <div className="space-y-3">
                <div className="p-3  rounded-lg border border-primary/20">
                  <Label className="text-xs font-medium text-accent-foreground uppercase tracking-wide">
                    Full Name
                  </Label>
                  <div className="text-sm font-medium text-popover-foreground mt-1">
                    {user.fullName || "Not provided"}
                  </div>
                </div>

                <div className="p-3  rounded-lg border border-primary/20">
                  <Label className="text-xs font-medium text-accent-foreground uppercase tracking-wide">
                    Email Address
                  </Label>
                  <div className="text-sm font-medium text-popover-foreground mt-1 break-words">
                    {user.primaryEmailAddress?.emailAddress || "Not provided"}
                  </div>
                </div>
              </div>
            </CardContent>
          </Card>

          {/* Subscription Information */}
          <Card className="lg:col-span-2 border-primary/30 shadow-sm">
            <CardHeader className="pb-4">
              <CardTitle className="flex items-center gap-2 text-lg text-popover-foreground">
                <Star className="h-4 w-4 text-accent-foreground" />
                Subscription Status
              </CardTitle>
            </CardHeader>
            <CardContent>
              {plan ? (
                <div className="space-y-4">
                  {/* Plan Overview */}
                  <div className="flex items-center justify-between p-4  rounded-lg border border-primary/20">
                    <div className="flex items-center gap-3">
                      <div className=" p-2 rounded-lg">
                        <Crown className="h-5 w-5 text-yellow-500" />
                      </div>
                      <div>
                        <h4 className="text-lg font-semibold text-popover-foreground">
                          {plan.title}
                        </h4>
                        <p className="text-accent-foreground text-sm">
                          {plan.price} / {plan.period}
                        </p>
                      </div>
                    </div>
                    {isLifetime && (
                      <div className="bg-green-100 text-green-800 px-3 py-1 rounded-full text-xs font-medium">
                        LIFETIME
                      </div>
                    )}
                  </div>

                  {/* Status */}
                  <div className="flex items-center gap-3 p-3 bg-green-50 rounded-lg border border-green-100">
                    <Shield className="h-4 w-4 text-green-600" />
                    <div>
                      <p className="text-md font-medium text-green-900">
                        {isLifetime ? "Lifetime Access Active" : "Subscription Active"}
                      </p>
                      <p className="text-green-700 text-sm">
                        {isLifetime
                          ? "Unlimited access with no expiry"
                          : `Next payment: ${expiryDate?.toLocaleDateString("en-IN", {
                              year: "numeric",
                              month: "long",
                              day: "numeric",
                            })}`}
                      </p>
                    </div>
                  </div>

                  {/* Features Grid */}
                  <div>
                    <h5 className="text-sm font-medium text-popover-foreground mb-3 flex items-center gap-2">
                      <Sparkles className="h-4 w-4 text-accent-foreground" />
                      Plan Features
                    </h5>
                    <div className="grid grid-cols-1 sm:grid-cols-2 gap-2">
                      {plan.features.map((feature, idx) => (
                        <div 
                          key={idx} 
                          className="flex items-center gap-2 p-2 text-sm text-primary  rounded border border-primary/20"
                        >
                          <CheckCircle className="h-3 w-3 text-green-500 flex-shrink-0" />
                          <span className="text-xs">{feature}</span>
                        </div>
                      ))}
                    </div>
                  </div>
                </div>
              ) : (
                <Alert className="bg-amber-50 border-amber-200">
                  <AlertCircle className="h-4 w-4 text-amber-600" />
                  <AlertDescription className="text-amber-800 text-sm">
                    No active subscription found. Upgrade to access premium features.
                  </AlertDescription>
                </Alert>
              )}
            </CardContent>
          </Card>
        </div>

        {/* Additional Info Cards */}
        {plan && (
          <div className="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 gap-4 mt-6">
            <Card className="border-primary/30 shadow-sm ">
              <CardContent className="p-4 text-center">
                <div className="bg-blue-50 p-2 rounded-lg w-fit mx-auto mb-2">
                  <Mail className="h-4 w-4 text-blue-600" />
                </div>
                <p className="text-xs font-medium text-accent-foreground uppercase tracking-wide">Support</p>
                <p className="text-sm text-popover-foreground mt-1">24/7 Premium Support</p>
              </CardContent>
            </Card>

            <Card className="border-primary/30 shadow-sm ">
              <CardContent className="p-4 text-center">
                <div className="bg-purple-50 p-2 rounded-lg w-fit mx-auto mb-2">
                  <Zap className="h-4 w-4 text-purple-600" />
                </div>
                <p className="text-xs font-medium text-accent-foreground uppercase tracking-wide">Performance</p>
                <p className="text-sm text-popover-foreground mt-1">High-Speed Access</p>
              </CardContent>
            </Card>

            <Card className="border-primary/30 shadow-sm ">
              <CardContent className="p-4 text-center">
                <div className="bg-green-50 p-2 rounded-lg w-fit mx-auto mb-2">
                  <Shield className="h-4 w-4 text-green-600" />
                </div>
                <p className="text-xs font-medium text-accent-foreground uppercase tracking-wide">Security</p>
                <p className="text-sm text-popover-foreground mt-1">Advanced Protection</p>
              </CardContent>
            </Card>
          </div>
        )}
      </div>
    </div>
  );
};

export default SubscriptionProfile;
</modules/misc/profile.tsx>

<modules/misc/help-desk.tsx>
"use client";

import React, { useState, useRef, useEffect, useCallback } from "react";
import { Card, CardContent } from "@/components/ui/card";
import { Button } from "@/components/ui/button";
import { Input } from "@/components/ui/input";
import { Send, Mic, X, Paperclip, Info, ClipboardList,  BookOpen, HelpCircle, Sparkles, Settings } from "lucide-react";
import { Avatar } from "@/components/ui/avatar";
import { Badge } from "@/components/ui/badge";
import { Tooltip, TooltipContent, TooltipProvider, TooltipTrigger } from "@/components/ui/tooltip";
import { Tabs, TabsContent, TabsList, TabsTrigger } from "@/components/ui/tabs";
import { Dialog, DialogContent, DialogDescription, DialogHeader, DialogTitle, DialogTrigger } from "@/components/ui/dialog";
import { ScrollArea } from "@/components/ui/scroll-area";
import { Separator } from "@/components/ui/separator";
import Image from "next/image";
import { useSearchParams } from 'next/navigation';

interface Message {
  role: "user" | "assistant";
  content: string;
  timestamp: string;
  suggestions?: { name: string; route: string }[];
}

interface SpeechRecognitionEvent extends Event {
  results: {
    [index: number]: {
      [index: number]: {
        transcript: string;
      };
    };
  };
}

interface SpeechRecognitionErrorEvent extends Event {
  error: string;
}

interface SpeechRecognition {
  continuous: boolean;
  interimResults: boolean;
  onresult: (event: SpeechRecognitionEvent) => void;
  onerror: (event: SpeechRecognitionErrorEvent) => void;
  start: () => void;
  stop: () => void;
}

declare global {
  interface Window {
    SpeechRecognition: new () => SpeechRecognition;
    webkitSpeechRecognition: new () => SpeechRecognition;
  }
}

// Links to documentation sections
const documentationLinks = [
  { title: "User Guide", icon: BookOpen, url: "/docs/guide" },
  { title: "Tutorials", icon: Paperclip, url: "/docs/tutorials" },
  { title: "FAQs", icon: HelpCircle, url: "/docs/faqs" }
];

// Common query suggestions
const commonSuggestions = [
  "How do I create a timetable?",
  "When can I create block allocation?",
  "Where are reports generated?",
  "How to set up exam centers?",
  "How to mark absent students?"
];

export default function TestForgeAssistant() {
  const searchParams = useSearchParams();
  const initialQuery = searchParams.get('q') || '';

  const [messages, setMessages] = useState<Message[]>([{
    role: "assistant",
    content: "Hello! How can I help you with TestForge today? I can assist with creating timetables, managing block allocations, setting up exam centers, or generating reports.Also I can help you with the troubleshooting of the application.",
    timestamp: new Date().toLocaleTimeString([], { hour: '2-digit', minute: '2-digit' }),
    suggestions: [
      { name: "Exam Setup - Timetable Management", route: "/active/configs/timetable" },
      { name: "Block Allocation - Block Assignment", route: "/active/block/allocation" },
      { name: "Reports - Generate Reports", route: "/active/reports/attendance" },
      { name: "Supervision Report", route: "/active/reports/supervision" },
      { name: "Student Management - Absent Students", route: "/active/students/absent" }
    ]
  }]);
  const [input, setInput] = useState(initialQuery);
  const [isLoading, setIsLoading] = useState(false);
  const [isRecording, setIsRecording] = useState(false);
  const [activeTab, setActiveTab] = useState("chat");
  const [showWelcomeTips, setShowWelcomeTips] = useState(true);

  const messagesEndRef = useRef<HTMLDivElement>(null);
  const inputRef = useRef<HTMLInputElement>(null);

  // Voice recognition setup
  const [recognition, setRecognition] = useState<SpeechRecognition | null>(null);

  // Initialize speech recognition
  useEffect(() => {
    if (typeof window !== 'undefined' && ('SpeechRecognition' in window || 'webkitSpeechRecognition' in window)) {
      const SpeechRecognition = window.SpeechRecognition || window.webkitSpeechRecognition;
      const recognitionInstance = new SpeechRecognition();
      recognitionInstance.continuous = false;
      recognitionInstance.interimResults = false;

      recognitionInstance.onresult = (event: SpeechRecognitionEvent) => {
        const transcript = event.results[0][0].transcript;
        setInput(transcript);
        setTimeout(() => inputRef.current?.focus(), 100);
        setIsRecording(false);
      };

      recognitionInstance.onerror = (event: SpeechRecognitionErrorEvent) => {
        console.error('Speech recognition error:', event.error);
        setIsRecording(false);
      };

      setRecognition(recognitionInstance);
    }
  }, []);

  // Auto-scroll to bottom when messages update
  useEffect(() => {
    messagesEndRef.current?.scrollIntoView({ behavior: "smooth" });
  }, [messages]);

  // Handle Enter key for sending messages
  const handleKeyDown = useCallback((e: React.KeyboardEvent) => {
    if (e.key === "Enter" && !e.shiftKey) {
      e.preventDefault();
      handleSend();
    }
  }, [input]);

  const handleSend = async () => {
    if (!input.trim()) return;

    const userMessage: Message = {
      role: "user",
      content: input,
      timestamp: new Date().toLocaleTimeString([], { hour: '2-digit', minute: '2-digit' })
    };

    setMessages((prev) => [...prev, userMessage]);
    setInput("");
    setIsLoading(true);

    try {
      const response = await fetch("/api/send-message", {
        method: "POST",
        headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" },
        body: JSON.stringify({ message: input }),
      });

      if (!response.ok) {
        throw new Error(`Failed to fetch response: ${response.statusText}`);
      }

      const data = await response.json();
   
      // Updated destructuring to match the API response key 'response' instead of 'reply'
      const { response: reply, suggestions } = data;
      if (!reply) {
        throw new Error("No response received from API");
      }

      const assistantMessage: Message = {
        role: "assistant",
        content: reply,
        timestamp: new Date().toLocaleTimeString([], { hour: '2-digit', minute: '2-digit' }),
        suggestions: suggestions || []
      };

      setMessages((prev) => [...prev, assistantMessage]);
    } catch (error) {
      console.error("Error sending message:", error);
      setMessages((prev) => [
        ...prev,
        {
          role: "assistant",
          content: "Sorry, I couldn't process your request. Let's try a different approach. You can create block allocations by navigating to the Block Allocation module. Would you like to know more about that?",
          timestamp: new Date().toLocaleTimeString([], { hour: '2-digit', minute: '2-digit' }),
          suggestions: [
            { name: "Block Allocation - Block Allocation", route: "/active/block/allocation" },
            { name: "Reports - Datewise Block Allocation", route: "/active/reports/attendance" },
            { name: "Block Allocation - Supervision Order", route: "/active/block/suporder" }
          ]
        },
      ]);
    } finally {
      setIsLoading(false);
    }
  };

  const handleVoiceInput = () => {
    if (!recognition) {
      alert('Speech recognition is not supported in your browser');
      return;
    }

    if (isRecording) {
      recognition.stop();
      setIsRecording(false);
    } else {
      recognition.start();
      setIsRecording(true);
    }
  };

  const handleSuggestionClick = (suggestion: string) => {
    setInput(suggestion);
    inputRef.current?.focus();
  };

  const clearChat = () => {
    setMessages([{
      role: "assistant",
      content: "Chat cleared. How can I help you with TestForge today?",
      timestamp: new Date().toLocaleTimeString([], { hour: '2-digit', minute: '2-digit' })
    }]);
  };

  return (
    <div className="max-w-4xl mx-auto p-4 flex flex-col h-screen">
      {/* Header */}
      <div className="flex justify-between items-center mb-4 bg-neutral-900 text-neutral-50 p-4 rounded-lg shadow-md">
        <div className="flex items-center gap-3">
          <div className="bg-neutral-50 p-2 rounded-full">
            <ClipboardList className="h-6 w-6 text-neutral-900" />
          </div>
          <h1 className="text-2xl font-bold">TestForge Help Assistant</h1>
        </div>
        <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
          <Dialog>
            <DialogTrigger asChild>
              <Button variant="outline" size="sm" className="bg-neutral-800 text-neutral-50 border-neutral-700 hover:bg-neutral-700">
                <Settings className="h-4 w-4 mr-1" /> Settings
              </Button>
            </DialogTrigger>
            <DialogContent>
              <DialogHeader>
                <DialogTitle>Assistant Settings</DialogTitle>
                <DialogDescription>Configure your TestForge Help Assistant preferences</DialogDescription>
              </DialogHeader>
              <div className="space-y-4 py-4">
                <div className="flex items-center justify-between">
                  <p className="text-sm font-medium">Show welcome tips</p>
                  <Button variant="outline" size="sm" onClick={() => setShowWelcomeTips(!showWelcomeTips)}>
                    {showWelcomeTips ? "Disable" : "Enable"}
                  </Button>
                </div>
                <Separator />
                <div className="flex items-center justify-between">
                  <p className="text-sm font-medium">Voice recognition</p>
                  <Button variant="outline" size="sm">Enable</Button>
                </div>
                <Separator />
                <div className="flex items-center justify-between">
                  <p className="text-sm font-medium">Auto-save conversations</p>
                  <Button variant="outline" size="sm">Disable</Button>
                </div>
              </div>
            </DialogContent>
          </Dialog>
          <Badge variant="outline" className="bg-neutral-800 text-neutral-50 border-neutral-700">
            v1.0.3
          </Badge>
        </div>
      </div>

      {/* Main content */}
      <Tabs value={activeTab} onValueChange={setActiveTab} className="flex-1 flex flex-col">
        <div className="flex justify-between items-center mb-2">
          <TabsList className="bg-neutral-100">
            <TabsTrigger value="chat" className="data-[state=active]:bg-neutral-900 data-[state=active]:text-neutral-50">
              <div className="flex items-center">
                <Sparkles className="h-4 w-4 mr-1" /> Chat
              </div>
            </TabsTrigger>
            <TabsTrigger value="docs" className="data-[state=active]:bg-neutral-900 data-[state=active]:text-neutral-50">
              <div className="flex items-center">
                <BookOpen className="h-4 w-4 mr-1" /> Documentation
              </div>
            </TabsTrigger>
          </TabsList>
          <div className="flex gap-2">
            <Button variant="ghost" size="sm" onClick={clearChat} className="text-neutral-600 hover:text-neutral-900">
              <X className="h-4 w-4 mr-1" /> Clear
            </Button>
          </div>
        </div>

        {/* Chat Tab */}
        <TabsContent value="chat" className="flex-1 flex flex-col space-y-4">
          <Card className="flex-1 overflow-hidden shadow-lg border-neutral-200">
            <CardContent className="p-4 h-full">
              <ScrollArea className="h-full pr-2 pb-2">
                {showWelcomeTips && messages.length === 1 && (
                  <div className="mb-4 bg-blue-50 p-4 rounded-lg border border-blue-200">
                    <h3 className="font-medium text-blue-800 mb-2 flex items-center">
                      <Info className="h-4 w-4 mr-1" /> Welcome to TestForge Assistant
                    </h3>
                    <p className="text-sm text-blue-700 mb-2">I can help you with:</p>
                    <ul className="text-sm text-blue-700 list-disc pl-5 space-y-1">
                      <li>Finding information about TestForge features</li>
                      <li>Troubleshooting common issues</li>
                      <li>Guiding you to the right pages for specific tasks</li>
                      <li>Explaining MSBTE exam procedures</li>
                    </ul>
                    <Button variant="outline" size="sm" className="mt-2 text-blue-700 border-blue-200 hover:bg-blue-100"
                      onClick={() => setShowWelcomeTips(false)}>
                      Got it
                    </Button>
                  </div>
                )}

                {messages.length === 0 ? (
                  <div className="flex flex-col items-center justify-center h-full text-neutral-500">
                    <Sparkles className="h-12 w-12 mb-2 text-neutral-300" />
                    <p>No messages yet. Start by asking a question!</p>
                  </div>
                ) : (
                  messages.map((message, index) => (
                    <div key={index} className="mb-4">
                      <div className={`flex ${message.role === "user" ? "justify-end" : "justify-start"}`}>
                        {message.role === "assistant" && (
                          <Avatar className="h-8 w-8 mr-2 bg-neutral-900 flex items-center justify-center text-neutral-50">
                            TF
                          </Avatar>
                        )}
                        <div className="max-w-[75%]">
                          <div className={`p-4 rounded-lg ${message.role === "user"
                            ? "bg-neutral-900 text-neutral-50"
                            : "bg-neutral-100 text-neutral-900 border border-neutral-200"
                            }`}>
                            <p className="whitespace-pre-wrap">{message.content}</p>
                          </div>
                          <div className={`text-xs mt-1 text-neutral-500 ${message.role === "user" ? "text-right" : "text-left"}`}>
                            {message.timestamp}
                          </div>
                        </div>
                        {message.role === "user" && (
                          <Avatar className="h-8 w-8 ml-2 bg-neutral-300 flex items-center justify-center">
                            <Image src="/logo.svg" alt="User" width={32} height={32} />
                          </Avatar>
                        )}
                      </div>

                      {/* Display navigation suggestions if provided */}
                      {message.role === "assistant" && message.suggestions && message.suggestions.length > 0 && (
                        <div className="ml-10 mt-2 flex flex-wrap gap-2">
                          {message.suggestions.map((suggestion, idx) => (
                            <Button key={idx} size="sm" variant="outline" className="text-xs text-blue-700 bg-blue-50 border-blue-200 hover:bg-blue-100"
                              onClick={() => window.location.href = `/active${suggestion.route}`}>
                              {suggestion.name}
                            </Button>
                          ))}
                        </div>
                      )}
                    </div>
                  ))
                )}

                {isLoading && (
                  <div className="flex items-center ml-10 mb-4">
                    <Avatar className="h-8 w-8 mr-2 bg-neutral-900 flex items-center justify-center text-neutral-50">
                      TF
                    </Avatar>
                    <div className="bg-neutral-100 text-neutral-900 border border-neutral-200 p-4 rounded-lg flex items-center">
                      <div className="flex space-x-1">
                        <div className="h-2 w-2 bg-neutral-600 rounded-full animate-bounce"></div>
                        <div className="h-2 w-2 bg-neutral-600 rounded-full animate-bounce" style={{ animationDelay: "0.2s" }}></div>
                        <div className="h-2 w-2 bg-neutral-600 rounded-full animate-bounce" style={{ animationDelay: "0.4s" }}></div>
                      </div>
                    </div>
                  </div>
                )}
                <div ref={messagesEndRef} />
              </ScrollArea>
            </CardContent>
          </Card>

          {/* Suggestions */}
          {messages.length < 3 && (
            <div className="flex flex-wrap gap-2 mb-2">
              {commonSuggestions.map((suggestion, index) => (
                <Button
                  key={index}
                  variant="outline"
                  size="sm"
                  className="text-sm text-neutral-700 bg-neutral-50 hover:bg-neutral-100 border-neutral-300"
                  onClick={() => handleSuggestionClick(suggestion)}
                >
                  {suggestion}
                </Button>
              ))}
            </div>
          )}

          {/* Input area */}
          <div className="flex gap-2 items-center">
            <div className="relative flex-1">
              <Input
                autoFocus
                ref={inputRef}
                value={input}
                onChange={(e) => setInput(e.target.value)}
                placeholder="Ask about TestForge..."
                onKeyDown={handleKeyDown}
                className="pr-10 focus-visible:ring-neutral-500 border-neutral-300"
              />
              {input && (
                <Button
                  variant="ghost"
                  size="icon"
                  className="absolute right-0 top-0 h-full"
                  onClick={() => setInput("")}
                >
                  <X className="h-4 w-4 text-neutral-400" />
                </Button>
              )}
            </div>
            <TooltipProvider>
              <Tooltip>
                <TooltipTrigger asChild>
                  <Button
                    variant="outline"
                    size="icon"
                    className={`rounded-full shrink-0 ${isRecording ? 'bg-red-100 text-red-500 animate-pulse border-red-300' : ''}`}
                    onClick={handleVoiceInput}
                  >
                    <Mic className="h-5 w-5" />
                  </Button>
                </TooltipTrigger>
                <TooltipContent>
                  <p>Voice Input</p>
                </TooltipContent>
              </Tooltip>
            </TooltipProvider>
            <Button
              onClick={handleSend}
              disabled={isLoading || !input.trim()}
              className="bg-neutral-900 hover:bg-neutral-800 text-neutral-50"
            >
              <Send className="h-5 w-5 mr-1" /> Send
            </Button>
          </div>
        </TabsContent>


        {/* Documentation Tab */}
        <TabsContent value="docs" className="flex-1">
          <Card className="flex-1 h-full">
            <CardContent className="p-4 h-full overflow-auto">
              <div className="p-4 text-center flex flex-col items-center justify-center h-full text-neutral-600">
                <Info className="h-12 w-12 mb-2 text-neutral-900" />
                <h3 className="text-lg font-medium mb-2">TestForge Documentation</h3>
                <p>Access comprehensive guides,  and tutorials.</p>
                <div className="grid grid-cols-2 gap-4 mt-6 max-w-md">
                  {documentationLinks.map((link, index) => (
                    <Button
                      key={index}
                      variant="outline"
                      className="flex flex-col p-6 h-auto items-center border-neutral-300 hover:bg-neutral-50"
                      onClick={() => window.location.href = link.url}
                    >
                      <link.icon className="h-8 w-8 mb-2 text-neutral-900" />
                      <span>{link.title}</span>
                    </Button>
                  ))}
                </div>

                <div className="mt-8 w-full max-w-md">
                  <h4 className="text-left font-medium mb-3">Popular Topics</h4>
                  <div className="space-y-2">
                    {[
                      "Setting up exam centers",
                      "Creating timetables",
                      "Managing block allocation",
                      "Generating reports",
                      "Tracking absent students"
                    ].map((topic, index) => (
                      <div key={index} className="flex items-center p-2 hover:bg-neutral-50 rounded-lg cursor-pointer">
                        <BookOpen className="h-4 w-4 mr-2 text-neutral-500" />
                        <span className="text-sm">{topic}</span>
                      </div>
                    ))}
                  </div>
                </div>
              </div>
            </CardContent>
          </Card>
        </TabsContent>
      </Tabs>
    </div>
  );
}
</modules/misc/help-desk.tsx>

<modules/misc/qp-accounting.tsx>
import React, { useState } from 'react';
import { Button } from '@/components/ui/button';
import { Card, CardContent, CardHeader } from '@/components/ui/card';
import { Input } from '@/components/ui/input';
import { toast } from 'react-toastify';
import 'react-toastify/dist/ReactToastify.css';
import ConfirmationDialog from '@/components/misc/DialogBox';
import { Table, TableBody, TableCell, TableHead, TableHeader, TableRow } from "@/components/ui/table";

interface InventoryRecord {
  SESSION: string;
  E_SUB_CODE: string;
  E_TOTAL_STUDENT: number;
  E_TOTAL_PACKETS: number;
  R_SUB_CODE: string;
  R_TOTAL_STUDENT: number;
  R_TOTAL_PACKETS: number;
  QP_PER_PACKET: number;
}

const QPAccounting = () => {
  const [date, setDate] = useState(new Date().toISOString().split('T')[0]);
  const [error, setError] = useState<string | null>(null);
  const [isLoading, setIsLoading] = useState(false);
  const [inventory, setInventory] = useState<InventoryRecord[]>([]);
  const [showReport, setShowReport] = useState(false);
  const [showConfirmation, setShowConfirmation] = useState(false);
  const [confirmationMessage, setConfirmationMessage] = useState('');

  const fetchInventory = async () => {
    setIsLoading(true);
    setError(null);

    try {
      const response = await fetch(`/api/qp-acc?date=${date}`);
      if (!response.ok) {
        throw new Error('Failed to fetch inventory');
      }
      const data = await response.json();
      const updatedData = data.map((record: InventoryRecord) => ({
        ...record,
        QP_PER_PACKET: (record.R_TOTAL_PACKETS || 0) * 50,
      }));
      setInventory(updatedData);
      setShowReport(data.length > 0);
      toast.success('Inventory fetched successfully!');
    } catch (err) {
      setError(err instanceof Error ? err.message : 'An error occurred');
      toast.error('Failed to fetch inventory');
    } finally {
      setIsLoading(false);
    }
  };

  const handleReceivedChange = (index: number, field: keyof InventoryRecord, value: string) => {
    const updatedInventory = [...inventory];
    const numericValue = value === '' ? 0 : Number(value);

    updatedInventory[index] = {
      ...updatedInventory[index],
      [field]: numericValue,
    };

    if (field === 'R_TOTAL_PACKETS') {
      updatedInventory[index].QP_PER_PACKET = numericValue * 50;
    }

    setInventory(updatedInventory);
  };

  const handleQPPerPacketChange = (index: number, value: string) => {
    const updatedInventory = [...inventory];
    updatedInventory[index] = {
      ...updatedInventory[index],
      QP_PER_PACKET: value === '' ? 0 : Number(value),
    };
    setInventory(updatedInventory);
  };

  const submitReceivedData = async () => {
    setIsLoading(true);
    setError(null);

    try {
      const response = await fetch(`/api/qp-acc?date=${date}`, {
        method: 'PUT',
        headers: {
          'Content-Type': 'application/json',
        },
        body: JSON.stringify(inventory),
      });
      if (!response.ok) {
        throw new Error('Failed to update received data');
      }
      toast.success('Received data updated successfully!');
    } catch (err) {
      setError(err instanceof Error ? err.message : 'An error occurred');
      toast.error('Failed to update received data');
    } finally {
      setIsLoading(false);
      setShowConfirmation(false);
    }
  };

  const handleSubmitConfirmation = () => {
    const mismatchedRecords = inventory.filter(
      (record) => record.R_TOTAL_PACKETS !== record.E_TOTAL_PACKETS
    );

    if (mismatchedRecords.length > 0) {
      const mismatchedSubjects = mismatchedRecords
        .map((record) => record.E_SUB_CODE)
        .join(', ');

      setConfirmationMessage(
        `The received packets do not match the expected packets for the following subjects: ${mismatchedSubjects}. Are you sure you want to proceed?`
      );
    } else {
      setConfirmationMessage('Everything looks good. Are you sure you want to submit the received data?');
    }

    setShowConfirmation(true);
  };

  return (
    <div className="max-w-4xl mx-auto p-4">
      <Card className="mb-6">
        <CardHeader>
          <h2 className="text-2xl font-bold text-center">QP Accounting</h2>
        </CardHeader>
        <CardContent className="space-y-4">
          <div className="space-y-2">
            <label className="text-sm font-medium">Date</label>
            <Input type="date" value={date} onChange={(e) => setDate(e.target.value)} />
          </div>

          <Button onClick={fetchInventory} disabled={isLoading} className="w-full">
            {isLoading ? 'Loading...' : 'Fetch QP Accounting'}
          </Button>
          {error && <div className="text-destructive">{error}</div>}
        </CardContent>
      </Card>

      {showReport && (
        <Card>
          <CardHeader>
            <h3 className="text-xl font-semibold">Inventory Records</h3>
            <div className='flex justify-center items-center'>
              <div className='ml-10 mr-1 bg-muted h-4 w-4 border border-primary/70' />
              Morning
              <div className='ml-10 mr-1 bg-background h-4 w-4 border border-primary/70' />
              Afternoon
            </div>
          </CardHeader>
          <CardContent>
            <Table>
              <TableHeader>
                <TableRow>
                  <TableHead>Subject Code</TableHead>
                  <TableHead>Expected Students</TableHead>
                  <TableHead>Expected Packets</TableHead>
                  <TableHead>Received Packets</TableHead>
                  <TableHead>QP Per Packet</TableHead>
                </TableRow>
              </TableHeader>
              <TableBody>
                {inventory.map((record, index) => (
                  <TableRow key={index} className={record.SESSION !== 'Afternoon' ? 'bg-muted' : ''}>
                    <TableCell>{record.E_SUB_CODE}</TableCell>
                    <TableCell>{record.E_TOTAL_STUDENT}</TableCell>
                    <TableCell>{record.E_TOTAL_PACKETS}</TableCell>
                    <TableCell>
                      <Input
                        type="number"
                        min={0}
                        value={record.R_TOTAL_PACKETS || 0}
                        onChange={(e) => handleReceivedChange(index, 'R_TOTAL_PACKETS', e.target.value)}
                      />
                    </TableCell>
                    <TableCell>
                      <Input
                        type="number"
                        value={record.QP_PER_PACKET || 0}
                        onChange={(e) => handleQPPerPacketChange(index, e.target.value)}
                      />
                    </TableCell>
                  </TableRow>
                ))}
              </TableBody>
            </Table>
            <Button onClick={handleSubmitConfirmation} disabled={isLoading} className="mt-4 w-full">
              {isLoading ? 'Submitting...' : 'Submit Received Data'}
            </Button>
          </CardContent>
        </Card>
      )}

      {showConfirmation && (
        <ConfirmationDialog
          type="info"
          message={confirmationMessage}
          onConfirm={submitReceivedData}
          onCancel={() => setShowConfirmation(false)}
          confirmButtonText="Submit"
          cancelButtonText="Cancel"
        />
      )}
    </div>
  );
};

export default QPAccounting;
</modules/misc/qp-accounting.tsx>

<modules/reports/absent.tsx>
'use client';

import React, { CSSProperties, useRef, useState } from "react";
import { useReactToPrint } from "react-to-print";
import { Button } from "@/components/ui/button";
import { Card, CardHeader, CardContent } from "@/components/ui/card";
import { LucidePrinter, XIcon } from 'lucide-react';
import { Input } from "@/components/ui/input";
import { Select, SelectContent, SelectItem, SelectTrigger, SelectValue } from "@/components/ui/select";
import { useExamCenter } from "@/hooks/useExamCenter";
import axios from "axios";
import { useEcCode } from "@/lib/helper";
import Image from "next/image";
import { toast } from "react-toastify";

interface AttendanceReport {
    institute_id: string;
    blockno: string;
    location: string;
    scheme: string;
    subject_name: string;
    subject_code: string;
    total_students: number;
    seatNumbers: number[];
    absent_numbers: number[];
}

const PAGE_STYLE: CSSProperties = {
    pageBreakAfter: "always",
    width: "210mm",
    height: "297mm",
    margin: "0 auto",
    marginBlockEnd: "8px",
};

const AttendanceReportComponent = ({ reports, toggleReport }: { reports: AttendanceReport[]; toggleReport: () => void }) => {
    const contentRef = useRef<HTMLDivElement>(null);
    const ec_code = useEcCode()
    const { getExamCenterInfo, getConnectedInstituteNameByCode, getDepartmentByCode, getExamSeason, getExamYear } = useExamCenter(ec_code);

    const handlePrint = useReactToPrint({
        contentRef,
    });

    const toOrdinalWord = (n: number): string => ["", "First", "Second", "Third", "Fourth", "Fifth", "Sixth"][n] || n.toString();

    return (
        <div className="p-6 min-h-screen">
            <div className="max-w-7xl mx-auto">
                <div className="flex justify-between mb-6">
                    <Button type="reset" variant="secondary" onClick={toggleReport} className="mb-6 flex items-center gap-2 group">
                        <XIcon className="transition-transform duration-500 group-hover:rotate-180 hover:font-bold group-hover:scale-110" />
                        <span className="transition-opacity duration-500 group-hover:opacity-80 group-hover:translate-x-1">Clear Print</span>
                    </Button>
                    <Button onClick={() => handlePrint()} className="mb-6 group transition-transform duration-300 hover:scale-105">
                        <LucidePrinter className="transition-transform duration-300 group-hover:scale-105" /> Print Report
                    </Button>
                </div>
                <div ref={contentRef}>
                    {reports.map((report, index) => (
                        report.total_students !== 0 && (
                            <div key={index} style={PAGE_STYLE} className="border border-primary px-8 py-6 times">
                                {/* Header Section */}
                                <div className="header text-center mb-6">
                                    <div className="title font-bold text-lg mt-2 flex ">
                                        <Image width={100} height={100} src={"/msbte.jpg"} alt="MSBTE logo" className="h-12 w-12 mr-2" />
                                        MAHARASHTRA STATE BOARD OF TECHNICAL EDUCATION, MUMBAI.
                                    </div>
                                    <div>Examination: {getExamSeason()}-{getExamYear()} THEORY</div>
                                    <div className="flex justify-center mt-2">
                                        <div className="font-bold text-xl">ATTENDANCE REPORT &ldquo;A&rdquo;</div>
                                    </div>
                                </div>

                                {/* Details Section */}
                                <div className="details mb-6 space-y-2">
                                    <p><strong>Exam.Cent.Code/Name:</strong> ({report.institute_id})-{getConnectedInstituteNameByCode(report.institute_id)}</p>
                                    <p><strong>Institute Code/Name:</strong> ({ec_code}) - {getExamCenterInfo().NAME}</p>
                                    <div className="details mb-6 flex flex-wrap justify-between">

                                        <p className="w-[48%]"><strong>Course Name:</strong> {getDepartmentByCode(report.scheme.split("-")[0]).name}</p>
                                        <p className="w-[48%]"><strong>Course Code:</strong> {report.scheme}</p>
                                        <p className="w-[48%]"><strong>Semester:</strong> {toOrdinalWord(parseInt(report.scheme.split("-")[1]))}</p>
                                        <p className="w-[48%]"><strong>Master Code:</strong> {report.scheme.split("-")[2]}</p>
                                        <p className="w-[48%]"><strong>Name of Subject:</strong> {report.subject_name}</p>
                                        <p className="w-[48%]"><strong>Sub.Code:</strong> {report.subject_code}</p>
                                        <p className="w-[48%]"><strong>Date:</strong> {new Date().toLocaleDateString('en-IN')}</p>
                                        <p className="w-[48%]"><strong>Time:</strong> 02:00 PM - 05:00 PM</p>
                                    </div>
                                </div>

                                {/* Table Section */}
                                <table className="w-full border-collapse border border-primary mb-6">
                                    <thead>
                                        <tr>
                                            <th className="border border-primary p-2">Total Seat Nos. On Computerised Mark-Sheet</th>
                                            <th colSpan={2} className="border border-primary p-2">Additional Candidates allowed by the Institute</th>
                                            <th colSpan={2} className="border border-primary p-2">Candidates Absent (as per Computerised Seat Nos. And Additional Seat Nos.)</th>
                                            <th className="border border-primary p-2">Total Number of Candidate Present</th>
                                        </tr>
                                    </thead>
                                    <tbody>
                                        <tr className="text-center">
                                            <td className="border border-primary p-2 text-justify">(1)<br />{report.total_students}</td>
                                            <td className="border border-primary p-2 text-justify">(2)<br /><strong>Seat Numbers</strong><br />Nil</td>
                                            <td className="border border-primary p-2 text-justify">(3)<br /><strong>Total No. of Candidate</strong><br />0</td>
                                            <td className="border border-primary p-2 text-justify">(4)<br /><strong>Seat Nos. of Absent Candidate</strong><br />{report.absent_numbers.length > 0 ? report.absent_numbers.join(", ") : "Nil"}</td>
                                            <td className="border border-primary p-2 text-justify">(5)<br /><strong>Total Nos. of Candidate Absent</strong><br />{report.absent_numbers.length}</td>
                                            <td className="border border-primary p-2 text-justify">(6)<br />{report.total_students - report.absent_numbers.length}</td>
                                        </tr>
                                    </tbody>
                                </table>

                                {/* Signatures Section */}
                                <div className="signatures flex justify-between mb-4 mt-16">
                                    <div>
                                        <strong>({getExamCenterInfo().SEALING_SUPERVISOR})</strong><br />
                                        Signature of Sealing Supervisor
                                    </div>
                                    <div>
                                        <strong>({getExamCenterInfo().OFFICER_INCHARGE})</strong><br />
                                        Signature of Officer In-Charge
                                    </div>
                                </div>

                                {/* Notes Section */}
                                <div className="notes">
                                    <p><strong>Notes:</strong></p>
                                    <p>1) This report is to be prepared in duplicate.</p>
                                    <p>2) One Copy should be attached with answer books bundle.</p>
                                    <p>3) One copy should be retained at the institute.</p>
                                    <p>4) Total of column 1 & 3 should be equal to total of column 5 & 6.</p>
                                    <p>5) Figure in column 6 must tally with the total No. of answer books in the bundle.</p>
                                </div>
                            </div>
                        )
                    ))}
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>
    );
};

export default function AttendanceReportPage() {
    const [reports, setReports] = useState<AttendanceReport[]>([]);
    const [isLoading, setIsLoading] = useState<boolean>(false);
    const [error, setError] = useState<string | null>(null);
    const [date, setDate] = useState<string>(new Date().toISOString().split('T')[0]);
    const [session, setSession] = useState<string>("");
    const [showReport, setShowReport] = useState(false);
    const toggleReport = () => setShowReport(!showReport);

    const fetchData = async () => {
        if (!session || !date) { toast.warn("Select session and date"); return; }
        setIsLoading(true);

        try {
            const response = await axios.get(`/api/absent?date=${date}&session=${session}&institute_id=1740`);
            const adaptedData = response.data.map((report: AttendanceReport) => ({
                institute_id: report.institute_id,
                blockno: report.blockno,
                location: report.location,
                scheme: report.scheme,
                subject_name: report.subject_name,
                subject_code: report.subject_code,
                total_students: report.total_students,
                seatNumbers: report.seatNumbers,
                absent_numbers: report.absent_numbers || [],
            }));
            setReports(adaptedData);
            toggleReport();
        } catch (error) {
            const msg = axios.isAxiosError(error) ? error.response?.data?.error : "Something went wrong";
            setError(msg);
        } finally {
            setIsLoading(false);
        }
    };

    return (
        <div className="p-6 min-h-screen">
            <div className="max-w-7xl mx-auto">
                {!showReport && (
                    <Card className="max-w-md mx-auto mb-6">
                        <CardHeader>
                            <h2 className="text-2xl font-bold text-center">Date & Session Wise Absent Report</h2>
                        </CardHeader>
                        <CardContent className="space-y-4">
                            <Input type="date" value={date} onChange={(e) => setDate(e.target.value)} />
                            <Select value={session} onValueChange={setSession}>
                                <SelectTrigger><SelectValue placeholder="Select session" /></SelectTrigger>
                                <SelectContent>
                                    <SelectItem value="Morning">Morning</SelectItem>
                                    <SelectItem value="Afternoon">Afternoon</SelectItem>
                                </SelectContent>
                            </Select>
                            <Button onClick={fetchData} className="w-full" disabled={isLoading}>{isLoading ? "Loading..." : "Fetch Data"}</Button>
                            {error && <div className="text-red-500">{error}</div>}
                        </CardContent>
                    </Card>
                )}

                {reports.length > 0 && showReport && <AttendanceReportComponent reports={reports} toggleReport={toggleReport} />}
            </div>
        </div>
    );
}
</modules/reports/absent.tsx>

<modules/reports/qpaccount.tsx>
import React from 'react'

const QPAccount = () => {
  return (
    <div>QPAccount</div>
  )
}

export default QPAccount
</modules/reports/qpaccount.tsx>

<modules/reports/supervision.tsx>
import React, { CSSProperties, useEffect, useState, useRef, useCallback } from 'react';
import { Card, CardHeader, CardContent } from '@/components/ui/card';
import { Label } from '@/components/ui/label';
import { Table, TableBody, TableCell, TableHead, TableHeader, TableRow } from '@/components/ui/table';
import { motion } from 'framer-motion';
import { useExamCenter } from '@/hooks/useExamCenter';
import axios from 'axios';
import { Loader2, RefreshCcw, LucidePrinter, XIcon } from 'lucide-react';
import { Button } from '@/components/ui/button';
import { toast } from 'react-toastify';
import { useEcCode } from '@/lib/helper';
import { useReactToPrint } from 'react-to-print';
import { Input } from '@/components/ui/input';
import { ReportFooter } from '../misc/footers';

const PAGE_STYLE: CSSProperties = {
    width: "210mm",
    height: "297mm",
    margin: "0 auto",
    marginBottom: "8px",
    padding: "10mm 5mm",
    position: "relative",
    backgroundColor: "white",
    boxSizing: "border-box",
    pageBreakAfter: "always",
};

interface Scheme {
    SCHEME: string;
    SUBJECT_CODE: string;
    SUBJECT_NAME: string;
    INST_CODE: string;
    TOTAL_STUDENTS: number;
    TIMESLOT: string;
}

interface SupervisionRecord {
    BLOCKNO: string;
    LOCATION: string;
    SUPERVISOR_NAME: string;
    SUPERVISOR_UID: string;
    SCHEMES: Scheme[];
}

interface DataEntry {
    DATE: string;
    SESSION: string;
    SUPERVISION_RECORDS: SupervisionRecord[];
}

interface FlattenedRow {
    BLOCKNO: string;
    LOCATION: string;
    SUPERVISOR_NAME: string;
    INST_CODE: string;
    SCHEME: string;
    SUBJECT_CODE: string;
    SUBJECT_NAME: string;
    TOTAL_STUDENTS: number;
    isFirstInGroup: boolean;
    groupSize: number;
}

const DataDisplay = () => {
    const [data, setData] = useState<DataEntry[]>([]);
    const ec_code = useEcCode();
    const { getExamSeason, getExamYear, getExamCenterInfo } = useExamCenter(ec_code);
    const [loading, setLoading] = useState(false);
    const contentRef = useRef<HTMLDivElement>(null);
    const [date, setDate] = useState(() => {
        const today = new Date();
        return today.toISOString().split('T')[0];
    });
    const [session, setSession] = useState(''); // Changed from `time` to `session`
    const [showReport, setShowReport] = useState(false);

    const fetchData = useCallback(async (selectedDate: string, selectedSession: string) => {
        setLoading(true);
        try {
            const response = await axios.get(`/api/supervision?date=${selectedDate}&session=${selectedSession}`);
            if (!response.data.length) {
                toast.error("No data available for selected date and session");
                setData([]);
                return;
            }
            setData(response.data);
            setShowReport(true);
        } catch (error) {
            console.error('Error fetching data:', error);
            toast.error('Failed to fetch data. Please try again.');
            setData([]);
            setShowReport(false);
        } finally {
            setLoading(false);
        }
    }, []);

    useEffect(() => {
        if (showReport) {
            fetchData(date, session);
        }
    }, [date, session, fetchData, showReport]);

    const flattenData = useCallback((records: SupervisionRecord[]): FlattenedRow[] => {
        return records.flatMap(record =>
            record.SCHEMES.map((scheme, index) => ({
                BLOCKNO: record.BLOCKNO,
                LOCATION: record.LOCATION,
                SUPERVISOR_NAME: record.SUPERVISOR_NAME,
                SCHEME: scheme.SCHEME,
                INST_CODE: scheme.INST_CODE,
                SUBJECT_CODE: scheme.SUBJECT_CODE,
                SUBJECT_NAME: scheme.SUBJECT_NAME,
                TOTAL_STUDENTS: scheme.TOTAL_STUDENTS,
                isFirstInGroup: index === 0,
                groupSize: record.SCHEMES.length
            }))
        );
    }, []);

    const handlePrint = useReactToPrint({
        contentRef,
        documentTitle: "Supervision_Report",
    });

    const handleReset = () => {
        setData([]);
        setDate(new Date().toISOString().split('T')[0]);
        setSession('');
        setShowReport(false);
    };

    const handleFetchReport = () => {
        if (!date || !session) {
            toast.error('Please select both date and session');
            return;
        }
        fetchData(date, session);
    };

    const MAX_ROWS_PER_PAGE = 13;

    const chunkedData = useCallback((data: FlattenedRow[]) => {
        const chunks: FlattenedRow[][] = [];
        for (let i = 0; i < data.length; i += MAX_ROWS_PER_PAGE) {
            chunks.push(data.slice(i, i + MAX_ROWS_PER_PAGE));
        }
        return chunks;
    }, []);

    if (loading) {
        return (
            <div className="flex justify-center items-center h-screen">
                <Loader2 className="animate-spin size-6 text-blue-500" />
            </div>
        );
    }

    return (
        <div className="flex flex-col gap-8 pb-8">
            {!showReport ? (
                <Card className="w-full max-w-2xl mx-auto">
                    <CardHeader>
                        <h2 className="text-2xl font-bold text-center">Supervision Report</h2>
                    </CardHeader>
                    <CardContent className="space-y-4">
                        <div className="space-y-2">
                            <Label htmlFor="date" className="text-sm font-medium">Date</Label>
                            <Input
                                id="date"
                                type="date"
                                value={date}
                                onChange={(e) => setDate(e.target.value)}
                                max={new Date().toISOString().split('T')[0]}
                            />
                        </div>
                        <div className="space-y-2">
                            <Label htmlFor="session" className="text-sm font-medium">Session</Label>
                            <select
                                id="session"
                                value={session}
                                onChange={(e) => setSession(e.target.value)}
                                className="w-full p-2 border rounded-md"
                            >
                                <option value="">Select Session</option>
                                <option value="Morning">Morning</option>
                                <option value="Afternoon">Afternoon</option>
                            </select>
                        </div>
                        <Button
                            onClick={handleFetchReport}
                            disabled={loading}
                            className="w-full"
                        >
                            {loading ? 'Loading...' : 'Fetch Report'}
                        </Button>
                    </CardContent>
                </Card>
            ) : (
                <>
                    <div className="flex justify-center gap-4 w-full print:hidden">
                        <Button
                            onClick={() => handlePrint()}
                            size="lg"
                            className="w-40 group transition-transform duration-300 hover:scale-105"
                        >
                            <LucidePrinter className="size-4 mr-2 transition-transform duration-300 group-hover:scale-105" />
                            Print Report
                        </Button>
                        <Button
                            variant="ghost"
                            size="lg"
                            className="w-40"
                            disabled={loading}
                            onClick={() => fetchData(date, session)}
                        >
                            {loading ? (
                                <>
                                    <Loader2 className="animate-spin size-4 mr-2" /> Refreshing...
                                </>
                            ) : (
                                <>
                                    <RefreshCcw className="size-4 mr-2" /> Refresh
                                </>
                            )}
                        </Button>
                        <Button
                            variant="secondary"
                            size="lg"
                            className="w-40 flex items-center gap-2 group"
                            onClick={handleReset}
                        >
                            <XIcon className="transition-transform duration-500 group-hover:rotate-180 group-hover:scale-110" />
                            <span className="transition-opacity duration-500 group-hover:opacity-80 group-hover:translate-x-1">
                                Clear
                            </span>
                        </Button>
                    </div>
                    <div ref={contentRef}>
                        {data.map((entry, entryIndex) => {
                            const flattenedData = flattenData(entry.SUPERVISION_RECORDS);
                            const pages = chunkedData(flattenedData);

                            return pages.map((pageData, pageIndex) => (
                                <motion.div
                                    key={`${entryIndex}-${pageIndex}`}
                                    initial={{ opacity: 0, y: 20 }}
                                    animate={{ opacity: 1, y: 0 }}
                                    transition={{ duration: 0.5, delay: pageIndex * 0.1 }}
                                    className="print:block"
                                >
                                    <Card
                                        className="shadow-xl print:shadow-none relative rounded-lg overflow-hidden dark:bg-neutral-800 w-full mx-auto my-6 p-4"
                                        style={PAGE_STYLE}
                                    >
                                        <CardHeader className="px-6 border-b-2 border-primary mb-6">
                                            {pageIndex === 0 && (
                                                <>
                                                    <p className="text-center text-sm text-neutral-500 dark:text-neutral-400">
                                                        {getExamSeason()} - {getExamYear()}
                                                    </p>
                                                    <h1 className="text-center text-3xl font-bold mb-2">
                                                        {getExamCenterInfo()?.NAME}
                                                    </h1>
                                                    <h2 className="text-center text-2xl font-semibold mb-4 border-b-2 border-primary w-fit m-auto">
                                                        Supervision Report
                                                    </h2>
                                                </>
                                            )}
                                            <div className="flex justify-between items-center mt-2 text-sm">
                                                <p className="font-medium">Date: {new Date(entry.DATE).toLocaleDateString('en-IN')}</p>
                                                <p className="font-medium">Session: {entry.SESSION}</p>
                                                <p className="font-medium">
                                                    Page: {pageIndex + 1} of {pages.length}
                                                </p>
                                            </div>
                                        </CardHeader>

                                        <CardContent className="p-6">
                                            <Table className="w-full border-collapse border border-neutral-200 dark:border-neutral-700 overflow-x-hidden">
                                                <TableHeader>
                                                    <TableRow className="bg-neutral-100 dark:bg-neutral-700">
                                                        <TableHead className="text-center font-bold px-3 py-1 border-b border-r dark:border-neutral-600">
                                                            Block No
                                                        </TableHead>
                                                        <TableHead className="text-center font-bold px-3 py-1 border-b border-r dark:border-neutral-600">
                                                            Location
                                                        </TableHead>
                                                        <TableHead className="text-center font-bold px-3 py-1 border-b border-r dark:border-neutral-600">
                                                            Supervisor
                                                        </TableHead>
                                                        <TableHead className="text-center font-bold px-3 py-1 border-b border-r dark:border-neutral-600">
                                                            Scheme
                                                        </TableHead>
                                                        <TableHead className="text-center font-bold px-3 py-1 border-b border-r dark:border-neutral-600">
                                                            Subject Code
                                                        </TableHead>
                                                        <TableHead className="text-center font-bold px-3 py-1 border-b border-r dark:border-neutral-600">
                                                            Subject
                                                        </TableHead>
                                                        <TableHead className="text-center font-bold px-3 py-1 border-b dark:border-neutral-600">
                                                            Students
                                                        </TableHead>
                                                    </TableRow>
                                                </TableHeader>
                                                <TableBody>
                                                    {pageData.map((row, rowIndex) => (
                                                        <TableRow
                                                            key={rowIndex}
                                                            className="border-b dark:border-neutral-700 hover:bg-neutral-50 dark:hover:bg-neutral-700 transition-colors duration-150"
                                                        >
                                                            {row.isFirstInGroup && (
                                                                <>
                                                                    <TableCell
                                                                        rowSpan={row.groupSize}
                                                                        className="text-center border-r px-3 py-1 dark:border-neutral-600 font-medium"
                                                                    >
                                                                        {row.BLOCKNO}
                                                                    </TableCell>
                                                                    <TableCell
                                                                        rowSpan={row.groupSize}
                                                                        className="text-center border-r px-3 py-1 dark:border-neutral-600"
                                                                    >
                                                                        {row.LOCATION}
                                                                    </TableCell>
                                                                    <TableCell
                                                                        rowSpan={row.groupSize}
                                                                        className="text-center border-r px-3 py-1 dark:border-neutral-600"
                                                                    >
                                                                        {row.SUPERVISOR_NAME}
                                                                    </TableCell>
                                                                </>
                                                            )}
                                                            <TableCell className="text-center border-r px-3 py-1 dark:border-neutral-600">
                                                                ({row.INST_CODE})<br />{row.SCHEME}
                                                            </TableCell>
                                                            <TableCell className="text-center border-r px-3 py-1 dark:border-neutral-600">
                                                                {row.SUBJECT_CODE}
                                                            </TableCell>
                                                            <TableCell className="text-center border-r px-3 py-1 dark:border-neutral-600">
                                                                {row.SUBJECT_NAME}
                                                            </TableCell>
                                                            <TableCell className="text-center w-12 p-3 font-medium">
                                                                {row.TOTAL_STUDENTS}
                                                            </TableCell>
                                                        </TableRow>
                                                    ))}
                                                </TableBody>
                                            </Table>

                                            <ReportFooter/>
                                        </CardContent>
                                    </Card>
                                </motion.div>
                            ));
                        })}
                    </div>
                </>
            )}
        </div>
    );
};

export default React.memo(DataDisplay);
</modules/reports/supervision.tsx>

<modules/reports/packing_slip.tsx>
'use client';

import React, { CSSProperties, useRef } from "react";
import { Button } from "@/components/ui/button";
import { Card, CardHeader, CardContent } from "@/components/ui/card";
import { Loader2, LucidePrinter, XIcon } from 'lucide-react';
import { Input } from "@/components/ui/input";
import { Select, SelectContent, SelectItem, SelectTrigger, SelectValue } from "@/components/ui/select";
import { toast } from "react-toastify";
import { useReactToPrint } from 'react-to-print';
import { useEcCode } from "@/lib/helper";
import { useExamCenter } from "@/hooks/useExamCenter";

interface ExamData {
    INSTITUTE_CODE: number;
    DATE: string;
    SESSION: string;
    TIME_SLOT: string;
    SCHEME: string;
    SUBJECT_CODE: string;
    TOTAL_STUDENTS: number;
    SHEET_NO: string;
    SUBJECT_NAME: string;
    ABSENT_NUMBERS: number[];
    CPS_NUMBERS: number[];
}

const PAGE_STYLE: CSSProperties = {
    pageBreakAfter: "always",
    width: "210mm",
    height: "297mm",
    margin: "0 auto",
    marginBlockEnd: "8px"
};


const formatDate = (dateString: string) => {
    return new Date(dateString).toLocaleDateString('en-IN', { day: '2-digit', month: '2-digit', year: 'numeric' });
};

interface SlipProps {
    ec_code: string;
    item: ExamData;
    season: string;
    year: string;
    isCopyCase?: boolean;
}

const Slip = ({ ec_code, item, season, year, isCopyCase = false }: SlipProps) => {
    const totalStudents = isCopyCase ? item.CPS_NUMBERS.length : item.TOTAL_STUDENTS - (item.ABSENT_NUMBERS.length + item.CPS_NUMBERS.length);
    const slipType = isCopyCase ? "COPY CASE PACKING SLIP" : "PACKING SLIP";
    const absentOrCopyCaseStudents = isCopyCase ? item.CPS_NUMBERS : item.ABSENT_NUMBERS;

    return (
        <div style={PAGE_STYLE} className="border px-8 py-6 times">
            <div className="header text-center mb-6">
                <div className="title font-bold text-lg mt-2">MAHARASHTRA STATE BOARD OF TECHNICAL EDUCATION, MUMBAI</div>
                <div>Theory Examination: {season}-{year}</div>
                <div className="font-bold text-xl">{slipType}</div>
            </div>
            <div className="border border-primary px-4 py-2">
                <div className="details mb-6 grid grid-cols-2 gap-2">
                    <p><strong>Examination Center Code:</strong> {ec_code}</p>
                    <p><strong>Institute Code:</strong> {item.INSTITUTE_CODE}</p>
                    <p><strong>Date:</strong> {formatDate(item.DATE)}</p>
                    <p><strong>Time:</strong> {item.TIME_SLOT}</p>
                    <p><strong>Course:</strong> {item.SCHEME.split("-")[0]}</p>
                    <p className="flex justify-between"><div><strong>Sem:</strong> {item.SCHEME.split("-")[1]} </div><div><strong>Master:</strong> {item.SCHEME.split("-")[2]}</div></p>
                    <p><strong>Subject Code:</strong> {item.SUBJECT_CODE}</p>
                    <p><strong>Subject Name:</strong> {item.SUBJECT_NAME}</p>
                    <p className="col-span-full"><strong>Total Number of Answer Books in Bundle:</strong> <span className="px-3 py-2 border border-primary rounded">{totalStudents}</span></p>
                    <p className="col-span-full"><strong>Marksheet No:</strong> {item.SHEET_NO}</p>
                    <p><strong>Sealed on:</strong> {formatDate(item.DATE)}</p>
                    <p><strong>Sealing Time:</strong> ______________ AM/PM</p>
                    {absentOrCopyCaseStudents.length > 0 && <p className="col-span-full"><strong>{isCopyCase ? "Copy Case Students" : "Absent Students"}:</strong> {absentOrCopyCaseStudents.join(", ")}</p>}
                </div>
                <div className="signatures flex justify-between mb-4 mt-16">
                    <div><strong>Sealing Supervisor</strong><br />Signature</div>
                    <div><strong>Officer In-Charge</strong><br />Signature</div>
                    <div><strong>Exam Controller</strong><br />Signature</div>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>
    );
};


const SlipComponent = ({
    data,
    toggleReport,
    ec_code,
    date,
    session
}: {
    data: ExamData[];
    toggleReport: () => void;
    ec_code: string;
    date: string;
    session: string
}) => {
    const [printing, setPrinting] = React.useState(false);
    const componentRef = useRef<HTMLDivElement>(null);

    const handlePrint = useReactToPrint({
        contentRef: componentRef,
        documentTitle: `packing_slip_${ec_code}_${date.replace(/-/g, "")}_${session[0]}`,
        onBeforePrint: async () => setPrinting(true),
        onAfterPrint: async () => {
            setPrinting(false);
            toast.success('Print job completed');
        },
        onPrintError: () => {
            setPrinting(false);
            toast.error('Failed to print. Please try again.');
        }
    });

    const { getExamSeason, getExamYear } = useExamCenter(ec_code);
    const year = getExamYear();
    const season = getExamSeason();

    return (
        <div className="p-6 min-h-screen">
            <div className="max-w-7xl mx-auto">
                <div className="flex justify-between mb-6">
                    <Button
                        type="reset"
                        variant="secondary"
                        onClick={toggleReport}
                        className="mb-6 flex items-center gap-2 group"
                    >
                        <XIcon className="transition-transform duration-500 group-hover:rotate-180 hover:font-bold group-hover:scale-110" />
                        <span className="transition-opacity duration-500 group-hover:opacity-80 group-hover:translate-x-1">Clear Report</span>
                    </Button>
                    <Button
                        onClick={() => handlePrint()}
                        className="mb-6 group transition-transform duration-300 hover:scale-105"
                        disabled={printing}
                    >
                        {printing ? <Loader2 className="animate-spin" /> :
                            <LucidePrinter className="transition-transform duration-300 group-hover:scale-105" />}
                        Print Packing Slips
                    </Button>
                </div>
                <div ref={componentRef}>
                    {data.map((item, index) => (
                        <React.Fragment key={index}>
                            <Slip ec_code={ec_code} item={item} season={season} year={year} />
                            {item.CPS_NUMBERS.length > 0 && (
                                <Slip ec_code={ec_code} item={item} season={season} year={year} isCopyCase />
                            )}
                        </React.Fragment>
                    ))}
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>
    );
};

const PackingPage = () => {
    const [data, setData] = React.useState<ExamData[]>([]);
    const [isLoading, setIsLoading] = React.useState(false);
    const [error, setError] = React.useState<string | null>(null);
    const [date, setDate] = React.useState(new Date().toISOString().split('T')[0]);
    const [session, setSession] = React.useState<string>("");
    const [showReport, setShowReport] = React.useState(false);

    const fetchData = async () => {
        if (!session || !date) {
            toast.warn("Select session and date");
            return;
        }
        setIsLoading(true);
        try {
            const response = await fetch(`/api/packing-slip?date=${date}&session=${session}`);
            if (!response.ok) throw new Error('Failed to fetch data');
            const result = await response.json();
            setData(result);
            setShowReport(true);
        } catch (error: unknown) {
            if (error instanceof Error) {
                setError(error.message);
            } else {
                setError('An unknown error occurred');
            }
        } finally {
            setIsLoading(false);
        }
    };

    const ec_code = useEcCode();

    return (
        <div className="p-6 min-h-screen">
            <div className="max-w-7xl mx-auto">
                {!showReport && (
                    <Card className="max-w-md mx-auto mb-6">
                        <CardHeader>
                            <h2 className="text-2xl font-bold text-center">Packing Slip</h2>
                        </CardHeader>
                        <CardContent className="space-y-4">
                            <div className="space-y-2">
                                <label className="text-sm font-medium">Date</label>
                                <Input type="date" value={date} onChange={(e) => setDate(e.target.value)} />
                            </div>
                            <div className="space-y-2">
                                <label className="text-sm font-medium">Session</label>
                                <Select value={session} onValueChange={setSession}>
                                    <SelectTrigger><SelectValue placeholder="Select session" /></SelectTrigger>
                                    <SelectContent>
                                        <SelectItem value="Morning">Morning</SelectItem>
                                        <SelectItem value="Afternoon">Afternoon</SelectItem>
                                    </SelectContent>
                                </Select>
                            </div>
                            <Button onClick={fetchData} disabled={isLoading} className="w-full">
                                {isLoading ? "Loading..." : "Generate Packing Slip"}
                            </Button>
                            {error && <div className="text-red-500">{error}</div>}
                        </CardContent>
                    </Card>
                )}
                {data.length > 0 && showReport &&
                    <SlipComponent
                        data={data}
                        toggleReport={() => setShowReport(false)}
                        ec_code={ec_code}
                        date={date}
                        session={session}
                    />
                }
            </div>
        </div>
    );
};

export default PackingPage;
</modules/reports/packing_slip.tsx>

<modules/reports/attendance.tsx>
import React, { useRef, useState } from "react"
import { useReactToPrint } from "react-to-print"
import { Button } from "@/components/ui/button"
import { Card, CardHeader, CardContent, CardFooter, CardTitle } from "@/components/ui/card"
import { Table, TableHeader, TableRow, TableHead, TableBody, TableCell } from "@/components/ui/table"
import { Loader2, AlertCircle, XIcon, LucidePrinter, Info } from "lucide-react"
import { Input } from "@/components/ui/input"
import { Select, SelectTrigger, SelectValue, SelectContent, SelectItem } from "@/components/ui/select"
import { Alert, AlertDescription, AlertTitle } from "@/components/ui/alert"
import { Label } from "@/components/ui/label"
import { Separator } from "@/components/ui/separator"
import { toast } from "react-toastify"
import "react-toastify/dist/ReactToastify.css"
import { useExamCenter } from "@/hooks/useExamCenter"
