import Image from "next/image"

interface ExamRecord {
  INST_CODE: string
  INSTITUTE_NAME: string
  DATE: string
  SESSION: string
  BLOCKNO: string
  SUPERVISOR_NAME: string
  SCHEME: string
  TIMESLOT: string
  SUBJECT_CODE: string
  SUBJECT_NAME: string
  SEAT_NUMBERS: string[]
}

interface MetadataType {
  season: "SUMMER" | "WINTER" | ""
  year: number
}

const PAGE_STYLE: React.CSSProperties = {
  pageBreakAfter: "always",
  width: "210mm", 
  height: "297mm",
  margin: "0 auto",
  marginBlockEnd: "8px",
  padding: "5mm",
  boxSizing: "border-box"
}

const ReportHeader: React.FC<{
  metadata: MetadataType
  record: ExamRecord
  getConnectedInstituteNameByCode: (code: string) => string
  getExamCenterInfo: () => { NAME: string; SEALING_SUPERVISOR: string; OFFICER_INCHARGE: string }
  ec_code: string
}> = ({ metadata, record, getConnectedInstituteNameByCode, getExamCenterInfo, ec_code }) => (
  <CardHeader className="border-b border-primary p-1 space-y-1">
    <h1 className="text-center font-primary text-sm flex justify-center items-center">
      <Image width={100} height={100} src={"/msbte.jpg"} alt="MSBTE logo" className="h-8 w-8 mr-2" />

      MAHARASTRA STATE BOARD OF TECHNICAL EDUCATION,MUMBAI</h1>
    <h2 className="text-center font-bold text-xs">
      ATTENDANCE REPORT - EXAMINATION: {metadata.season}-{metadata.year}
    </h2>
    <div className="flex justify-between flex-col text-xs">
      <p>
        <span className="font-semibold">Exam Center:</span> ({ec_code}) - {getExamCenterInfo().NAME}
      </p>
      <p>
        <span className="font-semibold">Institute Code:</span> ({record.INST_CODE}) -{" "}
        {getConnectedInstituteNameByCode(record.INST_CODE)}
      </p>
    </div>
    <div className="flex justify-between text-xs">
      <p>
        <span className="font-semibold">Date:</span> {new Date(record.DATE as string).toLocaleDateString("en-IN")}
      </p>
      <p>
        <span className="font-semibold">Time:</span> {record.TIMESLOT}
      </p>
      <p>
        <span className="font-semibold">Course-Sem-Master:</span> {record.SCHEME}
      </p>
    </div>
    <div className="flex justify-between text-xs">
      <p>
        <span className="font-semibold">Block No.:</span>{" "}
        <span className="font-bold border-2 rounded border-primary py-0.5 px-1">{record.BLOCKNO}</span>
      </p>
      <p>
        <span className="font-semibold">Name of Invigilator:</span> {record.SUPERVISOR_NAME}
      </p>
    </div>
    <div className="flex justify-between text-xs">
      <p>
        <span className="font-semibold">Subject:</span> {record.SUBJECT_NAME} [{record.SUBJECT_CODE}]
      </p>
      <p>
        <span className="font-semibold">Code:</span> {record.SUBJECT_CODE}
      </p>
    </div>
  </CardHeader>
)

const ReportTable: React.FC<{ seatNumbers: string[]; lastColumnHeader: string; lastColumnContent: string }> = ({
  seatNumbers,

  lastColumnContent,
}) => (

        <TableHead className="text-center text-xs border py-0 border-primary">Sr. No. of Main Answer book</TableHead>
        <TableHead className="text-center text-xs border py-0 border-primary">Sr. No. of Supplement Issued</TableHead>
        <TableHead className="text-center text-xs border py-0 border-primary">{lastColumnHeader}</TableHead>
      </TableRow>
    </TableHeader>
    <TableBody>
      {seatNumbers?.map((seatNo, idx) => (
        <TableRow key={seatNo} className="border border-primary">
          <TableCell className="text-center text-sm py-0 px-0.5 border border-primary">{idx + 1}</TableCell>
          <TableCell className="text-center text-sm py-0 px-0.5 border border-primary">{seatNo}</TableCell>
          <TableCell className="text-center text-sm py-0 px-0.5 border border-primary"></TableCell>
          <TableCell className="text-center text-sm py-0 px-0.5 border border-primary"></TableCell>
          <TableCell className="text-center text-sm py-0 px-0.5 border border-primary">{lastColumnContent}</TableCell>
        </TableRow>
      ))}
    </TableBody>
  </Table>
)

const ReportFooter: React.FC<{ record: ExamRecord; getExamCenterInfo: () => { NAME: string; SEALING_SUPERVISOR: string; OFFICER_INCHARGE: string } }> = ({

      <p>
        <span className="font-semibold">Total Supp:</span>{" "}
      </p>
    </div>
    <div className="flex justify-between w-full mt-1">
      <p>
        <br />
        <span className="font-semibold">Signature of Invigilator:</span> ({record.SUPERVISOR_NAME})
      </p>
      <div className="text-right">
        <span>({getExamCenterInfo().OFFICER_INCHARGE})</span>
        <p>
          <span className="font-semibold">Signature of Officer In-charge:</span>
        </p>
      </div>
    </div>
  </CardFooter>
)

const AppendixBReport: React.FC<{
  data: AttendanceData
  getExamCenterInfo: () => { NAME: string; SEALING_SUPERVISOR: string; OFFICER_INCHARGE: string }

                </Label>

              <Separator className="my-1" />
              <div>
                <Label>
                  <strong>Seat No. From :</strong>
                </Label>
                <p className="text-sm">{record.SEAT_NUMBERS.join(", ")}</p>
              </div>
              <div className="grid grid-cols-2 gap-1">
                <Label>
                  <strong>Paper Code :</strong> {record.SUBJECT_CODE}
                </Label>
                <Label>
                  <strong>Total :</strong>{" "}
                  <span className="font-bold border border-primary rounded py-1 px-2">
                    {record.SEAT_NUMBERS.length}
                  </span>
                </Label>
              </div>
              <Label>
                <strong>Subject :</strong> {record.SUBJECT_NAME}
              </Label>
              <Table className="border-collapse border border-primary text-sm">
                <TableHeader>
                  <TableRow>
                    <TableHead className="border border-primary p-1 text-center font-bold">
                      SEAT NO. OF CANDIDATES WHO ARE ABSENT
                    </TableHead>
                    <TableHead className="border border-primary p-1 text-center font-bold">
                      TOTAL NUMBERS OF ANSWER BOOKS
                    </TableHead>
                  </TableRow>
                </TableHeader>
                <TableBody>
                  <TableRow className="h-36">
                    <TableCell className="border border-primary p-1 text-center" />
                    <TableCell className="border border-primary p-1 text-center" />
                  </TableRow>
                </TableBody>
              </Table>
              <div className="grid grid-cols-2 gap-1 pt-6">
                <Label>
                  <strong>CHECKED BY :</strong> ({getExamCenterInfo().SEALING_SUPERVISOR})
                </Label>
                <Label>
                  <strong>INVIGILATOR :</strong> ({record.SUPERVISOR_NAME})
                </Label>
              </div>
              <div className="flex justify-end pt-6">
                <Label>
                  <strong>OFFICER IN-CHARGE :</strong> ({getExamCenterInfo().OFFICER_INCHARGE})
                </Label>
              </div>
              <Table className="border-collapse border border-primary text-sm">
                <TableHeader>
                  <TableRow>
                    <TableHead className="border border-primary p-1 text-center font-bold">SEAT NO.</TableHead>
                    <TableHead className="border border-primary p-1 text-center font-bold">TIME</TableHead>
                    <TableHead className="border border-primary p-1 text-center font-bold">REMARKS</TableHead>
                  </TableRow>
                </TableHeader>
                <TableBody>
                  <TableRow className="h-52">
                    <TableCell className="border border-primary p-1 text-center" />
                    <TableCell className="border border-primary p-1 text-center" />
                    <TableCell className="border border-primary p-1 text-center" />
                  </TableRow>
                </TableBody>
              </Table>
              <div className="flex justify-end pt-6 pb-0">
                <Label>
                  <strong>INVIGILATOR :</strong> ({record.SUPERVISOR_NAME})
                </Label>
              </div>
            </CardContent>
          </Card>
        </div>
      ))}
    </>
  )
}

interface AttendanceData {
  metadata: {
    season: string;
    year: number;
  };
  attendance_records: AttendanceRecord[];
}

export interface AttendanceRecord {
  INST_CODE: string;
  INSTITUTE_NAME: string;
  DATE: string;
  SESSION: string;
  BLOCKNO: string;
  SUPERVISOR_NAME: string;
  SCHEME: string;
  TIMESLOT: string;
  SUBJECT_CODE: string;
  SUBJECT_NAME: string;
  SEAT_NUMBERS: string[];
}

interface DatePickerComponentProps {
  onFetchData: (date: string, session: string) => void;
  isLoading: boolean;
  error: string;
  numberOfAppendixCopies: number;
  numberOfAttendanceCopies: number;
  setNumberOfAppendixCopies: (value: number) => void;
  setNumberOfAttendanceCopies: (value: number) => void;
}

interface ReportComponentProps {
  ref: React.RefObject<HTMLDivElement>;
  attendanceData: AttendanceData;
  numberOfAppendixCopies: number;
  numberOfAttendanceCopies: number;
  onReset: () => void;
  getExamCenterInfo: () => { NAME: string; SEALING_SUPERVISOR: string; OFFICER_INCHARGE: string };
  getConnectedInstituteNameByCode: (ec_code: string) => string;
  ec_code: string;
}

interface AttendanceReportRendererProps {
  attendanceData: AttendanceData;
  numberOfAppendixCopies: number;
  numberOfAttendanceCopies: number;
  getExamCenterInfo: () => { NAME: string; SEALING_SUPERVISOR: string; OFFICER_INCHARGE: string };
  getConnectedInstituteNameByCode: (ec_code: string) => string;
}

const DatePickerComponent: React.FC<DatePickerComponentProps> = ({ onFetchData, isLoading, error, numberOfAppendixCopies, numberOfAttendanceCopies, setNumberOfAppendixCopies, setNumberOfAttendanceCopies }) => {
  const [date, setDate] = useState(new Date().toISOString().split('T')[0]);
  const [session, setSession] = useState<string>("");

  return (
    <Card className="max-w-md mx-auto relative">
      <CardHeader>
        <h2 className="text-2xl font-bold text-center">DATE & SESSION WISE ATTENDANCE REPORT</h2>
      </CardHeader>
      <CardContent className="space-y-4">
        <div className="space-y-2">
          <label className="text-sm font-medium">Date</label>
          <Input type="date" value={date} onChange={(e) => setDate(e.target.value)} />
        </div>
        <div className="space-y-2">
          <label className="text-sm font-medium">Session</label>
          <Select value={session} onValueChange={setSession}>
            <SelectTrigger>
              <SelectValue placeholder="Select session" />
            </SelectTrigger>
            <SelectContent>
              <SelectItem value="Morning">Morning</SelectItem>
              <SelectItem value="Afternoon">Afternoon</SelectItem>
            </SelectContent>
          </Select>
        </div>
        <Separator className="my-4" />
        <div className="flex justify-between flex-col space-y-2">
          <div className="flex items-center gap-2 justify-between text-md">
            <Label className="text-sm font-medium">Number of Attendance Report Copies</Label>
            <Input
              type="number"
              className="max-w-32"
              value={numberOfAttendanceCopies}
              min={0}
              max={5}
              onChange={(e) => setNumberOfAttendanceCopies(Number.parseInt(e.target.value))}
            />
          </div>
          <div className="flex items-center gap-2 justify-between text-md">
            <Label className="text-sm font-medium">Number of Appendix Copies</Label>
            <Input
              type="number"
              className="w-32"
              value={numberOfAppendixCopies}
              min={0}
              max={5}
              onChange={(e) => setNumberOfAppendixCopies(Number.parseInt(e.target.value))}
            />
          </div>

        </div>
        <Button onClick={() => onFetchData(date, session)} disabled={isLoading} className="w-full">
          {isLoading ? (
            <>
              <Loader2 className="mr-2 h-4 w-4 animate-spin" />
              Loading...
            </>
          ) : (
            "Fetch Data"
          )}
        </Button>
        {error && (
          <Alert variant="destructive" className="flex items-center gap-4">
            <AlertCircle className="h-5 w-5 text-red-500" />
            <AlertDescription className="text-sm">{error}</AlertDescription>
          </Alert>
        )}
      </CardContent>
    </Card>
  );
};

export const ReportComponent: React.FC<ReportComponentProps> = ({
  ref,
  attendanceData,
  numberOfAppendixCopies,
  numberOfAttendanceCopies,
  getExamCenterInfo,
  getConnectedInstituteNameByCode
}) => {
  return (
    <>
      <div className="w-fit mx-auto" ref={ref}>
        <AttendanceReportRenderer
          attendanceData={attendanceData}
          numberOfAppendixCopies={numberOfAppendixCopies}
          numberOfAttendanceCopies={numberOfAttendanceCopies}
          getExamCenterInfo={getExamCenterInfo}
          getConnectedInstituteNameByCode={getConnectedInstituteNameByCode}
        />
      </div>
    </>
  );
};

const AttendanceReportRenderer: React.FC<AttendanceReportRendererProps> = ({
  attendanceData,
  numberOfAppendixCopies,
  numberOfAttendanceCopies,
  getExamCenterInfo,
  getConnectedInstituteNameByCode,
}) => {
  const ec_code = useEcCode()
  const { getExamSeason, getExamYear } = useExamCenter(ec_code)
  const meta: MetadataType = { year: Number(getExamYear()), season: getExamSeason() as "SUMMER" | "WINTER" | "" }
  return (
    <>
      {attendanceData.attendance_records?.map((record, index) => (
        <React.Fragment key={index}>
          {Array.from({ length: numberOfAttendanceCopies }, (_, i) => (
            <Card
              key={`attendance-${i}`}
              className="shadow-none times relative rounded-none overflow-hidden px-8 mb-4 print:mb-0"
              style={PAGE_STYLE}
            >
              <ReportHeader
                metadata={meta}
                record={record}
                getExamCenterInfo={getExamCenterInfo}
                ec_code={ec_code}
                getConnectedInstituteNameByCode={getConnectedInstituteNameByCode}
              />
              <CardContent className="p-1">
                <ReportTable
                  seatNumbers={record.SEAT_NUMBERS}
                  lastColumnHeader={i % 2 !== 0 ? "P/A" : "Signature of the Candidate"}
                  lastColumnContent=""
                />
              </CardContent>
              <ReportFooter record={record} getExamCenterInfo={getExamCenterInfo} />
              <div className="absolute bottom-0 text-gray-500 text-center left-0 right-0 text-xs">
                1st copy forwarded with answer book bundle,2nd copy for office use.
              </div>
            </Card>
          ))}

          {Array.from({ length: numberOfAppendixCopies }, (_, i) => (
            <AppendixBReport
              key={`appendix-${i}`}
              data={{ metadata: meta as MetadataType, attendance_records: [record] }}
              getExamCenterInfo={getExamCenterInfo}
              getConnectedInstituteNameByCode={getConnectedInstituteNameByCode}
              ec_code={ec_code}
            />
          ))}
        </React.Fragment>
      ))}
    </>
  );
};

const AttendanceReport: React.FC = () => {
  const [attendanceData, setAttendanceData] = useState<AttendanceData>({ metadata: { season: "", year: 0 }, attendance_records: [] });
  const [isLoading, setIsLoading] = useState(false);
  const [error, setError] = useState("");
  const [showReport, setShowReport] = useState(false);

  const [numberOfAppendixCopies, setNumberOfAppendixCopies] = useState(2);
  const [numberOfAttendanceCopies, setNumberOfAttendanceCopies] = useState(2);
  const ec_code = useEcCode()
  const { getConnectedInstituteNameByCode, getExamCenterInfo, getExamSeason } = useExamCenter(ec_code);

  const fetchData = async (date: string, session: string) => {
    if (!session || !date) { toast.warn("Select session and date"); return; }
    setIsLoading(true);
    setError("");

    try {
      const response = await fetch(`/api/blocks?date=${date}&session=${session}`);
      if (!response.ok) throw new Error(`HTTP error! Status: ${response.status}`);
      const data = await response.json();
      if (data.length === 0) {
        toast.info("No data found for the selected date and session.");
        setShowReport(false);
      } else {
        const season = getExamSeason()
        setAttendanceData({ metadata: { season, year: 2021 }, attendance_records: data });
        setShowReport(true);
      }
    } catch (error) {
      console.error("Error fetching attendance data:", error);
      setError("Failed to fetch attendance data. Please try again.");
      toast.error("Failed to fetch attendance data. Please try again.");
    } finally {
      setIsLoading(false);
    }
  };

  const handleReset = () => {
    setShowReport(false);
    setAttendanceData({ metadata: { season: "", year: 0 }, attendance_records: [] });
    setError("");
  };

  const contentRef = useRef<HTMLDivElement>(null);
  const reactToPrintFn = useReactToPrint({ contentRef });

  return (
    <div className="p-2 min-h-screen text-xs">
      <div className="max-w-7xl mx-auto">
        {!showReport ? (
          <>
            <Alert variant="default" className="flex items-start gap-3 p-4 w-1/2 mx-auto mb-10">
              <Info className="h-5 w-5 text-blue-500" />
              <div>
                <AlertTitle className="font-semibold">Attendance Report Component</AlertTitle>
                <AlertDescription className="text-sm">
                  This component generates a date and session-wise attendance report for exam centers. It fetches
                  attendance records from an API and allows users to print formatted reports, including:
                  <ul className="list-disc list-inside mt-1">
                    <li>
                      <strong>Attendance Report:</strong> Lists examinee seat numbers with attendance details.
                    </li>
                    <li>
                      <strong>Appendix B Report:</strong> Supervisor&apos;s report including invigilator details.
                    </li>
                  </ul>
                  Users can customize the number of report copies before printing.
                  <br />
                  <br />
                  <strong>Note:</strong> Use 2 copies of attendance report and 2 copies of appendix B report one for
                  MSBTE and one for the institute.
                </AlertDescription>
              </div>
            </Alert>
            <DatePickerComponent onFetchData={fetchData} isLoading={isLoading} error={error} numberOfAppendixCopies={numberOfAppendixCopies} numberOfAttendanceCopies={numberOfAttendanceCopies} setNumberOfAppendixCopies={setNumberOfAppendixCopies} setNumberOfAttendanceCopies={setNumberOfAttendanceCopies} />
          </>
        ) : (
          <div className="w-fit mx-auto">
            <div className="flex justify-between">
              <Button type="reset" variant="secondary" onClick={handleReset} className="mb-6 flex items-center gap-2 group">
                <XIcon className="transition-transform duration-500 group-hover:rotate-180 hover:font-bold group-hover:scale-110" />
                <span className="transition-opacity duration-500 group-hover:opacity-80 group-hover:translate-x-1">
                  Clear Print
                </span>
              </Button>
              <Button onClick={() => reactToPrintFn()} className="mb-6 group transition-transform duration-300 hover:scale-105">
                <LucidePrinter className="transition-transform duration-300 group-hover:scale-105" /> Print All Pages
              </Button>
            </div>
            <ReportComponent
              ref={contentRef as React.RefObject<HTMLDivElement>}
              attendanceData={attendanceData}
              numberOfAppendixCopies={numberOfAppendixCopies}
              numberOfAttendanceCopies={numberOfAttendanceCopies}
              onReset={handleReset}
              getExamCenterInfo={getExamCenterInfo}
              getConnectedInstituteNameByCode={getConnectedInstituteNameByCode}
              ec_code={ec_code}
            />
          </div>
        )}
      </div>
    </div>
  );
};

export default AttendanceReport

</modules/reports/attendance.tsx>

<modules/reports/block_allocation.tsx>
"use client"

import  { useRef, useState, type CSSProperties } from "react"
import { useReactToPrint } from "react-to-print"
import { Button } from "@/components/ui/button"
import { Card, CardHeader, CardContent } from "@/components/ui/card"
import { Table, TableHeader, TableRow, TableHead, TableBody, TableCell } from "@/components/ui/table"
import { Input } from "@/components/ui/input"
import { Select, SelectContent, SelectItem, SelectTrigger, SelectValue } from "@/components/ui/select"
import { AlertCircle, Loader2, LucidePrinter, XIcon } from "lucide-react"
import { Label } from "@/components/ui/label"
import { useExamCenter } from "@/hooks/useExamCenter"
import { Alert, AlertDescription } from "@/components/ui/alert"
import { toast } from "react-toastify"
import axios from "axios"
import { useEcCode } from "@/lib/helper"
import { ReportFooter } from "../misc/footers"

export interface ExamData {
    ID: number
    INST_CODE: string
    DATE: string
    SESSION: string
    TIMESLOT: string
    BLOCKNO: string
    LOCATION: string
    SCHEME: string
    SUBJECT_CODE: string
    SUBJECT_NAME: string
    SEAT_NUMBERS: number[]
    FIRST: number
    LAST: number
    ASSIGNED: number
    STRENGTH: number
    SUPERVISOR_UID: string
    SUPERVISOR_NAME: string
}

interface BlockDistribution {
    Name: string;
    Strength: number;
    currentStrength: number;
    distribution: number[];
}

const PAGE_STYLE: CSSProperties = {
    pageBreakAfter: "always",
    width: "210mm",
    height: "297mm",
    margin: "0 auto",
    marginBlockEnd: "8px",
}

export const transformData = (apiData: ExamData[] | null): { [key: string]: ExamData[] } => {
    if (!apiData) return {}
    const transformedData: { [key: string]: ExamData[] } = {}
    apiData.forEach((item) => {
        const blockKey = `BLOCK${item.BLOCKNO}`
        if (!transformedData[blockKey]) {
            transformedData[blockKey] = []
        }
        transformedData[blockKey].push(item)
    })
    return transformedData
}

const formatDate = (date: string) =>
    new Date(date).toLocaleDateString("en-IN", { year: "numeric", month: "long", day: "numeric" })

const SubjectAllocationTable = ({ data }: { data: ExamData[] }) => {
    const MAX_ROWS_PER_PAGE = 18;
    const groupedData = data.reduce(
        (acc, item) => {
            if (!acc[item.SUBJECT_CODE]) acc[item.SUBJECT_CODE] = [];
            acc[item.SUBJECT_CODE].push(item);
            return acc;
        },
        {} as { [key: string]: ExamData[] },
    );
    const flattenedData = Object.values(groupedData).flat();
    const subjectChunks: ExamData[][] = [];
    for (let i = 0; i < flattenedData.length; i += MAX_ROWS_PER_PAGE) {
        subjectChunks.push(flattenedData.slice(i, i + MAX_ROWS_PER_PAGE));
    }

    return (
        <>
            {subjectChunks.map((chunk, chunkIndex) => {
                const groupedChunk = chunk.reduce(
                    (acc, item) => {
                        if (!acc[item.SUBJECT_CODE]) acc[item.SUBJECT_CODE] = [];
                        acc[item.SUBJECT_CODE].push(item);
                        return acc;
                    },
                    {} as { [key: string]: ExamData[] },
                );
                return (
                    <Card key={chunkIndex} className="shadow-xl rounded-lg overflow-hidden relative" style={PAGE_STYLE}>
                        {chunkIndex === 0 && (
                            <CardHeader className="p-6 border-b  border-primary">
                                <h1 className="text-center text-3xl font-bold mb-4">TestForge</h1>
                                <h2 className="text-xl font-bold text-center">Subject Allocation Details</h2>
                                <h6 className="text-md text-center">
                                    (Additional Document Generated by TestForge to Assist Officer In-Charge in Distribution Of Paper Code
                                    Wise Question Papers to Various Blocks)
                                </h6>
                            </CardHeader>
                        )}
                        <CardContent className="p-6">
                            <Table className="w-full border  border-primary">
                                {chunkIndex === 0 && (
                                    <TableHeader>
                                        <TableRow className="border">
                                            <TableHead className="text-center font-bold py-1 border  border-primary">
                                                Subject Code
                                            </TableHead>
                                            <TableHead className="text-center font-bold py-1 border  border-primary">
                                                Block No
                                            </TableHead>
                                            <TableHead className="text-center font-bold py-1 border  border-primary">
                                                Block Location
                                            </TableHead>
                                            <TableHead className="text-center font-bold py-1 border  border-primary">
                                                Total Students
                                            </TableHead>
                                        </TableRow>
                                    </TableHeader>
                                )}
                                <TableBody>
                                    {chunk.map((item, index) => {
                                        const group = groupedChunk[item.SUBJECT_CODE];
                                        const isFirstInGroup = group && group[0] === item;
                                        return (
                                            <TableRow
                                                key={index}
                                                className="border-b  border-primary"
                                            >
                                                {isFirstInGroup && (
                                                    <TableCell
                                                        rowSpan={group.length}
                                                        className="text-center border-r  border-primary px-3 py-2"
                                                    >
                                                        {item.SUBJECT_CODE}
                                                    </TableCell>
                                                )}
                                                <TableCell className="text-center border-r px-3 py-2  border-primary">
                                                    {item.BLOCKNO}
                                                </TableCell>
                                                <TableCell className="text-center border-r px-3 py-2  border-primary">
                                                    Block- {item.LOCATION}
                                                </TableCell>
                                                <TableCell className="text-center px-3 py-2  border-primary flex justify-evenly">
                                                    <b>{item.ASSIGNED}</b>({item.SCHEME})
                                                </TableCell>
                                            </TableRow>
                                        );
                                    })}
                                </TableBody>
                            </Table>
                            <ReportFooter/>
                        </CardContent>
                    </Card>
                );
            })}
        </>
    );
};

const AllotmentTable = ({ allotment, institute }: { allotment: ExamData[]; institute: string }) => {
    const FIRST_PAGE_MAX_ROWS = 11;
    const SUBSEQUENT_PAGE_MAX_ROWS = 17;
    const groupedByScheme = allotment.reduce(
        (acc, item) => {
            if (!acc[item.SCHEME]) acc[item.SCHEME] = [];
            acc[item.SCHEME].push(item);
            return acc;
        },
        {} as { [key: string]: ExamData[] },
    );
    const flattenedAllotment = Object.values(groupedByScheme).flat();
    const allotmentChunks = [];
    let startIndex = 0;
    if (flattenedAllotment.length > 0) {
        allotmentChunks.push(flattenedAllotment.slice(0, FIRST_PAGE_MAX_ROWS));
        startIndex = FIRST_PAGE_MAX_ROWS;
    }
    for (let i = startIndex; i < flattenedAllotment.length; i += SUBSEQUENT_PAGE_MAX_ROWS) {
        allotmentChunks.push(flattenedAllotment.slice(i, i + SUBSEQUENT_PAGE_MAX_ROWS));
    }

    return (
        <>
            {allotmentChunks.map((chunk, chunkIndex) => {
                const groupedAllotment = chunk.reduce(
                    (acc, item) => {
                        if (!acc[item.BLOCKNO]) acc[item.BLOCKNO] = [];
                        acc[item.BLOCKNO].push(item);
                        return acc;
                    },
                    {} as { [key: string]: ExamData[] },
                );
                return (
                    <Card key={chunkIndex} className="shadow-xl rounded-lg overflow-hidden relative" style={PAGE_STYLE}>
                        {chunkIndex === 0 && (
                            <CardHeader className="p-2 border-b  border-primary">
                                <h1 className="text-center text-xl font-bold mb-2">{institute}</h1>
                                <h2 className="text-lg font-bold text-center">Allotment Details</h2>
                                <h3 className="text-md font-semibold text-center">{new Date(allotment[0].DATE).toLocaleDateString('en-IN')}-{allotment[0].SESSION}</h3>
                            </CardHeader>
                        )}
                        <CardContent className="p-6">
                            <Table className="w-full border  border-primary">
                                {chunkIndex === 0 && (
                                    <TableHeader>
                                        <TableRow className="border">
                                            <TableHead className="text-center font-bold py-3 border  border-primary">
                                                Block No
                                            </TableHead>
                                            <TableHead className="text-center font-bold py-3 border  border-primary">
                                                Location
                                            </TableHead>
                                            <TableHead className="text-center font-bold py-3 border  border-primary">
                                                Scheme
                                            </TableHead>
                                            <TableHead className="text-center font-bold py-3 border  border-primary">
                                                Seat Numbers
                                            </TableHead>
                                            <TableHead className="text-center font-bold py-3 border  border-primary">
                                                Subject Code
                                            </TableHead>
                                            <TableHead className="text-center font-bold py-3 border  border-primary">
                                                Subject
                                            </TableHead>
                                            <TableHead className="text-center font-bold py-3 border  border-primary">
                                                Total Stu.
                                            </TableHead>
                                            <TableHead className="text-center font-bold py-3 border  border-primary">
                                                Timeslot
                                            </TableHead>
                                        </TableRow>
                                    </TableHeader>
                                )}
                                <TableBody>
                                    {chunk.map((item, index) => {
                                        const group = groupedAllotment[item.BLOCKNO];
                                        const isFirstInGroup = group && group[0] === item;
                                        return (
                                            <TableRow
                                                key={index}
                                                className="border-b  border-primary"
                                            >
                                                {isFirstInGroup && (
                                                    <>
                                                        <TableCell
                                                            rowSpan={group.length}
                                                            className="text-center border-r  border-primary px-3 py-2"
                                                        >
                                                            {item.BLOCKNO}
                                                        </TableCell>
                                                        <TableCell
                                                            rowSpan={group.length}
                                                            className="text-center p-2 border-r  border-primary px-3 py-2"
                                                        >
                                                            {item.LOCATION}
                                                        </TableCell>
                                                    </>
                                                )}
                                                <TableCell className="text-center border-r px-3 py-2  border-primary">
                                                    {item.SCHEME}
                                                </TableCell>
                                                <TableCell className="text-center border-r px-3 py-2  border-primary">
                                                    {item.FIRST} TO {item.LAST}
                                                </TableCell>
                                                <TableCell className="text-center border-r px-3 py-2  border-primary">
                                                    {item.SUBJECT_CODE}
                                                </TableCell>
                                                <TableCell className="text-center border-r px-3 py-2  border-primary">
                                                    {item.SUBJECT_NAME}
                                                </TableCell>
                                                <TableCell className="text-center border-r px-3 py-2  border-primary">
                                                    {item.ASSIGNED}
                                                </TableCell>
                                                <TableCell className="text-center px-3 py-2  border-primary">
                                                    {item.TIMESLOT}
                                                </TableCell>
                                            </TableRow>
                                        );
                                    })}
                                </TableBody>
                            </Table>
                            <div className="flex justify-between absolute bottom-0 left-2 right-2 mx-4">
                                <Label className="mb-1 mr-2 text-muted text-left w-full text-xs">
                                    Page {chunkIndex + 1} of {allotmentChunks.length}
                                </Label>
                                <ReportFooter/>
                            </div>
                            {chunkIndex === allotmentChunks.length - 1 && (
                                <Label className="absolute bottom-0 mb-8 text-center w-full left-4 text-lg">
                                    (To be displayed at the entrance/Main gate of institute)
                                </Label>
                            )}
                        </CardContent>
                    </Card>
                );
            })}
        </>
    );
};

const HeaderInfo = ({ block }: { block: ExamData }) => (
    <div className="flex flex-col sm:flex-row justify-between mt-4 text-sm">
        <Table>
            <TableBody>
                <TableRow>
                    <TableCell className="border border-primary">
                        <strong>Date:</strong> {formatDate(block.DATE)}
                    </TableCell>
                    <TableCell className="border border-primary">
                        <strong>Session:</strong> {(block.SESSION)}
                    </TableCell>
                    <TableCell className="border border-primary">
                        <strong>Location:</strong> {(block.LOCATION)}
                    </TableCell> 
                    <TableCell className="border border-primary">
                        <strong>Supervisor:</strong> {(block.SUPERVISOR_NAME)}
                    </TableCell>
                </TableRow>
            </TableBody>
        </Table>
    </div>
)

const SchemeInfo = ({ subjects }: { subjects: ExamData[] }) => (
    <div className="mt-2 text-sm">
      <Table>
        <TableHeader>
            <TableRow className="font-semibold">
                <TableCell className="border border-primary">Scheme</TableCell>
                <TableCell className="border border-primary">Subject</TableCell>
                <TableCell className="border border-primary">Timeslot</TableCell>
            </TableRow>
        </TableHeader>
        <TableBody>
            {subjects.map((subject, index) => (
                <TableRow key={index}>
                    <TableCell className="border border-primary">{subject.SCHEME}</TableCell>
                    <TableCell className="border border-primary">{subject.SUBJECT_NAME}</TableCell>
                    <TableCell className="border border-primary">{subject.TIMESLOT}</TableCell>
                </TableRow>
            ))}
        </TableBody>
      </Table>
    </div>
);

const SeatTable = ({ subjects, blockDistributions }: { subjects: ExamData[], blockDistributions: { [key: string]: number[] } }) => {
    const allSeatNumbers = subjects.flatMap((subject) => subject.SEAT_NUMBERS);
    const schemeStartIndices = subjects.reduce(
        (acc, subject) => {
            acc[subject.SCHEME] = acc[subject.SCHEME] || allSeatNumbers.indexOf(subject.SEAT_NUMBERS[0]);
            return acc;
        },
        {} as { [key: string]: number }
    );
    const location = subjects[0]?.LOCATION;
    const distribution = blockDistributions[location] || [10, 10, 10, 10];
    const maxRows = Math.max(...distribution);

    const createZigZagPattern = (seatNumbers: number[], distribution: number[]) => {
        const result: (number | null)[][] = [];
        let currentIndex = 0;
        let isTopToBottom = true;
        for (let i = distribution.length - 1; i >= 0; i--) {
            const columnSize = distribution[i];
            const column: (number | null)[] = Array(maxRows).fill(null);
            if (isTopToBottom) {
                for (let j = 0; j < columnSize && currentIndex < seatNumbers.length; j++) {
                    column[j] = seatNumbers[currentIndex];
                    currentIndex++;
                }
            } else {
                for (let j = columnSize - 1; j >= 0 && currentIndex < seatNumbers.length; j--) {
                    column[j] = seatNumbers[currentIndex];
                    currentIndex++;
                }
            }
            result.push(column);
            isTopToBottom = !isTopToBottom;
        }
        return result.reverse();
    };

    const seatArrangement = createZigZagPattern(allSeatNumbers, distribution);
    const ec_code = useEcCode();
    const { getExamCenterInfo } = useExamCenter(ec_code);

    return (
        <div className="w-full p-4">
            <div className="flex justify-center mb-4">
                <div
                    className="grid gap-2 w-full"
                    style={{ gridTemplateColumns: `repeat(${distribution.length}, minmax(0, 1fr))` }}
                >
                    {seatArrangement.map((column, colIndex) => (
                        <div key={colIndex} className="flex flex-col gap-2">
                            {column.map((seatNumber, rowIndex) => {
                                if (seatNumber === null) return null;
                                const seatIndex = allSeatNumbers.indexOf(seatNumber);
                                const scheme = Object.keys(schemeStartIndices).find(
                                    (scheme) => schemeStartIndices[scheme] === seatIndex
                                );
                                return (
                                    <div
                                        key={rowIndex}
                                        className="border border-primary rounded-md shadow"
                                    >
                                        <div className="flex items-center justify-center text-sm">
                                            <div className="p-2 text-center flex-grow">
                                                {seatNumber}
                                            </div>
                                            <div className="p-2 text-center flex-1 rounded border-l border-primary ">
                                                <div className="font-medium ">B{seatIndex + 1}</div>
                                                {scheme && (
                                                    <div className="text-xs text-blue-600 p-0 m-0 underline">
                                                        {scheme}
                                                    </div>
                                                )}
                                            </div>
                                        </div>
                                    </div>
                                );
                            })}
                        </div>
                    ))}
                </div>
            </div>
            <div className="text-right mt-24">
                <div className="text-muted-foreground text-sm">
                    {getExamCenterInfo().OFFICER_INCHARGE}<br />
                    <span className="italic">Signature of Officer Incharge</span>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>
    );
};

const BlockCard = ({ block, institute, blockDistributions }: { block: ExamData[]; institute: string; blockDistributions: { [key: string]: number[] } }) => {
    return (
        <Card className="shadow-md rounded-md overflow-hidden relative" style={PAGE_STYLE}>
            <CardHeader className="p-4 border-b  border-primary">
                <h1 className="text-center text-2xl font-bold mb-2">{institute}</h1>
                <HeaderInfo block={block[0]} />
                <SchemeInfo subjects={block} />
            </CardHeader>
            <CardContent className="p-4">
                <SeatTable subjects={block} blockDistributions={blockDistributions} />
            </CardContent>
            <ReportFooter/>
        </Card>
    );
};

export default function BlockAllocation() {
    const ec_code = useEcCode()
    const { getExamCenterInfo } = useExamCenter(ec_code)
    const contentRef = useRef<HTMLDivElement>(null)
    const reactToPrintFn = useReactToPrint({ contentRef })
    const [date, setDate] = useState<string>(new Date().toISOString().split("T")[0])
    const [session, setSession] = useState<string>("")
    const [numberOfAllotmentCopies, setNumberOfAllotmentCopies] = useState<number>(1)
    const [apiResponse, setApiResponse] = useState<ExamData[] | null>(null)
    const [isLoading, setIsLoading] = useState<boolean>(false)
    const [error, setError] = useState<string | null>(null)
    const [blockDistributions, setBlockDistributions] = useState<{ [key: string]: number[] }>({})

    // Define the expected API response type
    interface BlockDistributionResponse {
        [key: string]: BlockDistribution;
    }

    const handleFetchData = async () => {
        if (!date || !session) { toast.warning("Select date and session"); return }
        setIsLoading(true)
        try {
            // Fetch both the exam data and block distributions in parallel
            const [examResponse, blockResponse] = await Promise.all([
                axios.get(`/api/blocks?date=${date}&session=${session}`),
                axios.get<BlockDistributionResponse>('/api/block')
            ]);
            
            if (examResponse.data.length === 0) {
                throw new Error("NO DATA FOUND FOR GIVEN DATE AND SESSION..")
            }
            
            // Process block distribution data
            const distributionData = Object.entries(blockResponse.data).reduce(
                (acc: { [key: string]: number[] }, [key, value]: [string, BlockDistribution]) => {
                    acc[key] = value.distribution;
                    return acc;
                },
                {} as { [key: string]: number[] }
            );
            
            // Set both states
            setApiResponse(examResponse.data)
            setBlockDistributions(distributionData)
        } catch (error) {
            const msg = axios.isAxiosError(error)
                ? error.response?.data?.message
                : error instanceof Error
                    ? error.message
                    : "Something went wrong"
            setError(msg)
            toast.error(msg)
        } finally {
            setIsLoading(false)
        }
    }

    const transformedData = transformData(apiResponse)

    return (
        <div className="p-6 min-h-screen text-md">
            <div className="max-w-7xl mx-auto">
                {!apiResponse ? (
                    <ReportDataRendered
                        isLoading={isLoading}
                        error={error}
                        date={date}
                        session={session}
                        setDate={setDate}
                        setSession={setSession}
                        handleFetchData={handleFetchData}
                        numberOfAllotmentCopies={numberOfAllotmentCopies}
                        setNumberOfAllotmentCopies={setNumberOfAllotmentCopies}
                    />
                ) : (
                    <>
                        <div className="flex justify-between !text-primary">
                            <Button
                                type="reset"
                                variant="secondary"
                                onClick={() => {
                                    setApiResponse(null)
                                    setError(null)
                                }}
                                className="mb-6 flex items-center gap-2 group"
                            >
                                <XIcon className="transition-transform duration-500 group-hover:rotate-180 hover:font-bold group-hover:scale-110" />
                                <span className="transition-opacity duration-500 group-hover:opacity-80 group-hover:translate-x-1">
                                    Clear Print
                                </span>
                            </Button>
                            <Button onClick={() => reactToPrintFn()} className="mb-6 group transition-transform duration-300 hover:scale-105">
                                <LucidePrinter className="transition-transform duration-300 group-hover:scale-105" /> Print All Pages
                            </Button>
                        </div>
                        <ReportDataDisplayed
                            contentRef={contentRef as React.RefObject<HTMLDivElement>}
                            apiResponse={apiResponse}
                            numberOfAllotmentCopies={numberOfAllotmentCopies}
                            transformedData={transformedData}
                            getExamCenterInfo={getExamCenterInfo}
                            blockDistributions={blockDistributions}
                        />
                    </>)}
            </div>
        </div>
    )
}

const ReportDataRendered = ({
    isLoading,
    error,
    date,
    session,
    setDate,
    setSession,
    handleFetchData,
    numberOfAllotmentCopies,
    setNumberOfAllotmentCopies,
}: {
    isLoading: boolean
    error: string | null
    date: string
    session: string
    setDate: React.Dispatch<React.SetStateAction<string>>
    setSession: React.Dispatch<React.SetStateAction<string>>
    handleFetchData: () => void
    numberOfAllotmentCopies: number
    setNumberOfAllotmentCopies: React.Dispatch<React.SetStateAction<number>>
}) => (
    <Card className="max-w-md mx-auto">
        <CardHeader className="bg-muted border-secondary-foreground rounded-t-xl">
            <h2 className="text-2xl font-bold text-center">DATE & SESSION WISE BLOCK ALLOCATION REPORT</h2>
        </CardHeader>
        <CardContent className="space-y-4">
            <div className="space-y-4">
                <div className="space-y-2">
                    <label className="text-sm font-medium">Date</label>
                    <Input type="date" value={date} onChange={(e) => setDate(e.target.value)} />
                </div>
                <div className="space-y-2">
                    <label className="text-sm font-medium">Session</label>
                    <Select value={session} onValueChange={setSession} required>
                        <SelectTrigger>
                            <SelectValue placeholder="Select session" />
                        </SelectTrigger>
                        <SelectContent>
                            <SelectItem value="Morning">Morning</SelectItem>
                            <SelectItem value="Afternoon">Afternoon</SelectItem>
                        </SelectContent>
                    </Select>
                </div>
            </div>
            <div className="flex items-center gap-2 justify-between text-md">
                <label className="text-sm font-medium">Number of Allotment Report Copies</label>
                <Input
                    type="number"
                    className="w-40"
                    value={numberOfAllotmentCopies}
                    min={1}
                    max={5}
                    onChange={(e) => setNumberOfAllotmentCopies(Number.parseInt(e.target.value))}
                />
            </div>
            <Button onClick={handleFetchData} disabled={isLoading} className="w-full">
                {isLoading ? (
                    <>
                        <Loader2 className="mr-2 h-4 w-4 animate-spin" />
                        Loading...
                    </>
                ) : (
                    "Fetch Data"
                )}
            </Button>
            {error && (
                <Alert variant="destructive" className="flex items-center gap-4">
                    <AlertCircle className="h-5 w-5 text-red-500" />
                    <AlertDescription className="text-sm">{error}</AlertDescription>
                </Alert>
            )}
        </CardContent>
    </Card>
)

export const ReportDataDisplayed = ({
    contentRef,
    apiResponse,
    numberOfAllotmentCopies,
    transformedData,
    getExamCenterInfo,
    blockDistributions,
}: {
    contentRef: React.RefObject<HTMLDivElement>
    apiResponse: ExamData[]
    numberOfAllotmentCopies: number
    transformedData: { [key: string]: ExamData[] }
    getExamCenterInfo: () => { NAME: string; SEALING_SUPERVISOR: string; OFFICER_INCHARGE: string }
    blockDistributions: { [key: string]: number[] }
}) => (
    <div>
        <div ref={contentRef}>
            <div className="space-y-8">
                <SubjectAllocationTable data={apiResponse} />
                {Array.from({ length: numberOfAllotmentCopies }).map((_, index) => (
                    <AllotmentTable allotment={apiResponse} institute={getExamCenterInfo().NAME} key={index} />
                ))}
                {Object.entries(transformedData).map(([blockKey, blockData]) => (
                    <BlockCard 
                        key={blockKey} 
                        block={blockData as ExamData[]} 
                        institute={getExamCenterInfo().NAME} 
                        blockDistributions={blockDistributions}
                    />
                ))}
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>
)
</modules/reports/block_allocation.tsx>

<modules/block/absent.tsx>
'use client'

import React, { useState } from 'react'
import { AlertCircle, Loader2 } from 'lucide-react'
import { Label } from '@/components/ui/label'
import { Input } from '@/components/ui/input'
import { Button } from '@/components/ui/button'
import { Select, SelectContent, SelectItem, SelectTrigger, SelectValue } from '@/components/ui/select'
import { Alert, AlertDescription } from '@/components/ui/alert'
import { Card, CardContent, CardDescription, CardHeader, CardTitle } from '@/components/ui/card'
import { Separator } from '@/components/ui/separator'
import ConfirmationDialog from '@/components/misc/DialogBox'
import { toast } from 'react-toastify'
import axios from 'axios'

interface SchemeData {
    scheme: string
    subject_code: string
    subject_name: string
    total_students: number
    seatNumbers: number[]
    absent_numbers: number[]
}

interface BlockData {
    blockno: string
    location: string
    schemes: SchemeData[]
}

interface DialogState {
    type: "error" | "success" | "info"
    message: string
}

interface ApiBlockData {
    blockno: string
    location: string
    scheme: string
    subject_code: string
    subject_name: string
    total_students: number
    seatNumbers: number[]
    absent_numbers: number[]
}

export default function AbsentReport() {
    const [date, setDate] = useState('')
    const [session, setSession] = useState('')
    const [blocks, setBlocks] = useState<BlockData[]>([])
    const [selectedBlock, setSelectedBlock] = useState<BlockData | null>(null)
    const [selectedScheme, setSelectedScheme] = useState<SchemeData | null>(null)
    const [absentSeats, setAbsentSeats] = useState<number[]>([])
    const [isLoading, setIsLoading] = useState(false)
    const [error, setError] = useState<string | null>(null)
    const [dialogState, setDialogState] = useState<DialogState | null>(null)

    const fetchData = async () => {
        if (!date || !session) {
            setError('Please select a date and session')
            return
        }
        setIsLoading(true)
        setError(null)
        resetSelection()

        try {
            const response = await axios.get(`/api/absent/?date=${date}&session=${session}`)


            setBlocks(combineBlocks(response.data))
        } catch (err) {
            const message = axios.isAxiosError(err) ? err?.response?.data?.error : err instanceof Error ? err.message : "An error occurred"
            setError(message)
        } finally {
            setIsLoading(false)
        }
    }

    const combineBlocks = (data: ApiBlockData[]): BlockData[] => {
        const combinedBlocks: Record<string, BlockData> = {}
        data.forEach((block) => {
            if (!combinedBlocks[block.blockno]) {
                combinedBlocks[block.blockno] = { blockno: block.blockno, location: block.location, schemes: [] }
            }
            combinedBlocks[block.blockno].schemes.push({
                scheme: block.scheme,
                subject_code: block.subject_code,
                subject_name: block.subject_name,
                total_students: block.total_students,
                seatNumbers: block.seatNumbers,
                absent_numbers: block.absent_numbers,
            })
        })
        return Object.values(combinedBlocks)
    }

    const handleMarkAbsent = async () => {
        if (!selectedBlock || !selectedScheme) {
            setError('Please select a block and scheme')
            return
        }
        await updateAbsentSeats(absentSeats)
    }

    const handleResetAbsent = async () => {
        if (!selectedBlock || !selectedScheme) {
            setError('Please select a block and scheme to reset absent numbers')
            return
        }
        await updateAbsentSeats([])
    }

    const updateAbsentSeats = async (seats: number[]) => {
        setIsLoading(true)
        setError(null)
        try {
            const response = await fetch('/api/absent/', {
                method: 'POST',
                headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
                body: JSON.stringify({
                    date,
                    session,
                    institute_id: '1740',
                    blockno: selectedBlock!.blockno,
                    scheme: selectedScheme!.scheme,
                    subject_code: selectedScheme!.subject_code,
                    absent_numbers: seats,
                }),
            })
            if (!response.ok) throw new Error('Failed to update absent seats')
            toast.success(seats.length ? 'Absent seats updated successfully' : 'Absent numbers reset successfully')
            resetSelection()
        } catch (err) {
            setError(err instanceof Error ? err.message : 'An error occurred')
        } finally {
            setIsLoading(false)
        }
    }

    const resetSelection = () => {
        setBlocks([])
        setSelectedBlock(null)
        setSelectedScheme(null)
        setAbsentSeats([])
    }

    const handleSeatSelection = (seatNo: number) => {
        setAbsentSeats(prev => prev.includes(seatNo) ? prev.filter(s => s !== seatNo) : [...prev, seatNo])
        
    }

    const confirmAction = (action: 'mark' | 'reset') => {
        const message = action === 'mark'
            ? `Are you sure you want to mark "${absentSeats.join(", ")}" students as absent?`
            : 'Are you sure you want to reset absent numbers?'

        setDialogState({
            type: "info",
            message
        })
    }

    const handleDialogConfirm = () => {
        if (dialogState?.message.includes('mark')) {
            handleMarkAbsent()
        } else {
            handleResetAbsent()
        }
        setDialogState(null)
    }

    return (
        <Card className="w-full max-w-2xl mx-auto">
            <CardHeader>
                <CardTitle>Absent Student Marking</CardTitle>
                <CardDescription>Mark students as absent for a specific date, session, and block.</CardDescription>
            </CardHeader>
            <CardContent className="space-y-6">
                <form onSubmit={(e) => { e.preventDefault(); fetchData() }} className="space-y-4">
                    <div className="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 gap-4">
                        <div className="space-y-2">
                            <Label htmlFor="date">Date</Label>
                            <Input id="date" type="date" value={date} onChange={(e) => setDate(e.target.value)} required />
                        </div>
                        <div className="space-y-2">
                            <Label htmlFor="session">Session</Label>
                            <Select onValueChange={setSession} required>
                                <SelectTrigger id="session">
                                    <SelectValue placeholder="Select a session" />
                                </SelectTrigger>
                                <SelectContent>
                                    <SelectItem value="Morning">Morning</SelectItem>
                                    <SelectItem value="Afternoon">Afternoon</SelectItem>
                                </SelectContent>
                            </Select>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                    <Button type="submit" className="w-full" disabled={isLoading || !date || !session}>
                        {isLoading && <Loader2 className="h-4 w-4 animate-spin mr-2" />}
                        Fetch Blocks
                    </Button>
                </form>

                {blocks.length > 0 && (
                    <>
                        <Separator />
                        <SelectBlock blocks={blocks} onSelect={(block) => { setSelectedBlock(block); setSelectedScheme(null); setAbsentSeats([]) }} />
                    </>
                )}

                {selectedBlock && (
                    <>
                        <Separator />
                        <SelectScheme schemes={selectedBlock.schemes} onSelect={(scheme) => { setSelectedScheme(scheme); setAbsentSeats(scheme.absent_numbers) }} />
                    </>
                )}

                {selectedScheme && (
                    <>
                        <Separator />
                        <SeatSelection
                            seatNumbers={selectedScheme.seatNumbers}
                            absentSeats={absentSeats}
                            onSeatSelect={handleSeatSelection}
                        />
                        <div className="flex gap-2">
                            <Button onClick={() => confirmAction('mark')} className="w-full" disabled={isLoading}>
                                {isLoading && <Loader2 className="h-4 w-4 animate-spin mr-2" />}
                                Save Absent
                            </Button>
                            <Button onClick={() => confirmAction('reset')} className="w-full" variant="destructive" disabled={isLoading}>
                                {isLoading && <Loader2 className="h-4 w-4 animate-spin mr-2" />}
                                Reset Absent
                            </Button>
                        </div>
                    </>
                )}

                {error && (
                    <Alert variant="destructive">
                        <AlertCircle className="h-4 w-4 mr-2" />
                        <AlertDescription>{error}</AlertDescription>
                    </Alert>
                )}
            </CardContent>

            {dialogState && (
                <ConfirmationDialog
                    type={dialogState.type}
                    message={dialogState.message}
                    onConfirm={handleDialogConfirm}
                    onCancel={() => setDialogState(null)}
                />
            )}
        </Card>
    )
}

function SelectBlock({ blocks, onSelect }: { blocks: BlockData[], onSelect: (block: BlockData) => void }) {
    return (
        <div className="space-y-2">
            <Label htmlFor="block">Select Block</Label>
            <Select onValueChange={(value) => {
                const block = blocks.find((b) => b.blockno === value)
                if (block) onSelect(block)
            }}>
                <SelectTrigger id="block">
                    <SelectValue placeholder="Select a block" />
                </SelectTrigger>
                <SelectContent>
                    {blocks.map((block) => (
                        <SelectItem key={block.blockno} value={block.blockno}>
                            Block {block.blockno} - {block.location}
                        </SelectItem>
                    ))}
                </SelectContent>
            </Select>
        </div>
    )
}

function SelectScheme({ schemes, onSelect }: { schemes: SchemeData[], onSelect: (scheme: SchemeData) => void }) {
    return (
        <div className="space-y-2">
            <Label htmlFor="scheme">Select Scheme</Label>
            <Select onValueChange={(value) => {
                const scheme = schemes.find((s) => s.scheme === value)
                if (scheme) onSelect(scheme)
            }}>
                <SelectTrigger id="scheme">
                    <SelectValue placeholder="Select a scheme" />
                </SelectTrigger>
                <SelectContent>
                    {schemes.map((scheme) => (
                        <SelectItem key={scheme.scheme} value={scheme.scheme}>
                            {scheme.scheme} - {scheme.subject_name}
                        </SelectItem>
                    ))}
                </SelectContent>
            </Select>
        </div>
    )
}

function SeatSelection({
    seatNumbers,
    absentSeats,
    onSeatSelect,
}: {
    seatNumbers: number[] | undefined;
    absentSeats: number[];
    onSeatSelect: (seatNo: number) => void;
}) {
    // Provide a default empty array if seatNumbers is undefined
    const numbers = seatNumbers ?? [];

    return (
        <div className="space-y-2">
            <Label>Seat Numbers</Label>
            <div className="grid grid-cols-2 md:grid-cols-4 gap-4">
                {numbers.map((seatNo) => (
                    <div
                        key={seatNo}
                        className={`p-2 rounded-md cursor-pointer text-center transition duration-100 border ${absentSeats.includes(seatNo)
                            ? "bg-red-100 dark:bg-red-900 text-red-800 dark:text-red-200 border-red-300 dark:border-red-700"
                            : "bg-green-100 dark:bg-green-900 text-green-800 dark:text-green-200 border-green-300 dark:border-green-700"
                            }`}  onClick={() => onSeatSelect(seatNo)}
                    >
                        {seatNo}
                    </div>
                ))}
            </div>
        </div>
    );
}
</modules/block/absent.tsx>

<modules/block/relorder.tsx>
'use client';

import React, { useState, useCallback, useRef } from 'react';
import { Button } from "@/components/ui/button";
import { Card, CardContent, CardDescription, CardFooter, CardHeader, CardTitle } from "@/components/ui/card";
import { Input } from "@/components/ui/input";
import { Select, SelectContent, SelectItem, SelectTrigger, SelectValue } from "@/components/ui/select";
import { Separator } from "@/components/ui/separator";
import { Badge } from "@/components/ui/badge";
import { Users, UserCheck, BarChart } from 'lucide-react';
import { toast } from 'react-toastify';
import { useEcCode } from '@/lib/helper';
import { useExamCenter } from '@/hooks/useExamCenter';

interface Reliever {
  ID: number;
  NAME: string;
  DEPARTMENT: string;
}

interface RelieverOrderResponse {
  avg_strength: string;
  relievers: Record<string, Reliever>;
  supervision_required: Record<string, Record<string, SupervisionSessionData>>;
}

interface SupervisionSessionData {
  total_students: number;
  schemes: string[];
  allotted: string[];
}

export default function RelieverOrder() {
  const [data, setData] = useState<RelieverOrderResponse | null>(null);
  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(false);
  const [error, setError] = useState<string | null>(null);
  const [selectedRelievers, setSelectedRelievers] = useState<Record<string, string[]>>({});
  const [isSaving, setIsSaving] = useState(false);
  const [date, setDate] = useState<string>("");
  const [session, setSession] = useState<"Morning" | "Afternoon">("Morning");
  const loadDataButtonRef = useRef<HTMLButtonElement>(null);

  const ec_code = useEcCode();
  const { getDepartmentByCode } = useExamCenter(ec_code);

  const fetchData = useCallback(async () => {
    if (!date || !session) return;

    setLoading(true);
    setError(null);

    try {
      const response = await fetch(`/api/rel-order?date=${date}&session=${session}`);
      if (!response.ok) throw new Error(`HTTP error! Status: ${response.status}`);
      const result: RelieverOrderResponse = await response.json();
      const initialSelections = Object.entries(result.supervision_required).reduce((acc, [date, sessions]) => {
        Object.entries(sessions).forEach(([session, data]) => {
          acc[`${date}-${session}`] = data.allotted || [];
        });
        return acc;
      }, {} as Record<string, string[]>);
      setSelectedRelievers(initialSelections);
      setData(result);
    } catch (error) {
      console.error("Error fetching data:", error);
      setError("Failed to fetch data. Please try again later.");
    } finally {
      setLoading(false);
    }
  }, [date, session]);

  const saveRelievers = useCallback(
    async (date: string, session: string) => {
      const key = `${date}-${session}`;
      const relieversToSave = selectedRelievers[key]?.filter(Boolean) || [];
      const existingAllotted = data?.supervision_required[date]?.[session]?.allotted || [];

      if (!relieversToSave.length) {
        toast.warn("No relievers selected to save");
        return;
      }

      setIsSaving(true);
      try {
        const relieverIds = relieversToSave.map(uid => {
          const reliever = data?.relievers[uid];
          return reliever ? reliever.ID : null;
        }).filter(Boolean) as number[];

        const method = existingAllotted.length > 0 ? "PUT" : "POST";
        let body;

        if (method === "POST") {
          body = {
            date,
            session,
            reliever_ids: relieverIds,
            reliever_uids: relieversToSave,
          };
        } else {
          const operations = relieversToSave.map((newUid, index) => {
            const oldUid = existingAllotted[index];
            if (oldUid && oldUid !== newUid) {
              return {
                date,
                session,
                old_reliever_uid: oldUid,
                new_reliever_uid: newUid,
              };
            }
            return null;
          }).filter(Boolean);

          if (operations.length === 0) {
            toast.info("No changes to save");
            setIsSaving(false);
            return;
          }

          body = operations[0];
        }

        const response = await fetch("/api/rel-order", {
          method,
          headers: {
            "Content-Type": "application/json",
          },
          body: JSON.stringify(body),
        });

        if (!response.ok) {
          throw new Error(`Failed to save relievers: ${response.statusText}`);
        }

        toast.success("Relievers assigned successfully");

        if (session === "Morning") {
          setSession("Afternoon");
        } else {
          const nextDate = new Date(date);
          nextDate.setDate(nextDate.getDate() + 1);
          setDate(nextDate.toISOString().split("T")[0]);
          setSession("Morning");
        }

        setSelectedRelievers((prev) => {
          const updated = { ...prev };
          delete updated[key];
          return updated;
        });

        setData(null);
      } catch (error) {
        console.error("Error saving relievers:", error);
        toast.error("Failed to save relievers");
      } finally {
        setIsSaving(false);
      }
    },
    [selectedRelievers, data]
  );

  const calculateRelieversRequired = useCallback(
    (totalStudents: number) => {
      const avgStrength = parseFloat(data?.avg_strength || "0");
      const supervisorsRequired = avgStrength > 0 ? Math.ceil(totalStudents / avgStrength) : 0;
      return Math.max(1, Math.ceil(supervisorsRequired / 3));
    },
    [data]
  );

  const getAvailableRelievers = (date: string, session: string, currentIndex: number) => {
    const key = `${date}-${session}`;
    const selectedForCard = selectedRelievers[key] || [];
    return Object.entries(data?.relievers || {}).filter(([uid]) => 
      !selectedForCard.includes(uid) || selectedForCard[currentIndex] === uid
    );
  };

  const handleRelieverChange = (
    date: string,
    session: string,
    index: number,
    relieverUid: string
  ) => {
    const key = `${date}-${session}`;
    setSelectedRelievers((prev) => {
      const currentRelievers = prev[key] || [];
      const updatedRelievers = [...currentRelievers];
      while (updatedRelievers.length <= index) {
        updatedRelievers.push("");
      }
      updatedRelievers[index] = relieverUid;
      return { ...prev, [key]: updatedRelievers };
    });
  };

  const isSaveButtonEnabled = (date: string, session: string, required: number) => {
    const key = `${date}-${session}`;
    const selected = selectedRelievers[key]?.filter(Boolean) || [];
    return selected.length === required;
  };

  const handleLoadData = () => {
    if (!date || !session) {
      toast.warn("Please select both date and session");
      return;
    }
    fetchData();
  };

  const getUniqueDepartments = (schemes: string[]) => {
    const uniqueDepartmentCodes = [...new Set(schemes.map(s => s.split("-")[0]))];
    return uniqueDepartmentCodes.map(code => getDepartmentByCode(code).name);
  };

  return (
    <div className="grid grid-cols-1 gap-6 p-6 max-w-6xl mx-auto">
      <Card className="shadow-md">
        <CardHeader className="pb-2">
          <CardTitle className="text-xl font-bold">Reliever Order</CardTitle>
          <CardDescription>Assign relievers to examination sessions (1/3 of supervisors)</CardDescription>
        </CardHeader>
        <CardContent>
          <div className="flex flex-wrap gap-4">
            <div className="flex flex-col gap-2">
              <label className="text-sm font-medium text-secondary-foreground">Date</label>
              <Input
                type="date"
                value={date}
                onChange={(e) => setDate(e.target.value)}
                className="w-48"
              />
            </div>
            <div className="flex flex-col gap-2">
              <label className="text-sm font-medium text-secondary-foreground">Session</label>
              <Select value={session} onValueChange={(value: "Morning" | "Afternoon") => setSession(value)}>
                <SelectTrigger className="w-40">
                  <SelectValue placeholder="Select session" />
                </SelectTrigger>
                <SelectContent>
                  <SelectItem value="Morning">Morning</SelectItem>
                  <SelectItem value="Afternoon">Afternoon</SelectItem>
                </SelectContent>
              </Select>
            </div>
            <div className="flex flex-col gap-2 justify-end">
              <Button
                onClick={handleLoadData}
                ref={loadDataButtonRef}
                disabled={loading}
                className="h-10"
              >
                {loading ? "Loading..." : "Load Data"}
              </Button>
            </div>
          </div>
        </CardContent>
      </Card>

      {loading && (
        <div className="p-6 text-center">
          <div className="animate-pulse text-lg font-medium">Loading...</div>
        </div>
      )}

      {error && (
        <div className="p-6 text-center">
          <div className="text-red-500 border border-red-200 rounded-lg p-4 bg-red-50">{error}</div>
        </div>
      )}

      {data && (
        <>
          {Object.entries(data.supervision_required).flatMap(([date, sessions]) =>
            Object.entries(sessions).map(([session, { total_students, schemes, allotted }]) => {
              const relieversRequired = calculateRelieversRequired(total_students);
              const uniqueKey = `${date}-${session}`;
              const selectedForCard = selectedRelievers[uniqueKey] || allotted || [];
              const uniqueDepartments = getUniqueDepartments(schemes);
              const blocksRequired = Math.ceil(total_students / parseFloat(data.avg_strength));

              return (
                <Card
                  key={uniqueKey}
                  className="shadow-md hover:shadow-lg transition-shadow duration-300 overflow-hidden"
                >
                  <CardHeader className="bg-muted pb-2">
                    <div className="flex justify-between items-start">
                      <div>
                        <CardTitle className="text-xl font-bold">
                          {new Date(date).toLocaleDateString('en-IN', { weekday: 'long', year: 'numeric', month: 'short', day: 'numeric' })} - {session}
                        </CardTitle>
                        <CardDescription className="mt-1 text-sm">
                          <div className="flex flex-wrap gap-2 mt-2">
                            {uniqueDepartments.map((dept, idx) => (
                              <Badge key={idx} variant="outline" className="bg-blue-50 text-blue-700 border-blue-200">
                                {dept}
                              </Badge>
                            ))}
                          </div>
                        </CardDescription>
                      </div>

                      <div className="flex gap-2">
                        <div className="inline-flex items-center gap-2.5 bg-green-100 text-green-900 px-4 py-2 rounded-lg shadow-sm hover:bg-green-200 transition-colors">
                          <Users className="w-5 h-5" />
                          <span className="text-sm font-bold">{total_students}</span>
                          <span className="text-xs font-medium">Students</span>
                        </div>
                        <div className="inline-flex items-center gap-2.5 bg-purple-100 text-purple-900 px-4 py-2 rounded-lg shadow-sm hover:bg-purple-200 transition-colors">
                          <UserCheck className="w-5 h-5" />
                          <span className="text-sm font-bold">{relieversRequired}</span>
                          <span className="text-xs font-medium">Relievers</span>
                        </div>
                        <div className="inline-flex items-center gap-2.5 bg-blue-100 text-blue-900 px-4 py-2 rounded-lg shadow-sm hover:bg-blue-200 transition-colors">
                          <BarChart className="w-5 h-5" />
                          <span className="text-sm font-bold">{data.avg_strength}</span>
                          <span className="text-xs font-medium">Average Strength</span>
                        </div>
                        <div className="inline-flex items-center gap-2.5 bg-orange-100 text-orange-900 px-4 py-2 rounded-lg shadow-sm hover:bg-orange-200 transition-colors">
                          <span className="text-sm font-bold">{blocksRequired}</span>
                          <span className="text-xs font-medium">Blocks Required</span>
                        </div>
                      </div>
                    </div>
                  </CardHeader>

                  <Separator />

                  <CardContent className="p-6">
                    <div className="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3 gap-4">
                      {Array.from({ length: relieversRequired }).map((_, index) => (
                        <div key={index} className="flex flex-col">
