                          <label className="text-sm font-medium text-secondary-foreground mb-1">
                            Reliever {index + 1}
                          </label>
                          <Select
                            value={selectedForCard[index] || ""}
                            onValueChange={(value) => handleRelieverChange(date, session, index, value)}
                          >
                            <SelectTrigger className="w-full">
                              <SelectValue placeholder="Select a reliever" />
                            </SelectTrigger>
                            <SelectContent>
                              {getAvailableRelievers(date, session, index).map(([uid, { NAME, DEPARTMENT }]) => (
                                <SelectItem key={uid} value={uid}>
                                  {NAME} ({DEPARTMENT})
                                </SelectItem>
                              ))}
                            </SelectContent>
                          </Select>
                        </div>
                      ))}
                    </div>
                  </CardContent>

                  <CardFooter className="p-6 pt-0">
                    <Button
                      onClick={() => saveRelievers(date, session)}
                      disabled={isSaving || !isSaveButtonEnabled(date, session, relieversRequired)}
                      className="w-full"
                      variant={isSaveButtonEnabled(date, session, relieversRequired) ? "default" : "outline"}
                    >
                      {isSaving ? "Saving..." : "Save Relievers"}
                    </Button>
                  </CardFooter>
                </Card>
              );
            })
          )}
        </>
      )}

      {!loading && !error && !data && (
        <div className="p-8 text-center bg-muted rounded-lg border border-gray-200">
          <div className="text-secondary-foreground font-bold">No data available. Please select a date and session to load data.</div>
        </div>
      )}
    </div>
  );
} 
</modules/block/relorder.tsx>

<modules/block/change_supervisor.tsx>
'use client'

import React, { useState } from 'react'
import { AlertCircle, CheckCircle2, Loader2 } from 'lucide-react'
import { Label } from '@/components/ui/label'
import { Input } from '@/components/ui/input'
import { Button } from '@/components/ui/button'
import { Select, SelectContent, SelectItem, SelectTrigger, SelectValue } from '@/components/ui/select'
import { Alert, AlertDescription } from '@/components/ui/alert'
import { Card, CardContent, CardDescription, CardHeader, CardTitle } from '@/components/ui/card'
import { Separator } from '@/components/ui/separator'
import { toast } from 'react-toastify'

interface Block {
    ID: number
    INST_CODE: string
    DATE: string
    SESSION: string
    TIMESLOT: string
    BLOCKNO: string
    LOCATION: string
    SCHEME: string
    SUBJECT_CODE: string
    SUBJECT_NAME: string
    SEAT_NUMBERS: number[]
    FIRST: number
    LAST: number
    ASSIGNED: number
    STRENGTH: number
    SUPERVISOR_UID: string
    SUPERVISOR_NAME: string
}

interface Supervisor {
    UID: string
    NAME: string
}

export default function ChangeSupervisor() {
    const [date, setDate] = useState<string>("")
    const [session, setSession] = useState<string>("")
    const [blocks, setBlocks] = useState<Block[]>([])
    const [selectedBlock, setSelectedBlock] = useState<string | null>(null)
    const [supervisors, setSupervisors] = useState<Supervisor[]>([])
    const [selectedSupervisor, setSelectedSupervisor] = useState<string>("")
    const [isLoading, setIsLoading] = useState<boolean>(false)
    const [error, setError] = useState<string | null>(null)
    const [success, setSuccess] = useState<string | null>(null)

    const fetchBlocks = async () => {
        if (!session || !date) { toast.warn("Select session and date"); return; }
        setIsLoading(true)
        setError(null)
        setSuccess(null)

        try {
            const response = await fetch(`/api/blocks?date=${date}&session=${session}`, {
                headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" },
            })
            if (!response.ok) throw new Error("Failed to fetch blocks")
            const data = await response.json()
            if (data.length === 0) {
                setError("No blocks found for the selected date and session")
                return
            }
            setBlocks(data)
        } catch (err) {
            setError((err as Error).message || "An error occurred while fetching blocks")
        } finally {
            setIsLoading(false)
        }
    }

    const fetchSupervisors = async () => {
        setIsLoading(true)
        setError(null)
        setSuccess(null)

        try {
            const response = await fetch(`/api/supervisors`)
            if (!response.ok) throw new Error("Failed to fetch supervisors")
            const data = await response.json()
            
            // Filter out supervisors who are already allocated
            const allocatedSupervisorUIDs = blocks.map(block => block.SUPERVISOR_UID)
            const availableSupervisors = data.filter(
                (supervisor: Supervisor) => !allocatedSupervisorUIDs.includes(supervisor.UID)
            )
            
            setSupervisors(availableSupervisors)
        } catch (err) {
            setError((err as Error).message || "An error occurred while fetching supervisors")
        } finally {
            setIsLoading(false)
        }
    }

    const resetForm = () => {
        setDate("")
        setSession("")
        setBlocks([])
        setSelectedBlock(null)
        setSupervisors([])
        setSelectedSupervisor("")
        setError(null)
    }

    const handleChangeSupervisor = async () => {
        if (!selectedBlock || !selectedSupervisor) {
            setError("Please select a block and a supervisor")
            return
        }

        setIsLoading(true)
        setError(null)
        setSuccess(null)

        try {
            const response = await fetch(`/api/supervisors`, {
                method: "PATCH",
                headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" },
                body: JSON.stringify({
                    date,
                    session,
                    block_no: selectedBlock,
                    new_supervisor_uid: selectedSupervisor,
                }),
            })

            if (!response.ok) {
                const errorData = await response.json()
                throw new Error(errorData.detail || "Failed to update supervisor")
            }

            const result = await response.json()
            setSuccess(result.message)
            resetForm()
        } catch (err) {
            setError((err as Error).message || "An error occurred while updating the supervisor")
        } finally {
            setIsLoading(false)
        }
    }

    return (
        <Card className="w-full max-w-2xl mx-auto">
            <CardHeader>
                <CardTitle>Change Supervisor</CardTitle>
                <CardDescription>Assign a new supervisor to a block for a specific date and session.</CardDescription>
            </CardHeader>
            <CardContent>
                <form onSubmit={(e) => { e.preventDefault(); fetchBlocks(); }} className="space-y-4">
                    <div className="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 gap-4">
                        <div className="space-y-2">
                            <Label htmlFor="date">Date</Label>
                            <Input
                                id="date"
                                type="date"
                                value={date}
                                onChange={(e) => setDate(e.target.value)}
                                required
                            />
                        </div>
                        <div className="space-y-2">
                            <Label htmlFor="session">Session</Label>
                            <Select onValueChange={(value) => setSession(value)} required>
                                <SelectTrigger id="session">
                                    <SelectValue placeholder="Select a session" />
                                </SelectTrigger>
                                <SelectContent>
                                    <SelectItem value="Morning">Morning</SelectItem>
                                    <SelectItem value="Afternoon">Afternoon</SelectItem>
                                </SelectContent>
                            </Select>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                    <Button type="submit" className="w-full" disabled={isLoading || !date || !session}>
                        {isLoading ? <Loader2 className="h-4 w-4 animate-spin mr-2" /> : null}
                        Fetch Blocks
                    </Button>
                </form>

                {blocks.length > 0 && (
                    <>
                        <Separator className="my-4" />
                        <div className="space-y-4">
                            <Label htmlFor="block">Select Block</Label>
                            <Select onValueChange={(value) => setSelectedBlock(value)}>
                                <SelectTrigger id="block">
                                    <SelectValue placeholder="Select a block" />
                                </SelectTrigger>
                                <SelectContent>
                                    {Object.entries(
                                        blocks.reduce((acc, block) => {
                                            acc[block.BLOCKNO] = acc[block.BLOCKNO] || [];
                                            acc[block.BLOCKNO].push(block);
                                            return acc;
                                        }, {} as Record<string, Block[]>)
                                    ).map(([blockNo, groupedBlocks]) => (
                                        <SelectItem key={blockNo} value={blockNo}>
                                            Block {blockNo} - {groupedBlocks[0].LOCATION} (Supervisor: {groupedBlocks[0].SUPERVISOR_NAME})
                                        </SelectItem>
                                    ))}
                                </SelectContent>
                            </Select>

                            <Button onClick={fetchSupervisors} className="w-full" disabled={isLoading || !selectedBlock}>
                                {isLoading ? <Loader2 className="h-4 w-4 animate-spin mr-2" /> : null}
                                Fetch Supervisors
                            </Button>
                        </div>
                    </>
                )}

                {supervisors.length > 0 && (
                    <>
                        <Separator className="my-4" />
                        <div className="space-y-4">
                            <Label htmlFor="supervisor">Select New Supervisor</Label>
                            <Select onValueChange={(value) => setSelectedSupervisor(value)}>
                                <SelectTrigger id="supervisor">
                                    <SelectValue placeholder="Select a supervisor" />
                                </SelectTrigger>
                                <SelectContent>
                                    {supervisors.map(({ UID, NAME }) => (
                                        <SelectItem key={UID} value={UID}>
                                            <b>({UID})</b> {NAME}
                                        </SelectItem>
                                    ))}
                                </SelectContent>
                            </Select>
                            <Button onClick={handleChangeSupervisor} className="w-full" disabled={isLoading || !selectedSupervisor}>
                                {isLoading ? <Loader2 className="h-4 w-4 animate-spin mr-2" /> : null}
                                Change Supervisor
                            </Button>
                        </div>
                    </>
                )}


                {error && (
                    <Alert variant="destructive" className="mt-4">
                        <AlertCircle className="h-4 w-4 mr-2" />
                        <AlertDescription>{error}</AlertDescription>
                    </Alert>
                )}

                {success && (
                    <Alert variant="default" className="mt-4 bg-green-50 dark:bg-green-900 border-green-200 dark:border-green-800 text-green-700 dark:text-green-300">
                        <CheckCircle2 className="h-4 w-4 mr-2" />
                        <AlertDescription>{success}</AlertDescription>
                    </Alert>
                )}
            </CardContent>
        </Card>
    )
}
</modules/block/change_supervisor.tsx>

<modules/block/suporder.tsx>
"use client";
import { useState, useCallback, useRef } from "react";
import { Select, SelectContent, SelectItem, SelectTrigger, SelectValue } from "@/components/ui/select";
import { Card, CardHeader, CardTitle, CardDescription, CardContent, CardFooter } from "@/components/ui/card";
import { Button } from "@/components/ui/button";
import { Input } from "@/components/ui/input";
import { toast } from "react-toastify";
import { useExamCenter } from "@/hooks/useExamCenter";
import { useEcCode } from "@/lib/helper";
import { Badge } from "@/components/ui/badge";
import { Separator } from "@/components/ui/separator";
import { Users, UserCheck, BarChart } from "lucide-react";

interface SupervisionSessionData {
  total_students: number;
  schemes: string[];
  allotted: string[];
}

interface Supervisor {
  ID: number;
  NAME: string;
  DEPARTMENT: string;
}

interface SupervisionResponse {
  avg_strength: string;
  supervisors: Record<string, Supervisor>;
  supervision_required: Record<string, Record<string, SupervisionSessionData>>;
}

export default function SupervisionOrder() {
  const [data, setData] = useState<SupervisionResponse | null>(null);
  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(false);
  const [error, setError] = useState<string | null>(null);
  const [selectedSupervisors, setSelectedSupervisors] = useState<Record<string, string[]>>({});
  const [isSaving, setIsSaving] = useState(false);
  const [date, setDate] = useState<string>("");
  const [session, setSession] = useState<"Morning" | "Afternoon">("Morning");
  const loadDataButtonRef = useRef<HTMLButtonElement>(null);

  const ec_code = useEcCode();
  const { getDepartmentByCode } = useExamCenter(ec_code);

  const fetchData = useCallback(async () => {
    if (!date || !session) return;

    setLoading(true);
    setError(null);

    try {
      const response = await fetch(`/api/sup-order?date=${date}&session=${session}`);
      if (!response.ok) throw new Error(`HTTP error! Status: ${response.status}`);
      const result: SupervisionResponse = await response.json();
      const initialSelections = Object.entries(result.supervision_required).reduce((acc, [date, sessions]) => {
        Object.entries(sessions).forEach(([session, data]) => {
          acc[`${date}-${session}`] = data.allotted || [];
        });
        return acc;
      }, {} as Record<string, string[]>);
      setSelectedSupervisors(initialSelections);
      setData(result);
    } catch (error) {
      console.error("Error fetching data:", error);
      setError("Failed to fetch data. Please try again later.");
    } finally {
      setLoading(false);
    }
  }, [date, session]);

  const saveSupervisors = useCallback(
    async (date: string, session: string) => {
      const key = `${date}-${session}`;
      const supervisorsToSave = selectedSupervisors[key]?.filter(Boolean) || [];
      const existingAllotted = data?.supervision_required[date]?.[session]?.allotted || [];

      if (!supervisorsToSave.length) {
        toast.warn("No supervisors selected to save");
        return;
      }

      setIsSaving(true);
      try {
        const supervisorIds = supervisorsToSave.map(uid => {
          const supervisor = data?.supervisors[uid];
          return supervisor ? supervisor.ID : null;
        }).filter(Boolean) as number[];

        const method = existingAllotted.length > 0 ? "PUT" : "POST";
        let body;

        if (method === "POST") {
          body = {
            date,
            session,
            supervisor_ids: supervisorIds,
            supervisor_uids: supervisorsToSave,
          };
        } else {
          const operations = supervisorsToSave.map((newUid, index) => {
            const oldUid = existingAllotted[index];
            if (oldUid && oldUid !== newUid) {
              return {
                date,
                session,
                old_supervisor_uid: oldUid,
                new_supervisor_uid: newUid,
              };
            }
            return null;
          }).filter(Boolean);

          if (operations.length === 0) {
            toast.info("No changes to save");
            setIsSaving(false);
            return;
          }

          body = operations[0];
        }

        const response = await fetch("/api/sup-order", {
          method,
          headers: {
            "Content-Type": "application/json",
          },
          body: JSON.stringify(body),
        });

        if (!response.ok) {
          throw new Error(`Failed to save supervisors: ${response.statusText}`);
        }

        toast.success("Supervisors assigned successfully");

        if (session === "Morning") {
          setSession("Afternoon");
        } else {
          const nextDate = new Date(date);
          nextDate.setDate(nextDate.getDate() + 1);
          setDate(nextDate.toISOString().split("T")[0]);
          setSession("Morning");
        }

        setSelectedSupervisors((prev) => {
          const updated = { ...prev };
          delete updated[key];
          return updated;
        });

        setData(null);
      } catch (error) {
        console.error("Error saving supervisors:", error);
        toast.error("Failed to save supervisors");
      } finally {
        setIsSaving(false);
      }
    },
    [selectedSupervisors, data, date, session]
  );

  const calculateSupervisorsRequired = useCallback(
    (totalStudents: number) => {
      const avgStrength = parseFloat(data?.avg_strength || "0");
      return avgStrength > 0 ? Math.ceil(totalStudents / avgStrength) : 0;
    },
    [data]
  );

  const getAvailableSupervisors = (date: string, session: string, currentIndex: number) => {
    const key = `${date}-${session}`;
    const selectedForCard = selectedSupervisors[key] || [];
    return Object.entries(data?.supervisors || {}).filter(([uid]) => 
      !selectedForCard.includes(uid) || selectedForCard[currentIndex] === uid
    );
  };

  const handleSupervisorChange = (
    date: string,
    session: string,
    index: number,
    supervisorUid: string
  ) => {
    const key = `${date}-${session}`;
    setSelectedSupervisors((prev) => {
      const currentSupervisors = prev[key] || [];
      const updatedSupervisors = [...currentSupervisors];
      while (updatedSupervisors.length <= index) {
        updatedSupervisors.push("");
      }
      updatedSupervisors[index] = supervisorUid;
      return { ...prev, [key]: updatedSupervisors };
    });
  };

  const isSaveButtonEnabled = (date: string, session: string, required: number) => {
    const key = `${date}-${session}`;
    const selected = selectedSupervisors[key]?.filter(Boolean) || [];
    return selected.length === required;
  };

  const handleLoadData = () => {
    if (!date || !session) {
      toast.warn("Please select both date and session");
      return;
    }
    fetchData();
  };

  const getUniqueDepartments = (schemes: string[]) => {
    const uniqueDepartmentCodes = [...new Set(schemes.map(s => s.split("-")[0]))];
    return uniqueDepartmentCodes.map(code => getDepartmentByCode(code).name);
  };

  return (
    <div className="grid grid-cols-1 gap-6 p-6 max-w-6xl mx-auto">
      <Card className="shadow-md">
        <CardHeader className="pb-2">
          <CardTitle className="text-xl font-bold">Supervision Order</CardTitle>
          <CardDescription>Assign supervisors to examination sessions</CardDescription>
        </CardHeader>
        <CardContent>
          <div className="flex flex-wrap gap-4">
            <div className="flex flex-col gap-2">
              <label className="text-sm font-medium text-secondary-foreground">Date</label>
              <Input
                type="date"
                value={date}
                onChange={(e) => setDate(e.target.value)}
                className="w-48"
              />
            </div>
            <div className="flex flex-col gap-2">
              <label className="text-sm font-medium text-secondary-foreground">Session</label>
              <Select value={session} onValueChange={(value: "Morning" | "Afternoon") => setSession(value)}>
                <SelectTrigger className="w-40">
                  <SelectValue placeholder="Select session" />
                </SelectTrigger>
                <SelectContent>
                  <SelectItem value="Morning">Morning</SelectItem>
                  <SelectItem value="Afternoon">Afternoon</SelectItem>
                </SelectContent>
              </Select>
            </div>
            <div className="flex flex-col gap-2 justify-end">
              <Button
                onClick={handleLoadData}
                ref={loadDataButtonRef}
                disabled={loading}
                className="h-10"
              >
                {loading ? "Loading..." : "Load Data"}
              </Button>
            </div>
          </div>
        </CardContent>
      </Card>

      {loading && (
        <div className="p-6 text-center">
          <div className="animate-pulse text-lg font-medium">Loading...</div>
        </div>
      )}

      {error && (
        <div className="p-6 text-center">
          <div className="text-red-500 border border-red-200 rounded-lg p-4 bg-red-50">{error}</div>
        </div>
      )}

      {!loading && !error && data && (
        <>
          {Object.entries(data.supervision_required).flatMap(([date, sessions]) =>
            Object.entries(sessions).map(([session, { total_students, schemes, allotted }]) => {
              const supervisorsRequired = calculateSupervisorsRequired(total_students);
              const uniqueKey = `${date}-${session}`;
              const selectedForCard = selectedSupervisors[uniqueKey] || allotted || [];
              const uniqueDepartments = getUniqueDepartments(schemes);

              return (
                <Card
                  key={uniqueKey}
                  className="shadow-md hover:shadow-lg transition-shadow duration-300 overflow-hidden"
                >
                  <CardHeader className="bg-muted pb-2">
                    <div className="flex justify-between items-start">
                      <div>
                        <CardTitle className="text-xl font-bold">
                          {new Date(date).toLocaleDateString('en-IN', { weekday: 'long', year: 'numeric', month: 'short', day: 'numeric' })} - {session}
                        </CardTitle>
                        <CardDescription className="mt-1 text-sm">
                          <div className="flex flex-wrap gap-2 mt-2">
                            {uniqueDepartments.map((dept, idx) => (
                              <Badge key={idx} variant="outline" className="bg-blue-50 text-blue-700 border-blue-200">
                                {dept}
                              </Badge>
                            ))}
                          </div>
                        </CardDescription>
                      </div>

                      <div className="text-right space-x-1 space-y-3">
                        <div className="inline-flex items-center gap-2.5 bg-green-100 text-green-900 px-4 py-2 rounded-lg shadow-sm hover:bg-green-200 transition-colors">
                          <Users className="w-5 h-5" />
                          <span className="text-sm font-bold">{total_students}</span>
                          <span className="text-xs font-medium">Students</span>
                        </div>
                        <div className="inline-flex items-center gap-2.5 bg-purple-100 text-purple-900 px-4 py-2 rounded-lg shadow-sm hover:bg-purple-200 transition-colors">
                          <UserCheck className="w-5 h-5" />
                          <span className="text-sm font-bold">{supervisorsRequired}</span>
                          <span className="text-xs font-medium">Supervisors</span>
                        </div>
                        <div className="inline-flex items-center gap-2.5 bg-blue-100 text-blue-900 px-4 py-2 rounded-lg shadow-sm hover:bg-blue-200 transition-colors">
                          <BarChart className="w-5 h-5" />
                          <span className="text-sm font-bold">{data.avg_strength}</span>
                          <span className="text-xs font-medium">Average Strength</span>
                        </div>
                      </div>
                    </div>
                  </CardHeader>

                  <Separator />

                  <CardContent className="p-6">
                    <div className="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3 gap-4">
                      {Array.from({ length: supervisorsRequired }).map((_, index) => (
                        <div key={index} className="flex flex-col">
                          <label className="text-sm font-medium text-secondary-foreground mb-1">
                            Supervisor {index + 1}
                          </label>
                          <Select
                            value={selectedForCard[index] || ""}
                            onValueChange={(value) => handleSupervisorChange(date, session, index, value)}
                          >
                            <SelectTrigger className="w-full">
                              <SelectValue placeholder="Select a supervisor" />
                            </SelectTrigger>
                            <SelectContent>
                              {getAvailableSupervisors(date, session, index).map(([uid, { NAME, DEPARTMENT }]) => (
                                <SelectItem key={uid} value={uid}>
                                  {NAME} ({DEPARTMENT})
                                </SelectItem>
                              ))}
                            </SelectContent>
                          </Select>
                        </div>
                      ))}
                    </div>
                  </CardContent>

                  <CardFooter className="p-4">
                    <Button
                      onClick={() => saveSupervisors(date, session)}
                      disabled={isSaving || !isSaveButtonEnabled(date, session, supervisorsRequired)}
                      className="w-full"
                      variant={isSaveButtonEnabled(date, session, supervisorsRequired) ? "default" : "outline"}
                    >
                      {isSaving ? "Saving..." : "Save Supervisors"}
                    </Button>
                  </CardFooter>
                </Card>
              );
            })
          )}
        </>
      )}

      {!loading && !error && !data && (
        <div className="p-8 text-center bg-muted rounded-lg border border-gray-200">
          <div className="text-secondary-foreground font-bold">No data available. Please select a date and session to load data.</div>
        </div>
      )}
    </div>
  );
}
</modules/block/suporder.tsx>

<modules/block/allocation.tsx>
import BlockAllocation from "@/components/blocks/BlockAllocation"

export default function Page() {
  return <BlockAllocation />
}

</modules/block/allocation.tsx>

<modules/block/copy_case.tsx>
'use client'

import React, { useState } from 'react'
import { AlertCircle, Loader2 } from 'lucide-react'
import { Label } from '@/components/ui/label'
import { Input } from '@/components/ui/input'
import { Button } from '@/components/ui/button'
import { Select, SelectContent, SelectItem, SelectTrigger, SelectValue } from '@/components/ui/select'
import { Alert, AlertDescription } from '@/components/ui/alert'
import { Card, CardContent, CardDescription, CardHeader, CardTitle } from '@/components/ui/card'
import { Separator } from '@/components/ui/separator'
import ConfirmationDialog from '@/components/misc/DialogBox'
import { toast } from 'react-toastify'
import axios from 'axios'

interface SchemeData {
    scheme: string
    subject_code: string
    subject_name: string
    total_students: number
    seatNumbers: number[]
    cps_students: number[]
    absent_students: number[]
}

interface BlockData {
    blockno: string
    location: string
    schemes: SchemeData[]
}

interface DialogState {
    type: "error" | "success" | "info"
    message: string
}

interface ApiBlockData {
    blockno: string
    location: string
    scheme: string
    subject_code: string
    subject_name: string
    total_students: number
    seatNumbers: number[]
    cps_students: number[]
    absent_students: number[]
}

export default function CopyCaseReport() {
    const [date, setDate] = useState('')
    const [session, setSession] = useState('')
    const [blocks, setBlocks] = useState<BlockData[]>([])
    const [selectedBlock, setSelectedBlock] = useState<BlockData | null>(null)
    const [selectedScheme, setSelectedScheme] = useState<SchemeData | null>(null)
    const [copyCaseSeats, setCopyCaseSeats] = useState<number[]>([]) // Default to empty array
    const [isLoading, setIsLoading] = useState(false)
    const [error, setError] = useState<string | null>(null)
    const [dialogState, setDialogState] = useState<DialogState | null>(null)

    const fetchData = async () => {
        if (!date || !session) {
            setError('Please select a date and session')
            return
        }
        setIsLoading(true)
        setError(null)
        resetSelection()

        try {
            const response = await axios.get(`/api/cps/?date=${date}&session=${session}`) // Fixed endpoint to match copy-case
            setBlocks(combineBlocks(response.data))
        } catch (err) {
            const message = axios.isAxiosError(err) ? err?.response?.data?.error : err instanceof Error ? err.message : "An error occurred"
            setError(message)
        } finally {
            setIsLoading(false)
        }
    }

    const combineBlocks = (data: ApiBlockData[]): BlockData[] => {
        const combinedBlocks: Record<string, BlockData> = {}
        data.forEach((block) => {
            if (!combinedBlocks[block.blockno]) {
                combinedBlocks[block.blockno] = { blockno: block.blockno, location: block.location, schemes: [] }
            }
            combinedBlocks[block.blockno].schemes.push({
                scheme: block.scheme,
                subject_code: block.subject_code,
                subject_name: block.subject_name,
                total_students: block.total_students,
                seatNumbers: block.seatNumbers,
                cps_students: block.cps_students ?? [],
                absent_students: block.absent_students ?? [],
            })
        })
        return Object.values(combinedBlocks)
    }

    const handleMarkCopyCase = async () => {
        if (!selectedBlock || !selectedScheme) {
            setError('Please select a block and scheme')
            return
        }
        await updateCopyCaseSeats(copyCaseSeats)
    }

    const handleResetCopyCase = async () => {
        if (!selectedBlock || !selectedScheme) {
            setError('Please select a block and scheme to reset copy case numbers')
            return
        }
        await updateCopyCaseSeats([])
    }

    const updateCopyCaseSeats = async (seats: number[]) => {
        setIsLoading(true)
        setError(null)
        try {
            const response = await fetch('/api/cps/', {
                method: 'POST',
                headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
                body: JSON.stringify({
                    date,
                    session,
                    institute_id: '1740',
                    blockno: selectedBlock!.blockno,
                    scheme: selectedScheme!.scheme,
                    subject_code: selectedScheme!.subject_code,
                    cps_students: seats,
                }),
            })
            if (!response.ok) throw new Error('Failed to update copy case seats')
            toast.success(seats.length ? 'Copy case seats updated successfully' : 'Copy case numbers reset successfully')
            resetSelection()
        } catch (err) {
            setError(err instanceof Error ? err.message : 'An error occurred')
        } finally {
            setIsLoading(false)
        }
    }

    const resetSelection = () => {
        setBlocks([])
        setSelectedBlock(null)
        setSelectedScheme(null)
        setCopyCaseSeats([]) // Reset to empty array
    }

    const handleSeatSelection = (seatNo: number) => {
        setCopyCaseSeats(prev => {
            const currentSeats = prev ?? [] // Default to empty array if prev is undefined
            return currentSeats.includes(seatNo) ? currentSeats.filter(s => s !== seatNo) : [...currentSeats, seatNo]
        })
    }

    const confirmAction = (action: 'mark' | 'reset') => {
        const message = action === 'mark'
            ? `Are you sure you want to mark "${copyCaseSeats.join(", ")}" students as copy cases?`
            : 'Are you sure you want to reset copy case numbers?'

        setDialogState({
            type: "info",
            message
        })
    }

    const handleDialogConfirm = () => {
        if (dialogState?.message.includes('mark')) {
            handleMarkCopyCase()
        } else {
            handleResetCopyCase()
        }
        setDialogState(null)
    }

    return (
        <Card className="w-full max-w-2xl mx-auto">
            <CardHeader>
                <CardTitle>Copy Case Student Marking</CardTitle>
                <CardDescription>Mark students involved in copy cases for a specific date, session, and block.</CardDescription>
            </CardHeader>
            <CardContent className="space-y-6">
                <form onSubmit={(e) => { e.preventDefault(); fetchData() }} className="space-y-4">
                    <div className="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 gap-4">
                        <div className="space-y-2">
                            <Label htmlFor="date">Date</Label>
                            <Input id="date" type="date" value={date} onChange={(e) => setDate(e.target.value)} required />
                        </div>
                        <div className="space-y-2">
                            <Label htmlFor="session">Session</Label>
                            <Select onValueChange={setSession} required>
                                <SelectTrigger id="session">
                                    <SelectValue placeholder="Select a session" />
                                </SelectTrigger>
                                <SelectContent>
                                    <SelectItem value="Morning">Morning</SelectItem>
                                    <SelectItem value="Afternoon">Afternoon</SelectItem>
                                </SelectContent>
                            </Select>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                    <Button type="submit" className="w-full" disabled={isLoading || !date || !session}>
                        {isLoading && <Loader2 className="h-4 w-4 animate-spin mr-2" />}
                        Fetch Blocks
                    </Button>
                </form>

                {blocks.length > 0 && (
                    <>
                        <Separator />
                        <SelectBlock blocks={blocks} onSelect={(block) => { setSelectedBlock(block); setSelectedScheme(null); setCopyCaseSeats([]) }} />
                    </>
                )}

                {selectedBlock && (
                    <>
                        <Separator />
                        <SelectScheme schemes={selectedBlock.schemes} onSelect={(scheme) => { setSelectedScheme(scheme); setCopyCaseSeats(scheme.cps_students ?? []) }} />
                    </>
                )}
                {selectedScheme && (
                    <>
                        <Separator />

                        
                        <SeatSelection
                            seatNumbers={selectedScheme.seatNumbers}
                            copyCaseSeats={copyCaseSeats}
                            onSeatSelect={handleSeatSelection}
                            absentNumbers={selectedScheme.absent_students ?? []}
                        />
                        <div className="flex gap-2">
                            <Button onClick={() => confirmAction('mark')} className="w-full" disabled={isLoading}>
                                {isLoading && <Loader2 className="h-4 w-4 animate-spin mr-2" />}
                                Save Copy Case
                            </Button>
                            <Button onClick={() => confirmAction('reset')} className="w-full" variant="destructive" disabled={isLoading}>
                                {isLoading && <Loader2 className="h-4 w-4 animate-spin mr-2" />}
                                Reset Copy Case
                            </Button>
                        </div>
                    </>
                )}
                {error && (
                    <Alert variant="destructive">
                        <AlertCircle className="h-4 w-4 mr-2" />
                        <AlertDescription>{error}</AlertDescription>
                    </Alert>
                )}
            </CardContent>

            {dialogState && (
                <ConfirmationDialog
                    type={dialogState.type}
                    message={dialogState.message}
                    onConfirm={handleDialogConfirm}
                    onCancel={() => setDialogState(null)}
                />
            )}
        </Card>
    )
}

function SelectBlock({ blocks, onSelect }: { blocks: BlockData[], onSelect: (block: BlockData) => void }) {
    return (
        <div className="space-y-2">
            <Label htmlFor="block">Select Block</Label>
            <Select onValueChange={(value) => {
                const block = blocks.find((b) => b.blockno === value)
                if (block) onSelect(block)
            }}>
                <SelectTrigger id="block">
                    <SelectValue placeholder="Select a block" />
                </SelectTrigger>
                <SelectContent>
                    {blocks.map((block) => (
                        <SelectItem key={block.blockno} value={block.blockno}>
                            Block {block.blockno} - {block.location}
                        </SelectItem>
                    ))}
                </SelectContent>
            </Select>
        </div>
    )
}

function SelectScheme({ schemes, onSelect }: { schemes: SchemeData[], onSelect: (scheme: SchemeData) => void }) {
    return (
        <div className="space-y-2">
            <Label htmlFor="scheme">Select Scheme</Label>
            <Select onValueChange={(value) => {
                const scheme = schemes.find((s) => s.scheme === value)
                if (scheme) onSelect(scheme)
            }}>
                <SelectTrigger id="scheme">
                    <SelectValue placeholder="Select a scheme" />
                </SelectTrigger>
                <SelectContent>
                    {schemes.map((scheme) => (
                        <SelectItem key={scheme.scheme} value={scheme.scheme}>
                            {scheme.scheme} - {scheme.subject_name}
                        </SelectItem>
                    ))}
                </SelectContent>
            </Select>
        </div>
    )
}
function SeatSelection({
    seatNumbers,
    copyCaseSeats,
    onSeatSelect,
    absentNumbers,
}: {
    seatNumbers: number[] | undefined;
    copyCaseSeats: number[];
    onSeatSelect: (seatNo: number) => void;
    absentNumbers: number[];
}) {
    const numbers = seatNumbers ?? [];

    return (
        <div className="space-y-2">
            <Label>Seat Numbers</Label>
            <div className="grid grid-cols-2 md:grid-cols-4 gap-4">
                {numbers.map((seatNo) => {
                    const isAbsent = absentNumbers.includes(seatNo);
                    const isCopyCase = copyCaseSeats.includes(seatNo);

                    let className = "p-2 rounded-md cursor-pointer text-center border ";
                    if (isAbsent) {
                        className += "bg-red-100 dark:bg-red-900 text-red-800 dark:text-red-200 border-red-300 dark:border-red-700 opacity-80 cursor-not-allowed";
                    } else if (isCopyCase) {
                        className += "bg-yellow-100 dark:bg-yellow-900 text-yellow-800 dark:text-yellow-200 border-yellow-300 dark:border-yellow-700";
                    } else {
                        className += "bg-green-100 dark:bg-green-900 text-green-800 dark:text-green-200 border-green-300 dark:border-green-700";
                    }

                    return (
                        <div
                            key={seatNo}
                            className={className}
                            onClick={() => !isAbsent && onSeatSelect(seatNo)}
                        >
                            {seatNo}
                        </div>
                    );
                })}
            </div>

            {/* Color Indication Legend */}
            <div className="flex gap-4 mt-4">
                <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
                    <div className="w-4 h-4 bg-green-100 dark:bg-green-900 border border-green-300 dark:border-green-700 rounded-sm"></div>
                    <span className="text-sm">Present</span>
                </div>
                <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
                    <div className="w-4 h-4 bg-yellow-100 dark:bg-yellow-900 border border-yellow-300 dark:border-yellow-700 rounded-sm"></div>
                    <span className="text-sm">Copy Case</span>
                </div>
                <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
                    <div className="w-4 h-4 bg-red-100 dark:bg-red-900 border border-red-300 dark:border-red-700 rounded-sm"></div>
                    <span className="text-sm">Absent</span>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>
    );
}
</modules/block/copy_case.tsx>

<modules/block/clearAllocation.tsx>
import React, { useState } from "react";
import axios from "axios";
import ConfirmationDialog from "@/components/misc/DialogBox"; 
import { Input } from "@/components/ui/input";
import { Card } from "@/components/ui/card";
import { Button } from "@/components/ui/button";
import { Alert } from "@/components/ui/alert";
import { toast } from "react-toastify";
import { useRouter } from "next/navigation";
import { RadioGroup, RadioGroupItem } from "@/components/ui/radio-group";
import { Label } from "@/components/ui/label";

const BlockDeallocation = () => {
    const [date, setDate] = useState(new Date().toISOString().split('T')[0]);
    const [session, setSession] = useState("Morning");
    const [loading, setLoading] = useState(false);
    const [error, setError] = useState("");
    const [dialogMessage, setDialogMessage] = useState("");
    const [dialogType, setDialogType] = useState<"error" | "confirmation">("confirmation");
    const router = useRouter();

    const deleteBlockAllocation = async () => {
        if (!session || !date) { toast.warn("Select session and date"); return; }
        setLoading(true);
        setError("");

        try {

            await axios.delete(
                "/api/blocks/",
                {
                    data: { date, session },

                }
            );

            toast.success("Block allocation deleted successfully!");

            setTimeout(() => router.back(), 1000);
        } catch (err) {
            if (axios.isAxiosError(err)) {
                const message = err.response?.data.error || "Failed to delete block allocation.";
                toast.error(message);
            } else {
                toast.error("An unexpected error occurred.");
            }
        } finally {
            setLoading(false);
        }
    };

    const handleConfirmation = () => {
        if (!date || !session) {
            setError("Please select a date and session.");
            return;
        }
        setDialogMessage("Are you sure you want to delete the block allocation for the selected date and session?");
        setDialogType("confirmation");
    };

    return (
        <div className="flex flex-col items-center justify-center h-screen w-full">
            <Card className="p-6 shadow-lg rounded-lg w-full max-w-md ">
                <h2 className="text-xl font-bold mb-4">Delete Block Allocation</h2>
                <Input
                    type="date"
                    value={date}
                    onChange={(e) => setDate(e.target.value)}
                    className="mb-4"
                    placeholder="Select Date"
                />
                <div className="mb-4">
                    <RadioGroup value={session} onValueChange={setSession}>
                        <div className="flex items-center space-x-2">
                            <RadioGroupItem value="Morning" id="morning" />
                            <Label htmlFor="morning">Morning</Label>
                        </div>
                        <div className="flex items-center space-x-2">
                            <RadioGroupItem value="Afternoon" id="afternoon" />
                            <Label htmlFor="afternoon">Afternoon</Label>
                        </div>
                    </RadioGroup>
                </div>
                <Button
                    onClick={handleConfirmation}
                    variant="destructive"
                    className="w-full mb-4"
                    disabled={loading}
                >
                    {loading ? "Deleting..." : "Delete Block Allocation"}
                </Button>
                {error && (
                    <Alert variant="destructive" className="mb-4">
                        {error}
                    </Alert>
                )}
            </Card>

            <ConfirmationDialog
                type={dialogType as "error" | "success" | "info"}
                message={dialogMessage}
                onConfirm={deleteBlockAllocation}
                onCancel={() => setDialogMessage("")}
            />
        </div>
    );
};

export default BlockDeallocation;
</modules/block/clearAllocation.tsx>

<modules/configs/inventory.tsx>
"use client"

import type React from "react"
import { useCallback, useEffect, useState } from "react"
import { useDropzone } from "react-dropzone"
import axios from "axios"
import {
  FileUp,
  X,
  FileSpreadsheet,
  Download,
  AlertCircle,
  Loader2,
  RefreshCw,
  Trash2,
  CheckCircle2,
  Info,
  Rocket
} from "lucide-react"
import { Card, CardContent, CardHeader, CardTitle, CardDescription } from "@/components/ui/card"
import { Button } from "@/components/ui/button"
import { cn } from "@/lib/utils"
import { toast } from "react-toastify"
import "react-toastify/dist/ReactToastify.css"
import { Alert, AlertDescription, AlertTitle } from "@/components/ui/alert"
import { Progress } from "@/components/ui/progress"
import ConfirmationDialog from "@/components/misc/DialogBox"
import { validateExcelColumns } from "@/lib/excelValidator"
import { useEcCode } from "@/lib/helper"
import { useTableExists } from "@/hooks/useTableExists"
import { Badge } from "@/components/ui/badge"
import { Separator } from "@/components/ui/separator"
import { Tooltip, TooltipContent, TooltipProvider, TooltipTrigger } from "@/components/ui/tooltip"

const API_BASE_URL = process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_API_URL || "http://127.0.0.1:8000"
const PREFIX_FILENAME = "inventory"

interface ConfirmationDialogProps {
  type: "warning" | "error" | "success" | "info"
  message: string
  onConfirm: () => void
  onCancel: () => void
}

const InventoryManagement: React.FC = () => {
  const [file, setFile] = useState<File | null>(null)
  const [fileExists, setFileExists] = useState(false)
  const [customFileName, setCustomFileName] = useState("")
  const [isUploading, setIsUploading] = useState(false)
  const [uploadProgress, setUploadProgress] = useState(0)
  const [isLoading, setIsLoading] = useState(true)
  const [error, setError] = useState<string | null>(null)
  const [isProcessing, setIsProcessing] = useState(false)
  const [confirmDialog, setConfirmDialog] = useState<ConfirmationDialogProps | null>(null)
  const ec_code = useEcCode()
  const { checkInventoryTable } = useTableExists()
  const inventoryProcessed = checkInventoryTable()

  const fetchExistingFiles = useCallback(async () => {
    setIsLoading(true)
    setError(null)
    try {
      const response = await axios.get(`${API_BASE_URL}/api/files/list`)
      const files = response.data || []
      const newFileName = `${PREFIX_FILENAME}_${ec_code}.xlsx`

      setCustomFileName(newFileName)
      setFileExists(files.includes(newFileName))
    } catch (error) {
      const errorMessage = axios.isAxiosError(error) ? error.response?.data?.details : "Failed to fetch existing files. Please try again later."
      setError(errorMessage)
      toast.error(errorMessage)
    } finally {
      setIsLoading(false)
    }
  }, [ec_code])

  useEffect(() => {
    fetchExistingFiles()
  }, [fetchExistingFiles])

  const processFile = async () => {
    setIsProcessing(true)
    try {
      const response = await axios.post(`${API_BASE_URL}/api/inventory/process/${ec_code}`)
      if (response.status === 200) {
        toast.success("Inventory processed successfully!")
      } else {
        throw new Error("Unexpected response from the server.")
      }
    } catch (error) {
      const errorMessage =
        axios.isAxiosError(error) && error.response?.data?.detail
          ? error.response.data.detail
          : "An error occurred while processing the file."
      toast.error(errorMessage)
    } finally {
      setIsProcessing(false)
    }
  }

  const validateExcelFile = useCallback((file: File) => {
    const validTypes = ['application/vnd.ms-excel', 'application/vnd.openxmlformats-officedocument.spreadsheetml.sheet'];
    if (!validTypes.includes(file.type)) {
      toast.error('Please upload a valid Excel file (.xlsx or .xls)');
      return false;
    }
    return true;
  }, []);

  const clearFile = useCallback(() => {
    setFile(null);
    setCustomFileName('');
  }, []);

  const onDrop = useCallback(
    async (acceptedFiles: File[]) => {
      if (acceptedFiles.length === 0) return
      
      const uploadedFile = acceptedFiles[0]
      
      if (uploadedFile.size > 10485760) { // 10MB
        toast.error("File size exceeds the 10MB limit")
        return
      }
      
      try {
        if (!validateExcelFile(uploadedFile)) return
        await validateExcelColumns(uploadedFile, "inventory")
        setFile(uploadedFile)
        setError(null)
        toast.info("File ready for upload")
      } catch (error) {
        if (error instanceof Error) {
          toast.error(error.message)
        }
        clearFile()
      }
    },
    [validateExcelFile, clearFile]
  )

  const { getRootProps, getInputProps, isDragActive } = useDropzone({
    onDrop,
    accept: {
      "application/vnd.openxmlformats-officedocument.spreadsheetml.sheet": [".xlsx"],
      "application/vnd.ms-excel": [".xls"],
    },
    maxFiles: 1,
    multiple: false,
    maxSize: 10485760, // 10MB
  })

  const uploadFile = async () => {
    if (!file) return
    setIsUploading(true)
    setError(null)
    const renamedFile = new File([file], customFileName, { type: file.type })
    const formData = new FormData()
    formData.append("file", renamedFile)
    const customName = `${PREFIX_FILENAME}_${ec_code}`

    try {
      const response = await axios.post(`${API_BASE_URL}/api/files/upload?name=${customName}`, formData, {
        headers: { "Content-Type": "multipart/form-data" },
        onUploadProgress: (progressEvent) => {
          const progress = progressEvent.total ? Math.round((progressEvent.loaded * 100) / progressEvent.total) : 0
          setUploadProgress(progress)
        },
      })
      if (response.status === 200) {
        toast.success("File uploaded successfully!")
        clearFile()
        await fetchExistingFiles()
      }
    } catch (error) {
      const errorMessage =
        axios.isAxiosError(error) && error.response?.data?.detail
          ? error.response.data.detail
          : "An error occurred while uploading the file"
      setError(errorMessage)
      toast.error(errorMessage)
    } finally {
      setIsUploading(false)
      setUploadProgress(0)
    }
  }

  const downloadFile = async () => {
    try {
      const response = await axios.get(`${API_BASE_URL}/api/files/download/${customFileName}`, { responseType: "blob" })
      const url = window.URL.createObjectURL(new Blob([response.data]))
      const link = document.createElement("a")
      link.href = url
      link.setAttribute("download", customFileName)
      document.body.appendChild(link)
      link.click()
      link.remove()
      toast.success("File downloaded successfully!")
    } catch (error) {
      const errorMessage = axios.isAxiosError(error) ? error.response?.data?.details : "Failed to download file. Please try again later."
      toast.error(errorMessage)
    }
  }

  const deleteFile = async () => {
    try {
      await axios.delete(`${API_BASE_URL}/api/files/delete/${customFileName}`)
      toast.success("File deleted successfully!")
      await fetchExistingFiles()
    } catch (error) {
      const errorMessage = axios.isAxiosError(error) ? error.response?.data?.details : "Failed to delete file. Please try again later."
      toast.error(errorMessage)
    }
  }

  if (isLoading) {
    return (
      <div className="max-w-5xl mx-auto p-6">
        <Card className="shadow-md">
          <CardContent className="flex flex-col items-center justify-center py-16">
            <Loader2 className="w-12 h-12 animate-spin text-primary" />
            <p className="mt-4 text-muted-foreground">Loading inventory information...</p>
          </CardContent>
        </Card>
      </div>
    )
  }

  return (
    <div className="max-w-5xl mx-auto p-6 space-y-8">
      <div className="space-y-2">
        <div className="flex items-center justify-between">
          <h2 className="text-3xl font-bold tracking-tight">Inventory Management</h2>
          <Button variant="ghost" size="icon" onClick={fetchExistingFiles} className="h-9 w-9">
            <RefreshCw className="h-5 w-5" />
          </Button>
        </div>
        <p className="text-muted-foreground">
          {fileExists
            ? "Process your inventory file and store it in the database"
            : "Upload your inventory Excel file for processing"}
        </p>
      </div>

      <Separator className="my-6" />

      {error && (
        <Alert variant="destructive" className="mb-6">
          <AlertCircle className="h-5 w-5" />
          <AlertTitle>Error</AlertTitle>
          <AlertDescription>{error}</AlertDescription>
        </Alert>
      )}

      {inventoryProcessed && (
        <Alert
          variant="default"
          className="mb-6 flex items-center gap-4 p-4 rounded-xl border-green-200 bg-green-50 text-green-800 shadow-md"
        >
          <CheckCircle2 className="h-6 w-6 text-green-600 flex-shrink-0" />
          <div className="flex-1 space-y-1">
            <AlertTitle className="text-lg font-semibold text-green-900">Inventory Processed</AlertTitle>
            <AlertDescription className="text-sm text-green-700">
              The Inventory has been successfully processed and stored in the database.
            </AlertDescription>
          </div>
        </Alert>
      )}

      {fileExists ? (
        <Card className="shadow-lg border-t-4 border-t-primary">
          <CardHeader className="pb-3">
            <div className="flex items-center justify-between">
              <CardTitle className="text-2xl font-bold">Inventory File</CardTitle>
              <Badge variant={inventoryProcessed ? "secondary" : "default"}>
                {inventoryProcessed ? "Processed" : "Ready for Processing"}
              </Badge>
            </div>
            <CardDescription>
              Manage and process your uploaded inventory file
            </CardDescription>
          </CardHeader>
          <CardContent className="space-y-6">
            <Alert
              variant="default"
              className={cn(
                "flex items-center gap-4 p-4 rounded-xl shadow-sm border transition-all",
                inventoryProcessed ? "bg-rose-100 border-rose-200 text-rose-800" : "bg-blue-50 border-blue-200 text-blue-800"
              )}
            >
              <div className="flex-shrink-0">
                {inventoryProcessed ? 
                  <Info className="h-6 w-6 text-rose-600" /> : 
                  <CheckCircle2 className="h-6 w-6 text-blue-600" />}
              </div>
              <div className="flex-1 space-y-1">
                <AlertTitle className={cn("text-lg font-semibold", inventoryProcessed ? "text-rose-900" : "text-blue-900")}>
                  {inventoryProcessed ? "Inventory Status: Processed" : "Inventory Ready"}
                </AlertTitle>
                <AlertDescription className={inventoryProcessed ? "text-rose-700" : "text-blue-700"}>
                  {inventoryProcessed
                    ? "Reprocessing will update existing records. Proceed only if necessary."
                    : "Your file has been uploaded successfully. You can now process the inventory."}
                </AlertDescription>
              </div>
            </Alert>

            <div className="flex flex-col sm:flex-row items-center sm:justify-center gap-4 my-6">
              <TooltipProvider>
                <Tooltip>
                  <TooltipTrigger asChild>
                    <Button 
                      onClick={downloadFile} 
                      variant="outline" 
                      className="w-full sm:w-auto flex items-center justify-center gap-2 py-6 text-base"
                      disabled={isProcessing}
                    >
                      <Download className="w-5 h-5" /> 
                      <span>Download File</span>
                    </Button>
                  </TooltipTrigger>
                  <TooltipContent>
                    <p>Download the inventory file for review</p>
                  </TooltipContent>
                </Tooltip>
              </TooltipProvider>
              
              <TooltipProvider>
                <Tooltip>
                  <TooltipTrigger asChild>
                    <Button 
                      variant="destructive" 
                      onClick={() =>
                        setConfirmDialog({
                          type: "error",
                          message: "Are you sure you want to delete this file? This cannot be undone.",
                          onConfirm: deleteFile,
                          onCancel: () => setConfirmDialog(null),
                        })
                      } 
                      className="w-full sm:w-auto flex items-center justify-center gap-2 py-6 text-base"
                      disabled={isProcessing}
                    >
                      <Trash2 className="w-5 h-5" /> 
                      <span>Delete File</span>
                    </Button>
                  </TooltipTrigger>
                  <TooltipContent>
                    <p>Remove this file to upload a new one</p>
                  </TooltipContent>
                </Tooltip>
              </TooltipProvider>
            </div>

            <div className="flex flex-col items-center pt-3">
              <Button 
                onClick={() =>
                  setConfirmDialog({
                    type: "success",
                    message: "This will process the inventory and commit it to the database. Continue?",
                    onConfirm: processFile,
                    onCancel: () => setConfirmDialog(null),
                  })
                }
                disabled={isProcessing}
                size="lg"
                className="max-w-sm w-full flex items-center gap-3 py-7 text-lg font-medium rounded-lg shadow-md hover:shadow-lg transition-all"
              >
                {isProcessing ? (
                  <>
                    <Loader2 className="w-6 h-6 animate-spin" />
                    <span>Processing...</span>
                  </>
                ) : (
                  <>
                    <Rocket className="w-6 h-6" />
                    <span>Process Inventory</span>
                  </>
                )}
              </Button>
            </div>
          </CardContent>
        </Card>
      ) : (
        <Card className="shadow-md">
          <CardHeader className="pb-3">
            <CardTitle>File Upload</CardTitle>
            <CardDescription>Upload your inventory Excel file</CardDescription>
          </CardHeader>
          <CardContent>
            <div
              {...getRootProps()}
              className={cn(
                "border-2 border-dashed rounded-xl p-10 text-center cursor-pointer transition-all",
                isDragActive
                  ? "border-primary/70 bg-primary/5 shadow-inner"
                  : "border-muted-foreground/20 hover:border-muted-foreground/40 hover:bg-muted/5",
                isUploading && "pointer-events-none opacity-60",
                file && "bg-green-50/50 border-green-200"
              )}
            >
              <input {...getInputProps()} accept=".xlsx, .xls" />
              {file ? (
                <div className="flex flex-col items-center justify-center space-y-3">
                  <div className="bg-green-100 text-green-700 p-3 rounded-full">
                    <FileSpreadsheet className="w-8 h-8" />
                  </div>
                  <div className="flex items-center space-x-2">
                    <span className="text-gray-700 font-medium">{file.name}</span>
                    <button
                      onClick={(e) => {
                        e.stopPropagation()
                        clearFile()
                      }}
                      className="p-1 hover:bg-gray-100 rounded-full"
                      disabled={isUploading}
                      aria-label="Remove file"
                    >
                      <X className="w-5 h-5 text-gray-500" />
                    </button>
                  </div>
                  <span className="text-sm text-gray-500">
                    {(file.size / 1024 / 1024).toFixed(2)} MB
                  </span>
                </div>
              ) : (
                <div className="space-y-4">
                  <div className={cn(
                    "p-3 rounded-full mx-auto inline-flex transition-colors",
                    isDragActive ? "bg-primary/10" : "bg-muted"
                  )}>
                    <FileUp className={cn(
                      "w-10 h-10 transition-colors",
                      isDragActive ? "text-primary" : "text-muted-foreground/60"
                    )} />
                  </div>
                  <div className="space-y-2">
                    <p className="text-lg font-medium text-gray-700">
                      {isDragActive ? "Drop to upload Excel file" : "Upload inventory file"}
                    </p>
                    <p className="text-sm text-gray-500 max-w-md mx-auto">
                      Drag and drop your Excel file here, or click to browse
                    </p>
                  </div>
                </div>
              )}
            </div>
            
            {isUploading && (
              <div className="mt-4 space-y-2">
                <Progress value={uploadProgress} className="h-2" />
                <p className="text-sm text-gray-500 text-center">
                  Uploading: {uploadProgress}%
                </p>
              </div>
            )}

            <div className="mt-6 flex justify-end">
              <Button 
                onClick={() => {
                  setConfirmDialog({
                    type: "info",
                    message: "Upload the inventory file?",
                    onConfirm: uploadFile,
                    onCancel: () => setConfirmDialog(null),
                  })
                }}
                disabled={!file || isUploading}
                className="min-w-32"
              >
                {isUploading ? (
                  <>
                    <Loader2 className="w-4 h-4 mr-2 animate-spin" />
                    Uploading...
                  </>
                ) : (
                  <>
                    <FileUp className="w-4 h-4 mr-2" />
                    Upload File
                  </>
                )}
              </Button>
            </div>

            <Alert variant="default" className="mt-8 bg-muted/50 border">
              <Info className="h-5 w-5" />
              <AlertTitle>Important Notes</AlertTitle>
              <AlertDescription>
                <div className="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 gap-x-8 gap-y-2 mt-2">
                  {[
                    "Maximum file size: 10MB",
                    "Supported formats: .xlsx, .xls",
                    "Ensure the file contains valid inventory data",
                    "Each row should represent one inventory item",
                    "Verify column headers are consistent",
                    "Remove merged cells before uploading",
                    "Ensure all required fields are populated",
                    "Check data formatting before uploading"
                  ].map((note, i) => (
                    <div key={i} className="flex items-center gap-2">
                      <div className="h-1.5 w-1.5 rounded-full bg-gray-500"></div>
                      <span>{note}</span>
                    </div>
                  ))}
                </div>
              </AlertDescription>
            </Alert>
          </CardContent>
        </Card>
      )}
      
      {confirmDialog && (
        <ConfirmationDialog
          type={confirmDialog.type as "error" | "success" | "info"}
          message={confirmDialog.message}
          onConfirm={confirmDialog.onConfirm}
          onCancel={confirmDialog.onCancel}
        />
      )}
    </div>
  )
}

export default InventoryManagement
</modules/configs/inventory.tsx>

<modules/configs/relievers.tsx>
'use client';

import React, { useState } from 'react';
import { Button } from "@/components/ui/button";
import { Input } from "@/components/ui/input";
import { Select, SelectContent, SelectItem, SelectTrigger, SelectValue } from "@/components/ui/select";
import { Table, TableBody, TableCell, TableHead, TableHeader, TableRow } from "@/components/ui/table";
import { Loader2, PlusCircle, Trash2 } from 'lucide-react';
import ConfirmationDialog from '@/components/misc/DialogBox';
import { useEcCode } from '@/lib/helper';
import useRelievers from '@/hooks/useRelievers';
import courseCodes from '@/config/course_codes.json';

type CourseCode = keyof typeof courseCodes;

export default function RelieverManagement() {
    const ecCode = useEcCode()
    const { relievers = [], error, createReliever, deleteReliever } = useRelievers(ecCode);
    const [form, setForm] = useState({ NAME: '', UID: '', DEPARTMENT: '', ROLE: '', EMAIL: '' });
    const [submitting, setSubmitting] = useState<boolean>(false);
    const departments = Object.entries(courseCodes).map(([code, name]) => ({
        code: code as CourseCode,
        name
    }));
    const [confirmationDialog, setConfirmationDialog] = useState<{
        type: string
        message: string
        onConfirm: () => void
    } | null>(null)

    const handleInputChange = (e: React.ChangeEvent<HTMLInputElement>) => {
        const { name, value } = e.target;
        setForm((prev) => ({ ...prev, [name]: value }));
    };

    const handleDelete = (uid: string, e: React.MouseEvent<HTMLButtonElement>) => {
        e.preventDefault();
        setConfirmationDialog({
            type: "error",
            message: "Are you sure you want to delete this reliever?",
            onConfirm: async () => {
                await deleteReliever(uid);
            },
        })
    }

    const handleSubmit = async (e: React.FormEvent) => {
        e.preventDefault();
        setConfirmationDialog({
            type: "success",
            message: "Are you sure you want to submit the changes?",
            onConfirm: async () => {
                setSubmitting(true);
                await createReliever(form);
                setConfirmationDialog(null)
                setSubmitting(false);
                setForm({ NAME: '', UID: '', DEPARTMENT: '', ROLE: '', EMAIL: '' });
            },
        })
    };

    return (
        <div className="container mx-auto p-4 rounded-lg shadow-md">
            <h1 className="text-2xl font-bold mb-4">Reliever Management</h1>

            {error && (
                <div className="alert alert-error mb-4 bg-red-100 border border-red-400 text-red-700 rounded p-2">
                    <Loader2 className="h-4 w-4 inline-block mr-2" />
                    <span>{error}</span>
                </div>
            )}

            <form onSubmit={handleSubmit}>
                <h2 className="text-xl font-semibold">Create New Reliever</h2>

                <div className="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-5 gap-4">
                    <div className="flex justify-between md:col-span-2 space-x-4 gap-4">
                        <Input
                            name="NAME"
                            type="text"
                            value={form.NAME}
                            onChange={handleInputChange}
                            placeholder="Name"
                            required
                        />
                        <Input
                            name="UID"
                            type="text"
                            value={form.UID}
                            onChange={handleInputChange}
                            placeholder="UID"
                            required
                        />
                    </div>
                    <div className="flex justify-between md:col-span-2 space-x-4 gap-4">
                        <Select name="DEPARTMENT" value={form.DEPARTMENT} onValueChange={(value) => setForm((prev) => ({ ...prev, DEPARTMENT: value }))} required>
                            <SelectTrigger className="w-full">
                                <SelectValue placeholder="Department" />
                            </SelectTrigger>
                            <SelectContent>
                                {departments.map((dept) => (
                                    <SelectItem key={dept.code} value={dept.code}>
                                        <b>{dept.code}</b> - {dept.name}
                                    </SelectItem>
                                ))}
                            </SelectContent>
                        </Select>
                    </div>
                    <div className="flex justify-between md:col-span-1 space-x-4 gap-4">
                        <Input
                            name="EMAIL"
                            type="email"
                            value={form.EMAIL}
                            onChange={handleInputChange}
                            placeholder="Email"
                            required
                        />
                        </div>
                        <Button type="submit" disabled={submitting} className="mt-2">
                            {submitting ? (
                                <>
                                    <Loader2 className="mr-2 h-4 w-4 animate-spin" />
                                    Creating...
                                </>
                            ) : (
                                <>
                                    <PlusCircle className="mr-2 h-4 w-4" /> Create Reliever
                                </>
                            )}
                        </Button>
                    
                </div>
            </form>

            <br />

            <h2 className="text-xl font-semibold mb-4">Available Relievers</h2>
            <Table className="min-w-full rounded-lg shadow-md">
                <TableHeader>
                    <TableRow>
                        <TableHead className="border-b border-gray-300 dark:border-gray-600">Name</TableHead>
                        <TableHead className="border-b border-gray-300 dark:border-gray-600">UID</TableHead>
                        <TableHead className="border-b border-gray-300 dark:border-gray-600">Department</TableHead>
                        <TableHead className="border-b border-gray-300 dark:border-gray-600">Email</TableHead>
                        <TableHead className="border-b border-gray-300 dark:border-gray-600">Actions</TableHead>
                    </TableRow>
                </TableHeader>
                <TableBody>
                    {relievers.map((reliever) => (
                        <TableRow key={reliever.ID} className="hover:bg-gray-100 dark:hover:bg-gray-600">
                            <TableCell className="border-b border-gray-300 dark:border-gray-600">{reliever.NAME}</TableCell>
                            <TableCell className="border-b border-gray-300 dark:border-gray-600">{reliever.UID}</TableCell>
                            <TableCell className="border-b border-gray-300 dark:border-gray-600">
                                <b>{reliever.DEPARTMENT}</b> - {departments.find((dept) => dept.code === reliever.DEPARTMENT)?.name || 'Unknown'}
                            </TableCell>
                            <TableCell className="border-b border-gray-300 dark:border-gray-600">{reliever.EMAIL}</TableCell>
                            <TableCell className="border-b border-gray-300 dark:border-gray-600">
                                <Button variant="destructive" onClick={(e) => handleDelete(reliever.UID, e)}>
                                    <Trash2 className="h-4 w-4" /> Delete
                                </Button>
                            </TableCell>
                        </TableRow>
                    ))}
                </TableBody>
            </Table>

            {confirmationDialog && (
                <ConfirmationDialog
                    type={confirmationDialog.type as "error" | "success" | "info"}
                    confirmButtonText={confirmationDialog.type === "error" ? "Yes" : "Confirm"}
                    message={confirmationDialog.message}
                    onConfirm={confirmationDialog.onConfirm}
                    onCancel={() => setConfirmationDialog(null)}
                />
            )}
        </div>
    );
};

</modules/configs/relievers.tsx>

<modules/configs/emarksheet.tsx>
"use client";

import type React from "react";
import { useCallback, useEffect, useState } from "react";
import { useDropzone } from "react-dropzone";
import axios from "axios";
import {
  FileUp,
  X,
  FileSpreadsheet,
  Download,
  AlertCircle,
  Loader2,
  RefreshCw,
  Trash2,
  CheckCircle2,
  Info,
  Rocket
} from "lucide-react";
import { Card, CardContent, CardHeader, CardTitle, CardDescription } from "@/components/ui/card";
import { Button } from "@/components/ui/button";
import { cn } from "@/lib/utils";
import { toast } from "react-toastify";
import "react-toastify/dist/ReactToastify.css";
import { Alert, AlertDescription, AlertTitle } from "@/components/ui/alert";
import { Progress } from "@/components/ui/progress";
import ConfirmationDialog from "@/components/misc/DialogBox";
import { useEcCode } from "@/lib/helper";
import { useTableExists } from "@/hooks/useTableExists";
import { Badge } from "@/components/ui/badge"; 
import { Separator } from "@/components/ui/separator";
import { Tooltip, TooltipContent, TooltipProvider, TooltipTrigger } from "@/components/ui/tooltip";
import { validateExcelColumns } from "@/lib/excelValidator";

const API_BASE_URL = process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_API_URL || "http://127.0.0.1:8000";
const PREFIX_FILENAME = "emarksheet";

interface ConfirmationDialogProps {
  type: "warning" | "error" | "success" | "info";
  message: string;
  onConfirm: () => void;
  onCancel: () => void;
}

const EMarksheet: React.FC = () => {
  const [file, setFile] = useState<File | null>(null);
  const [fileExists, setFileExists] = useState(false);
  const [customFileName, setCustomFileName] = useState("");
  const [isUploading, setIsUploading] = useState(false);
  const [uploadProgress, setUploadProgress] = useState(0);
  const [isLoading, setIsLoading] = useState(true);
  const [error, setError] = useState<string | null>(null);
  const [isProcessing, setIsProcessing] = useState(false);
  const [confirmDialog, setConfirmDialog] = useState<ConfirmationDialogProps | null>(null);
  const { checkEmarksheetTable } = useTableExists();
  const emarksheetProcessed = checkEmarksheetTable();
  const ec_code = useEcCode();

  const fetchExistingFiles = useCallback(async () => {
    setIsLoading(true);
    setError(null);
    try {
      const response = await axios.get(`${API_BASE_URL}/api/files/list`);
      const files = response.data || [];
      const newFileName = `${PREFIX_FILENAME}_${ec_code}.xlsx`;
      setCustomFileName(newFileName);
      setFileExists(files.includes(newFileName));
    } catch (error) {
      const errorMessage = axios.isAxiosError(error)
        ? error.response?.data?.details
        : "Failed to fetch existing files. Please try again later.";
      setError(errorMessage);
      toast.error(errorMessage);
    } finally {
      setIsLoading(false);
    }
  }, [ec_code]);

  useEffect(() => {
    fetchExistingFiles();
  }, [fetchExistingFiles]);

  const processFile = async () => {
    setIsProcessing(true);
    try {
      const response = await axios.post(`${API_BASE_URL}/api/emarksheet/process/${ec_code}`);
      if (response.status === 200) {
        toast.success("E-Marksheet processed successfully!");
      } else {
        throw new Error("Unexpected response from the server.");
      }
    } catch (error) {
      const errorMessage =
        axios.isAxiosError(error) && error.response?.data?.detail
          ? error.response.data.detail
          : "An error occurred while processing the file.";
      toast.error(errorMessage);
    } finally {
      setIsProcessing(false);
    }
  };

  const validateExcelFile = useCallback((file: File) => {
    const validTypes = [
      "application/vnd.openxmlformats-officedocument.spreadsheetml.sheet",
      "application/vnd.ms-excel",
    ];
    if (!validTypes.includes(file.type)) {
      toast.error("Please upload a valid Excel file (.xlsx or .xls)");
      return false;
    }
    return true;
  }, []);

  const clearFile = useCallback(() => {
    setFile(null);
    setError(null);
    setUploadProgress(0);
  }, []);

  const onDrop = useCallback(
