    async (acceptedFiles: File[]) => {
      if (acceptedFiles.length === 0) return;
      
      const uploadedFile = acceptedFiles[0];
      
      if (uploadedFile.size > 10485760) { // 10MB
        toast.error("File size exceeds the 10MB limit");
        return;
      }
      
      try {
        if (!validateExcelFile(uploadedFile)) return;
        await validateExcelColumns(uploadedFile, "emarksheet");
        setFile(uploadedFile);
        setError(null);
        toast.info("File ready for upload");
      } catch (error) {
        if (error instanceof Error) {
          toast.error(error.message);
        }
        clearFile();
      }
    },
    [validateExcelFile, clearFile]
  );

  const { getRootProps, getInputProps, isDragActive } = useDropzone({
    onDrop,
    accept: {
      "application/vnd.openxmlformats-officedocument.spreadsheetml.sheet": [".xlsx"],
      "application/vnd.ms-excel": [".xls"],
    },
    maxFiles: 1,
    multiple: false,
    maxSize: 10485760, // 10MB
  });

  const uploadFile = async () => {
    if (!file) return;
    setIsUploading(true);
    setError(null);
    const renamedFile = new File([file], customFileName, { type: file.type });
    const formData = new FormData();
    formData.append("file", renamedFile);
    const customName = `${PREFIX_FILENAME}_${ec_code}`;

    try {
      const response = await axios.post(`${API_BASE_URL}/api/files/upload?name=${customName}`, formData, {
        headers: { "Content-Type": "multipart/form-data" },
        onUploadProgress: (progressEvent) => {
          const progress = progressEvent.total ? Math.round((progressEvent.loaded * 100) / progressEvent.total) : 0;
          setUploadProgress(progress);
        },
      });
      if (response.status === 200) {
        toast.success("File uploaded successfully!");
        clearFile();
        await fetchExistingFiles();
      }
    } catch (error) {
      const errorMessage =
        axios.isAxiosError(error) && error.response?.data?.detail
          ? error.response.data.detail
          : "An error occurred while uploading the file";
      setError(errorMessage);
      toast.error(errorMessage);
    } finally {
      setIsUploading(false);
      setUploadProgress(0);
    }
  };

  const downloadFile = async () => {
    try {
      const response = await axios.get(`${API_BASE_URL}/api/files/download/${customFileName}`, { responseType: "blob" });
      const url = window.URL.createObjectURL(new Blob([response.data]));
      const link = document.createElement("a");
      link.href = url;
      link.setAttribute("download", customFileName);
      document.body.appendChild(link);
      link.click();
      link.remove();
      toast.success("File downloaded successfully!");
    } catch (error) {
      const errorMessage = axios.isAxiosError(error)
        ? error.response?.data?.details
        : "Failed to download file. Please try again later.";
      toast.error(errorMessage);
    }
  };

  const deleteFile = async () => {
    try {
      await axios.delete(`${API_BASE_URL}/api/files/delete/${customFileName}`);
      toast.success("File deleted successfully!");
      await fetchExistingFiles();
    } catch (error) {
      const errorMessage = axios.isAxiosError(error)
        ? error.response?.data?.details
        : "Failed to delete file. Please try again later.";
      toast.error(errorMessage);
    }
  };

  if (isLoading) {
    return (
      <div className="max-w-5xl mx-auto p-6">
        <Card className="shadow-md">
          <CardContent className="flex flex-col items-center justify-center py-16">
            <Loader2 className="w-12 h-12 animate-spin text-primary" />
            <p className="mt-4 text-muted-foreground">Loading E-Marksheet information...</p>
          </CardContent>
        </Card>
      </div>
    );
  }

  return (
    <div className="max-w-5xl mx-auto p-6 space-y-8">
      <div className="space-y-2">
        <div className="flex items-center justify-between">
          <h2 className="text-3xl font-bold tracking-tight">E-Marksheet Management</h2>
          <Button variant="ghost" size="icon" onClick={fetchExistingFiles} className="h-9 w-9">
            <RefreshCw className="h-5 w-5" />
          </Button>
        </div>
        <p className="text-muted-foreground">
          {fileExists
            ? "Process your E-Marksheet file and store it in the database"
            : "Upload your E-Marksheet Excel file for processing"}
        </p>
      </div>

      <Separator className="my-6" />

      {error && (
        <Alert variant="destructive" className="mb-6">
          <AlertCircle className="h-5 w-5" />
          <AlertTitle>Error</AlertTitle>
          <AlertDescription>{error}</AlertDescription>
        </Alert>
      )}

      {emarksheetProcessed && (
        <Alert
          variant="default"
          className="mb-6 flex items-center gap-4 p-4 rounded-xl border-green-200 bg-green-50 text-green-800 shadow-md"
        >
          <CheckCircle2 className="h-6 w-6 text-green-600 flex-shrink-0" />
          <div className="flex-1 space-y-1">
            <AlertTitle className="text-lg font-semibold text-green-900">E-Marksheet Processed</AlertTitle>
            <AlertDescription className="text-sm text-green-700">
              The E-Marksheet has been successfully processed and stored in the database.
            </AlertDescription>
          </div>
        </Alert>
      )}

      {fileExists ? (
        <Card className="shadow-lg border-t-4 border-t-primary">
          <CardHeader className="pb-3">
            <div className="flex items-center justify-between">
              <CardTitle className="text-2xl font-bold">E-Marksheet File</CardTitle>
              <Badge variant={emarksheetProcessed ? "secondary" : "default"}>
                {emarksheetProcessed ? "Processed" : "Ready for Processing"}
              </Badge>
            </div>
            <CardDescription>
              Manage and process your uploaded E-Marksheet file
            </CardDescription>
          </CardHeader>
          <CardContent className="space-y-6">
            <Alert
              variant="default"
              className={cn(
                "flex items-center gap-4 p-4 rounded-xl shadow-sm border transition-all",
                emarksheetProcessed ? "bg-rose-100 border-rose-200 text-rose-800" : "bg-blue-50 border-blue-200 text-blue-800"
              )}
            >
              <div className="flex-shrink-0">
                {emarksheetProcessed ? 
                  <Info className="h-6 w-6 text-rose-600" /> : 
                  <CheckCircle2 className="h-6 w-6 text-blue-600" />}
              </div>
              <div className="flex-1 space-y-1">
                <AlertTitle className={cn("text-lg font-semibold", emarksheetProcessed ? "text-rose-900" : "text-blue-900")}>
                  {emarksheetProcessed ? "E-Marksheet Status: Processed" : "E-Marksheet Ready"}
                </AlertTitle>
                <AlertDescription className={emarksheetProcessed ? "text-rose-700" : "text-blue-700"}>
                  {emarksheetProcessed
                    ? "Reprocessing will update existing records. Proceed only if necessary."
                    : "Your file has been uploaded successfully. You can now process the E-Marksheet."}
                </AlertDescription>
              </div>
            </Alert>

            <div className="flex flex-col sm:flex-row items-center sm:justify-center gap-4 my-6">
              <TooltipProvider>
                <Tooltip>
                  <TooltipTrigger asChild>
                    <Button 
                      onClick={downloadFile} 
                      variant="outline" 
                      className="w-full sm:w-auto flex items-center justify-center gap-2 py-6 text-base"
                      disabled={isProcessing}
                    >
                      <Download className="w-5 h-5" /> 
                      <span>Download File</span>
                    </Button>
                  </TooltipTrigger>
                  <TooltipContent>
                    <p>Download the E-Marksheet file for review</p>
                  </TooltipContent>
                </Tooltip>
              </TooltipProvider>
              
              <TooltipProvider>
                <Tooltip>
                  <TooltipTrigger asChild>
                    <Button 
                      variant="destructive" 
                      onClick={() =>
                        setConfirmDialog({
                          type: "error",
                          message: "Are you sure you want to delete this file? This cannot be undone.",
                          onConfirm: deleteFile,
                          onCancel: () => setConfirmDialog(null),
                        })
                      } 
                      className="w-full sm:w-auto flex items-center justify-center gap-2 py-6 text-base"
                      disabled={isProcessing}
                    >
                      <Trash2 className="w-5 h-5" /> 
                      <span>Delete File</span>
                    </Button>
                  </TooltipTrigger>
                  <TooltipContent>
                    <p>Remove this file to upload a new one</p>
                  </TooltipContent>
                </Tooltip>
              </TooltipProvider>
            </div>

            <div className="flex flex-col items-center pt-3">
              <Button 
                onClick={() =>
                  setConfirmDialog({
                    type: "success",
                    message: "This will process the E-Marksheet and commit it to the database. Continue?",
                    onConfirm: processFile,
                    onCancel: () => setConfirmDialog(null),
                  })
                }
                disabled={isProcessing}
                size="lg"
                className="max-w-sm w-full flex items-center gap-3 py-7 text-lg font-medium rounded-lg shadow-md hover:shadow-lg transition-all"
              >
                {isProcessing ? (
                  <>
                    <Loader2 className="w-6 h-6 animate-spin" />
                    <span>Processing...</span>
                  </>
                ) : (
                  <>
                    <Rocket className="w-6 h-6" />
                    <span>Process E-Marksheet</span>
                  </>
                )}
              </Button>
            </div>
          </CardContent>
        </Card>
      ) : (
        <Card className="shadow-md">
          <CardHeader className="pb-3">
            <CardTitle>File Upload</CardTitle>
            <CardDescription>Upload your E-Marksheet Excel file</CardDescription>
          </CardHeader>
          <CardContent>
            <div
              {...getRootProps()}
              className={cn(
                "border-2 border-dashed rounded-xl p-10 text-center cursor-pointer transition-all",
                isDragActive
                  ? "border-primary/70 bg-primary/5 shadow-inner"
                  : "border-muted-foreground/20 hover:border-muted-foreground/40 hover:bg-muted/5",
                isUploading && "pointer-events-none opacity-60",
                file && "bg-green-50/50 border-green-200"
              )}
            >
              <input {...getInputProps()} accept=".xlsx, .xls" />
              {file ? (
                <div className="flex flex-col items-center justify-center space-y-3">
                  <div className="bg-green-100 text-green-700 p-3 rounded-full">
                    <FileSpreadsheet className="w-8 h-8" />
                  </div>
                  <div className="flex items-center space-x-2">
                    <span className="text-gray-700 font-medium">{file.name}</span>
                    <button
                      onClick={(e) => {
                        e.stopPropagation();
                        clearFile();
                      }}
                      className="p-1 hover:bg-gray-100 rounded-full"
                      disabled={isUploading}
                      aria-label="Remove file"
                    >
                      <X className="w-5 h-5 text-gray-500" />
                    </button>
                  </div>
                  <span className="text-sm text-gray-500">
                    {(file.size / 1024 / 1024).toFixed(2)} MB
                  </span>
                </div>
              ) : (
                <div className="space-y-4">
                  <div className={cn(
                    "p-3 rounded-full mx-auto inline-flex transition-colors",
                    isDragActive ? "bg-primary/10" : "bg-muted"
                  )}>
                    <FileUp className={cn(
                      "w-10 h-10 transition-colors",
                      isDragActive ? "text-primary" : "text-muted-foreground/60"
                    )} />
                  </div>
                  <div className="space-y-2">
                    <p className="text-lg font-medium text-gray-700">
                      {isDragActive ? "Drop to upload Excel file" : "Upload E-Marksheet file"}
                    </p>
                    <p className="text-sm text-gray-500 max-w-md mx-auto">
                      Drag and drop your Excel file here, or click to browse
                    </p>
                  </div>
                </div>
              )}
            </div>
            
            {isUploading && (
              <div className="mt-4 space-y-2">
                <Progress value={uploadProgress} className="h-2" />
                <p className="text-sm text-gray-500 text-center">
                  Uploading: {uploadProgress}%
                </p>
              </div>
            )}

            <div className="mt-6 flex justify-end">
              <Button 
                onClick={() => {
                  setConfirmDialog({
                    type: "info",
                    message: "Upload the E-Marksheet file?",
                    onConfirm: uploadFile,
                    onCancel: () => setConfirmDialog(null),
                  })
                }}
                disabled={!file || isUploading}
                className="min-w-32"
              >
                {isUploading ? (
                  <>
                    <Loader2 className="w-4 h-4 mr-2 animate-spin" />
                    Uploading...
                  </>
                ) : (
                  <>
                    <FileUp className="w-4 h-4 mr-2" />
                    Upload File
                  </>
                )}
              </Button>
            </div>

            <Alert variant="default" className="mt-8 bg-muted/50 border">
              <Info className="h-5 w-5" />
              <AlertTitle>Important Notes</AlertTitle>
              <AlertDescription>
                <div className="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 gap-x-8 gap-y-2 mt-2">
                  {[
                    "Maximum file size: 10MB",
                    "Supported formats: .xlsx, .xls",
                    "Remove merged cells and complex formatting",
                    "Each row should represent one student's marks",
                    "Verify column headers are consistent",
                    "Ensure all required fields are populated",
                    "Check data formatting before uploading",
                    "Back up your data before processing"
                  ].map((note, i) => (
                    <div key={i} className="flex items-center gap-2">
                      <div className="h-1.5 w-1.5 rounded-full bg-gray-500"></div>
                      <span>{note}</span>
                    </div>
                  ))}
                </div>
              </AlertDescription>
            </Alert>
          </CardContent>
        </Card>
      )}
      
      {confirmDialog && (
        <ConfirmationDialog
          type={confirmDialog.type as "error" | "success" | "info"}
          message={confirmDialog.message}
          onConfirm={confirmDialog.onConfirm}
          onCancel={confirmDialog.onCancel}
        />
      )}
    </div>
  );
};

export default EMarksheet;
</modules/configs/emarksheet.tsx>

<modules/configs/seating-arrangement.tsx>
"use client"

import type React from "react"
import { useCallback, useEffect, useState } from "react"
import { useDropzone } from "react-dropzone"
import axios from "axios"
import {
  FileUp,
  X,
  FileSpreadsheet,
  Download,
  AlertCircle,
  Loader2,
  RefreshCw,
  Trash2,
  CheckCircle2,
  Info,
  Rocket
} from "lucide-react"
import { Card, CardContent, CardHeader, CardTitle, CardDescription } from "@/components/ui/card"
import { Button } from "@/components/ui/button"
import { cn } from "@/lib/utils"
import { toast } from "react-toastify"
import "react-toastify/dist/ReactToastify.css"
import { Alert, AlertDescription, AlertTitle } from "@/components/ui/alert"
import { Progress } from "@/components/ui/progress"
import ConfirmationDialog from "@/components/misc/DialogBox"
import { validateExcelColumns } from "@/lib/excelValidator"
import { useEcCode } from "@/lib/helper"
import { useTableExists } from "@/hooks/useTableExists"
import { Badge } from "@/components/ui/badge"
import { Separator } from "@/components/ui/separator"
import { Tooltip, TooltipContent, TooltipProvider, TooltipTrigger } from "@/components/ui/tooltip"

const API_BASE_URL = process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_API_URL || "http://127.0.0.1:8000"
const PREFIX_FILENAME = "ec"

interface ConfirmationDialogProps {
  type: "warning" | "error" | "success" | "info"
  message: string
  onConfirm: () => void
  onCancel: () => void
}

const SeatingArrangement: React.FC = () => {
  const [file, setFile] = useState<File | null>(null)
  const [fileExists, setFileExists] = useState(false)
  const [customFileName, setCustomFileName] = useState("")
  const [isUploading, setIsUploading] = useState(false)
  const [uploadProgress, setUploadProgress] = useState(0)
  const [isLoading, setIsLoading] = useState(true)
  const [error, setError] = useState<string | null>(null)
  const [isProcessing, setIsProcessing] = useState(false)
  const [confirmDialog, setConfirmDialog] = useState<ConfirmationDialogProps | null>(null)
  const ec_code = useEcCode()
  const { checkSeatingChartTable } = useTableExists()
  const seatingProcessed = checkSeatingChartTable()

  const fetchExistingFiles = useCallback(async () => {
    setIsLoading(true)
    setError(null)
    try {
      const response = await axios.get(`${API_BASE_URL}/api/files/list`)
      const files = response.data || []
      const newFileName = `${PREFIX_FILENAME}_${ec_code}_final_arrangement.xlsx`

      setCustomFileName(newFileName)
      setFileExists(files.includes(newFileName))
    } catch (error) {
      const errorMessage = axios.isAxiosError(error) ? error.response?.data?.details : "Failed to fetch existing files. Please try again later."
      setError(errorMessage)
      toast.error(errorMessage)
    } finally {
      setIsLoading(false)
    }
  }, [ec_code])

  useEffect(() => {
    fetchExistingFiles()
  }, [fetchExistingFiles])

  const processFile = async () => {
    setIsProcessing(true)
    try {
      const response = await axios.post(`${API_BASE_URL}/api/seatingarrangement/${ec_code}`)
      if (response.status === 200) {
        toast.success("Seating arrangement processed successfully!")
        await fetchExistingFiles()
      } else {
        throw new Error("Unexpected response from the server.")
      }
    } catch (error) {
      const errorMessage =
        axios.isAxiosError(error) && error.response?.data?.detail
          ? error.response.data.detail
          : "An error occurred while processing the seating arrangement."
      setError(errorMessage)
      toast.error(errorMessage)
    } finally {
      setIsProcessing(false)
    }
  }

  const validateExcelFile = useCallback((file: File) => {
    const validTypes = ['application/vnd.ms-excel', 'application/vnd.openxmlformats-officedocument.spreadsheetml.sheet']
    if (!validTypes.includes(file.type)) {
      toast.error('Please upload a valid Excel file (.xlsx or .xls)')
      return false
    }
    return true
  }, [])

  const clearFile = useCallback(() => {
    setFile(null)
    setError(null)
    setUploadProgress(0)
  }, [])

  const onDrop = useCallback(
    async (acceptedFiles: File[]) => {
      if (acceptedFiles.length === 0) return

      const uploadedFile = acceptedFiles[0]

      if (uploadedFile.size > 10485760) { // 10MB
        toast.error("File size exceeds the 10MB limit")
        return
      }

      try {
        if (!validateExcelFile(uploadedFile)) return
        await validateExcelColumns(uploadedFile, "seatingarrangement")
        setFile(uploadedFile)
        setError(null)
        toast.info("File ready for upload")
      } catch (error) {
        if (error instanceof Error) {
          toast.error(error.message)
        }
        clearFile()
      }
    },
    [validateExcelFile, clearFile]
  )

  const { getRootProps, getInputProps, isDragActive } = useDropzone({
    onDrop,
    accept: {
      "application/vnd.openxmlformats-officedocument.spreadsheetml.sheet": [".xlsx"],
      "application/vnd.ms-excel": [".xls"],
    },
    maxFiles: 1,
    multiple: false,
    maxSize: 10485760, // 10MB
  })

  const uploadFile = async () => {
    if (!file) return
    setIsUploading(true)
    setError(null)
    const renamedFile = new File([file], customFileName, { type: file.type })
    const formData = new FormData()
    formData.append("file", renamedFile)
    const customName = `${PREFIX_FILENAME}_${ec_code}_final_arrangement`

    try {
      const response = await axios.post(`${API_BASE_URL}/api/files/upload?name=${customName}`, formData, {
        headers: { "Content-Type": "multipart/form-data" },
        onUploadProgress: (progressEvent) => {
          const progress = progressEvent.total ? Math.round((progressEvent.loaded * 100) / progressEvent.total) : 0
          setUploadProgress(progress)
        },
      })
      if (response.status === 200) {
        toast.success("Seating arrangement uploaded successfully!")
        clearFile()
        await fetchExistingFiles()
      }
    } catch (error) {
      const errorMessage =
        axios.isAxiosError(error) && error.response?.data?.detail
          ? error.response.data.detail
          : "An error occurred while uploading the file"
      setError(errorMessage)
      toast.error(errorMessage)
    } finally {
      setIsUploading(false)
      setUploadProgress(0)
    }
  }

  const downloadFile = async () => {
    try {
      const response = await axios.get(`${API_BASE_URL}/api/files/download/${customFileName}`, { responseType: "blob" })
      const url = window.URL.createObjectURL(new Blob([response.data]))
      const link = document.createElement("a")
      link.href = url
      link.setAttribute("download", customFileName)
      document.body.appendChild(link)
      link.click()
      link.remove()
      toast.success("File downloaded successfully!")
    } catch (error) {
      const errorMessage = axios.isAxiosError(error) ? error.response?.data?.details : "Failed to download file. Please try again later."
      toast.error(errorMessage)
    }
  }

  const downloadTimetable = async () => {
    setIsProcessing(true)
    try {
      const response = await fetch('/api/timetable', { method: 'PUT' })
      const blob = await response.blob()
      const a = document.createElement('a')
      a.href = URL.createObjectURL(blob)
      a.download = 'timetable.json'
      a.click()
      toast.success("Timetable JSON downloaded successfully")
    } catch {
      toast.error("Failed to download timetable JSON")
    } finally {
      setIsProcessing(false)
    }
  }

  const deleteFile = async () => {
    try {
      await axios.delete(`${API_BASE_URL}/api/files/delete/${customFileName}`)
      toast.success("File deleted successfully!")
      await fetchExistingFiles()
    } catch (error) {
      const errorMessage = axios.isAxiosError(error) ? error.response?.data?.details : "Failed to delete file. Please try again later."
      toast.error(errorMessage)
    }
  }

  if (isLoading) {
    return (
      <div className="max-w-5xl mx-auto p-6">
        <Card className="shadow-md">
          <CardContent className="flex flex-col items-center justify-center py-16">
            <Loader2 className="w-12 h-12 animate-spin text-primary" />
            <p className="mt-4 text-muted-foreground">Loading seating arrangement information...</p>
          </CardContent>
        </Card>
      </div>
    )
  }

  return (
    <div className="max-w-5xl mx-auto p-6 space-y-8">
      <div className="space-y-2">
        <div className="flex items-center justify-between">
          <h2 className="text-3xl font-bold tracking-tight">Seating Arrangement Management</h2>
          <Button variant="ghost" size="icon" onClick={fetchExistingFiles} className="h-9 w-9">
            <RefreshCw className="h-5 w-5" />
          </Button>
        </div>
        <p className="text-muted-foreground">
          {fileExists
            ? "Process your seating arrangement file and store it in the database"
            : "Upload your seating arrangement Excel file for processing"}
        </p>
      </div>

      <Separator className="my-6" />

      {error && (
        <Alert variant="destructive" className="mb-6">
          <AlertCircle className="h-5 w-5" />
          <AlertTitle>Error</AlertTitle>
          <AlertDescription>{error}</AlertDescription>
        </Alert>
      )}

      {seatingProcessed && (
        <Alert
          variant="default"
          className="mb-6 flex items-center gap-4 p-4 rounded-xl border-green-200 bg-green-50 text-green-800 shadow-md"
        >
          <CheckCircle2 className="h-6 w-6 text-green-600 flex-shrink-0" />
          <div className="flex-1 space-y-1">
            <AlertTitle className="text-lg font-semibold text-green-900">Seating Arrangement Processed</AlertTitle>
            <AlertDescription className="text-sm text-green-700">
              The seating arrangement has been successfully processed and stored in the database.
            </AlertDescription>
          </div>
        </Alert>
      )}

      {fileExists ? (
        <Card className="shadow-lg border-t-4 border-t-primary">
          <CardHeader className="pb-3">
            <div className="flex items-center justify-between">
              <CardTitle className="text-2xl font-bold">Seating Arrangement File</CardTitle>
              <Badge variant={seatingProcessed ? "secondary" : "default"}>
                {seatingProcessed ? "Processed" : "Ready for Processing"}
              </Badge>
            </div>
            <CardDescription>
              Manage and process your uploaded seating arrangement file
            </CardDescription>
          </CardHeader>
          <CardContent className="space-y-6">
            <Alert
              variant="default"
              className={cn(
                "flex items-center gap-4 p-4 rounded-xl shadow-sm border transition-all",
                seatingProcessed ? "bg-rose-100 border-rose-200 text-rose-800" : "bg-blue-50 border-blue-200 text-blue-800"
              )}
            >
              <div className="flex-shrink-0">
                {seatingProcessed ? 
                  <Info className="h-6 w-6 text-rose-600" /> : 
                  <CheckCircle2 className="h-6 w-6 text-blue-600" />}
              </div>
              <div className="flex-1 space-y-1">
                <AlertTitle className={cn("text-lg font-semibold", seatingProcessed ? "text-rose-900" : "text-blue-900")}>
                  {seatingProcessed ? "Seating Arrangement Status: Processed" : "Seating Arrangement Ready"}
                </AlertTitle>
                <AlertDescription className={seatingProcessed ? "text-rose-700" : "text-blue-700"}>
                  {seatingProcessed
                    ? "Reprocessing will update existing records. Proceed only if necessary."
                    : "Your file has been uploaded successfully. You can now process the seating arrangement."}
                </AlertDescription>
              </div>
            </Alert>

            <div className="flex flex-col sm:flex-row items-center sm:justify-center gap-4 my-6">
              <TooltipProvider>
                <Tooltip>
                  <TooltipTrigger asChild>
                    <Button 
                      onClick={downloadFile} 
                      variant="outline" 
                      className="w-full sm:w-auto flex items-center justify-center gap-2 py-6 text-base"
                      disabled={isProcessing}
                    >
                      <Download className="w-5 h-5" /> 
                      <span>Download File</span>
                    </Button>
                  </TooltipTrigger>
                  <TooltipContent>
                    <p>Download the seating arrangement file for review</p>
                  </TooltipContent>
                </Tooltip>
              </TooltipProvider>
              
              <TooltipProvider>
                <Tooltip>
                  <TooltipTrigger asChild>
                    <Button 
                      variant="destructive" 
                      onClick={() =>
                        setConfirmDialog({
                          type: "error",
                          message: "Are you sure you want to delete this file? This cannot be undone.",
                          onConfirm: deleteFile,
                          onCancel: () => setConfirmDialog(null),
                        })
                      } 
                      className="w-full sm:w-auto flex items-center justify-center gap-2 py-6 text-base"
                      disabled={isProcessing}
                    >
                      <Trash2 className="w-5 h-5" /> 
                      <span>Delete File</span>
                    </Button>
                  </TooltipTrigger>
                  <TooltipContent>
                    <p>Remove this file to upload a new one</p>
                  </TooltipContent>
                </Tooltip>
              </TooltipProvider>

              <TooltipProvider>
                <Tooltip>
                  <TooltipTrigger asChild>
                    <Button 
                      onClick={downloadTimetable} 
                      variant="outline" 
                      className="w-full sm:w-auto flex items-center justify-center gap-2 py-6 text-base"
                      disabled={isProcessing}
                    >
                      <Download className="w-5 h-5" /> 
                      <span>Download Timetable JSON</span>
                    </Button>
                  </TooltipTrigger>
                  <TooltipContent>
                    <p>Download the timetable in JSON format</p>
                  </TooltipContent>
                </Tooltip>
              </TooltipProvider>
            </div>

            <div className="flex flex-col items-center pt-3">
              <Button 
                onClick={() =>
                  setConfirmDialog({
                    type: "success",
                    message: "This will process the seating arrangement and commit it to the database. Continue?",
                    onConfirm: processFile,
                    onCancel: () => setConfirmDialog(null),
                  })
                }
                disabled={isProcessing}
                size="lg"
                className="max-w-sm w-full flex items-center gap-3 py-7 text-lg font-medium rounded-lg shadow-md hover:shadow-lg transition-all"
              >
                {isProcessing ? (
                  <>
                    <Loader2 className="w-6 h-6 animate-spin" />
                    <span>Processing...</span>
                  </>
                ) : (
                  <>
                    <Rocket className="w-6 h-6" />
                    <span>Process Seating Arrangement</span>
                  </>
                )}
              </Button>
            </div>
          </CardContent>
        </Card>
      ) : (
        <Card className="shadow-md">
          <CardHeader className="pb-3">
            <CardTitle>File Upload</CardTitle>
            <CardDescription>Upload your seating arrangement Excel file</CardDescription>
          </CardHeader>
          <CardContent>
            <div
              {...getRootProps()}
              className={cn(
                "border-2 border-dashed rounded-xl p-10 text-center cursor-pointer transition-all",
                isDragActive
                  ? "border-primary/70 bg-primary/5 shadow-inner"
                  : "border-muted-foreground/20 hover:border-muted-foreground/40 hover:bg-muted/5",
                isUploading && "pointer-events-none opacity-60",
                file && "bg-green-50/50 border-green-200"
              )}
            >
              <input {...getInputProps()} accept=".xlsx, .xls" />
              {file ? (
                <div className="flex flex-col items-center justify-center space-y-3">
                  <div className="bg-green-100 text-green-700 p-3 rounded-full">
                    <FileSpreadsheet className="w-8 h-8" />
                  </div>
                  <div className="flex items-center space-x-2">
                    <span className="text-gray-700 font-medium">{file.name}</span>
                    <button
                      onClick={(e) => {
                        e.stopPropagation()
                        clearFile()
                      }}
                      className="p-1 hover:bg-gray-100 rounded-full"
                      disabled={isUploading}
                      aria-label="Remove file"
                    >
                      <X className="w-5 h-5 text-gray-500" />
                    </button>
                  </div>
                  <span className="text-sm text-gray-500">
                    {(file.size / 1024 / 1024).toFixed(2)} MB
                  </span>
                </div>
              ) : (
                <div className="space-y-4">
                  <div className={cn(
                    "p-3 rounded-full mx-auto inline-flex transition-colors",
                    isDragActive ? "bg-primary/10" : "bg-muted"
                  )}>
                    <FileUp className={cn(
                      "w-10 h-10 transition-colors",
                      isDragActive ? "text-primary" : "text-muted-foreground/60"
                    )} />
                  </div>
                  <div className="space-y-2">
                    <p className="text-lg font-medium text-gray-700">
                      {isDragActive ? "Drop to upload Excel file" : "Upload seating arrangement file"}
                    </p>
                    <p className="text-sm text-gray-500 max-w-md mx-auto">
                      Drag and drop your Excel file here, or click to browse
                    </p>
                  </div>
                </div>
              )}
            </div>

            {isUploading && (
              <div className="mt-4 space-y-2">
                <Progress value={uploadProgress} className="h-2" />
                <p className="text-sm text-gray-500 text-center">
                  Uploading: {uploadProgress}%
                </p>
              </div>
            )}

            <div className="mt-6 flex justify-end">
              <Button 
                onClick={() => {
                  setConfirmDialog({
                    type: "info",
                    message: "Upload the seating arrangement file?",
                    onConfirm: uploadFile,
                    onCancel: () => setConfirmDialog(null),
                  })
                }}
                disabled={!file || isUploading}
                className="min-w-32"
              >
                {isUploading ? (
                  <>
                    <Loader2 className="w-4 h-4 mr-2 animate-spin" />
                    Uploading...
                  </>
                ) : (
                  <>
                    <FileUp className="w-4 h-4 mr-2" />
                    Upload File
                  </>
                )}
              </Button>
            </div>

            <Alert variant="default" className="mt-8 bg-muted/50 border">
              <Info className="h-5 w-5" />
              <AlertTitle>Important Notes for Seating Arrangement</AlertTitle>
              <AlertDescription>
                <div className="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 gap-x-8 gap-y-2 mt-2">
                  {[
                    "Maximum file size: 10MB",
                    "Supported formats: .xlsx, .xls",
                    "Ensure the file contains valid seating arrangement data",
                    "Each row should represent one examinee",
                    "Verify column headers are consistent",
                    "Remove merged cells before uploading",
                    "Ensure all required fields are populated",
                    "Check data formatting before uploading",
                    "Upload 2-4 days before the first exam day",
                    "Required for accurate seating management"
                  ].map((note, i) => (
                    <div key={i} className="flex items-center gap-2">
                      <div className="h-1.5 w-1.5 rounded-full bg-gray-500"></div>
                      <span>{note}</span>
                    </div>
                  ))}
                </div>
              </AlertDescription>
            </Alert>
          </CardContent>
        </Card>
      )}

      {confirmDialog && (
        <ConfirmationDialog
          type={confirmDialog.type as "error" | "success" | "info"}
          message={confirmDialog.message}
          onConfirm={confirmDialog.onConfirm}
          onCancel={confirmDialog.onCancel}
        />
      )}
    </div>
  )
}

export default SeatingArrangement
</modules/configs/seating-arrangement.tsx>

<modules/configs/ec_config.tsx>
"use client"

import { useExamCenter } from "@/hooks/useExamCenter"
import { useState } from "react"
import { Loader2, Trash2, Edit, Check } from "lucide-react"
import { Input } from "@/components/ui/input"
import { Button } from "@/components/ui/button"
import { Card, CardContent, CardHeader, CardTitle } from "@/components/ui/card"
import { Label } from "@/components/ui/label"
import { RadioGroup, RadioGroupItem } from "@/components/ui/radio-group"
import ConfirmationDialog from "@/components/misc/DialogBox"
import type React from "react"
import { useEcCode } from "@/lib/helper"

interface SectionCardProps {
  title: string
  children: React.ReactNode
}

interface InputFieldProps {
  label: string
  value: string | number
  onChange?: (e: React.ChangeEvent<HTMLInputElement>) => void
  type?: "text" | "number" | "date"
  readOnly?: boolean
  placeholder?: string
  min?: string
}

interface ConnectedInstituteItemProps {
  inst: { CODE: string; NAME: string }
  onUpdateName: (newName: string) => void
  onDisconnect: () => void
}

let eccode: string;
function ExamCenterInfo() {
  eccode = useEcCode()
  const {
    examCenter,
    setExamCenter,
    season,
    setSeason,
    instituteCode,
    submitting,
    setInstituteCode,
    instituteName,
    loading,
    instituteLoading,
    connectedInstitutes,
    error,
    fetchInstituteInfo,
    handleSubmit,
    disconnectInstitute,
    updateInstituteName
  } = useExamCenter(eccode)

  const [confirmationDialog, setConfirmationDialog] = useState<{
    type: string
    message: string
    onConfirm: () => void
  } | null>(null)

  if (loading) {
    return (
      <div className="flex justify-center items-center min-h-screen">
        <Loader2 className="h-8 w-8 animate-spin" />
      </div>
    )
  }

  const handleDisconnectInstitute = (code: string) => {
    setConfirmationDialog({
      type: "error",
      message: `Are you sure you want to disconnect institute ${code}?`,
      onConfirm: () => {
        disconnectInstitute(code)
        setConfirmationDialog(null)
      },
    })
  }

  const handleSubmitConfirmation = () => {
    setConfirmationDialog({
      type: "success",
      message: "Are you sure you want to submit the changes?",
      onConfirm: () => {
        handleSubmit()
        setConfirmationDialog(null)
      },
    })
  }

  return (
    <div className="container mx-auto py-8 px-4">
      <h1 className="text-3xl font-bold mb-8 text-center">Exam Center Information</h1>
      <div className="space-y-8">
        <SectionCard title="Exam Center Details">
          <InputField label="Exam Center Code" value={eccode || ""} readOnly type="text" />
          <InputField
            label="Exam Center Name"
            value={examCenter?.EC_INFO?.NAME || ""}
            type="text"
            onChange={(e) =>
              setExamCenter((prev) =>
                prev
                  ? { ...prev, EC_INFO: { ...(prev.EC_INFO ?? {}), NAME: e.target.value } }
                  : { EC_CODE: eccode, EC_INFO: { NAME: e.target.value, ADDRESS: "", OFFICER_INCHARGE: "", SEALING_SUPERVISOR: "" }, CON_INST: [], EXAM_INFO: { SEASON: "SUMMER", START_DATE: "", END_DATE: "", YEAR: "" }, DC_INFO: { CODE: "", NAME: "" }, DEPARTMENTS: [] }
              )
            }
          />
          <InputField
            label="Exam Center Address"
            value={examCenter?.EC_INFO?.ADDRESS || ""}
            type="text"
            onChange={(e) =>
              setExamCenter((prev) => ({
                ...prev!,
                EC_INFO: { ...prev!.EC_INFO, ADDRESS: e.target.value },
              }))
            }
          />
          <div className="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 gap-6">
            <InputField
              label="Officer Incharge"
              value={examCenter?.EC_INFO?.OFFICER_INCHARGE || ""}
              type="text"
              onChange={(e) =>
                setExamCenter((prev) => ({
                  ...prev!,
                  EC_INFO: { ...prev!.EC_INFO, OFFICER_INCHARGE: e.target.value },
                }))
              }
            />
            <InputField
              label="Sealing Supervisor"
              value={examCenter?.EC_INFO?.SEALING_SUPERVISOR || ""}
              type="text"
              onChange={(e) =>
                setExamCenter((prev) => ({
                  ...prev!,
                  EC_INFO: { ...prev!.EC_INFO, SEALING_SUPERVISOR: e.target.value },
                }))
              }
            />
          </div>
        </SectionCard>

        <SectionCard title="Exam Information">
          <RadioGroup value={season} onValueChange={(value: "SUMMER" | "WINTER") => setSeason(value)}>
            <div className="flex space-x-4">
              <div className="flex items-center">
                <RadioGroupItem value="SUMMER" id="summer" />
                <Label htmlFor="summer" className="ml-2">
                  Summer
                </Label>
              </div>
              <div className="flex items-center">
                <RadioGroupItem value="WINTER" id="winter" />
                <Label htmlFor="winter" className="ml-2">
                  Winter
                </Label>
              </div>
            </div>
          </RadioGroup>

          <div className="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 gap-6">
            <InputField
              label="Start Date"
              type="date"
              value={examCenter?.EXAM_INFO?.START_DATE || ""}
              onChange={(e) =>
                setExamCenter((prev) => ({
                  ...prev!,
                  EXAM_INFO: { ...prev!.EXAM_INFO, START_DATE: e.target.value },
                }))
              }
            />
            <InputField
              label="End Date"
              type="date"
              value={examCenter?.EXAM_INFO?.END_DATE || ""}
              min={examCenter?.EXAM_INFO?.START_DATE || ""}
              onChange={(e) =>
                setExamCenter((prev) => ({
                  ...prev!,
                  EXAM_INFO: { ...prev!.EXAM_INFO, END_DATE: e.target.value },
                }))
              }
            />
            <InputField
              label="Year"
              type="number"
              value={examCenter?.EXAM_INFO?.YEAR || ""}
              onChange={(e) =>
                setExamCenter((prev) => ({
                  ...prev!,
                  EXAM_INFO: { ...prev!.EXAM_INFO, YEAR: e.target.value },
                }))
              }
            />
          </div>
        </SectionCard>

        <SectionCard title="Distribution Center Details">
          <div className="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 gap-6">
            <InputField
              label="Distribution Center Code"
              value={examCenter?.DC_INFO?.CODE || ""}
              type="number"
              onChange={(e) => {
                const value = e.target.value.replace(/\D/g, '') // Only allow digits
                setExamCenter((prev) => ({
                  ...prev!,
                  DC_INFO: { ...prev!.DC_INFO, CODE: value },
                }))
              }}
            />
            <InputField
              label="Distribution Center Name"
              value={examCenter?.DC_INFO?.NAME || ""}
              type="text"
              onChange={(e) =>
                setExamCenter((prev) => ({
                  ...prev!,
                  DC_INFO: { ...prev!.DC_INFO, NAME: e.target.value },
                }))
              }
            />
          </div>
        </SectionCard>

        <SectionCard title="Connected Institutes">
          <div className="flex flex-col md:flex-row md:space-x-4 w-full justify-between space-y-4 md:space-y-0 items-end">
            <div className="w-full md:w-1/3">
              <InputField
                label="Institute Code"
                value={instituteCode}
                type="text"
                onChange={(e) => setInstituteCode(e.target.value)}
                placeholder="Enter Institute Code"
              />
            </div>
            <Button onClick={fetchInstituteInfo} disabled={instituteLoading || !instituteCode}>
              {instituteLoading ? <Loader2 className="mr-2 h-4 w-4 animate-spin" /> : null}
              Fetch Institute
            </Button>
          </div>
          {instituteName && (
            <div className="mt-4">
              <Label className="block text-sm font-medium text-gray-700 dark:text-gray-300">Institute Name</Label>
              <div className="mt-1 p-2 block w-full rounded-md border border-gray-300 dark:border-gray-700 bg-gray-50 dark:bg-neutral-800">
                {instituteName}
              </div>
            </div>
          )}
          {connectedInstitutes.length > 0 && (
            <div className="mt-6">
              <h4 className="font-semibold mb-2">Connected Institutes:</h4>
              <ul className="space-y-2">
                {connectedInstitutes.map((inst, index) => (
                  <ConnectedInstituteItem
                    key={index}
                    inst={inst}
                    onUpdateName={(newName) => updateInstituteName(inst.CODE, newName)}
                    onDisconnect={() => handleDisconnectInstitute(inst.CODE)}
                  />
                ))}
              </ul>
            </div>
          )}
        </SectionCard>
      </div>

      {error && <p className="text-red-500 text-sm mt-4">{error}</p>}

      {examCenter && connectedInstitutes.length > 0 && (
        <div className="mt-8 flex justify-center">
          <Button onClick={handleSubmitConfirmation} size="lg" disabled={submitting}>
            Submit
          </Button>
        </div>
      )}

      {confirmationDialog && (
        <ConfirmationDialog
          type={confirmationDialog.type as "error" | "success" | "info"}
          confirmButtonText={confirmationDialog.type === "error" ? "Yes" : "Confirm"}
          message={confirmationDialog.message}
          onConfirm={confirmationDialog.onConfirm}
          onCancel={() => setConfirmationDialog(null)}
        />
      )}
    </div>
  )
}

const SectionCard: React.FC<SectionCardProps> = ({ title, children }) => (
  <Card className="transition-colors duration-300">
    <CardHeader>
      <CardTitle>{title}</CardTitle>
    </CardHeader>
    <CardContent className="space-y-6">{children}</CardContent>
  </Card>
)

const InputField: React.FC<InputFieldProps> = ({
  label,
  value,
  onChange,
  type = "text",
  readOnly = false,
  placeholder = "",
  min = "",
}) => (
  <div className="space-y-2">
    <Label htmlFor={label}>{label}</Label>
    <Input
      id={label}
      value={value}
      onChange={onChange}
      type={type}
      readOnly={readOnly}
      placeholder={placeholder}
      min={min}
      className="w-full"
    />
  </div>
)

const ConnectedInstituteItem: React.FC<ConnectedInstituteItemProps> = ({ inst, onUpdateName, onDisconnect }) => {
  const [isEditing, setIsEditing] = useState(false)
  const [editedName, setEditedName] = useState(inst.NAME)

  const handleSave = () => {
    onUpdateName(editedName)
    setIsEditing(false)
  }

  return (
    <li className="flex justify-between items-center p-2 rounded border border-gray-300 dark:border-gray-700">
      {isEditing ? (
        <Input value={editedName} onChange={(e) => setEditedName(e.target.value)} className="flex-grow mr-2" />
      ) : (
        <span>
          <b>{inst.CODE}</b> - {inst.NAME}
        </span>
      )}
      <div className="flex space-x-2">
        {isEditing ? (
          <Button size="sm" onClick={handleSave}>
            <Check className="h-4 w-4" />
          </Button>
        ) : (
          <Button size="sm" variant="outline" onClick={() => setIsEditing(true)}>
            <Edit className="h-4 w-4" />
          </Button>
        )}
        <Button size="sm" variant="destructive" onClick={onDisconnect}>
          <Trash2 className="h-4 w-4" />
        </Button>
      </div>
    </li>
  )
}

export default ExamCenterInfo

</modules/configs/ec_config.tsx>

<modules/configs/timetable.tsx>
"use client"

import { useState, useCallback, useEffect } from "react"
import { Button } from "@/components/ui/button"
import { Input } from "@/components/ui/input"
import { Table, TableBody, TableCell, TableHead, TableHeader, TableRow } from "@/components/ui/table"
import { Pagination } from "@/components/ui/pagination"
import { Select, SelectContent, SelectItem, SelectTrigger, SelectValue } from "@/components/ui/select"
import { X, Loader, Calendar, Clock } from "lucide-react"
import ConfirmationDialog from "@/components/misc/DialogBox"
import Skeleton from "react-loading-skeleton"
import "react-loading-skeleton/dist/skeleton.css"
import { toast } from "react-toastify"
import "react-toastify/dist/ReactToastify.css"
import axios from "axios"
import { useEcCode } from "@/lib/helper"
import { useExamCenter } from "@/hooks/useExamCenter"

const baseUrl = `${process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_API_URL}/api/timetable`
const CACHE_EXPIRATION_TIME = 5 * 60 * 1000

type TimetableEntry = {
  ID: number
  DATE: string
  SESSION: string
  TIME_SLOT: string 
  SUBJECT_CODE: string
  SUBJECT_NAME: string
  SUBJECT_ABBR: string
  SCHEME: string
  ABSENT_NUMBERS: number[] | null
  TOTAL_STUDENTS: number
}

type GroupedTimetable = {
  DATE: string
  SESSION: string
  entries: TimetableEntry[]
}

const fetchTimetable = async (): Promise<TimetableEntry[]> => {
  const response = await axios.get(`/api/timetable`, {
    headers: { Accept: "application/json" },
  })
  return response.data
}

const getCachedTimetable = (ec_code: string): TimetableEntry[] | null => {
  const cachedData = localStorage.getItem(`timetable-${ec_code}`)
  const cachedTimestamp = localStorage.getItem(`timetable-${ec_code}-timestamp`)

  if (cachedData && cachedTimestamp) {
    const isCacheValid = Date.now() - Number.parseInt(cachedTimestamp) < CACHE_EXPIRATION_TIME
    if (isCacheValid) return JSON.parse(cachedData)
  }
  return null
}

const saveToCache = (ec_code: string, data: TimetableEntry[]) => {
  localStorage.setItem(`timetable-${ec_code}`, JSON.stringify(data))
  localStorage.setItem(`timetable-${ec_code}-timestamp`, Date.now().toString())
}

const groupAndFilterTimetable = (
  data: TimetableEntry[],
  searchTerm: string,
  filterType: "DATE" | "SCHEME",
): GroupedTimetable[] => {
  let filtered = data
  if (searchTerm) {
    if (filterType === "DATE") {
      filtered = data.filter(
        (entry) => entry.DATE.includes(searchTerm) || entry.SESSION.toLowerCase().includes(searchTerm.toLowerCase()),
      )
    } else if (filterType === "SCHEME") {
      filtered = data.filter((entry) =>
        entry.SCHEME.toLowerCase().includes(searchTerm.toLowerCase()),
      )
    }
  }

  const grouped = filtered.reduce(
    (acc, curr) => {
      const key = `${curr.DATE}-${curr.SESSION}`
      if (!acc[key]) {
        acc[key] = {
          DATE: curr.DATE,
          SESSION: curr.SESSION,
          entries: [],
        }
      }
      acc[key].entries.push(curr)
      return acc
    },
    {} as Record<string, GroupedTimetable>,
  )

  return Object.values(grouped)
}

const TimetablePage = () => {
  const ec_code = useEcCode()
  const {getExamCenterInfo} = useExamCenter(ec_code)
  const [timetable, setTimetable] = useState<TimetableEntry[]>([])
  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(false)
  const [filteredTimetable, setFilteredTimetable] = useState<GroupedTimetable[]>([])
  const [dialog, setDialog] = useState({ type: "", message: "" })
  const [currentPage, setCurrentPage] = useState(1)
  const [searchTerm, setSearchTerm] = useState("")
  const [filterType, setFilterType] = useState<"DATE" | "SCHEME">("DATE")
  const itemsPerPage = 5

  const fetchTimetableData = useCallback(
    async (ec_code: string) => {
      if (!ec_code) return

      setLoading(true)
      const cachedData = getCachedTimetable(ec_code)

      if (cachedData) {
        setTimetable(cachedData)
        setFilteredTimetable(groupAndFilterTimetable(cachedData, searchTerm, filterType))
        toast.success("Timetable loaded from cache!")
        setLoading(false)
        return
      }

      try {
        const data = await fetchTimetable()
        setTimetable(data)
        setFilteredTimetable(groupAndFilterTimetable(data, searchTerm, filterType))
        saveToCache(ec_code, data)
        toast.success("Timetable fetched successfully!")
      } catch (err) {
        if (axios.isAxiosError(err)) {
          if (err.response?.status === 418) {
            setDialog({
              type: "error",
              message: `No timetable found for EC Code ${ec_code}. Do you want to create a timetable for this code?`,
            })
          } else {
            toast.error(err.response?.data?.message || "An error occurred while fetching the timetable.")
          }
        } else {
          toast.error("An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.")
        }
        setFilteredTimetable([])
      } finally {
        setLoading(false)
      }
    },
    [searchTerm, filterType],
  )

  const handleFetchTimetable = () => {
    fetchTimetableData(ec_code)
  }

  const handleClear = () => {
    setTimetable([])
    setFilteredTimetable([])
    setSearchTerm("")
    localStorage.removeItem(`timetable-${ec_code}`)
    localStorage.removeItem(`timetable-${ec_code}-timestamp`)
    toast.success("Timetable cleared successfully!")
  }

  const handleConfirm = async () => {
    setLoading(true)
    setDialog({ type: "", message: "" })

    try {
      const response = await axios.post(`${baseUrl}`, { eccode: ec_code }, { headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" } })
      if (response.status === 201) {
        toast.success("Timetable created successfully!")
        fetchTimetableData(ec_code)
      }
    } catch (error) {
      if (axios.isAxiosError(error)) {
        toast.error(error.response?.data?.message || "An error occurred while creating the timetable.")
      } else {
        toast.error("An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.")
      }
    } finally {
      setLoading(false)
    }
  }

  const handleCancel = () => {
    setDialog({ type: "", message: "" })
  }

  useEffect(() => {
    setFilteredTimetable(groupAndFilterTimetable(timetable, searchTerm, filterType))
  }, [searchTerm, filterType, timetable])

  const paginatedTimetable = filteredTimetable.slice((currentPage - 1) * itemsPerPage, currentPage * itemsPerPage)

  return (
    <div className="container mx-auto p-4 flex flex-col gap-4">
      <h1 className="text-3xl font-semibold mb-12 text-center">
        Timetable for <u>{getExamCenterInfo()?.NAME}</u>
      </h1>

      <div className="flex flex-col justify-between gap-4 sm:flex-row">
        <div className="flex flex-col sm:flex-row gap-4 flex-grow mb-4">
          <Input
            type="number"
            readOnly
            value={ec_code}
            placeholder="Enter EC Code"
            className="w-full"
          />
          <div className="flex gap-2">
            <Button onClick={handleFetchTimetable}>Fetch Timetable</Button>
            <Button onClick={handleClear} variant="outline">
              <X className="h-4 w-4 mr-2" />
              Clear
            </Button>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div className="flex flex-col sm:flex-row gap-4 flex-grow">
          <Input
            type="text"
            value={searchTerm}
            onChange={(e) => setSearchTerm(e.target.value)}
            placeholder={`Search by ${filterType === "DATE" ? "date or session" : "scheme"}`}
            className="w-full"
          />
          <Select value={filterType} onValueChange={(value) => setFilterType(value as "DATE" | "SCHEME")}>
            <SelectTrigger className="w-[180px]">
              <SelectValue placeholder="Filter by" />
            </SelectTrigger>
            <SelectContent>
              <SelectItem value="DATE">Date & Session</SelectItem>
              <SelectItem value="SCHEME">Scheme</SelectItem>
            </SelectContent>
          </Select>
        </div>
      </div>

      {loading && (
        <div className="mb-6">
          <div className="flex justify-center">
            <Loader className="animate-spin h-8 w-8" />
          </div>
          <Skeleton count={5} height={40} className="mb-2" />
        </div>
      )}

      {paginatedTimetable.length > 0 ? (
        <>
          {paginatedTimetable.map((group, idx) => (
            <div
              key={idx}
              className="mb-8 p-6  rounded-lg shadow-lg hover:shadow-xl transition-shadow duration-300 dark:-neutral-600"
            >
              <h2 className="flex justify-between items-center text-xl font-semibold mb-4">
                <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
                  <Calendar className="h-5 w-5" />
                  <span className="font-semibold text-lg">Date: {new Date(group.DATE).toLocaleDateString('en-IN')}</span>
                </div>
                <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
                  <Clock className="h-5 w-5" />
                  <span className="font-semibold text-lg">Session: {group.SESSION}</span>
                </div>
              </h2>
              <div className="overflow-x-auto">
                <Table>
                  <TableHeader>
                    <TableRow>
                      <TableHead className="text-center uppercase font-bold bg-muted border py-2 px-3">Time Slot</TableHead>
                      <TableHead className="text-center uppercase font-bold bg-muted border py-2 px-3">Subject Code</TableHead>
                      <TableHead className="text-center uppercase font-bold bg-muted border py-2 px-3">Subject Name</TableHead>
                      <TableHead className="text-center uppercase font-bold bg-muted border py-2 px-3">Scheme</TableHead>
                      <TableHead className="text-center uppercase font-bold bg-muted border py-2 px-3">Total Students</TableHead>
                    </TableRow>
                  </TableHeader>
                  <TableBody className="text-sm">
                    {group.entries.map((entry, index) => (
                      <TableRow key={index} className="hover:bg-accent">
                        <TableCell className="text-center border py-2 px-3">{entry.TIME_SLOT}</TableCell>
                        <TableCell className="text-center border py-2 px-3">{entry.SUBJECT_CODE}</TableCell>
                        <TableCell className="text-center border py-2 px-3"><b>{String(entry.SUBJECT_ABBR)?.split("-")[0]}</b> - {entry.SUBJECT_NAME}</TableCell>
                        <TableCell className="text-center border py-2 px-3">{entry.SCHEME}</TableCell>
                        <TableCell className="text-center border py-2 px-3">{entry.TOTAL_STUDENTS}</TableCell>
                      </TableRow>
                    ))}
                  </TableBody>
                </Table>
              </div>
            </div>
          ))}
          <Pagination
            currentPage={currentPage}
            totalPages={Math.ceil(filteredTimetable.length / itemsPerPage)}
            onPageChange={setCurrentPage}
          />
        </>
      ) : (
        !loading && <p className="text-center text-gray-500 dark:text-gray-400">No timetable data found.</p>
      )}

      <ConfirmationDialog
        type={dialog.type as "error" | "success" | "info"}
        message={dialog.message}
        onConfirm={handleConfirm}
        onCancel={handleCancel}
      />
    </div>
  )
}

export default TimetablePage
</modules/configs/timetable.tsx>

<modules/configs/supervisors.tsx>
'use client';

import React, { useState } from 'react';
import { Button } from "@/components/ui/button";
import { Input } from "@/components/ui/input";
import { Select, SelectContent, SelectItem, SelectTrigger, SelectValue } from "@/components/ui/select";
import { Table, TableBody, TableCell, TableHead, TableHeader, TableRow } from "@/components/ui/table";
import { Loader2, PlusCircle, Trash2 } from 'lucide-react';
import useSupervisors from '@/hooks/useSupervisors';
import ConfirmationDialog from '@/components/misc/DialogBox';
import { useEcCode } from '@/lib/helper';
import courseCodes from '@/config/course_codes.json';
import { Command, CommandEmpty, CommandGroup, CommandInput, CommandItem } from "@/components/ui/command";
import { Popover, PopoverContent, PopoverTrigger } from "@/components/ui/popover";
import { Check, ChevronsUpDown } from "lucide-react";
import { cn } from "@/lib/utils";

const roles: string[] = ["HEAD OF DEPT", "LAB ASSISTANT", "LECTURER"];

type CourseCode = keyof typeof courseCodes;

const departments = Object.entries(courseCodes).map(([code, name]) => ({
  code: code as CourseCode,
  name
}));

export default function SupervisorManagement() {
  const ecCode = useEcCode()
  const { supervisors = [], loading, error, createSupervisor, deleteSupervisor } = useSupervisors(ecCode);
  const [form, setForm] = useState({ NAME: '', UID: '', DEPARTMENT: '', ROLE: '', EMAIL: '' });
  const [submitting, setSubmitting] = useState<boolean>(false);
  const [open, setOpen] = useState(false);
  const [searchQuery, setSearchQuery] = useState('');
  const [confirmationDialog, setConfirmationDialog] = useState<{
    type: string
    message: string
    onConfirm: () => void
  } | null>(null)

  const filteredDepartments = departments.filter(dept => 
    dept.code.toLowerCase().includes(searchQuery.toLowerCase()) ||
    dept.name.toLowerCase().includes(searchQuery.toLowerCase())
  );

  const handleInputChange = (e: React.ChangeEvent<HTMLInputElement>) => {
    const { name, value } = e.target;
    setForm((prev) => ({ ...prev, [name]: value }));
  };

  const handleDelete = (uid: string,e: React.MouseEvent<HTMLButtonElement>) => {
    e.preventDefault();
    setConfirmationDialog({
      type: "error",
      message: "Are you sure you want to delete this supervisor?",
      onConfirm: async () => {
        await deleteSupervisor(uid);
      },
    })
  }

  const handleSubmit = async (e: React.FormEvent) => {
    e.preventDefault();
    setConfirmationDialog({
      type: "success", 
      message: "Are you sure you want to submit the changes?",
      onConfirm: async () => {
        setSubmitting(true);
        await createSupervisor(form);
        setConfirmationDialog(null)
        setSubmitting(false);
        setForm({ NAME: '', UID: '', DEPARTMENT: '', ROLE: '', EMAIL: '' });
      },
    })
  };

  return (
    <div className="container mx-auto p-4 rounded-lg shadow-md">
      <h1 className="text-2xl font-bold mb-4">Supervisor Management</h1>

      {error && (
        <div className="alert alert-error mb-4 bg-red-100 border border-red-400 text-red-700 rounded p-2">
          <Loader2 className="h-4 w-4 inline-block mr-2" />
          <span>{error}</span>
        </div>
      )}

      <form onSubmit={handleSubmit} className="mb-8 space-y-4">
        <h2 className="text-xl font-semibold">Create New Supervisor</h2>

        <div className="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-5 gap-4">
          <div className="flex justify-between md:col-span-2 space-x-4 gap-4">
            <Input
              name="NAME"
              type="text"
              value={form.NAME}
              onChange={handleInputChange}
              placeholder="Name"
              required
            />
            <Input
              name="UID"
              type="text"
              value={form.UID}
              onChange={handleInputChange}
              placeholder="UID"
              required
            />
          </div>
          <div className="flex justify-between md:col-span-2 space-x-4 gap-4">
            <Popover open={open} onOpenChange={setOpen}>
              <PopoverTrigger asChild>
                <Button
                  variant="outline"
                  role="combobox"
                  aria-expanded={open}
                  className="w-full justify-between"
                >
                  {form.DEPARTMENT
                    ? departments.find((dept) => dept.code === form.DEPARTMENT)?.code
                    : "Select department..."}
                  <ChevronsUpDown className="ml-2 h-4 w-4 shrink-0 opacity-50" />
                </Button>
              </PopoverTrigger>
              <PopoverContent className="w-[400px] p-0">
                <Command>
                  <CommandInput 
                    placeholder="Search department..." 
                    value={searchQuery}
                    onValueChange={setSearchQuery}
                  />
                  <CommandEmpty>No department found.</CommandEmpty>
                  <CommandGroup className="max-h-[300px] overflow-auto">
                    {filteredDepartments.map((dept) => (
                      <CommandItem
                        key={dept.code}
                        value={dept.code}
                        onSelect={(currentValue) => {
                          setForm(prev => ({...prev, DEPARTMENT: currentValue}))
                          setOpen(false)
                          setSearchQuery('')
                        }}
                      >
                        <Check
                          className={cn(
                            "mr-2 h-4 w-4",
                            form.DEPARTMENT === dept.code ? "opacity-100" : "opacity-0"
                          )}
                        />
                        <b>{dept.code}</b> - {dept.name}
                      </CommandItem>
                    ))}
                  </CommandGroup>
                </Command>
              </PopoverContent>
            </Popover>

            <Select name="ROLE" value={form.ROLE} onValueChange={(value) => setForm((prev) => ({ ...prev, ROLE: value }))} required>
              <SelectTrigger className="w-full">
                <SelectValue placeholder="Role" />
              </SelectTrigger>
              <SelectContent>
                {roles.map((roleOption) => (
                  <SelectItem key={roleOption} value={roleOption}>
                    {roleOption}
                  </SelectItem>
                ))}
              </SelectContent>
            </Select>
          </div>
          <div className="flex justify-between md:col-span-1 space-x-4 gap-4">
            <Input
              name="EMAIL"
              type="email"
              value={form.EMAIL}
              onChange={handleInputChange}
              placeholder="Email"
              required
              
            />
          </div>
          <Button type="submit" disabled={submitting} className="mt-2">
            {submitting ? (
              <>
                <Loader2 className="mr-2 h-4 w-4 animate-spin" />
                Creating...
              </>
            ) : (
              <>
                <PlusCircle /> Create Supervisor
              </>
            )}
          </Button>
        </div>
      </form>

      <br />

      <h2 className="text-xl font-semibold mb-4">Available Supervisors</h2>
      {loading ? (
        <div className="flex justify-center items-center h-32">
          <Loader2 className="h-8 w-8 animate-spin" />
        </div>
      ) : (
        <Table className="min-w-full rounded-lg shadow-md">
          <TableHeader>
            <TableRow>
              <TableHead className="border-b border-gray-300 dark:border-gray-600">Name</TableHead>
              <TableHead className="border-b border-gray-300 dark:border-gray-600">UID</TableHead>
              <TableHead className="border-b border-gray-300 dark:border-gray-600">Department</TableHead>
              <TableHead className="border-b border-gray-300 dark:border-gray-600">Role</TableHead>
              <TableHead className="border-b border-gray-300 dark:border-gray-600">Email</TableHead>
              <TableHead className="border-b border-gray-300 dark:border-gray-600">Actions</TableHead>
            </TableRow>
          </TableHeader>
          <TableBody>
            {supervisors.map((supervisor) => (
              <TableRow key={supervisor.UID} className="hover:bg-gray-100 dark:hover:bg-gray-600">
                <TableCell className="border-b border-gray-300 dark:border-gray-600">{supervisor.NAME}</TableCell>
                <TableCell className="border-b border-gray-300 dark:border-gray-600">{supervisor.UID}</TableCell>
                <TableCell className="border-b border-gray-300 dark:border-gray-600">
                  <b>{supervisor.DEPARTMENT}</b> - {courseCodes[supervisor.DEPARTMENT as CourseCode] || 'Unknown'}
                </TableCell>
                <TableCell className="border-b border-gray-300 dark:border-gray-600">{supervisor.ROLE}</TableCell>
                <TableCell className="border-b border-gray-300 dark:border-gray-600">{supervisor.EMAIL}</TableCell>
                <TableCell className="border-b border-gray-300 dark:border-gray-600">
                  <Button variant="destructive" onClick={(e) => handleDelete(supervisor.UID, e)}>
                    <Trash2 /> Delete
                  </Button>
                </TableCell>
              </TableRow>
            ))}
          </TableBody>
        </Table>
      )}
      {confirmationDialog && (
        <ConfirmationDialog
          type={confirmationDialog.type as "error" | "success" | "info"}
          confirmButtonText={confirmationDialog.type === "error" ? "Yes" : "Confirm"}
          message={confirmationDialog.message}
          onConfirm={confirmationDialog.onConfirm}
          onCancel={() => setConfirmationDialog(null)}
        />
      )}
    </div>
  );
}
</modules/configs/supervisors.tsx>

<modules/configs/controller.tsx>
import React, { useState, useEffect } from 'react';
import { Button } from "@/components/ui/button";
import { Input } from "@/components/ui/input";
import { Table, TableBody, TableCell, TableHead, TableHeader, TableRow } from "@/components/ui/table";
import { Loader2, Trash2, PlusCircle } from 'lucide-react';
import { toast } from 'react-toastify';
import 'react-toastify/dist/ReactToastify.css';

interface TeamMember {
    id: number;
    name: string;
    designation: string;
    post_held_in_examination: string;
}

const base_url = `/api/controller`;

export default function ControlRoomManagement() {
    const [teamMembers, setTeamMembers] = useState<TeamMember[]>([]);
    const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);
    const [form, setForm] = useState({ name: '', designation: '', post_held_in_examination: '' });
    const [submitting, setSubmitting] = useState(false);

    useEffect(() => {
        fetchTeamMembers();
    }, []);

    const fetchTeamMembers = async () => {
        setLoading(true);
        try {
            const response = await fetch(base_url);
            if (!response.ok) throw new Error('Failed to fetch team members');
            const data = await response.json();
            setTeamMembers(data);
        } catch (err) {
            toast.error('Error fetching team members ' + err);
        } finally {
            setLoading(false);
        }
    };

    const handleInputChange = (e: React.ChangeEvent<HTMLInputElement>) => {
        const { name, value } = e.target;
        setForm((prev) => ({ ...prev, [name]: value }));
    };

    const handleSubmit = async (e: React.FormEvent<HTMLFormElement>) => {
        e.preventDefault();
        setSubmitting(true);
        try {
            const response = await fetch(base_url, {
                method: 'POST',
                headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
                body: JSON.stringify(form),
            });
            if (!response.ok) {
                const errorData = await response.json();
                throw new Error(errorData.detail || 'Failed to create team member');
            }
            await fetchTeamMembers();
            setForm({ name: '', designation: '', post_held_in_examination: '' });
            toast.success('Team member added successfully!');
        } catch (err) {
            if (err instanceof Error) {
                toast.error(err.message || 'Error adding team member. Please try again.');
            } else {
                toast.error('Error adding team member. Please try again.');
            }
        } finally {
            setSubmitting(false);
        }
    };

    const handleDelete = async (id: number) => {
        if (typeof window !== "undefined" && window.confirm(`Are you sure you want to delete this team member?`)) {
            try {
                const response = await fetch(`${base_url}?id=${id}`, { method: 'DELETE' });
                if (!response.ok) throw new Error('Failed to delete team member');
                await fetchTeamMembers();
                toast.success('Team member deleted successfully!');
            } catch (err) {
                toast.error('Error deleting team member. ' + err);
            }
        }
    };

    return (
        <div className="container mx-auto p-6">
            <h1 className="text-3xl font-bold mb-6">Control Room Management</h1>

            {/* Add Team Member Form */}
            <form onSubmit={handleSubmit} className="mb-8 bg-card p-6 rounded-lg shadow-sm">
                <h2 className="text-xl font-semibold mb-4">Add New Team Member</h2>
                <div className="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 gap-4">
                    <Input
                        name="name"
                        type="text"
                        value={form.name}
                        onChange={handleInputChange}
                        placeholder="Name"
                        required
                    />
                    <Input
                        name="designation"
                        type="text"
                        value={form.designation}
                        onChange={handleInputChange}
                        placeholder="Designation"
                        required
                    />
                    <Input
                        name="post_held_in_examination"
                        type="text"
                        value={form.post_held_in_examination}
                        onChange={handleInputChange}
                        placeholder="Post Held in Examination"
                        required
                    />
                </div>
                <Button type="submit" disabled={submitting} className="mt-4 w-full md:w-auto">
                    {submitting ? (
                        <>
                            <Loader2 className="mr-2 h-4 w-4 animate-spin" />
                            Adding...
                        </>
                    ) : (
                        <>
                            <PlusCircle className="mr-2 h-4 w-4" />
                            Add Team Member
                        </>
                    )}
                </Button>
            </form>

            {/* Team Members Table */}
            <div className="bg-card p-6 rounded-lg shadow-sm">
                <h2 className="text-xl font-semibold mb-4">Team Members</h2>
                {loading ? (
                    <div className="flex justify-center items-center h-32">
                        <Loader2 className="h-8 w-8 animate-spin" />
                    </div>
                ) : (
                    <Table className="min-w-full">
                        <TableHeader>
                            <TableRow>
                                <TableHead>Name</TableHead>
                                <TableHead>Designation</TableHead>
                                <TableHead>Post Held</TableHead>
                                <TableHead>Actions</TableHead>
                            </TableRow>
                        </TableHeader>
                        <TableBody>
                            {teamMembers.map((member) => (
                                <TableRow key={member.id} className="hover:bg-muted transition-colors">
                                    <TableCell>{member.name}</TableCell>
                                    <TableCell>{member.designation}</TableCell>
                                    <TableCell>{member.post_held_in_examination}</TableCell>
                                    <TableCell>
                                        <Button
                                            variant="destructive"
                                            onClick={() => handleDelete(member.id)}
                                            className="flex items-center"
                                        >
                                            <Trash2 className="mr-2 h-4 w-4" />
                                            Delete
                                        </Button>
                                    </TableCell>
                                </TableRow>
                            ))}
                        </TableBody>
                    </Table>
                )}
            </div>
        </div>
    );
}
</modules/configs/controller.tsx>

<modules/configs/seatingchart.tsx>
"use client"

import { useState, useEffect, useCallback, useMemo } from "react"
import { useDropzone } from "react-dropzone"
import axios from "axios"
import { toast } from "react-toastify"
import { Button } from "@/components/ui/button"
import { Alert, AlertTitle, AlertDescription } from "@/components/ui/alert"
import { Progress } from "@/components/ui/progress"
import { 
  FileSpreadsheet, 
  FileUp, 
  Download, 
  Trash2, 
  Loader2, 
  X, 
  AlertCircle, 
  Rocket, 
  ChevronsRight,
  CheckCircle2,
  Info
} from "lucide-react"
import { cn } from "@/lib/utils"
import { Table, TableBody, TableCell, TableHead, TableHeader, TableRow } from "@/components/ui/table"
import ConfirmationDialog from "@/components/misc/DialogBox"
import { useExamCenter } from "@/hooks/useExamCenter"
