import { Separator } from "@/components/ui/separator"
import { useEcCode } from "@/lib/helper"
import { validateExcelColumns } from "@/lib/excelValidator"
import { useTableExists } from "@/hooks/useTableExists"
import { Card, CardContent, CardDescription, CardHeader, CardTitle } from "@/components/ui/card"
import { Badge } from "@/components/ui/badge"
import { Tooltip, TooltipContent, TooltipProvider, TooltipTrigger } from "@/components/ui/tooltip"

const API_BASE_URL = process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_API_URL || "http://127.0.0.1:8000"

interface Institute {
  CODE: string;
  NAME: string;
}

interface ConfirmDialogProps {
  type: "success" | "error" | "info";
  message: string;
  onConfirm: () => void;
}

// Finalization component for handling the final seating chart
const FinalizationComponent = ({ 
  ec_code, 
  onRefresh, 
  handleDownload, 
  handleDelete, 
  setConfirmDialog 
}: { 
  ec_code: string; 
  onRefresh: () => Promise<void>; 
  handleDownload: (filename: string) => Promise<void>; 
  handleDelete: (filename: string) => Promise<void>; 
  setConfirmDialog: React.Dispatch<React.SetStateAction<ConfirmDialogProps | null>>; 
}) => {
  const [processing, setProcessing] = useState(false)
  const [downloading, setDownloading] = useState(false)
  const [error, setError] = useState<string | null>(null)
  const { checkSeatingChartTable } = useTableExists()
  const flag = checkSeatingChartTable()
  
  const finalFileName = `ec_${ec_code}_final.xlsx`

  const handleFinalize = async () => {
    if (processing) return
    setProcessing(true)
    setError(null)
    try {
      const response = await axios.post(`${API_BASE_URL}/api/seatingchart/insert/${ec_code}`)
      if (response.status === 200) {
        toast.success("Seating chart finalized successfully!")
        onRefresh()
      } 
    } catch (err) {
      const message = axios.isAxiosError(err) ? err.response?.data.message : "Failed to process operation."
      setError("Failed to finalize seating chart: " + message)
      toast.error("ERROR: " + message)
    } finally {
      setProcessing(false)
    }
  }

  const handleDeleteFinalFile = async () => {
    try {
      await handleDelete(finalFileName)
      onRefresh()
    } catch {
      toast.error("Failed to delete final file.")
    }
  }

  const downloadTimetable = async () => {
    setDownloading(true)
    try {
      const res = await fetch('/api/timetable', { method: 'PUT' })
      const blob = await res.blob()
      const a = document.createElement('a')
      a.href = URL.createObjectURL(blob)
      a.download = 'timetable.json'
      a.click()
      toast.success("Timetable JSON downloaded successfully")
    } catch {
      toast.error("Failed to download timetable JSON")
    } finally {
      setDownloading(false)
    }
  }

  return (
    <Card className="shadow-lg border-t-4 border-t-primary">
      <CardHeader className="pb-3">
        <div className="flex items-center justify-between">
          <CardTitle className="text-2xl font-bold">Final Seating Chart</CardTitle>
          <Badge variant={flag ? "secondary" : "default"}>
            {flag ? "Finalized" : "Ready for Finalization"}
          </Badge>
        </div>
        <CardDescription>
          Complete your seating chart setup and make it available for use
        </CardDescription>
      </CardHeader>
      
      <CardContent className="space-y-6">
        <Alert
          variant="default"
          className={cn(
            "flex items-center gap-4 p-4 rounded-xl shadow-sm border transition-all",
            flag ? "bg-rose-100 border-rose-200 text-rose-800" : "bg-blue-50 border-blue-200 text-blue-800"
          )}
        >
          <div className="flex-shrink-0">
            {flag ? <Info className="h-6 w-6 text-rose-600" /> : <CheckCircle2 className="h-6 w-6 text-blue-600" />}
          </div>
          <div className="flex-1 space-y-1">
            <AlertTitle className={cn("text-lg font-semibold", flag ? "text-rose-900" : "text-blue-900")}>
              {flag ? "Seating Chart Status: Finalized" : "Seating Chart Ready"}
            </AlertTitle>
            <AlertDescription className={flag ? "text-rose-700" : "text-blue-700"}>
              {flag
                ? "Refinalizing will update existing records. Proceed only if necessary."
                : "All files have been processed successfully. You can now finalize the seating chart."}
            </AlertDescription>
          </div>
        </Alert>

        <div className="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 gap-4 my-6">
          <TooltipProvider>
            <Tooltip>
              <TooltipTrigger asChild>
                <Button 
                  variant="outline" 
                  className="w-full flex items-center justify-center gap-2 py-6 text-base" 
                  onClick={() => handleDownload(finalFileName)}
                >
                  <Download className="w-5 h-5" /> 
                  <span>Download Final File</span>
                </Button>
              </TooltipTrigger>
              <TooltipContent>
                <p>Download the combined seating chart for review</p>
              </TooltipContent>
            </Tooltip>
          </TooltipProvider>
          
          <TooltipProvider>
            <Tooltip>
              <TooltipTrigger asChild>
                <Button 
                  variant="destructive" 
                  className="w-full flex items-center justify-center gap-2 py-6 text-base"
                  onClick={() => setConfirmDialog({ 
                    type: "error", 
                    message: "Are you sure you want to delete the final file? This cannot be undone.", 
                    onConfirm: handleDeleteFinalFile 
                  })}
                >
                  <Trash2 className="w-5 h-5" /> 
                  <span>Delete Final File</span>
                </Button>
              </TooltipTrigger>
              <TooltipContent>
                <p>Remove the final file to recreate it</p>
              </TooltipContent>
            </Tooltip>
          </TooltipProvider>
        </div>

        <div className="flex flex-col items-center pt-3">
          <Button 
            onClick={() => setConfirmDialog({ 
              type: "success", 
              message: "This will commit the seating chart to the database. Continue?", 
              onConfirm: handleFinalize 
            })}
            disabled={processing}
            size="lg"
            className="max-w-sm w-full flex items-center gap-3 py-7 text-lg font-medium rounded-lg shadow-md hover:shadow-lg transition-all">
            {processing ? (
              <>
                <Loader2 className="w-6 h-6 animate-spin" />
                <span>Finalizing...</span>
              </>
            ) : (
              <>
                <Rocket className="w-6 h-6" />
                <span>Finalize Seating Chart</span>
              </>
            )}
          </Button>

          <div className="mt-8">
            <Button 
              disabled={downloading} 
              variant="outline"
              onClick={downloadTimetable} 
              className="flex items-center gap-2"
            >
              {downloading ? (
                <>
                  <Loader2 className="w-4 h-4 animate-spin" />
                  <span>Downloading...</span>
                </>
              ) : (
                <>
                  <Download className="w-4 h-4" />
                  <span>Download Timetable JSON</span>
                </>
              )}
            </Button>
          </div>
        </div>

        {error && (
          <Alert variant="destructive" className="mt-4">
            <AlertCircle className="h-5 w-5" />
            <AlertTitle>Error</AlertTitle>
            <AlertDescription>{error}</AlertDescription>
          </Alert>
        )}
      </CardContent>
    </Card>
  )
}

interface FileUploaderProps {
  isDragActive: boolean;
  file: File | null;
  uploading: boolean;
  uploadProgress: number;
  clearFile: () => void;
  getRootProps: () => Record<string, unknown>;
  getInputProps: () => Record<string, unknown>;
  nextInstitute: Institute;
}

// File uploader component
const FileUploader = ({ 
  isDragActive, 
  file, 
  uploading, 
  uploadProgress, 
  clearFile, 
  getRootProps, 
  getInputProps, 
  nextInstitute 
}: FileUploaderProps) => (
  <div className="space-y-6">
    <div className="flex items-center gap-3 mb-2">
      <Badge variant="outline" className="text-sm px-3 py-1 bg-primary/10">
        {nextInstitute.CODE}
      </Badge>
      <h3 className="text-xl font-medium">
        {nextInstitute.NAME}
      </h3>
    </div>
    
    <div
      {...getRootProps()}
      className={cn(
        "border-2 border-dashed rounded-xl p-10 text-center cursor-pointer transition-all",
        isDragActive
          ? "border-primary/70 bg-primary/5 shadow-inner"
          : "border-muted-foreground/20 hover:border-muted-foreground/40 hover:bg-muted/5",
        uploading && "pointer-events-none opacity-60",
        file && "bg-green-50/50 border-green-200"
      )}
    >
      <input {...getInputProps()} accept=".xlsx, .xls" />
      {file ? (
        <div className="flex flex-col items-center justify-center space-y-3">
          <div className="bg-green-100 text-green-700 p-3 rounded-full">
            <FileSpreadsheet className="w-8 h-8" />
          </div>
          <div className="flex items-center space-x-2">
            <span className="text-gray-700 font-medium">{file.name}</span>
            <button
              onClick={(e) => {
                e.stopPropagation()
                clearFile()
              }}
              className="p-1 hover:bg-gray-100 rounded-full"
              disabled={uploading}
              aria-label="Remove file"
            >
              <X className="w-5 h-5 text-gray-500" />
            </button>
          </div>
          <span className="text-sm text-gray-500">
            {(file.size / 1024 / 1024).toFixed(2)} MB
          </span>
        </div>
      ) : (
        <div className="space-y-4">
          <div className={cn(
            "p-3 rounded-full mx-auto inline-flex transition-colors",
            isDragActive ? "bg-primary/10" : "bg-muted"
          )}>
            <FileUp className={cn(
              "w-10 h-10 transition-colors",
              isDragActive ? "text-primary" : "text-muted-foreground/60"
            )} />
          </div>
          <div className="space-y-2">
            <p className="text-lg font-medium text-gray-700">
              {isDragActive ? "Drop to upload Excel file" : "Upload seating chart"}
            </p>
            <p className="text-sm text-gray-500 max-w-md mx-auto">
              Drag and drop your Excel file here, or click to browse
            </p>
          </div>
        </div>
      )}
    </div>
    
    {uploading && (
      <div className="mt-4 space-y-2">
        <Progress value={uploadProgress} className="h-2" />
        <p className="text-sm text-gray-500 text-center">
          Uploading: {uploadProgress}%
        </p>
      </div>
    )}
  </div>
)

// Main component
export default function SeatingChart() {
  const ec_code = useEcCode()
  const FILE_PREFIX = `ec_${ec_code}_sc_`
  const { connectedInstitutes, loading: examCenterLoading, error: examCenterError } = useExamCenter(ec_code)
  
  const [files, setFiles] = useState<string[]>([])
  const [file, setFile] = useState<File | null>(null)
  const [uploading, setUploading] = useState(false)
  const [uploadProgress, setUploadProgress] = useState(0)
  const [isDragActive, setIsDragActive] = useState(false)
  const [confirmDialog, setConfirmDialog] = useState<ConfirmDialogProps | null>(null)
  const [currentInstituteIndex, setCurrentInstituteIndex] = useState(0)
  const [filesLoaded, setFilesLoaded] = useState(false)
  const [dataError, setDataError] = useState<string | null>(null)
  const [finalFileExists, setFinalFileExists] = useState(false)
  const [processing, setProcessing] = useState(false)
  const [error, setError] = useState<string | null>(null)

  const { getRootProps, getInputProps } = useDropzone({
    onDrop: (acceptedFiles) => onDrop(acceptedFiles),
    onDragEnter: () => setIsDragActive(true),
    onDragLeave: () => setIsDragActive(false),
    maxSize: 10485760, // 10MB
  })

  // Clear file and reset states
  const clearFile = useCallback(() => {
    setFile(null)
    setError(null)
    setUploadProgress(0)
  }, [])

  // Validate Excel file type
  const validateExcelFile = useCallback((file: File) => {
    const validTypes = ['application/vnd.ms-excel', 'application/vnd.openxmlformats-officedocument.spreadsheetml.sheet']
    if (!validTypes.includes(file.type)) {
      toast.error('Please upload a valid Excel file (.xlsx or .xls)')
      return false
    }
    return true
  }, [])

  // Handle file drop
  const onDrop = useCallback(
    async (acceptedFiles: File[]) => {
      if (acceptedFiles.length === 0) return
      
      const uploadedFile = acceptedFiles[0]
      
      if (uploadedFile.size > 10485760) { // 10MB
        toast.error("File size exceeds the 10MB limit")
        return
      }
      
      try {
        validateExcelFile(uploadedFile)
        await validateExcelColumns(uploadedFile, "seatingchart")
        setFile(uploadedFile)
        toast.info("File ready for upload")
      } catch (error) {
        if (error instanceof Error) {
          toast.error(error.message)
        }
        clearFile()
      }
    },
    [validateExcelFile, clearFile]
  )

  // Initialize by fetching files
  const fetchFiles = useCallback(async () => {
    try {
      setFilesLoaded(false)
      const response = await fetch(`${API_BASE_URL}/api/files/list`)
      if (!response.ok) throw new Error('Failed to fetch files')
      const data = await response.json()
      setFiles(data)
      setFilesLoaded(true)
      setDataError(null)
      
      const finalFileName = `ec_${ec_code}_final`
      const finalFileExists = data.some((file: string) => file.includes(finalFileName))
      setFinalFileExists(finalFileExists)
    } catch (error) {
      console.error('Error fetching files:', error)
      setDataError('Failed to load file list. Please try again.')
      setFilesLoaded(true)
    }
  }, [ec_code])

  // Initialize on component mount
  useEffect(() => {
    fetchFiles()
  }, [fetchFiles])

  // File download handler
  const handleDownload = async (filename: string) => {
    try {
      const response = await axios.get(`${API_BASE_URL}/api/files/download/${filename}`, { 
        responseType: "blob" 
      })
      const url = window.URL.createObjectURL(new Blob([response.data]))
      const link = document.createElement("a")
      link.href = url
      link.setAttribute("download", filename)
      document.body.appendChild(link)
      link.click()
      document.body.removeChild(link)
      URL.revokeObjectURL(url)
      toast.success("File downloaded successfully!")
    } catch {
      toast.error("Failed to download file.")
    }
  }

  // File delete handler
  const handleDelete = async (filename: string) => {
    try {
      await axios.delete(`${API_BASE_URL}/api/files/delete/${filename}`)
      toast.success("File deleted successfully!")
      await fetchFiles()
    } catch {
      toast.error("Failed to delete file.")
    }
  }

  // Process all files to create final file
  const handleProcessFiles = async () => {
    try {
      setProcessing(true)
      const response = await axios.post(`${API_BASE_URL}/api/seatingchart/process/${ec_code}`)
      if (response.status === 200) {
        toast.success("Files processed successfully!")
        await fetchFiles()
      } else {
        throw new Error("Failed to process files.")
      }
    } catch{
      toast.error("Failed to process files. Please try again.")
    } finally {
      setProcessing(false)
    }
  }

  // Upload file function
  const uploadFile = async () => {
    if (!file || currentInstituteIndex >= connectedInstitutes.length) return
    
    const institute = connectedInstitutes[currentInstituteIndex]
    const customName = `${FILE_PREFIX}${institute.CODE}`
    
    setUploading(true)
    const formData = new FormData()
    formData.append("file", file)
    
    try {
      const response = await axios.post(
        `${API_BASE_URL}/api/files/upload?name=${customName}`, 
        formData, 
        {
          headers: { "Content-Type": "multipart/form-data" },
          onUploadProgress: (progressEvent) => {
            const percentCompleted = Math.round(
              (progressEvent.loaded * 100) / (progressEvent.total || 1)
            )
            setUploadProgress(percentCompleted)
          },
        }
      )
      
      if (response.data) {
        toast.success(`File uploaded successfully for ${institute.CODE}!`)
        await fetchFiles()
        setFile(null)
        setCurrentInstituteIndex((prevIndex) => prevIndex + 1)
      }
    } catch {
      toast.error("Failed to upload file. Please try again.")
    } finally {
      setUploading(false)
      setUploadProgress(0)
    }
  }

  // Check if all files are ready for processing
  const allFilesReady = useMemo(() => {
    if (!filesLoaded || examCenterLoading) return false
    if (connectedInstitutes.length === 0) return false
    
    const fileCodes = files.map((file) => {
      const withoutPrefix = file.replace(FILE_PREFIX, "")
      const withoutExtension = withoutPrefix.split(".")[0]
      return withoutExtension
    })
    
    return connectedInstitutes.every((institute) => fileCodes.includes(institute.CODE))
  }, [filesLoaded, examCenterLoading, connectedInstitutes, files, FILE_PREFIX])

  // Get next institute that needs file upload
  const getNextInstitute = useCallback(() => {
    if (!connectedInstitutes || connectedInstitutes.length === 0) return null
    
    for (let i = currentInstituteIndex; i < connectedInstitutes.length; i++) {
      const instituteCode = connectedInstitutes[i].CODE
      const filePattern = `${FILE_PREFIX}${instituteCode}`
      
      if (!files.some(file => file.includes(filePattern))) {
        return connectedInstitutes[i]
      }
    }
    return null
  }, [currentInstituteIndex, connectedInstitutes, files, FILE_PREFIX])

  const nextInstitute = getNextInstitute()
  
  // Calculate upload progress percentage
  const uploadPercentage = useMemo(() => {
    if (!connectedInstitutes.length) return 0
    const uploadedCount = connectedInstitutes.filter(institute => 
      files.some(file => file.includes(`${FILE_PREFIX}${institute.CODE}`))
    ).length
    return Math.round((uploadedCount / connectedInstitutes.length) * 100)
  }, [connectedInstitutes, files, FILE_PREFIX])

  // Filter files related to this exam center
  const filteredFiles = useMemo(() => {
    return files.filter(file => 
      file.includes(FILE_PREFIX) || file.includes(`ec_${ec_code}_final`)
    )
  }, [files, FILE_PREFIX, ec_code])

  // Important notes about file upload
  const renderImportantNotes = () => (
    <Alert variant="default" className="mt-8 bg-muted/50 border">
      <Info className="h-5 w-5" />
      <AlertTitle>Important Notes</AlertTitle>
      <AlertDescription>
        <div className="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 gap-x-8 gap-y-2 mt-2">
          {[
            "Maximum file size: 10MB",
            "Supported formats: .xlsx, .xls",
            "Remove merged cells before uploading",
            "Each row represents one examinee",
            "Ensure column headers are consistent",
            "Upload files for each institute separately",
            "Review final file before finalizing",
            "Files will be processed as a batch"
          ].map((note, i) => (
            <div key={i} className="flex items-center gap-2">
              <div className="h-1.5 w-1.5 rounded-full bg-gray-500"></div>
              <span>{note}</span>
            </div>
          ))}
        </div>
      </AlertDescription>
    </Alert>
  )

  return (
    <div className="max-w-5xl mx-auto p-6 space-y-8">
      <div className="space-y-2">
        <div className="flex items-center justify-between">
          <h2 className="text-3xl font-bold tracking-tight">Seating Chart Management</h2>
          {!finalFileExists && !examCenterLoading && connectedInstitutes.length > 0 && (
            <Badge variant="outline" className="px-3 py-1">
              Progress: {uploadPercentage}%
            </Badge>
          )}
        </div>
        <p className="text-muted-foreground">
          {finalFileExists
            ? "Finalize the seating chart and attach it to the application."
            : "Upload your seating chart Excel files for each institute."}
        </p>
      </div>
      
      <Separator className="my-6" />
      
      {finalFileExists ? (
        <FinalizationComponent
          ec_code={ec_code}
          onRefresh={fetchFiles}
          handleDownload={handleDownload}
          handleDelete={handleDelete}
          setConfirmDialog={setConfirmDialog}
        />
      ) : (
        <>
          {dataError && (
            <Alert variant="destructive" className="mb-6">
              <AlertCircle className="h-5 w-5" />
              <AlertTitle>Error</AlertTitle>
              <AlertDescription className="flex items-center">
                {dataError}
                <Button variant="link" onClick={fetchFiles} className="ml-2 p-0 h-auto">
                  Retry
                </Button>
              </AlertDescription>
            </Alert>
          )}
          
          {examCenterError && (
            <Alert variant="destructive" className="mb-6">
              <AlertCircle className="h-5 w-5" />
              <AlertTitle>Error</AlertTitle>
              <AlertDescription>Failed to load institute data.</AlertDescription>
            </Alert>
          )}
          
          {!dataError && !filesLoaded && (
            <div className="flex justify-center py-12">
              <div className="flex flex-col items-center gap-3">
                <Loader2 className="w-10 h-10 animate-spin text-primary" />
                <p className="text-muted-foreground">Loading files...</p>
              </div>
            </div>
          )}
          
          {!dataError && filesLoaded && (
            <div className="space-y-10">
              {filteredFiles.length > 0 && (
                <Card>
                  <CardHeader className="pb-3">
                    <CardTitle>Uploaded Files</CardTitle>
                    <CardDescription>
                      Manage your uploaded seating chart files
                    </CardDescription>
                  </CardHeader>
                  <CardContent>
                    <Table>
                      <TableHeader>
                        <TableRow className="hover:bg-muted/50">
                          <TableHead>File Name</TableHead>
                          <TableHead>Actions</TableHead>
                        </TableRow>
                      </TableHeader>
                      <TableBody>
                        {filteredFiles.map((file, index) => (
                          <TableRow key={index} className="hover:bg-muted/50">
                            <TableCell className="font-medium flex items-center gap-2">
                              <FileSpreadsheet className="w-4 h-4 text-primary" />
                              {file}
                            </TableCell>
                            <TableCell>
                              <div className="flex flex-wrap gap-3">
                                <Button size="sm" variant="outline" onClick={() => handleDownload(file)}>
                                  <Download className="w-4 h-4 mr-2" /> Download
                                </Button>
                                <Button
                                  size="sm"
                                  variant="destructive"
                                  onClick={() => {
                                    setConfirmDialog({
                                      type: "error",
                                      message: `Are you sure you want to delete "${file}"?`,
                                      onConfirm: () => handleDelete(file),
                                    })
                                  }}
                                >
                                  <Trash2 className="w-4 h-4 mr-2" /> Delete
                                </Button>
                              </div>
                            </TableCell>
                          </TableRow>
                        ))}
                      </TableBody>
                    </Table>
                  </CardContent>
                </Card>
              )}
              
              {!examCenterLoading && connectedInstitutes.length === 0 && (
                <Alert className="mt-8">
                  <AlertCircle className="h-5 w-5" />
                  <AlertTitle>No Institutes Found</AlertTitle>
                  <AlertDescription>
                    No institutes are connected to this exam center. Please check your configuration.
                  </AlertDescription>
                </Alert>
              )}
              
              {!examCenterLoading && allFilesReady && (
                <Card className="border-t-4 border-t-green-400 shadow-md">
                  <CardHeader>
                    <CardTitle>Files Ready</CardTitle>
                    <CardDescription>
                      All institute files have been uploaded successfully
                    </CardDescription>
                  </CardHeader>
                  <CardContent className="flex justify-center">
                    <Button 
                      onClick={() => {
                        setConfirmDialog({
                          type: "success",
                          message: "This will combine all files into a final seating chart. Continue?",
                          onConfirm: handleProcessFiles,
                        })
                      }} 
                      size="lg" 
                      disabled={processing}
                      className="px-8 py-6 text-lg font-medium"
                    >
                      {processing ? (
                        <>
                          <Loader2 className="w-5 h-5 mr-3 animate-spin" />
                          Processing...
                        </>
                      ) : (
                        <> 
                          Process All Files 
                          <ChevronsRight className="w-5 h-5 ml-2" /> 
                        </>
                      )}
                    </Button>
                  </CardContent>
                </Card>
              )}
              
              {!examCenterLoading && !allFilesReady && nextInstitute && (
                <Card className="shadow-md">
                  <CardHeader className="pb-3">
                    <CardTitle>File Upload</CardTitle>
                    <CardDescription>
                      Upload seating chart for each institute
                    </CardDescription>
                  </CardHeader>
                  <CardContent>
                    <FileUploader
                      isDragActive={isDragActive}
                      file={file}
                      uploading={uploading}
                      uploadProgress={uploadProgress}
                      clearFile={clearFile}
                      getRootProps={getRootProps}
                      getInputProps={getInputProps}
                      nextInstitute={nextInstitute}
                    />
                    
                    <div className="mt-6 flex justify-end">
                      <Button
                        onClick={() => {
                          setConfirmDialog({
                            type: "info",
                            message: `Upload file for ${nextInstitute.NAME} (${nextInstitute.CODE})?`,
                            onConfirm: uploadFile,
                          })
                        }}
                        disabled={!file || uploading}
                        className="min-w-32"
                      >
                        {uploading ? (
                          <>
                            <Loader2 className="w-4 h-4 mr-2 animate-spin" />
                            Uploading...
                          </>
                        ) : (
                          <>
                            <FileUp className="w-4 h-4 mr-2" />
                            Upload for {nextInstitute.CODE}
                          </>
                        )}
                      </Button>
                    </div>
                  </CardContent>
                </Card>
              )}
            </div>
          )}
        </>
      )}
      
      {error && (
        <Alert variant="destructive" className="mt-8">
          <AlertCircle className="h-5 w-5" />
          <AlertTitle>Error</AlertTitle>
          <AlertDescription>{error}</AlertDescription>
        </Alert>
      )}
      
      {!finalFileExists && renderImportantNotes()}
      
      {confirmDialog && (
        <ConfirmationDialog
          type={confirmDialog.type}
          message={confirmDialog.message}
          onConfirm={confirmDialog.onConfirm}
          onCancel={() => setConfirmDialog(null)}
        />
      )}
    </div>
  )
}


</modules/configs/seatingchart.tsx>

<hooks/useRelievers.ts>
import { useState, useEffect, useCallback } from 'react';
import { toast } from 'react-toastify';
import 'react-toastify/dist/ReactToastify.css';

interface Reliever {
  ID: number;
  UID: string;
  NAME: string;
  DEPARTMENT: string;
  ROLE: string;
  EMAIL: string;
}

const useRelievers = (ecCode: string) => {
  const [relievers, setRelievers] = useState<Reliever[]>([]);
  const [loading, setLoading] = useState<boolean>(true);
  const [error, setError] = useState<string | null>(null);
  const base_url = '/api/relievers';

  const fetchRelievers = useCallback(async () => {
    setLoading(true);
    setError(null);
    try {
      const response = await fetch(`${base_url}`);
      if (!response.ok) throw new Error('Failed to fetch relievers');
      const data = await response.json();
      setRelievers(data);
    } catch (err) {
      setError('Error fetching relievers. ' + err);
      toast.error('Error fetching relievers. Please try again.');
    } finally {
      setLoading(false);
    }
  }, []);

  useEffect(() => {
    if (ecCode) fetchRelievers();
  }, [ecCode, fetchRelievers]);

  const createReliever = async (form: Omit<Reliever, 'ID'>) => {
    try {
      const response = await fetch(`${base_url}`, {
        method: 'POST',
        headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
        body: JSON.stringify(form),
      });
      if (!response.ok) {
        const errorData = await response.json();
        throw new Error(errorData.detail || 'Failed to create reliever');
      }
      await fetchRelievers();
      toast.success('Reliever created successfully!');
    } catch (err) {
      toast.error(err instanceof Error ? err.message : 'Error creating reliever. Please try again.');
    }
  };

  const updateReliever = async (uid: string, updates: Partial<Reliever>) => {
    try {
      const response = await fetch(`${base_url}?&uid=${uid}`, {
        method: 'PUT',
        headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
        body: JSON.stringify(updates),
      });
      if (!response.ok) throw new Error('Failed to update reliever');
      await fetchRelievers();
      toast.success('Reliever updated successfully!');
    } catch (err) {
      toast.error('Error updating reliever. Please try again.' + err);
    }
  };

  const deleteReliever = async (uid: string) => {
    try {
      const response = await fetch(`${base_url}?&uid=${uid}`, { method: 'DELETE' });
      if (!response.ok) throw new Error('Failed to delete reliever');
      await fetchRelievers();
      toast.success('Reliever deleted successfully!');
    } catch (err) {
      toast.error('Error deleting reliever.'+err);
    }
  };

  return { relievers, loading, error, createReliever, updateReliever, deleteReliever };
}; 


export default useRelievers;
</hooks/useRelievers.ts>

<hooks/useToggleSidebar.tsx>
// src/hooks/useSidebarToggle.tsx
"use client"

import { useState } from "react"

export const useSidebarToggle = () => {
  const [isSidebarVisible, setSidebarVisible] = useState(false)

  const toggleSidebar = () => {
    setSidebarVisible((prev) => !prev)
  }

  return { isSidebarVisible, toggleSidebar }
}

</hooks/useToggleSidebar.tsx>

<hooks/useSupervisors.ts>
import { useState, useEffect, useCallback } from 'react';
import { toast } from 'react-toastify';
import 'react-toastify/dist/ReactToastify.css';

interface Supervisor {
  ID: number;
  UID: string;
  NAME: string;
  DEPARTMENT: string;
  ROLE: string;
  EMAIL: string;
}

const useSupervisors = (ecCode: string) => {
  const [supervisors, setSupervisors] = useState<Supervisor[]>([]);
  const [loading, setLoading] = useState<boolean>(true);
  const [error, setError] = useState<string | null>(null);
  const base_url = '/api/supervisors';

  const fetchSupervisors = useCallback(async () => {
    setLoading(true);
    setError(null);
    try {
      const response = await fetch(`${base_url}`);
      if (!response.ok) throw new Error('Failed to fetch supervisors');
      const data = await response.json();
      setSupervisors(data);
    } catch (err) {
      setError('Error fetching supervisors. ' + err);
      toast.error('Error fetching supervisors. Please try again.');
    } finally {
      setLoading(false);
    }
  }, []);

  useEffect(() => {
    if (ecCode) fetchSupervisors();
  }, [ecCode, fetchSupervisors]);

  const createSupervisor = async (form: Omit<Supervisor, 'ID'>) => {
    try {
      const response = await fetch(`${base_url}`, {
        method: 'POST',
        headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
        body: JSON.stringify(form),
      });
      if (!response.ok) {
        const errorData = await response.json();
        throw new Error(errorData.detail || 'Failed to create supervisor');
      }
      await fetchSupervisors();
      toast.success('Supervisor created successfully!');
    } catch (err) {
      toast.error(err instanceof Error ? err.message : 'Error creating supervisor. Please try again.');
    }
  };

  const updateSupervisor = async (uid: string, updates: Partial<Supervisor>) => {
    try {
      const response = await fetch(`${base_url}?&uid=${uid}`, {
        method: 'PUT',
        headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
        body: JSON.stringify(updates),
      });
      if (!response.ok) throw new Error('Failed to update supervisor');
      await fetchSupervisors();
      toast.success('Supervisor updated successfully!');
    } catch (err) {
      toast.error('Error updating supervisor. Please try again.' + err);
    }
  };

  const deleteSupervisor = async (uid: string) => {

    try {
      const response = await fetch(`${base_url}?&uid=${uid}`, { method: 'DELETE' });
      if (!response.ok) throw new Error('Failed to delete supervisor');
      await fetchSupervisors();
      toast.success('Supervisor deleted successfully!');
    } catch (err) {
      toast.error('Error deleting supervisor.'+err);
    }

  };

  return { supervisors, loading, error, createSupervisor, updateSupervisor, deleteSupervisor };
};

export default useSupervisors;
</hooks/useSupervisors.ts>

<hooks/useExamCenter.tsx>
import { useState, useEffect } from 'react';
import axios, { AxiosError } from 'axios';
import { toast } from 'react-toastify';
import courseCodes from '@/config/course_codes.json';

interface ExamCenterInfo {
  NAME: string;
  ADDRESS: string;
  OFFICER_INCHARGE: string;
  SEALING_SUPERVISOR: string;
}

interface ExamInfo {
  SEASON: 'SUMMER' | 'WINTER';
  START_DATE: string;
  END_DATE: string;
  YEAR: string;
}

interface DistributionCenterInfo {
  CODE: string;
  NAME: string;
}

interface Institute {
  CODE: string;
  NAME: string;
}

interface ExamCenter {
  EC_CODE: string;
  EC_INFO: ExamCenterInfo;
  CON_INST: Institute[];
  EXAM_INFO: ExamInfo;
  DC_INFO: DistributionCenterInfo;
  DEPARTMENTS: Department[];
}

interface Department {
  code: string;
  name: string;
}

type CourseCode = keyof typeof courseCodes;

const departmentMap = new Map(Object.entries(courseCodes).map(([code, name]) => [code, { code, name }]));

export const useExamCenter = (eccode: string) => {

  const CACHE_KEY = 'EC_DATA_' + eccode;
  const [examCenter, setExamCenter] = useState<ExamCenter>({
    EC_CODE: eccode,
    EC_INFO: { NAME: "", ADDRESS: "", OFFICER_INCHARGE: "", SEALING_SUPERVISOR: "" },
    CON_INST: [],
    EXAM_INFO: { SEASON: "SUMMER", START_DATE: "", END_DATE: "", YEAR: "" },
    DC_INFO: { CODE: "", NAME: "" },
    DEPARTMENTS: [],
  });

  const [season, setSeason] = useState<'SUMMER' | 'WINTER'>('SUMMER');
  const [instituteCode, setInstituteCode] = useState<string>('');
  const [instituteName, setInstituteName] = useState<string>('');
  const [loading, setLoading] = useState<boolean>(true);
  const [instituteLoading, setInstituteLoading] = useState<boolean>(false);
  const [connectedInstitutes, setConnectedInstitutes] = useState<Institute[]>([]);
  const [departments, setDepartments] = useState<Department[]>([]);
  const [error, setError] = useState<string | null>(null);
  const [submitting, setSubmitting] = useState<boolean>(false);


  useEffect(() => {
    const fetchExamCenter = async () => {
      try {
        // Check if data exists in localStorage
        const cachedData = localStorage.getItem(CACHE_KEY);
        if (cachedData) {
          const parsedData = JSON.parse(cachedData);
          setExamCenter(parsedData);
          setSeason(parsedData.EXAM_INFO.SEASON);
          setConnectedInstitutes(parsedData.CON_INST);
          setDepartments(parsedData.DEPARTMENTS);
          setLoading(false);
          return;
        }

        // Fetch data from API if not in cache
        const response = await axios.get<ExamCenter[]>(`/api/exam-center`);
        if (response.data.length > 0) {
          const centerData = response.data[0];
          setExamCenter(centerData);
          setSeason(centerData.EXAM_INFO.SEASON);
          setConnectedInstitutes(centerData.CON_INST);
          setDepartments(centerData.DEPARTMENTS);

          // Cache the data in localStorage
          localStorage.setItem(CACHE_KEY, JSON.stringify(centerData));
        } else {
          throw new Error('Exam center not found');
        }
      } catch (error) {
        if (error instanceof AxiosError && error.response?.status === 418) {
          await axios.post(`/api/exam-center`,
            { EC_CODE: eccode, EC_INFO: {}, CON_INST: [], EXAM_INFO: {}, DC_INFO: {}, DEPARTMENTS: [] }
          )

        } else {
          setError('Failed to fetch: ' + error);
          toast.error('Failed to fetch exam center data');
        }
      } finally {
        setLoading(false);
      }
    };

    if (eccode) {
      fetchExamCenter();
    }
  }, [eccode, CACHE_KEY]);

  const fetchInstituteInfo = async () => {
    if (!instituteCode) {
      setError('Please enter an institute code');
      toast.error('Please enter an institute code');
      return;
    }

    setInstituteLoading(true);
    try {
      const response = await axios.get<Institute>(`/api/inst-info?code=${instituteCode}`);
      setInstituteName(response.data.NAME);
      setConnectedInstitutes(prev => [...prev, response.data]);
      setError(null);
      toast.success('Institute fetched successfully');

      // Update cached data with new institute
      const cachedData = localStorage.getItem(CACHE_KEY);
      if (cachedData) {
        const parsedData = JSON.parse(cachedData);
        parsedData.CON_INST = [...parsedData.CON_INST, response.data];
        localStorage.setItem(CACHE_KEY, JSON.stringify(parsedData));
      }
    } catch (error) {
      setError('Failed to fetch: ' + error);
      toast.error('Failed to fetch institute data');
    } finally {
      setInstituteLoading(false);
    }
  };

  const handleSubmit = async () => {
    if (!examCenter) return;

    const updatedExamCenter: ExamCenter = {
      ...examCenter,
      CON_INST: connectedInstitutes,
      EXAM_INFO: { ...examCenter.EXAM_INFO, SEASON: season },
    };

    try {
      setSubmitting(true)
      await axios.put(`/api/exam-center`, updatedExamCenter);
      setInstituteCode('');
      setInstituteName('');
      toast.success('Exam center updated successfully');
      setError(null);

      // Update cached data
      localStorage.setItem(CACHE_KEY, JSON.stringify(updatedExamCenter));
    } catch (error) {
      setError('Failed to update: ' + error);
      toast.error('Failed to update exam center data');
    }
    finally { setSubmitting(false) }
  };

  const disconnectInstitute = (code: string) => {
    setConnectedInstitutes(prev => prev.filter(inst => inst.CODE !== code));
    toast.success('Institute disconnected successfully');

    // Update cached data
    const cachedData = localStorage.getItem(CACHE_KEY);
    if (cachedData) {
      const parsedData = JSON.parse(cachedData);
      parsedData.CON_INST = parsedData.CON_INST.filter((inst: Institute) => inst.CODE !== code);
      localStorage.setItem(CACHE_KEY, JSON.stringify(parsedData));
    }
  };

  const updateInstituteName = (code: string, newName: string) => {
    setConnectedInstitutes(prev =>
      prev.map(inst => (inst.CODE === code ? { ...inst, NAME: newName } : inst))
    );
    toast.success('Institute name updated successfully');

    // Update cached data
    const cachedData = localStorage.getItem(CACHE_KEY);
    if (cachedData) {
      const parsedData = JSON.parse(cachedData);
      parsedData.CON_INST = parsedData.CON_INST.map((inst: Institute) =>
        inst.CODE === code ? { ...inst, NAME: newName } : inst
      );
      localStorage.setItem(CACHE_KEY, JSON.stringify(parsedData));
    }
  };


  const getExamCenterCode = () => examCenter?.EC_CODE ?? "";
  const getExamCenterInfo = () => examCenter?.EC_INFO ?? { NAME: "", ADDRESS: "", OFFICER_INCHARGE: "", SEALING_SUPERVISOR: "" };
  const getExamSeason = () => examCenter?.EXAM_INFO?.SEASON ?? "SUMMER";
  const getExamYear = () => examCenter?.EXAM_INFO?.YEAR ?? new Date().getFullYear();
  const getExamStartDate = () => examCenter?.EXAM_INFO?.START_DATE ?? "";
  const getExamEndDate = () => examCenter?.EXAM_INFO?.END_DATE ?? "";
  const getConnectedInstitutes = () => examCenter?.CON_INST ?? [];
  const getDistributionCenterInfo = () => examCenter?.DC_INFO ?? { CODE: "", NAME: "" };
  const getDepartments = () => examCenter?.DEPARTMENTS ?? [];
  const getDepartmentByCode = (code: string) => departmentMap.get(code as CourseCode) ?? { code: "", name: "" };
  const getConnectedInstituteNameByCode = (code: string) =>
    examCenter?.CON_INST?.find(inst => inst.CODE === code)?.NAME ?? "";

  return {
    examCenter,
    season,
    instituteCode,
    instituteName,
    loading,
    submitting,
    instituteLoading,
    connectedInstitutes,
    error,
    departments,
    setExamCenter,
    setSeason,
    setInstituteCode,
    setSubmitting,
    fetchInstituteInfo,
    handleSubmit,
    disconnectInstitute,
    updateInstituteName,
    getExamCenterCode,
    getExamCenterInfo,
    getExamSeason,
    getExamStartDate,
    getExamEndDate,
    getConnectedInstitutes,
    getDistributionCenterInfo,
    getDepartments,
    getConnectedInstituteNameByCode,
    getDepartmentByCode,
    getExamYear
  };
};
</hooks/useExamCenter.tsx>

<hooks/useFiles.ts>
import { useState, useCallback } from "react";
import axios from "axios";
import { toast } from "react-toastify";

export const useFiles = () => {
    const [files, setFiles] = useState<string[]>([]);
    const [isLoading, setIsLoading] = useState(false);
    const [error, setError] = useState<string | null>(null);

    const fetchFiles = useCallback(async () => {
        setIsLoading(true);
        setError(null);
        try {
            const response = await axios.get("/api/files");
            setFiles(response.data.files || []);
        } catch (error) {
            setError("Failed to fetch files." + error);
            toast.error("Failed to fetch files.");
        } finally {
            setIsLoading(false);
        }
    }, []);

    const uploadFile = useCallback(async (file: File, customName?: string) => {
        setIsLoading(true);
        setError(null);
        const formData = new FormData();
        formData.append("file", file);
        if (customName) {
            formData.append("customName", customName);
        }

        try {
            const response = await axios.post("/api/files", formData, {
                headers: { "Content-Type": "multipart/form-data" },
            });

            if (response.status === 200) {
                toast.success("File uploaded successfully!");
                await fetchFiles();
            }
        } catch (error) {
            setError("Failed to upload file." + error);
            toast.error("Failed to upload file.");
        } finally {
            setIsLoading(false);
        }
    }, [fetchFiles]);

    const downloadFile = useCallback(async (fileName: string) => {
        try {
            const response = await axios.get(`/api/files/?filename=${fileName}`, {
                responseType: "blob", 
            });
    
            // Create a URL for the blob and trigger a download
            const url = window.URL.createObjectURL(new Blob([response.data]));
            const link = document.createElement("a");
            link.href = url;

            link.setAttribute("download", fileName);
            document.body.appendChild(link);
            link.click();
            link.remove();
    
            toast.success("File downloaded successfully!");
        } catch (error) {
            toast.error("Failed to download file.");
            console.error("Download error:", error);
        }
    }, []);

    const deleteFile = useCallback(async (filename: string) => {
        // if (!window.confirm("Are you sure you want to delete this file?")) return;

        try {
            await axios.delete(`/api/files/?filename=${filename}`);
            toast.success("File deleted successfully!");
            await fetchFiles();
        } catch (error) {
            setError("Failed to delete file." + error);
            toast.error("Failed to delete file.");
        }
    }, [fetchFiles]);

    return {
        files,
        isLoading,
        error,
        fetchFiles,
        uploadFile,
        downloadFile,
        deleteFile,
    };
};
</hooks/useFiles.ts>

<hooks/useTableExists.ts>
"use client";

import { useState, useEffect } from "react";
import { useEcCode } from "@/lib/helper";

// Define table keys as a union type
type TableKey =
    | "BLOCK_DETAILS"
    | "SUPERVISOR"
    | "SUPERVISION_ORDER"
    | "RELIEVER"
    | "RELIEVER_ORDER"
    | "CONTROL_ROOM"
    | "TIMETABLE"
    | "SEATING_CHART"
    | "EMARKSHEET"
    | "INVENTORY"
    | "BLOCK_CONFIG";


export function useTableExists() {
    const ecCode = useEcCode();
    const [tableStatus, setTableStatus] = useState<Record<TableKey, boolean | null>>({
         BLOCK_DETAILS: null,
            SUPERVISOR: null,
            RELIEVER: null,
            CONTROL_ROOM: null,
            TIMETABLE: null,
            SEATING_CHART: null,
            EMARKSHEET: null,
            INVENTORY: null,
            BLOCK_CONFIG: null,
            SUPERVISION_ORDER: null,
            RELIEVER_ORDER: null,
    });
    const [loading, setLoading] = useState(false);
    const [error, setError] = useState<string | null>(null);

    const fetchTableStatus = async (code: string) => {
        try {
            if (!code) throw new Error("EC_CODE is required.");
            setLoading(true);
            const response = await fetch(`/api/profile?action=table`, {
                method: "GET",
                headers: {
                    "Content-Type": "application/json",
                },
            });

        
            if (!response.ok) {
                const errorText = await response.text();
                throw new Error(`Failed to fetch table status: ${response.statusText} - ${errorText}`);
            }

            const data = await response.json();
          
            setTableStatus(data);
            setError(null);
        } catch (err: unknown) {  // Changed from any to unknown
            console.error("Error fetching table status:", err);
            setError(err instanceof Error ? err.message : "Failed to fetch table status.");
        } finally {
            setLoading(false);
        }
    };

    useEffect(() => {
        if (ecCode) {
            fetchTableStatus(ecCode);
        }
    }, [ecCode]);

    const checkTable = (tableKey: TableKey) => {
        return tableStatus[tableKey] ?? false;
    };

    return {
        tableStatus,
        loading,
        error,
       
        checkBlockDetailsTable: () => checkTable("BLOCK_DETAILS"),
        checkSupervisorTable: () => checkTable("SUPERVISOR"),
        checkSupervisionOrderTable: () => checkTable("SUPERVISION_ORDER"),
        checkControlRoomTable: () => checkTable("CONTROL_ROOM"),
        checkTimetableTable: () => checkTable("TIMETABLE"),
        checkSeatingChartTable: () => checkTable("SEATING_CHART"),
        checkEmarksheetTable: () => checkTable("EMARKSHEET"),
        checkInventoryTable: () => checkTable("INVENTORY"),
        checkBlockConfigTable: () => checkTable("BLOCK_CONFIG"),
        getAllTableStatus: () => tableStatus,
    };
}
</hooks/useTableExists.ts>
